authors_text: Hyungjin Chung,Eun Sun Lee,Jong Chul Ye
title: MR Image Denoising and Super-Resolution Using Regularized Reverse Diffusion
title_zh: 使用正则化反向扩散的 MR 图像去噪和超分辨率
abstract: Patient scans from MRI often suffer from noise, which hampers the diagnostic capability of such images. As a method to mitigate such artifact, denoising is largely studied both within the medical imaging community and beyond the community as a general subject. However, recent deep neural network-based approaches mostly rely on the minimum mean squared error (MMSE) estimates, which tend to produce a blurred output. Moreover, such models suffer when deployed in real-world sitautions: out-of-distribution data, and complex noise distributions that deviate from the usual parametric noise models. In this work, we propose a new denoising method based on score-based reverse diffusion sampling, which overcomes all the aforementioned drawbacks. Our network, trained only with coronal knee scans, excels even on out-of-distribution in vivo liver MRI data, contaminated with complex mixture of noise. Even more, we propose a method to enhance the resolution of the denoised image with the same network. With extensive experiments, we show that our method establishes state-of-the-art performance, while having desirable properties which prior MMSE denoisers did not have: flexibly choosing the extent of denoising, and quantifying uncertainty.
summary: Patient scans from MRI often suffer from noise, which hampers the diagnostic capability of such images. As a method to mitigate such artifact, denoising is largely studied both within the medical imaging community and beyond the community as a general subject. However, recent deep neural network-based approaches mostly rely on the minimum mean squared error (MMSE) estimates, which tend to produce a blurred output. Moreover, such models suffer when deployed in real-world sitautions: out-of-distribution data, and complex noise distributions that deviate from the usual parametric noise models. In this work, we propose a new denoising method based on score-based reverse diffusion sampling, which overcomes all the aforementioned drawbacks. Our network, trained only with coronal knee scans, excels even on out-of-distribution in vivo liver MRI data, contaminated with complex mixture of noise. Even more, we propose a method to enhance the resolution of the denoised image with the same network. With extensive experiments, we show that our method establishes state-of-the-art performance, while having desirable properties which prior MMSE denoisers did not have: flexibly choosing the extent of denoising, and quantifying uncertainty.
abstract_zh: MRI 扫描的患者经常受到噪声的影响，这会影响此类图像的诊断能力。作为减轻这种伪影的方法，去噪在医学成像界内部和界外作为一般主题得到了广泛研究。然而，最近基于深度神经网络的方法主要依赖于最小均方误差（MMSE）估计，这往往会产生模糊的输出。此外，此类模型在实际情况中部署时会受到影响：分布外的数据以及偏离通常参数噪声模型的复杂噪声分布。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于基于分数的反向扩散采样的新去噪方法，它克服了上述所有缺点。我们的网络仅通过冠状膝关节扫描进行训练，即使在受到复杂混合噪声污染的分布不均的体内肝脏 MRI 数据上也表现出色。更重要的是，我们提出了一种使用相同网络增强去噪图像分辨率的方法。通过大量的实验，我们表明我们的方法建立了最先进的性能，同时具有先前 MMSE 降噪器所不具备的理想特性：灵活选择降噪程度并量化不确定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于正则化反向扩散的MRI图像去噪与超分辨率方法，解决现有深度学习方法在复杂噪声和分布外数据上的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统MRI去噪方法依赖MMSE估计，易导致图像模糊且难以处理真实场景中的复杂噪声和分布外数据。
AI.method: 采用基于分数的反向扩散采样框架，结合正则化策略训练模型，并扩展至超分辨率任务。
AI.result: 在分布外肝脏MRI数据上实现SOTA性能，支持灵活控制去噪程度并量化不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法克服了传统MMSE去噪器的局限性，在实际应用中展现更优的鲁棒性和灵活性。

authors_text: Ronak Dedhiya,Siva Teja Kakileti,Goutham Deepu,Kanchana Gopinath,Nicholas Opoku,Christopher King,Geetha Manjunath
title: Evaluation of Non-Invasive Thermal Imaging for detection of Viability of Onchocerciasis worms
title_zh: 非侵入性热成像检测盘尾丝虫活力的评估
comment: It is submitted to EMBC 2022 and is currently under review
comments: It is submitted to EMBC 2022 and is currently under review
abstract: Onchocerciasis is causing blindness in over half a million people in the world today. Drug development for the disease is crippled as there is no way of measuring effectiveness of the drug without an invasive procedure. Drug efficacy measurement through assessment of viability of onchocerca worms requires the patients to undergo nodulectomy which is invasive, expensive, time-consuming, skill-dependent, infrastructure dependent and lengthy process. In this paper, we discuss the first-ever study that proposes use of machine learning over thermal imaging to non-invasively and accurately predict the viability of worms. The key contributions of the paper are (i) a unique thermal imaging protocol along with pre-processing steps such as alignment, registration and segmentation to extract interpretable features (ii) extraction of relevant semantic features (iii) development of accurate classifiers for detecting the existence of viable worms in a nodule. When tested on a prospective test data of 30 participants with 48 palpable nodules, we achieved an Area Under the Curve (AUC) of 0.85.
summary: Onchocerciasis is causing blindness in over half a million people in the world today. Drug development for the disease is crippled as there is no way of measuring effectiveness of the drug without an invasive procedure. Drug efficacy measurement through assessment of viability of onchocerca worms requires the patients to undergo nodulectomy which is invasive, expensive, time-consuming, skill-dependent, infrastructure dependent and lengthy process. In this paper, we discuss the first-ever study that proposes use of machine learning over thermal imaging to non-invasively and accurately predict the viability of worms. The key contributions of the paper are (i) a unique thermal imaging protocol along with pre-processing steps such as alignment, registration and segmentation to extract interpretable features (ii) extraction of relevant semantic features (iii) development of accurate classifiers for detecting the existence of viable worms in a nodule. When tested on a prospective test data of 30 participants with 48 palpable nodules, we achieved an Area Under the Curve (AUC) of 0.85.
abstract_zh: 盘尾丝虫病导致当今世界超过 50 万人失明。该疾病的药物开发受到阻碍，因为没有侵入性程序就无法测量药物的有效性。通过评估盘尾丝虫的生存能力来测量药物疗效需要患者进行结节切除术，这是侵入性的、昂贵的、耗时的、依赖于技能、依赖于基础设施且漫长的过程。在本文中，我们讨论了有史以来第一项研究，该研究提出使用机器学习而不是热成像来非侵入性地准确预测蠕虫的生存能力。该论文的主要贡献是（i）独特的热成像协议以及对齐、配准和分割等预处理步骤，以提取可解释的特征（ii）提取相关语义特征（iii）开发准确的分类器，用于检测结节中是否存在活蠕虫。当对 30 名参与者（48 个可触及结节）的前瞻性测试数据进行测试时，我们获得了 0.85 的曲线下面积 (AUC)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用热成像结合机器学习技术，非侵入式检测盘尾丝虫病蠕虫存活率，以替代传统侵入性手术评估药物效果。
AI.motivation: 现有药物疗效评估需通过侵入性结节切除术获取蠕虫存活信息，该方法存在创伤大、成本高、依赖基础设施等缺陷，亟需开发非侵入性替代方案。
AI.method: 建立热成像采集协议并进行图像配准、分割等预处理，提取语义特征后构建机器学习分类器，通过30名患者48个结节数据验证模型性能。
AI.result: 在独立测试数据集上达到0.85的AUC值，证明热成像结合机器学习可有效预测蠕虫存活状态。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为盘尾丝虫病药物研发提供非侵入式评估工具，有望降低研究成本并推动新药开发进程。

authors_text: Gyungin Shin,Samuel Albanie,Weidi Xie
title: Unsupervised Salient Object Detection with Spectral Cluster Voting
title_zh: 使用谱簇投票的无监督显着目标检测
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures
comments: 14 pages, 5 figures
abstract: In this paper, we tackle the challenging task of unsupervised salient object detection (SOD) by leveraging spectral clustering on self-supervised features. We make the following contributions: (i) We revisit spectral clustering and demonstrate its potential to group the pixels of salient objects; (ii) Given mask proposals from multiple applications of spectral clustering on image features computed from various self-supervised models, e.g., MoCov2, SwAV, DINO, we propose a simple but effective winner-takes-all voting mechanism for selecting the salient masks, leveraging object priors based on framing and distinctiveness; (iii) Using the selected object segmentation as pseudo groundtruth masks, we train a salient object detector, dubbed SelfMask, which outperforms prior approaches on three unsupervised SOD benchmarks. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/NoelShin/selfmask.
summary: In this paper, we tackle the challenging task of unsupervised salient object detection (SOD) by leveraging spectral clustering on self-supervised features. We make the following contributions: (i) We revisit spectral clustering and demonstrate its potential to group the pixels of salient objects; (ii) Given mask proposals from multiple applications of spectral clustering on image features computed from various self-supervised models, e.g., MoCov2, SwAV, DINO, we propose a simple but effective winner-takes-all voting mechanism for selecting the salient masks, leveraging object priors based on framing and distinctiveness; (iii) Using the selected object segmentation as pseudo groundtruth masks, we train a salient object detector, dubbed SelfMask, which outperforms prior approaches on three unsupervised SOD benchmarks. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/NoelShin/selfmask.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们通过利用自监督特征的谱聚类来解决无监督显着目标检测（SOD）这一具有挑战性的任务。我们做出以下贡献：（i）我们重新审视光谱聚类并证明其对显着物体的像素进行分组的潜力； (ii) 给定来自各种自监督模型（例如 MoCov2、SwAV、DINO）计算的图像特征上谱聚类的多种应用的掩模建议，我们提出了一种简单但有效的赢家通吃投票机制来选择显着掩模，利用基于框架和独特性的对象先验； (iii) 使用选定的对象分割作为伪真实掩码，我们训练了一个显着对象检测器，称为 SelfMask，它在三个无监督 SOD 基准上优于先前的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/NoelShin/selfmask 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于谱聚类投票的无监督显著物体检测方法，通过自监督特征和伪标签训练提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督显著物体检测方法在特征利用和掩码选择上存在不足，需更有效的聚类与整合策略。
AI.method: 利用谱聚类对自监督模型（如MoCov2、SwAV）提取的特征进行像素分组，通过多轮投票机制结合物体先验选择最优掩码，并以此训练检测模型SelfMask。
AI.result: SelfMask在三个无监督SOD基准上优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 谱聚类投票机制有效整合多模型特征，结合伪标签训练显著提升无监督显著物体检测效果。

ai_content.result: SelfMask在三个无监督SOD基准上优于现有方法，代码已开源。

search_text: Unsupervised Salient Object Detection with Spectral Cluster Voting 使用谱簇投票的无监督显着目标检测 In this paper, we tackle the challenging task of unsupervised salient object detection (SOD) by leveraging spectral clustering on self-supervised features. We make the following contributions: (i) We revisit spectral clustering and demonstrate its potential to group the pixels of salient objects; (ii) Given mask proposals from multiple applications of spectral clustering on image features computed from various self-supervised models, e.g., MoCov2, SwAV, DINO, we propose a simple but effective winner-takes-all voting mechanism for selecting the salient masks, leveraging object priors based on framing and distinctiveness; (iii) Using the selected object segmentation as pseudo groundtruth masks, we train a salient object detector, dubbed SelfMask, which outperforms prior approaches on three unsupervised SOD benchmarks. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/NoelShin/selfmask. 在本文中，我们通过利用自监督特征的谱聚类来解决无监督显着目标检测（SOD）这一具有挑战性的任务。我们做出以下贡献：（i）我们重新审视光谱聚类并证明其对显着物体的像素进行分组的潜力； (ii) 给定来自各种自监督模型（例如 MoCov2、SwAV、DINO）计算的图像特征上谱聚类的多种应用的掩模建议，我们提出了一种简单但有效的赢家通吃投票机制来选择显着掩模，利用基于框架和独特性的对象先验； (iii) 使用选定的对象分割作为伪真实掩码，我们训练了一个显着对象检测器，称为 SelfMask，它在三个无监督 SOD 基准上优于先前的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/NoelShin/selfmask 上公开获取。 本文提出一种基于谱聚类投票的无监督显著物体检测方法，通过自监督特征和伪标签训练提升检测性能。 Gyungin Shin,Samuel Albanie,Weidi Xie cs.CV

authors_text: Jiamin Xu,Zihan Zhu,Hujun Bao,Weiwei Xu
title: Hybrid Mesh-neural Representation for 3D Transparent Object Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于 3D 透明对象重建的混合网格神经表示
abstract: We propose a novel method to reconstruct the 3D shapes of transparent objects using hand-held captured images under natural light conditions. It combines the advantage of explicit mesh and multi-layer perceptron (MLP) network, a hybrid representation, to simplify the capture setting used in recent contributions. After obtaining an initial shape through the multi-view silhouettes, we introduce surface-based local MLPs to encode the vertex displacement field (VDF) for the reconstruction of surface details. The design of local MLPs allows to represent the VDF in a piece-wise manner using two layer MLP networks, which is beneficial to the optimization algorithm. Defining local MLPs on the surface instead of the volume also reduces the searching space. Such a hybrid representation enables us to relax the ray-pixel correspondences that represent the light path constraint to our designed ray-cell correspondences, which significantly simplifies the implementation of single-image based environment matting algorithm. We evaluate our representation and reconstruction algorithm on several transparent objects with ground truth models. Our experiments show that our method can produce high-quality reconstruction results superior to state-of-the-art methods using a simplified data acquisition setup.
summary: We propose a novel method to reconstruct the 3D shapes of transparent objects using hand-held captured images under natural light conditions. It combines the advantage of explicit mesh and multi-layer perceptron (MLP) network, a hybrid representation, to simplify the capture setting used in recent contributions. After obtaining an initial shape through the multi-view silhouettes, we introduce surface-based local MLPs to encode the vertex displacement field (VDF) for the reconstruction of surface details. The design of local MLPs allows to represent the VDF in a piece-wise manner using two layer MLP networks, which is beneficial to the optimization algorithm. Defining local MLPs on the surface instead of the volume also reduces the searching space. Such a hybrid representation enables us to relax the ray-pixel correspondences that represent the light path constraint to our designed ray-cell correspondences, which significantly simplifies the implementation of single-image based environment matting algorithm. We evaluate our representation and reconstruction algorithm on several transparent objects with ground truth models. Our experiments show that our method can produce high-quality reconstruction results superior to state-of-the-art methods using a simplified data acquisition setup.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在自然光条件下使用手持拍摄的图像重建透明物体 3D 形状的新颖方法。它结合了显式网格和多层感知器（MLP）网络（一种混合表示）的优点，以简化最近贡献中使用的捕获设置。通过多视图轮廓获得初始形状后，我们引入基于表面的局部 MLP 对顶点位移场 (VDF) 进行编码，以重建表面细节。局部 MLP 的设计允许使用两层 MLP 网络以分段方式表示 VDF，这有利于优化算法。在表面而不是体积上定义局部 MLP 也会减少搜索空间。这种混合表示使我们能够将表示光路约束的射线像素对应关系放松到我们设计的射线单元对应关系，这显着简化了基于单图像的环境抠图算法的实现。我们使用地面实况模型在几个透明物体上评估我们的表示和重建算法。我们的实验表明，我们的方法可以使用简化的数据采集设置产生优于最先进方法的高质量重建结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合显式网格和多层感知机（MLP）网络的混合表示方法，用于在自然光条件下通过手持图像重建透明物体的3D形状。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在重建透明物体时需复杂的数据采集设置或难以捕捉表面细节，本文旨在通过简化设置并提升重建质量来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 通过多视角轮廓获取初始形状，引入基于表面的局部MLP编码顶点位移场（VDF），采用分段式MLP网络降低优化难度，并通过射线-单元对应关系简化单图像环境抠图算法实现。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在简化数据采集设置下，对多个透明物体的重建质量优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合表示方法有效提升了透明物体的3D重建精度，同时简化了数据采集流程，为实际应用提供了更高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Fangjian Lin,Zhanhao Liang,Sitong Wu,Junjun He,Kai Chen,Shengwei Tian
title: StructToken : Rethinking Semantic Segmentation with Structural Prior
title_zh: StructToken：用结构先验重新思考语义分割
comment: Accept by IEEE TCSVT
comments: Accept by IEEE TCSVT
abstract: In previous deep-learning-based methods, semantic segmentation has been regarded as a static or dynamic per-pixel classification task, \textit{i.e.,} classify each pixel representation to a specific category. However, these methods only focus on learning better pixel representations or classification kernels while ignoring the structural information of objects, which is critical to human decision-making mechanism. In this paper, we present a new paradigm for semantic segmentation, named structure-aware extraction. Specifically, it generates the segmentation results via the interactions between a set of learned structure tokens and the image feature, which aims to progressively extract the structural information of each category from the feature. Extensive experiments show that our StructToken outperforms the state-of-the-art on three widely-used benchmarks, including ADE20K, Cityscapes, and COCO-Stuff-10K.
summary: In previous deep-learning-based methods, semantic segmentation has been regarded as a static or dynamic per-pixel classification task, \textit{i.e.,} classify each pixel representation to a specific category. However, these methods only focus on learning better pixel representations or classification kernels while ignoring the structural information of objects, which is critical to human decision-making mechanism. In this paper, we present a new paradigm for semantic segmentation, named structure-aware extraction. Specifically, it generates the segmentation results via the interactions between a set of learned structure tokens and the image feature, which aims to progressively extract the structural information of each category from the feature. Extensive experiments show that our StructToken outperforms the state-of-the-art on three widely-used benchmarks, including ADE20K, Cityscapes, and COCO-Stuff-10K.
abstract_zh: 在以前的基于深度学习的方法中，语义分割被视为静态或动态的每像素分类任务，\textit{即}将每个像素表示分类到特定类别。然而，这些方法只专注于学习更好的像素表示或分类内核，而忽略了对象的结构信息，这对人类决策机制至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的语义分割范例，称为结构感知提取。具体来说，它通过一组学习的结构标记与图像特征之间的交互来生成分割结果，其目的是从特征中逐步提取每个类别的结构信息。大量实验表明，我们的 StructToken 在 ADE20K、Cityscapes 和 COCO-Stuff-10K 等三个广泛使用的基准测试中表现优于最新水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于结构先验的语义分割新范式StructToken，通过结构token与图像特征的交互提取物体结构信息。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅关注像素分类而忽略对人类决策至关重要的物体结构信息，导致分割结果缺乏结构约束。
AI.method: 设计结构感知提取框架，利用可学习的结构token与图像特征进行交互，逐步挖掘各类别物体的结构特征。
AI.result: 在ADE20K、Cityscapes和COCO-Stuff-10K三个基准测试中均超越现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 结构信息建模显著提升分割性能，为语义分割任务提供了新的研究视角和改进方向。

authors_text: Haoran Zhang,Natalie Dullerud,Karsten Roth,Lauren Oakden-Rayner,Stephen Robert Pfohl,Marzyeh Ghassemi
title: Improving the Fairness of Chest X-ray Classifiers
title_zh: 提高胸部 X 射线分类器的公平性
comment: Published in CHIL 2022
comments: Published in CHIL 2022
abstract: Deep learning models have reached or surpassed human-level performance in the field of medical imaging, especially in disease diagnosis using chest x-rays. However, prior work has found that such classifiers can exhibit biases in the form of gaps in predictive performance across protected groups. In this paper, we question whether striving to achieve zero disparities in predictive performance (i.e. group fairness) is the appropriate fairness definition in the clinical setting, over minimax fairness, which focuses on maximizing the performance of the worst-case group. We benchmark the performance of nine methods in improving classifier fairness across these two definitions. We find, consistent with prior work on non-clinical data, that methods which strive to achieve better worst-group performance do not outperform simple data balancing. We also find that methods which achieve group fairness do so by worsening performance for all groups. In light of these results, we discuss the utility of fairness definitions in the clinical setting, advocating for an investigation of the bias-inducing mechanisms in the underlying data generating process whenever possible.
summary: Deep learning models have reached or surpassed human-level performance in the field of medical imaging, especially in disease diagnosis using chest x-rays. However, prior work has found that such classifiers can exhibit biases in the form of gaps in predictive performance across protected groups. In this paper, we question whether striving to achieve zero disparities in predictive performance (i.e. group fairness) is the appropriate fairness definition in the clinical setting, over minimax fairness, which focuses on maximizing the performance of the worst-case group. We benchmark the performance of nine methods in improving classifier fairness across these two definitions. We find, consistent with prior work on non-clinical data, that methods which strive to achieve better worst-group performance do not outperform simple data balancing. We also find that methods which achieve group fairness do so by worsening performance for all groups. In light of these results, we discuss the utility of fairness definitions in the clinical setting, advocating for an investigation of the bias-inducing mechanisms in the underlying data generating process whenever possible.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型在医学成像领域，特别是在利用胸部X光进行疾病诊断方面，已经达到或超越了人类水平的表现。然而，先前的工作发现，此类分类器可能会以受保护群体之间的预测性能差距的形式表现出偏差。在本文中，我们质疑努力实现预测性能的零差异（即群体公平性）是否是临床环境中适当的公平性定义，而不是极小极大公平性，后者侧重于最大化最坏情况群体的表现。我们对九种方法在这两个定义中提高分类器公平性的性能进行了基准测试。我们发现，与之前对非临床数据的研究一致，努力实现更好的最差组性能的方法并不优于简单的数据平衡。我们还发现，实现群体公平的方法是通过恶化所有群体的表现来实现的。根据这些结果，我们讨论了公平定义在临床环境中的效用，主张尽可能调查底层数据生成过程中的偏见诱发机制。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了九种改进胸部X光分类器公平性的方法，探讨在临床环境中应采用哪种公平性定义。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在医学影像诊断中表现优异，但存在对不同群体预测性能的偏差。现有研究未明确临床场景下应优先采用零差异公平性还是最差群体性能最大化公平性。
AI.method: 通过对比实验，基准测试九种方法在两种公平性定义（零差异公平性与最差群体性能最大化）下的表现，并分析其效果。
AI.result: 简单数据平衡方法优于追求最差群体性能提升的方法；实现零差异公平性的方法会降低所有群体的性能。
AI.conclusion: 临床场景中应优先探究数据生成过程中的偏见机制，而非单纯依赖公平性优化方法。

search_text: Improving the Fairness of Chest X-ray Classifiers 提高胸部 X 射线分类器的公平性 Deep learning models have reached or surpassed human-level performance in the field of medical imaging, especially in disease diagnosis using chest x-rays. However, prior work has found that such classifiers can exhibit biases in the form of gaps in predictive performance across protected groups. In this paper, we question whether striving to achieve zero disparities in predictive performance (i.e. group fairness) is the appropriate fairness definition in the clinical setting, over minimax fairness, which focuses on maximizing the performance of the worst-case group. We benchmark the performance of nine methods in improving classifier fairness across these two definitions. We find, consistent with prior work on non-clinical data, that methods which strive to achieve better worst-group performance do not outperform simple data balancing. We also find that methods which achieve group fairness do so by worsening performance for all groups. In light of these results, we discuss the utility of fairness definitions in the clinical setting, advocating for an investigation of the bias-inducing mechanisms in the underlying data generating process whenever possible. 深度学习模型在医学成像领域，特别是在利用胸部X光进行疾病诊断方面，已经达到或超越了人类水平的表现。然而，先前的工作发现，此类分类器可能会以受保护群体之间的预测性能差距的形式表现出偏差。在本文中，我们质疑努力实现预测性能的零差异（即群体公平性）是否是临床环境中适当的公平性定义，而不是极小极大公平性，后者侧重于最大化最坏情况群体的表现。我们对九种方法在这两个定义中提高分类器公平性的性能进行了基准测试。我们发现，与之前对非临床数据的研究一致，努力实现更好的最差组性能的方法并不优于简单的数据平衡。我们还发现，实现群体公平的方法是通过恶化所有群体的表现来实现的。根据这些结果，我们讨论了公平定义在临床环境中的效用，主张尽可能调查底层数据生成过程中的偏见诱发机制。 本文评估了九种改进胸部X光分类器公平性的方法，探讨在临床环境中应采用哪种公平性定义。 Haoran Zhang,Natalie Dullerud,Karsten Roth,Lauren Oakden-Rayner,Stephen Robert Pfohl,Marzyeh Ghassemi cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.CY,eess.IV

authors_text: Zhan Tong,Yibing Song,Jue Wang,Limin Wang
title: VideoMAE: Masked Autoencoders are Data-Efficient Learners for Self-Supervised Video Pre-Training
title_zh: VideoMAE：屏蔽自动编码器是用于自监督视频预训练的数据高效学习器
comment: NeurIPS 2022 camera-ready version
comments: NeurIPS 2022 camera-ready version
abstract: Pre-training video transformers on extra large-scale datasets is generally required to achieve premier performance on relatively small datasets. In this paper, we show that video masked autoencoders (VideoMAE) are data-efficient learners for self-supervised video pre-training (SSVP). We are inspired by the recent ImageMAE and propose customized video tube masking with an extremely high ratio. This simple design makes video reconstruction a more challenging self-supervision task, thus encouraging extracting more effective video representations during this pre-training process. We obtain three important findings on SSVP: (1) An extremely high proportion of masking ratio (i.e., 90% to 95%) still yields favorable performance of VideoMAE. The temporally redundant video content enables a higher masking ratio than that of images. (2) VideoMAE achieves impressive results on very small datasets (i.e., around 3k-4k videos) without using any extra data. (3) VideoMAE shows that data quality is more important than data quantity for SSVP. Domain shift between pre-training and target datasets is an important issue. Notably, our VideoMAE with the vanilla ViT can achieve 87.4% on Kinetics-400, 75.4% on Something-Something V2, 91.3% on UCF101, and 62.6% on HMDB51, without using any extra data. Code is available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/VideoMAE.
summary: Pre-training video transformers on extra large-scale datasets is generally required to achieve premier performance on relatively small datasets. In this paper, we show that video masked autoencoders (VideoMAE) are data-efficient learners for self-supervised video pre-training (SSVP). We are inspired by the recent ImageMAE and propose customized video tube masking with an extremely high ratio. This simple design makes video reconstruction a more challenging self-supervision task, thus encouraging extracting more effective video representations during this pre-training process. We obtain three important findings on SSVP: (1) An extremely high proportion of masking ratio (i.e., 90% to 95%) still yields favorable performance of VideoMAE. The temporally redundant video content enables a higher masking ratio than that of images. (2) VideoMAE achieves impressive results on very small datasets (i.e., around 3k-4k videos) without using any extra data. (3) VideoMAE shows that data quality is more important than data quantity for SSVP. Domain shift between pre-training and target datasets is an important issue. Notably, our VideoMAE with the vanilla ViT can achieve 87.4% on Kinetics-400, 75.4% on Something-Something V2, 91.3% on UCF101, and 62.6% on HMDB51, without using any extra data. Code is available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/VideoMAE.
abstract_zh: 通常需要在超大规模数据集上预训练视频转换器，才能在相对较小的数据集上实现最佳性能。在本文中，我们证明视频屏蔽自动编码器（VideoMAE）是用于自监督视频预训练（SSVP）的数据高效学习器。我们受到最近的 ImageMAE 的启发，提出了具有极高比率的定制视频管掩蔽。 This simple design makes video reconstruction a more challenging self-supervision task, thus encouraging extracting more effective video representations during this pre-training process. We obtain three important findings on SSVP: (1) An extremely high proportion of masking ratio (i.e., 90% to 95%) still yields favorable performance of VideoMAE.时间冗余的视频内容能够实现比图像更高的掩蔽比。 (2) VideoMAE 在非常小的数据集（即大约 3k-4k 视频）上取得了令人印象深刻的结果，而无需使用任何额外的数据。 (3)VideoMAE表明对于SSVP来说数据质量比数据数量更重要。预训练和目标数据集之间的域转移是一个重要问题。 Notably, our VideoMAE with the vanilla ViT can achieve 87.4% on Kinetics-400, 75.4% on Something-Something V2, 91.3% on UCF101, and 62.6% on HMDB51, without using any extra data.代码可在 https://github.com/MCG-NJU/VideoMAE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VideoMAE，一种用于自监督视频预训练的高效数据学习方法，通过高比例掩码和视频重建任务提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视频预训练需依赖大规模数据集，而本文受ImageMAE启发，探索通过高比例掩码机制实现更高效的数据利用，解决视频数据冗余性带来的挑战。
AI.method: 采用极高比例（90%-95%）的视频tube掩码策略，设计定制化掩码方案，通过视频重建任务增强模型表征能力，无需额外数据。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-400（87.4%）、Something-Something V2（75.4%）、UCF101（91.3%）等数据集上取得优异结果，验证了数据质量优于数据量的结论。
AI.conclusion: VideoMAE证明了高掩码比与小规模高质量数据结合的有效性，为自监督视频预训练提供了数据高效的新范式。

authors_text: Suraj Nair,Aravind Rajeswaran,Vikash Kumar,Chelsea Finn,Abhinav Gupta
title: R3M: A Universal Visual Representation for Robot Manipulation
title_zh: R3M：机器人操作的通用视觉表示
comment: Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2022
comments: Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL) 2022
abstract: We study how visual representations pre-trained on diverse human video data can enable data-efficient learning of downstream robotic manipulation tasks. Concretely, we pre-train a visual representation using the Ego4D human video dataset using a combination of time-contrastive learning, video-language alignment, and an L1 penalty to encourage sparse and compact representations. The resulting representation, R3M, can be used as a frozen perception module for downstream policy learning. Across a suite of 12 simulated robot manipulation tasks, we find that R3M improves task success by over 20% compared to training from scratch and by over 10% compared to state-of-the-art visual representations like CLIP and MoCo. Furthermore, R3M enables a Franka Emika Panda arm to learn a range of manipulation tasks in a real, cluttered apartment given just 20 demonstrations. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://tinyurl.com/robotr3m.
summary: We study how visual representations pre-trained on diverse human video data can enable data-efficient learning of downstream robotic manipulation tasks. Concretely, we pre-train a visual representation using the Ego4D human video dataset using a combination of time-contrastive learning, video-language alignment, and an L1 penalty to encourage sparse and compact representations. The resulting representation, R3M, can be used as a frozen perception module for downstream policy learning. Across a suite of 12 simulated robot manipulation tasks, we find that R3M improves task success by over 20% compared to training from scratch and by over 10% compared to state-of-the-art visual representations like CLIP and MoCo. Furthermore, R3M enables a Franka Emika Panda arm to learn a range of manipulation tasks in a real, cluttered apartment given just 20 demonstrations. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://tinyurl.com/robotr3m.
abstract_zh: 我们研究在不同的人类视频数据上预训练的视觉表示如何能够实现下游机器人操作任务的数据高效学习。具体来说，我们使用 Ego4D 人类视频数据集，结合时间对比学习、视频语言对齐和 L1 惩罚来预训练视觉表示，以鼓励稀疏和紧凑的表示。由此产生的表示 R3M 可用作下游策略学习的冻结感知模块。在 12 个模拟机器人操作任务中，我们发现与从头开始训练相比，R3M 将任务成功率提高了 20% 以上，与 CLIP 和 MoCo 等最先进的视觉表示相比，提高了 10% 以上。此外，R3M 使 Franka Emika Panda 手臂只需 20 次演示，就能在真实、杂乱的公寓中学习一系列操作任务。代码和预训练模型可在 https://tinyurl.com/robotr3m 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出R3M视觉表示方法，通过预训练人类视频数据提升机器人操作任务的数据效率。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人操作需大量标注数据，而预训练视觉模型可减少数据依赖，但现有方法在复杂场景下效果有限。
AI.method: 基于Ego4D数据集，结合时间对比学习、视频-语言对齐和L1正则化预训练视觉模型R3M，作为下游任务的冻结感知模块。
AI.result: 在12个模拟任务中，R3M相较从头训练提升20%成功率，优于CLIP/MoCo等方法；真实环境中仅需20个演示即可完成复杂操作。
AI.conclusion: R3M验证了跨领域预训练视觉表示在机器人操作中的有效性，为数据高效学习提供了新方向。

search_text: R3M: A Universal Visual Representation for Robot Manipulation R3M：机器人操作的通用视觉表示 We study how visual representations pre-trained on diverse human video data can enable data-efficient learning of downstream robotic manipulation tasks. Concretely, we pre-train a visual representation using the Ego4D human video dataset using a combination of time-contrastive learning, video-language alignment, and an L1 penalty to encourage sparse and compact representations. The resulting representation, R3M, can be used as a frozen perception module for downstream policy learning. Across a suite of 12 simulated robot manipulation tasks, we find that R3M improves task success by over 20% compared to training from scratch and by over 10% compared to state-of-the-art visual representations like CLIP and MoCo. Furthermore, R3M enables a Franka Emika Panda arm to learn a range of manipulation tasks in a real, cluttered apartment given just 20 demonstrations. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://tinyurl.com/robotr3m. 我们研究在不同的人类视频数据上预训练的视觉表示如何能够实现下游机器人操作任务的数据高效学习。具体来说，我们使用 Ego4D 人类视频数据集，结合时间对比学习、视频语言对齐和 L1 惩罚来预训练视觉表示，以鼓励稀疏和紧凑的表示。由此产生的表示 R3M 可用作下游策略学习的冻结感知模块。在 12 个模拟机器人操作任务中，我们发现与从头开始训练相比，R3M 将任务成功率提高了 20% 以上，与 CLIP 和 MoCo 等最先进的视觉表示相比，提高了 10% 以上。此外，R3M 使 Franka Emika Panda 手臂只需 20 次演示，就能在真实、杂乱的公寓中学习一系列操作任务。代码和预训练模型可在 https://tinyurl.com/robotr3m 获取。 本文提出R3M视觉表示方法，通过预训练人类视频数据提升机器人操作任务的数据效率。 Suraj Nair,Aravind Rajeswaran,Vikash Kumar,Chelsea Finn,Abhinav Gupta cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuezihan Jiang,Yu Cheng,Hanyu Zhao,Wentao Zhang,Xupeng Miao,Yu He,Liang Wang,Zhi Yang,Bin Cui
title: ZOOMER: Boosting Retrieval on Web-scale Graphs by Regions of Interest
title_zh: ZOOMER：按感兴趣区域促进网络规模图的检索
abstract: We introduce ZOOMER, a system deployed at Taobao, the largest e-commerce platform in China, for training and serving GNN-based recommendations over web-scale graphs. ZOOMER is designed for tackling two challenges presented by the massive user data at Taobao: low training/serving efficiency due to the huge scale of the graphs, and low recommendation quality due to the information overload which distracts the recommendation model from specific user intentions. ZOOMER achieves this by introducing a key concept, Region of Interests (ROI) in GNNs for recommendations, i.e., a neighborhood region in the graph with significant relevance to a strong user intention. ZOOMER narrows the focus from the whole graph and "zooms in" on the more relevant ROIs, thereby reducing the training/serving cost and mitigating the information overload at the same time. With carefully designed mechanisms, ZOOMER identifies the interest expressed by each recommendation request, constructs an ROI subgraph by sampling with respect to the interest, and guides the GNN to reweigh different parts of the ROI towards the interest by a multi-level attention module. Deployed as a large-scale distributed system, ZOOMER supports graphs with billions of nodes for training and thousands of requests per second for serving. ZOOMER achieves up to 14x speedup when downsizing sampling scales with comparable (even better) AUC performance than baseline methods. Besides, both the offline evaluation and online A/B test demonstrate the effectiveness of ZOOMER.
summary: We introduce ZOOMER, a system deployed at Taobao, the largest e-commerce platform in China, for training and serving GNN-based recommendations over web-scale graphs. ZOOMER is designed for tackling two challenges presented by the massive user data at Taobao: low training/serving efficiency due to the huge scale of the graphs, and low recommendation quality due to the information overload which distracts the recommendation model from specific user intentions. ZOOMER achieves this by introducing a key concept, Region of Interests (ROI) in GNNs for recommendations, i.e., a neighborhood region in the graph with significant relevance to a strong user intention. ZOOMER narrows the focus from the whole graph and "zooms in" on the more relevant ROIs, thereby reducing the training/serving cost and mitigating the information overload at the same time. With carefully designed mechanisms, ZOOMER identifies the interest expressed by each recommendation request, constructs an ROI subgraph by sampling with respect to the interest, and guides the GNN to reweigh different parts of the ROI towards the interest by a multi-level attention module. Deployed as a large-scale distributed system, ZOOMER supports graphs with billions of nodes for training and thousands of requests per second for serving. ZOOMER achieves up to 14x speedup when downsizing sampling scales with comparable (even better) AUC performance than baseline methods. Besides, both the offline evaluation and online A/B test demonstrate the effectiveness of ZOOMER.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了 ZOOMER，这是一个部署在中国最大的电子商务平台淘宝的系统，用于在网络规模图上训练和提供基于 GNN 的推荐。 ZOOMER 旨在解决淘宝海量用户数据带来的两个挑战：图规模庞大导致训练/服务效率低下，信息过载导致推荐模型偏离特定用户意图而导致推荐质量低下。 ZOOMER 通过在用于推荐的 GNN 中引入一个关键概念“兴趣区域 (ROI)”来实现这一目标，即图中与强烈用户意图显着相关的邻域区域。 ZOOMER 缩小了整个图表的焦点，并“放大”了更相关的 ROI，从而降低了培训/服务成本，同时减轻了信息过载。通过精心设计的机制，ZOOMER 识别每个推荐请求所表达的兴趣，通过针对兴趣进行采样构建 ROI 子图，并通过多级注意力模块引导 GNN 重新权衡 ROI 的不同部分。 ZOOMER 作为大型分布式系统部署，支持具有数十亿个节点的图进行训练，并支持每秒数千个请求进行服务。在缩小采样规模时，ZOOMER 可实现高达 14 倍的加速，并且 AUC 性能与基线方法相当（甚至更好）。此外，离线评估和在线A/B测试都证明了ZOOMER的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ZOOMER系统，通过关注图中的兴趣区域（ROI）提升大规模图上的GNN推荐效率和质量。
AI.motivation: 淘宝等平台面临图规模庞大导致的训练/服务效率低以及信息过载影响推荐质量的双重挑战，需通过聚焦关键区域优化模型表现。
AI.method: 引入ROI概念，通过识别用户兴趣构建子图，结合多级注意力机制引导GNN关注关键区域，并设计分布式系统支持大规模图处理。
AI.result: 训练速度提升14倍且AUC表现优于基线，离线评估和在线A/B测试均验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: ZOOMER通过ROI划分和注意力机制有效缓解信息过载与计算成本问题，为大规模图推荐提供可行方案。

authors_text: Hongyu Li,Peng Jiang,Tiejun Wang
title: Deep Learning based Intelligent Coin-tap Test for Defect Recognition
title_zh: 基于深度学习的智能硬币敲击测试用于缺陷识别
abstract: The coin-tap test is a convenient and primary method for non-destructive testing, while its manual on-site operation is tough and costly. With the help of the latest intelligent signal processing method, convolutional neural networks (CNN), we achieve an intelligent coin-tap test which exhibited superior performance in recognizing the defects. However, this success of CNNs relies on plenty of well-labeled data from the identical scenario, which could be difficult to get for many real industrial practices. This paper further develops transfer learning strategies for this issue, that is, to transfer the model trained on data of one scenario to another. In experiments, the result presents a notable improvement by using domain adaptation and pseudo label learning strategies. Hence, it becomes possible to apply the model into scenarios with none or little (less than 10\%) labeled data adopting the transfer learning strategies proposed herein. In addition, we used a benchmark dataset constructed ourselves throughout this study. This benchmark dataset for the coin-tap test containing around 100,000 sound signals is published at https://github.com/PPhub-hy/torch-tapnet.
summary: The coin-tap test is a convenient and primary method for non-destructive testing, while its manual on-site operation is tough and costly. With the help of the latest intelligent signal processing method, convolutional neural networks (CNN), we achieve an intelligent coin-tap test which exhibited superior performance in recognizing the defects. However, this success of CNNs relies on plenty of well-labeled data from the identical scenario, which could be difficult to get for many real industrial practices. This paper further develops transfer learning strategies for this issue, that is, to transfer the model trained on data of one scenario to another. In experiments, the result presents a notable improvement by using domain adaptation and pseudo label learning strategies. Hence, it becomes possible to apply the model into scenarios with none or little (less than 10\%) labeled data adopting the transfer learning strategies proposed herein. In addition, we used a benchmark dataset constructed ourselves throughout this study. This benchmark dataset for the coin-tap test containing around 100,000 sound signals is published at https://github.com/PPhub-hy/torch-tapnet.
abstract_zh: 硬币敲击测试是一种方便且主要的无损检测方法，但其手工现场操作难度大且成本高。借助最新的智能信号处理方法——卷积神经网络（CNN），我们实现了智能硬币敲击测试，在识别缺陷方面表现出了卓越的性能。然而，CNN 的成功依赖于来自相同场景的大量标记良好的数据，而这对于许多实际的工业实践来说可能很难获得。本文针对这个问题进一步开发了迁移学习策略，即将在一种场景的数据上训练的模型迁移到另一种场景。在实验中，通过使用域适应和伪标签学习策略，结果呈现出显着的改进。因此，可以将该模型应用到没有或很少（小于 10%）标记数据的场景中，采用本文提出的迁移学习策略。此外，我们在整个研究中使用了我们自己构建的基准数据集。这个硬币点击测试的基准数据集包含大约 100,000 个声音信号，发布于 https://github.com/PPhub-hy/torch-tapnet。

AI.tldr: 开发基于深度学习的智能硬币敲击测试方法，解决工业场景中缺陷识别数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统硬币敲击测试依赖人工操作成本高，而深度学习需大量标注数据，实际工业场景中数据获取困难。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络（CNN）结合迁移学习策略，包括领域自适应与伪标签学习，并构建包含10万条声学信号的基准数据集。
AI.result: 在少于10%标注数据的场景下，迁移学习策略显著提升缺陷识别性能，实现模型跨场景应用。
AI.conclusion: 通过迁移学习有效缓解工业场景数据稀缺问题，使智能硬币敲击测试在低标注数据条件下仍具实用性。

Hence, it becomes possible to apply the model into scenarios with none or little (less than 10\%) labeled data adopting the transfer learning strategies proposed herein. In addition, we used a benchmark dataset constructed ourselves throughout this study. This benchmark dataset for the coin-tap test containing around 100,000 sound signals is published at https://github.com/PPhub-hy/torch-tapnet. 硬币敲击测试是一种方便且主要的无损检测方法，但其手工现场操作难度大且成本高。借助最新的智能信号处理方法——卷积神经网络（CNN），我们实现了智能硬币敲击测试，在识别缺陷方面表现出了卓越的性能。然而，CNN 的成功依赖于来自相同场景的大量标记良好的数据，而这对于许多实际的工业实践来说可能很难获得。本文针对这个问题进一步开发了迁移学习策略，即将在一种场景的数据上训练的模型迁移到另一种场景。在实验中，通过使用域适应和伪标签学习策略，结果呈现出显着的改进。因此，可以将该模型应用到没有或很少（小于 10%）标记数据的场景中，采用本文提出的迁移学习策略。此外，我们在整个研究中使用了我们自己构建的基准数据集。这个硬币点击测试的基准数据集包含大约 100,000 个声音信号，发布于 https://github.com/PPhub-hy/torch-tapnet。 开发基于深度学习的智能硬币敲击测试方法，解决工业场景中缺陷识别数据不足的问题。 Hongyu Li,Peng Jiang,Tiejun Wang eess.SP,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Runyu Yu,Yawen Li,Ang Li
title: Semantic Similarity Computing for Scientific Academic Conferences fused with domain features
title_zh: 融合领域特征的科学学术会议语义相似度计算
abstract: Aiming at the problem that the current general-purpose semantic text similarity calculation methods are difficult to use the semantic information of scientific academic conference data, a semantic similarity calculation algorithm for scientific academic conferences by fusion with domain features is proposed. First, the domain feature information of the conference is obtained through entity recognition and keyword extraction, and it is input into the BERT network as a feature and the conference information. The structure of the Siamese network is used to solve the anisotropy problem of BERT. The output of the network is pooled and normalized, and finally the cosine similarity is used to calculate the similarity between the two sessions. Experimental results show that the SBFD algorithm has achieved good results on different data sets, and the Spearman correlation coefficient has a certain improvement compared with the comparison algorithm.
summary: Aiming at the problem that the current general-purpose semantic text similarity calculation methods are difficult to use the semantic information of scientific academic conference data, a semantic similarity calculation algorithm for scientific academic conferences by fusion with domain features is proposed. First, the domain feature information of the conference is obtained through entity recognition and keyword extraction, and it is input into the BERT network as a feature and the conference information. The structure of the Siamese network is used to solve the anisotropy problem of BERT. The output of the network is pooled and normalized, and finally the cosine similarity is used to calculate the similarity between the two sessions. Experimental results show that the SBFD algorithm has achieved good results on different data sets, and the Spearman correlation coefficient has a certain improvement compared with the comparison algorithm.
abstract_zh: 针对当前通用语义文本相似度计算方法难以利用科学学术会议数据语义信息的问题，提出一种融合领域特征的科学学术会议语义相似度计算算法。首先，通过实体识别和关键词提取得到会议的领域特征信息，作为特征和会议信息输入到BERT网络中。采用Siamese网络的结构来解决BERT的各向异性问题。网络的输出被池化并归一化，最后使用余弦相似度来计算两个会话之间的相似度。实验结果表明，SBFD算法在不同数据集上均取得了良好的效果，且Spearman相关系数较对比算法有一定的提升。

AI.tldr: 提出一种融合领域特征的科学学术会议语义相似度计算方法，解决通用方法难以利用会议数据语义信息的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有通用语义相似度计算方法无法有效提取科学学术会议数据中的领域特征和语义信息，导致相似度计算效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过实体识别和关键词提取获取会议领域特征，结合BERT网络与Siamese网络结构，利用池化和归一化处理后计算余弦相似度。
AI.result: SBFD算法在多个数据集上表现优异，Spearman相关系数较对比算法有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 融合领域特征的语义相似度计算方法能有效提升科学学术会议数据的相似度计算准确性。

authors_text: Bowen Yu,Junping Du,Yingxia Shao
title: Web Page Content Extraction Based on Multi-feature Fusion
title_zh: 基于多特征融合的网页内容提取
comment: Part of the content is for other purposes
comments: Part of the content is for other purposes
abstract: With the rapid development of Internet technology, people have more and more access to a variety of web page resources. At the same time, the current rapid development of deep learning technology is often inseparable from the huge amount of Web data resources. On the other hand, NLP is also an important part of data processing technology, such as web page data extraction. At present, the extraction technology of web page text mainly uses a single heuristic function or strategy, and most of them need to determine the threshold manually. With the rapid growth of the number and types of web resources, there are still problems to be solved when using a single strategy to extract the text information of different pages. This paper proposes a web page text extraction algorithm based on multi-feature fusion. According to the text information characteristics of web resources, DOM nodes are used as the extraction unit to design multiple statistical features, and high-order features are designed according to heuristic strategies. This method establishes a small neural network, takes multiple features of DOM nodes as input, predicts whether the nodes contain text information, makes full use of different statistical information and extraction strategies, and adapts to more types of pages. Experimental results show that this method has a good ability of web page text extraction and avoids the problem of manually determining the threshold.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于多特征融合的网页文本提取算法，以提高不同网页的文本提取效果。
AI.motivation: 现有网页文本提取技术依赖单一启发式函数或人工设定阈值，难以适应网页资源数量和类型的快速增长带来的挑战。
AI.method: 以DOM节点为基本单位，设计多种统计特征和高阶特征，构建小型神经网络模型对节点是否包含文本信息进行预测。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法具有良好的网页文本提取能力，有效避免了人工设定阈值的问题。
AI.conclusion: 多特征融合方法能更充分地利用统计信息和提取策略，提升网页文本提取的准确性和适应性。

authors_text: Jauen Phyo,Wonjun Ko,Eunjin Jeon,Heung-Il Suk
title: TransSleep: Transitioning-aware Attention-based Deep Neural Network for Sleep Staging
title_zh: TransSleep：用于睡眠分期的基于转移感知注意力的深度神经网络
comment: 13 pages, 9 figures
comments: 13 pages, 9 figures
abstract: Sleep staging is essential for sleep assessment and plays a vital role as a health indicator. Many recent studies have devised various machine learning as well as deep learning architectures for sleep staging. However, two key challenges hinder the practical use of these architectures: effectively capturing salient waveforms in sleep signals and correctly classifying confusing stages in transitioning epochs. In this study, we propose a novel deep neural network structure, TransSleep, that captures distinctive local temporal patterns and distinguishes confusing stages using two auxiliary tasks. In particular, TransSleep adopts an attention-based multi-scale feature extractor module to capture salient waveforms; a stage-confusion estimator module with a novel auxiliary task, epoch-level stage classification, to estimate confidence scores for identifying confusing stages; and a context encoder module with the other novel auxiliary task, stage-transition detection, to represent contextual relationships across neighboring epochs. Results show that TransSleep achieves promising performance in automatic sleep staging. The validity of TransSleep is demonstrated by its state-of-the-art performance on two publicly available datasets, Sleep-EDF and MASS. Furthermore, we performed ablations to analyze our results from different perspectives. Based on our overall results, we believe that TransSleep has immense potential to provide new insights into deep learning-based sleep staging.
summary: Sleep staging is essential for sleep assessment and plays a vital role as a health indicator. Many recent studies have devised various machine learning as well as deep learning architectures for sleep staging. However, two key challenges hinder the practical use of these architectures: effectively capturing salient waveforms in sleep signals and correctly classifying confusing stages in transitioning epochs. In this study, we propose a novel deep neural network structure, TransSleep, that captures distinctive local temporal patterns and distinguishes confusing stages using two auxiliary tasks. In particular, TransSleep adopts an attention-based multi-scale feature extractor module to capture salient waveforms; a stage-confusion estimator module with a novel auxiliary task, epoch-level stage classification, to estimate confidence scores for identifying confusing stages; and a context encoder module with the other novel auxiliary task, stage-transition detection, to represent contextual relationships across neighboring epochs. Results show that TransSleep achieves promising performance in automatic sleep staging. The validity of TransSleep is demonstrated by its state-of-the-art performance on two publicly available datasets, Sleep-EDF and MASS. Furthermore, we performed ablations to analyze our results from different perspectives. Based on our overall results, we believe that TransSleep has immense potential to provide new insights into deep learning-based sleep staging.
abstract_zh: 睡眠分期对于睡眠评估至关重要，并且作为健康指标发挥着至关重要的作用。最近的许多研究设计了各种用于睡眠分期的机器学习和深度学习架构。 However, two key challenges hinder the practical use of these architectures: effectively capturing salient waveforms in sleep signals and correctly classifying confusing stages in transitioning epochs. In this study, we propose a novel deep neural network structure, TransSleep, that captures distinctive local temporal patterns and distinguishes confusing stages using two auxiliary tasks.特别是，TransSleep采用基于注意力的多尺度特征提取器模块来捕获显着波形； a stage-confusion estimator module with a novel auxiliary task, epoch-level stage classification, to estimate confidence scores for identifying confusing stages; and a context encoder module with the other novel auxiliary task, stage-transition detection, to represent contextual relationships across neighboring epochs.结果表明，TransSleep 在自动睡眠分期方面取得了良好的表现。 TransSleep 的有效性通过其在两个公开数据集 Sleep-EDF 和 MASS 上的最先进性能得到了证明。此外，我们还进行了消融，从不同的角度分析我们的结果。根据我们的总体结果，我们相信 TransSleep 具有巨大的潜力，可以为基于深度学习的睡眠分期提供新的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TransSleep的深度神经网络结构，用于改进睡眠分期的自动识别。
AI.motivation: 现有睡眠分期方法在捕捉睡眠信号关键波形和区分过渡期混淆阶段方面存在挑战，需提升分类准确性。
AI.method: TransSleep包含基于注意力的多尺度特征提取模块、阶段混淆估计模块（通过辅助任务进行周期级分类）以及上下文编码模块（通过辅助任务检测阶段转换）。
AI.result: TransSleep在Sleep-EDF和MASS两个公开数据集上达到最先进的性能，并通过消融实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: TransSleep为基于深度学习的睡眠分期提供了新思路，具有重要的研究和应用潜力。

search_text: TransSleep: Transitioning-aware Attention-based Deep Neural Network for Sleep Staging TransSleep：用于睡眠分期的基于转移感知注意力的深度神经网络 Sleep staging is essential for sleep assessment and plays a vital role as a health indicator. Many recent studies have devised various machine learning as well as deep learning architectures for sleep staging. However, two key challenges hinder the practical use of these architectures: effectively capturing salient waveforms in sleep signals and correctly classifying confusing stages in transitioning epochs. In this study, we propose a novel deep neural network structure, TransSleep, that captures distinctive local temporal patterns and distinguishes confusing stages using two auxiliary tasks. In particular, TransSleep adopts an attention-based multi-scale feature extractor module to capture salient waveforms; a stage-confusion estimator module with a novel auxiliary task, epoch-level stage classification, to estimate confidence scores for identifying confusing stages; and a context encoder module with the other novel auxiliary task, stage-transition detection, to represent contextual relationships across neighboring epochs. Results show that TransSleep achieves promising performance in automatic sleep staging. The validity of TransSleep is demonstrated by its state-of-the-art performance on two publicly available datasets, Sleep-EDF and MASS. Furthermore, we performed ablations to analyze our results from different perspectives. Based on our overall results, we believe that TransSleep has immense potential to provide new insights into deep learning-based sleep staging. 睡眠分期对于睡眠评估至关重要，并且作为健康指标发挥着至关重要的作用。最近的许多研究设计了各种用于睡眠分期的机器学习和深度学习架构。 However, two key challenges hinder the practical use of these architectures: effectively capturing salient waveforms in sleep signals and correctly classifying confusing stages in transitioning epochs. In this study, we propose a novel deep neural network structure, TransSleep, that captures distinctive local temporal patterns and distinguishes confusing stages using two auxiliary tasks.特别是，TransSleep采用基于注意力的多尺度特征提取器模块来捕获显着波形； a stage-confusion estimator module with a novel auxiliary task, epoch-level stage classification, to estimate confidence scores for identifying confusing stages; and a context encoder module with the other novel auxiliary task, stage-transition detection, to represent contextual relationships across neighboring epochs.结果表明，TransSleep 在自动睡眠分期方面取得了良好的表现。 TransSleep 的有效性通过其在两个公开数据集 Sleep-EDF 和 MASS 上的最先进性能得到了证明。此外，我们还进行了消融，从不同的角度分析我们的结果。根据我们的总体结果，我们相信 TransSleep 具有巨大的潜力，可以为基于深度学习的睡眠分期提供新的见解。 本文提出一种名为TransSleep的深度神经网络结构，用于改进睡眠分期的自动识别。 Jauen Phyo,Wonjun Ko,Eunjin Jeon,Heung-Il Suk cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.HC,eess.SP

authors_text: Wei Jiang,Kwang Moo Yi,Golnoosh Samei,Oncel Tuzel,Anurag Ranjan
title: NeuMan: Neural Human Radiance Field from a Single Video
title_zh: NeuMan：来自单个视频的神经人类辐射场
abstract: Photorealistic rendering and reposing of humans is important for enabling augmented reality experiences. We propose a novel framework to reconstruct the human and the scene that can be rendered with novel human poses and views from just a single in-the-wild video. Given a video captured by a moving camera, we train two NeRF models: a human NeRF model and a scene NeRF model. To train these models, we rely on existing methods to estimate the rough geometry of the human and the scene. Those rough geometry estimates allow us to create a warping field from the observation space to the canonical pose-independent space, where we train the human model in. Our method is able to learn subject specific details, including cloth wrinkles and accessories, from just a 10 seconds video clip, and to provide high quality renderings of the human under novel poses, from novel views, together with the background.
summary: Photorealistic rendering and reposing of humans is important for enabling augmented reality experiences. We propose a novel framework to reconstruct the human and the scene that can be rendered with novel human poses and views from just a single in-the-wild video. Given a video captured by a moving camera, we train two NeRF models: a human NeRF model and a scene NeRF model. To train these models, we rely on existing methods to estimate the rough geometry of the human and the scene. Those rough geometry estimates allow us to create a warping field from the observation space to the canonical pose-independent space, where we train the human model in. Our method is able to learn subject specific details, including cloth wrinkles and accessories, from just a 10 seconds video clip, and to provide high quality renderings of the human under novel poses, from novel views, together with the background.
abstract_zh: 逼真的人体渲染和休息对于实现增强现实体验非常重要。 We propose a novel framework to reconstruct the human and the scene that can be rendered with novel human poses and views from just a single in-the-wild video.给定移动摄像机拍摄的视频，我们训练两个 NeRF 模型：人类 NeRF 模型和场景 NeRF 模型。为了训练这些模型，我们依靠现有的方法来估计人体和场景的粗略几何形状。 Those rough geometry estimates allow us to create a warping field from the observation space to the canonical pose-independent space, where we train the human model in. Our method is able to learn subject specific details, including cloth wrinkles and accessories, from just a 10 seconds video clip, and to provide high quality renderings of the human under novel poses, from novel views, together with the background.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeuMan框架，仅通过单个视频即可重建人类和场景，实现新颖姿态和视角下的高质量渲染。
AI.motivation: 增强现实需要逼真的人体渲染与重定位，但现有方法难以从单视频中高效重建人体细节与场景。
AI.method: 通过移动相机拍摄的视频，训练两个NeRF模型（人体与场景），利用几何估计生成变形场，将观测空间映射到标准姿态无关空间进行人体模型训练。
AI.result: 方法能从10秒视频学习衣物褶皱等细节，生成高质量的新姿态、新视角人体渲染及背景。
AI.conclusion: NeuMan有效解决了单视频下人体与场景重建问题，为AR应用提供了高精度渲染方案。

authors_text: Jin Yang,Yue Yin,Alexander K. Landauer,Selda Buyuktozturk,Jing Zhang,Luke Summey,Alexander McGhee,Matt K. Fu,John O. Dabiri,Christian Franck
title: SerialTrack: ScalE and Rotation Invariant Augmented Lagrangian Particle Tracking
title_zh: SerialTrack：尺度和旋转不变增强拉格朗日粒子跟踪
abstract: We present a new particle tracking algorithm to accurately resolve large deformation and rotational motion fields, which takes advantage of both local and global particle tracking algorithms. We call this method the ScalE and Rotation Invariant Augmented Lagrangian Particle Tracking (SerialTrack). This method builds an iterative scale and rotation invariant topology-based feature for each particle within a multi-scale tracking algorithm. The global kinematic compatibility condition is applied as a global augmented Lagrangian constraint to enhance the tracking accuracy. An open source software package implementing this numerical approach to track both 2D and 3D, incremental and cumulative deformation fields is provided.
summary: We present a new particle tracking algorithm to accurately resolve large deformation and rotational motion fields, which takes advantage of both local and global particle tracking algorithms. We call this method the ScalE and Rotation Invariant Augmented Lagrangian Particle Tracking (SerialTrack). This method builds an iterative scale and rotation invariant topology-based feature for each particle within a multi-scale tracking algorithm. The global kinematic compatibility condition is applied as a global augmented Lagrangian constraint to enhance the tracking accuracy. An open source software package implementing this numerical approach to track both 2D and 3D, incremental and cumulative deformation fields is provided.
abstract_zh: We present a new particle tracking algorithm to accurately resolve large deformation and rotational motion fields, which takes advantage of both local and global particle tracking algorithms.我们将此方法称为“尺度和旋转不变增强拉格朗日粒子跟踪”(SerialTrack)。该方法为多尺度跟踪算法中的每个粒子构建基于迭代尺度和旋转不变拓扑的特征。将全局运动学兼容性条件用作全局增强拉格朗日约束以提高跟踪精度。 An open source software package implementing this numerical approach to track both 2D and 3D, incremental and cumulative deformation fields is provided.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合局部与全局算法的粒子跟踪方法，以准确解析大变形和旋转运动场
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理大变形和旋转运动时存在局限，需更精确的算法
AI.method: 构建多尺度迭代的尺度和旋转不变拓扑特征，并引入全局运动学约束优化跟踪精度
AI.result: 开发出开源软件包，支持2D和3D、增量及累积变形场的追踪
AI.conclusion: SerialTrack通过结合局部与全局方法提升跟踪精度，并提供开源工具促进应用

authors_text: Xiaotian Li,Zhihua Li,Huiyuan Yang,Geran Zhao,Lijun Yin
title: Your "Attention" Deserves Attention: A Self-Diversified Multi-Channel Attention for Facial Action Analysis
title_zh: 你的“关注”值得关注：面部动作分析的自我多元化多渠道关注
comment: ef:FG2021(long Oral)
comments: ef:FG2021(long Oral)
abstract: Visual attention has been extensively studied for learning fine-grained features in both facial expression recognition (FER) and Action Unit (AU) detection. A broad range of previous research has explored how to use attention modules to localize detailed facial parts (e,g. facial action units), learn discriminative features, and learn inter-class correlation. However, few related works pay attention to the robustness of the attention module itself. Through experiments, we found neural attention maps initialized with different feature maps yield diverse representations when learning to attend the identical Region of Interest (ROI). In other words, similar to general feature learning, the representational quality of attention maps also greatly affects the performance of a model, which means unconstrained attention learning has lots of randomnesses. This uncertainty lets conventional attention learning fall into sub-optimal. In this paper, we propose a compact model to enhance the representational and focusing power of neural attention maps and learn the "inter-attention" correlation for refined attention maps, which we term the "Self-Diversified Multi-Channel Attention Network (SMA-Net)". The proposed method is evaluated on two benchmark databases (BP4D and DISFA) for AU detection and four databases (CK+, MMI, BU-3DFE, and BP4D+) for facial expression recognition. It achieves superior performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Visual attention has been extensively studied for learning fine-grained features in both facial expression recognition (FER) and Action Unit (AU) detection. A broad range of previous research has explored how to use attention modules to localize detailed facial parts (e,g. facial action units), learn discriminative features, and learn inter-class correlation. However, few related works pay attention to the robustness of the attention module itself. Through experiments, we found neural attention maps initialized with different feature maps yield diverse representations when learning to attend the identical Region of Interest (ROI). In other words, similar to general feature learning, the representational quality of attention maps also greatly affects the performance of a model, which means unconstrained attention learning has lots of randomnesses. This uncertainty lets conventional attention learning fall into sub-optimal. In this paper, we propose a compact model to enhance the representational and focusing power of neural attention maps and learn the "inter-attention" correlation for refined attention maps, which we term the "Self-Diversified Multi-Channel Attention Network (SMA-Net)". The proposed method is evaluated on two benchmark databases (BP4D and DISFA) for AU detection and four databases (CK+, MMI, BU-3DFE, and BP4D+) for facial expression recognition. It achieves superior performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 视觉注意力已被广泛研究，用于学习面部表情识别（FER）和动作单元（AU）检测中的细粒度特征。先前的大量研究探索了如何使用注意力模块来定位详细的面部部位（例如面部动作单元）、学习判别性特征以及学习类间相关性。然而，很少有相关工作关注注意力模块本身的鲁棒性。通过实验，我们发现使用不同特征图初始化的神经注意力图在学习关注相同的感兴趣区域（ROI）时会产生不同的表示。换句话说，与一般的特征学习类似，注意力图的表示质量也极大地影响模型的性能，这意味着无约束的注意力学习具有大量的随机性。这种不确定性让传统的注意力学习陷入次优状态。在本文中，我们提出了一个紧凑的模型来增强神经注意力图的表征和聚焦能力，并学习细化注意力图的“注意力间”相关性，我们将其称为“自我多样化多通道注意力网络（SMA-Net）”。该方法在用于 AU 检测的两个基准数据库（BP4D 和 DISFA）和用于面部表情识别的四个数据库（CK+、MMI、BU-3DFE 和 BP4D+）上进行评估。与最先进的方法相比，它实现了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自多样化多通道注意力网络（SMA-Net），用于增强面部动作单元检测和表情识别中的注意力机制鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力模块在学习关键区域时存在表示不确定性，导致模型性能不稳定，缺乏对注意力机制本身鲁棒性的研究。
AI.method: 设计SMA-Net通过增强注意力图的表示能力与聚焦力，并学习通道间的互注意力关联以优化注意力图。
AI.result: 在BP4D、DISFA等数据集上实现优于现有方法的AU检测性能，在CK+、BU-3DFE等数据集上表情识别效果显著。
AI.conclusion: SMA-Net通过提升注意力机制的鲁棒性和表征能力，有效解决了传统注意力学习中的随机性问题。

search_text: Your "Attention" Deserves Attention: A Self-Diversified Multi-Channel Attention for Facial Action Analysis 你的“关注”值得关注：面部动作分析的自我多元化多渠道关注 Visual attention has been extensively studied for learning fine-grained features in both facial expression recognition (FER) and Action Unit (AU) detection. A broad range of previous research has explored how to use attention modules to localize detailed facial parts (e,g. facial action units), learn discriminative features, and learn inter-class correlation. However, few related works pay attention to the robustness of the attention module itself. Through experiments, we found neural attention maps initialized with different feature maps yield diverse representations when learning to attend the identical Region of Interest (ROI). In other words, similar to general feature learning, the representational quality of attention maps also greatly affects the performance of a model, which means unconstrained attention learning has lots of randomnesses. This uncertainty lets conventional attention learning fall into sub-optimal. In this paper, we propose a compact model to enhance the representational and focusing power of neural attention maps and learn the "inter-attention" correlation for refined attention maps, which we term the "Self-Diversified Multi-Channel Attention Network (SMA-Net)". The proposed method is evaluated on two benchmark databases (BP4D and DISFA) for AU detection and four databases (CK+, MMI, BU-3DFE, and BP4D+) for facial expression recognition. It achieves superior performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods. 视觉注意力已被广泛研究，用于学习面部表情识别（FER）和动作单元（AU）检测中的细粒度特征。先前的大量研究探索了如何使用注意力模块来定位详细的面部部位（例如面部动作单元）、学习判别性特征以及学习类间相关性。然而，很少有相关工作关注注意力模块本身的鲁棒性。通过实验，我们发现使用不同特征图初始化的神经注意力图在学习关注相同的感兴趣区域（ROI）时会产生不同的表示。换句话说，与一般的特征学习类似，注意力图的表示质量也极大地影响模型的性能，这意味着无约束的注意力学习具有大量的随机性。这种不确定性让传统的注意力学习陷入次优状态。在本文中，我们提出了一个紧凑的模型来增强神经注意力图的表征和聚焦能力，并学习细化注意力图的“注意力间”相关性，我们将其称为“自我多样化多通道注意力网络（SMA-Net）”。该方法在用于 AU 检测的两个基准数据库（BP4D 和 DISFA）和用于面部表情识别的四个数据库（CK+、MMI、BU-3DFE 和 BP4D+）上进行评估。与最先进的方法相比，它实现了卓越的性能。 本文提出一种自多样化多通道注意力网络（SMA-Net），用于增强面部动作单元检测和表情识别中的注意力机制鲁棒性。 Xiaotian Li,Zhihua Li,Huiyuan Yang,Geran Zhao,Lijun Yin cs.CV

authors_text: Aysim Toker,Lukas Kondmann,Mark Weber,Marvin Eisenberger,Andrés Camero,Jingliang Hu,Ariadna Pregel Hoderlein,Çağlar Şenaras,Timothy Davis,Daniel Cremers,Giovanni Marchisio,Xiao Xiang Zhu,Laura Leal-Taixé
title: DynamicEarthNet: Daily Multi-Spectral Satellite Dataset for Semantic Change Segmentation
title_zh: DynamicEarthNet：用于语义变化分割的每日多光谱卫星数据集
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022, evaluation webpage: https://codalab.lisn.upsaclay.fr/competitions/2882
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022, evaluation webpage: https://codalab.lisn.upsaclay.fr/competitions/2882
abstract: Earth observation is a fundamental tool for monitoring the evolution of land use in specific areas of interest. Observing and precisely defining change, in this context, requires both time-series data and pixel-wise segmentations. To that end, we propose the DynamicEarthNet dataset that consists of daily, multi-spectral satellite observations of 75 selected areas of interest distributed over the globe with imagery from Planet Labs. These observations are paired with pixel-wise monthly semantic segmentation labels of 7 land use and land cover (LULC) classes. DynamicEarthNet is the first dataset that provides this unique combination of daily measurements and high-quality labels. In our experiments, we compare several established baselines that either utilize the daily observations as additional training data (semi-supervised learning) or multiple observations at once (spatio-temporal learning) as a point of reference for future research. Finally, we propose a new evaluation metric SCS that addresses the specific challenges associated with time-series semantic change segmentation. The data is available at: https://mediatum.ub.tum.de/1650201.

abstract_zh: 地球观测是监测特定感兴趣区域土地利用演变的基本工具。在这种情况下，观察和精确定义变化需要时间序列数据和像素级分割。 To that end, we propose the DynamicEarthNet dataset that consists of daily, multi-spectral satellite observations of 75 selected areas of interest distributed over the globe with imagery from Planet Labs.这些观察结果与 7 个土地利用和土地覆盖 (LULC) 类别的按像素每月语义分割标签配对。 DynamicEarthNet 是第一个提供日常测量和高质量标签的独特组合的数据集。 In our experiments, we compare several established baselines that either utilize the daily observations as additional training data (semi-supervised learning) or multiple observations at once (spatio-temporal learning) as a point of reference for future research.最后，我们提出了一种新的评估指标 SCS，它解决了与时间序列语义变化分割相关的特定挑战。数据可在以下网址获取：https://mediatum.ub.tum.de/1650201。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DynamicEarthNet数据集，包含全球75个区域的每日多光谱卫星图像及月度土地利用语义分割标签，用于时序语义变化分割研究。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时获取高时间分辨率遥感数据与高质量像素级标注，限制了土地利用变化的精确监测与分析。
AI.method: 整合Planet Labs每日卫星影像与月度土地利用分类标签，构建包含7类地表覆盖的时序数据集，并设计SCS评估指标比较半监督学习与时空学习等基线方法。
AI.result: 首次提供每日观测与高质量标注的结合数据集，验证了所提SCS指标在时序语义变化分割任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DynamicEarthNet为土地利用变化分析提供新基准，其SCS指标可推动时序遥感分割领域方法创新。

authors_text: Fadi Biadsy,Youzheng Chen,Xia Zhang,Oleg Rybakov,Andrew Rosenberg,Pedro J. Moreno
title: A Scalable Model Specialization Framework for Training and Inference using Submodels and its Application to Speech Model Personalization
title_zh: 使用子模型进行训练和推理的可扩展模型专业化框架及其在语音模型个性化中的应用
comment: Submitted to INTERSPEECH
comments: Submitted to INTERSPEECH
abstract: Model fine-tuning and adaptation have become a common approach for model specialization for downstream tasks or domains. Fine-tuning the entire model or a subset of the parameters using light-weight adaptation has shown considerable success across different specialization tasks. Fine-tuning a model for a large number of domains typically requires starting a new training job for every domain posing scaling limitations. Once these models are trained, deploying them also poses significant scalability challenges for inference for real-time applications. In this paper, building upon prior light-weight adaptation techniques, we propose a modular framework that enables us to substantially improve scalability for model training and inference. We introduce Submodels that can be quickly and dynamically loaded for on-the-fly inference. We also propose multiple approaches for training those Submodels in parallel using an embedding space in the same training job. We test our framework on an extreme use-case which is speech model personalization for atypical speech, requiring a Submodel for each user. We obtain 128x Submodel throughput with a fixed computation budget without a loss of accuracy. We also show that learning a speaker-embedding space can scale further and reduce the amount of personalization training data required per speaker.
summary: Model fine-tuning and adaptation have become a common approach for model specialization for downstream tasks or domains. Fine-tuning the entire model or a subset of the parameters using light-weight adaptation has shown considerable success across different specialization tasks. Fine-tuning a model for a large number of domains typically requires starting a new training job for every domain posing scaling limitations. Once these models are trained, deploying them also poses significant scalability challenges for inference for real-time applications. In this paper, building upon prior light-weight adaptation techniques, we propose a modular framework that enables us to substantially improve scalability for model training and inference. We introduce Submodels that can be quickly and dynamically loaded for on-the-fly inference. We also propose multiple approaches for training those Submodels in parallel using an embedding space in the same training job. We test our framework on an extreme use-case which is speech model personalization for atypical speech, requiring a Submodel for each user. We obtain 128x Submodel throughput with a fixed computation budget without a loss of accuracy. We also show that learning a speaker-embedding space can scale further and reduce the amount of personalization training data required per speaker.
abstract_zh: 模型微调和适应已成为下游任务或领域模型专业化的常用方法。使用轻量级自适应对整个模型或参数子集进行微调在不同的专业化任务中取得了相当大的成功。为大量领域微调模型通常需要为每个具有扩展限制的领域启动新的训练作业。一旦这些模型经过训练，部署它们也会给实时应用程序的推理带来重大的可扩展性挑战。在本文中，基于先前的轻量级适应技术，我们提出了一个模块化框架，使我们能够大幅提高模型训练和推理的可扩展性。我们引入了可以快速动态加载以进行即时推理的子模型。我们还提出了在同一训练作业中使用嵌入空间并行训练这些子模型的多种方法。我们在一个极端用例上测试我们的框架，即针对非典型语音的语音模型个性化，需要为每个用户提供一个子模型。我们在固定计算预算的情况下获得了 128 倍的子模型吞吐量，且不损失准确性。我们还表明，学习说话人嵌入空间可以进一步扩展并减少每个说话人所需的个性化训练数据量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展的模型专业化框架，通过子模型实现训练和推理的高效性，并应用于语音模型个性化。
AI.motivation: 传统微调方法在多领域或用户场景下面临训练成本高、推理部署困难的 scalability 问题，尤其在语音个性化任务中需为每个用户单独训练模型。
AI.method: 引入动态加载的子模型架构，结合嵌入空间并行训练多个子模型，通过共享训练任务降低计算开销。
AI.result: 在固定计算预算下实现 128 倍子模型吞吐量，同时保持精度；通过说话人嵌入空间进一步减少单用户个性化数据需求。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了模型专业化中的可扩展性难题，为大规模个性化应用提供了高效解决方案。

We test our framework on an extreme use-case which is speech model personalization for atypical speech, requiring a Submodel for each user. We obtain 128x Submodel throughput with a fixed computation budget without a loss of accuracy. We also show that learning a speaker-embedding space can scale further and reduce the amount of personalization training data required per speaker. 模型微调和适应已成为下游任务或领域模型专业化的常用方法。使用轻量级自适应对整个模型或参数子集进行微调在不同的专业化任务中取得了相当大的成功。为大量领域微调模型通常需要为每个具有扩展限制的领域启动新的训练作业。一旦这些模型经过训练，部署它们也会给实时应用程序的推理带来重大的可扩展性挑战。在本文中，基于先前的轻量级适应技术，我们提出了一个模块化框架，使我们能够大幅提高模型训练和推理的可扩展性。我们引入了可以快速动态加载以进行即时推理的子模型。我们还提出了在同一训练作业中使用嵌入空间并行训练这些子模型的多种方法。我们在一个极端用例上测试我们的框架，即针对非典型语音的语音模型个性化，需要为每个用户提供一个子模型。我们在固定计算预算的情况下获得了 128 倍的子模型吞吐量，且不损失准确性。我们还表明，学习说话人嵌入空间可以进一步扩展并减少每个说话人所需的个性化训练数据量。 本文提出了一种可扩展的模型专业化框架，通过子模型实现训练和推理的高效性，并应用于语音模型个性化。 Fadi Biadsy,Youzheng Chen,Xia Zhang,Oleg Rybakov,Andrew Rosenberg,Pedro J. Moreno eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Brandon Smock,Rohith Pesala,Robin Abraham
title: GriTS: Grid table similarity metric for table structure recognition
title_zh: GriTS：用于表结构识别的网格表相似度度量
abstract: In this paper, we propose a new class of metric for table structure recognition (TSR) evaluation, called grid table similarity (GriTS). Unlike prior metrics, GriTS evaluates the correctness of a predicted table directly in its natural form as a matrix. To create a similarity measure between matrices, we generalize the two-dimensional largest common substructure (2D-LCS) problem, which is NP-hard, to the 2D most similar substructures (2D-MSS) problem and propose a polynomial-time heuristic for solving it. This algorithm produces both an upper and a lower bound on the true similarity between matrices. We show using evaluation on a large real-world dataset that in practice there is almost no difference between these bounds. We compare GriTS to other metrics and empirically validate that matrix similarity exhibits more desirable behavior than alternatives for TSR performance evaluation. Finally, GriTS unifies all three subtasks of cell topology recognition, cell location recognition, and cell content recognition within the same framework, which simplifies the evaluation and enables more meaningful comparisons across different types of TSR approaches. Code will be released at https://github.com/microsoft/table-transformer.
summary: In this paper, we propose a new class of metric for table structure recognition (TSR) evaluation, called grid table similarity (GriTS). Unlike prior metrics, GriTS evaluates the correctness of a predicted table directly in its natural form as a matrix. To create a similarity measure between matrices, we generalize the two-dimensional largest common substructure (2D-LCS) problem, which is NP-hard, to the 2D most similar substructures (2D-MSS) problem and propose a polynomial-time heuristic for solving it. This algorithm produces both an upper and a lower bound on the true similarity between matrices. We show using evaluation on a large real-world dataset that in practice there is almost no difference between these bounds. We compare GriTS to other metrics and empirically validate that matrix similarity exhibits more desirable behavior than alternatives for TSR performance evaluation. Finally, GriTS unifies all three subtasks of cell topology recognition, cell location recognition, and cell content recognition within the same framework, which simplifies the evaluation and enables more meaningful comparisons across different types of TSR approaches. Code will be released at https://github.com/microsoft/table-transformer.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一类用于表结构识别（TSR）评估的新指标，称为网格表相似度（GriTS）。与之前的指标不同，GriTS 直接以其自然形式（矩阵）评估预测表的正确性。为了创建矩阵之间的相似性度量，我们将 NP 困难的二维最大公共子结构 (2D-LCS) 问题推广到二维最相似子结构 (2D-MSS) 问题，并提出了一种多项式时间启发式方法来解决它。该算法产生矩阵之间真实相似度的上限和下限。我们通过对大型现实世界数据集的评估表明，实际上这些界限之间几乎没有差异。我们将 GriTS 与其他指标进行比较，并凭经验验证矩阵相似性比 TSR 性能评估的替代方案表现出更理想的行为。最后，GriTS 将细胞拓扑识别、细胞位置识别和细胞内容识别的所有三个子任务统一在同一框架内，从而简化了评估并能够在不同类型的 TSR 方法之间进行更有意义的比较。代码将在 https://github.com/microsoft/table-transformer 发布。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的表格结构识别评估指标GriTS，用于直接评估预测表格的正确性。
AI.motivation: 现有表格结构识别评估指标无法直接评估预测表格的矩阵形式，需更有效的相似度衡量方法。
AI.method: 通过将二维最大公共子结构问题推广为二维最相似子结构问题，并提出多项式时间启发式算法计算矩阵相似度。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上验证上下界几乎无差异，且GriTS在TSR评估中表现优于其他指标。
AI.conclusion: GriTS统一了单元格拓扑、位置和内容识别，简化评估并支持不同TSR方法的比较。

authors_text: Mohammad Javad Mirshojaeian Hosseini,Elisa Donati,Giacomo Indiveri,Robert A. Nawrocki
title: Organic log-domain integrator synapse
title_zh: 有机对数域积分器突触
comment: Accepted by Advanced Electronic Materials (18 pages, 17 figures)
comments: Accepted by Advanced Electronic Materials (18 pages, 17 figures)
abstract: Synapses play a critical role in memory, learning, and cognition. Their main functions include converting pre-synaptic voltage spikes to post-synaptic currents, as well as scaling the input signal. Several brain-inspired architectures have been proposed to emulate the behavior of biological synapses. While these are useful to explore the properties of nervous systems, the challenge of making biocompatible and flexible circuits with biologically plausible time constants and tunable gain remains. Here, a physically flexible organic log-domain integrator synaptic circuit is shown to address this challenge. In particular, the circuit is fabricated using organic-based materials that are electrically active, offer flexibility and biocompatibility, as well as time constants (critical in learning neural codes and encoding spatiotemporal patterns) that are biologically plausible. Using a 10 nF synaptic capacitor, the time constant reached 126 ms and 221 ms before and during bending, respectively. The flexible synaptic circuit is characterized before and during bending, followed by studies on the effects of weighting voltage, synaptic capacitance, and disparity in pre-synaptic signals on the time constant.
summary: Synapses play a critical role in memory, learning, and cognition. Their main functions include converting pre-synaptic voltage spikes to post-synaptic currents, as well as scaling the input signal. Several brain-inspired architectures have been proposed to emulate the behavior of biological synapses. While these are useful to explore the properties of nervous systems, the challenge of making biocompatible and flexible circuits with biologically plausible time constants and tunable gain remains. Here, a physically flexible organic log-domain integrator synaptic circuit is shown to address this challenge. In particular, the circuit is fabricated using organic-based materials that are electrically active, offer flexibility and biocompatibility, as well as time constants (critical in learning neural codes and encoding spatiotemporal patterns) that are biologically plausible. Using a 10 nF synaptic capacitor, the time constant reached 126 ms and 221 ms before and during bending, respectively. The flexible synaptic circuit is characterized before and during bending, followed by studies on the effects of weighting voltage, synaptic capacitance, and disparity in pre-synaptic signals on the time constant.
abstract_zh: 突触在记忆、学习和认知中发挥着至关重要的作用。它们的主要功能包括将突触前电压尖峰转换为突触后电流，以及缩放输入信号。已经提出了几种受大脑启发的架构来模拟生物突触的行为。虽然这些对于探索神经系统的特性很有用，但制造具有生物学上合理的时间常数和可调增益的生物相容性和柔性电路的挑战仍然存在。在这里，物理上灵活的有机对数域积分器突触电路被证明可以解决这一挑战。特别是，该电路是使用有机材料制造的，这些材料具有电活性，具有灵活性和生物相容性，以及生物学上合理的时间常数（对于学习神经代码和编码时空模式至关重要）。使用 10 nF 突触电容器，弯曲之前和弯曲期间的时间常数分别达到 126 ms 和 221 ms。在弯曲之前和期间对柔性突触电路进行了表征，然后研究了加权电压、突触电容和突触前信号差异对时间常数的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于有机材料的柔性对数域积分突触电路，用于模拟生物突触功能并解决现有神经形态电路的生物相容性与灵活性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有仿生神经元电路难以实现生物相容性、柔性和与生物神经元匹配的时间常数，亟需开发新型突触电路以支持神经形态计算与柔性电子接口。
AI.method: 采用有机电活性材料构建柔性突触电路，通过10nF突触电容实现可调时间常数，并系统研究弯曲状态、权重电压、电容值及突触信号差异对时间常数的影响。
AI.result: 电路在弯曲前后的特征时间常数分别为126ms和221ms，验证了其生物合理性；通过参数调控可实现突触增益与时间常数的灵活调整。
AI.conclusion: 该柔性有机突触电路为开发具有生物相容性、可拉伸性和神经编码能力的神经形态系统提供了关键技术支撑。

authors_text: Benedikt Boecking,Vincent Jeanselme,Artur Dubrawski
title: Constrained Clustering and Multiple Kernel Learning without Pairwise Constraint Relaxation
title_zh: 无成对约束松弛的约束聚类和多核学习
abstract: Clustering under pairwise constraints is an important knowledge discovery tool that enables the learning of appropriate kernels or distance metrics to improve clustering performance. These pairwise constraints, which come in the form of must-link and cannot-link pairs, arise naturally in many applications and are intuitive for users to provide. However, the common practice of relaxing discrete constraints to a continuous domain to ease optimization when learning kernels or metrics can harm generalization, as information which only encodes linkage is transformed to informing distances. We introduce a new constrained clustering algorithm that jointly clusters data and learns a kernel in accordance with the available pairwise constraints. To generalize well, our method is designed to maximize constraint satisfaction without relaxing pairwise constraints to a continuous domain where they inform distances. We show that the proposed method outperforms existing approaches on a large number of diverse publicly available datasets, and we discuss how our method can scale to handling large data.
summary: Clustering under pairwise constraints is an important knowledge discovery tool that enables the learning of appropriate kernels or distance metrics to improve clustering performance. These pairwise constraints, which come in the form of must-link and cannot-link pairs, arise naturally in many applications and are intuitive for users to provide. However, the common practice of relaxing discrete constraints to a continuous domain to ease optimization when learning kernels or metrics can harm generalization, as information which only encodes linkage is transformed to informing distances. We introduce a new constrained clustering algorithm that jointly clusters data and learns a kernel in accordance with the available pairwise constraints. To generalize well, our method is designed to maximize constraint satisfaction without relaxing pairwise constraints to a continuous domain where they inform distances. We show that the proposed method outperforms existing approaches on a large number of diverse publicly available datasets, and we discuss how our method can scale to handling large data.
abstract_zh: 成对约束下的聚类是一种重要的知识发现工具，可以学习适当的核或距离度量来提高聚类性能。这些成对约束以必须链接和不能链接对的形式出现，在许多应用中自然出现，并且用户可以直观地提供。然而，在学习内核或度量时放宽离散约束到连续域以简化优化的常见做法可能会损害泛化性，因为仅编码链接的信息会被转换为告知距离。我们引入了一种新的约束聚类算法，该算法联合聚类数据并根据可用的成对约束学习内核。为了很好地概括，我们的方法旨在最大化约束满足，而不将成对约束放松到它们告知距离的连续域。我们表明，所提出的方法在大量不同的公开数据集上优于现有方法，并且我们讨论了我们的方法如何扩展以处理大数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需放松成对约束的约束聚类与多核学习方法，通过联合优化聚类和核学习以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将离散约束转化为连续域优化时会损失约束信息，导致泛化能力下降，需直接处理离散约束以保持信息完整性。
AI.method: 设计联合聚类与核学习算法，在保持必须链接/不可链接约束离散性的前提下，通过最大化约束满足度进行优化。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集实验中优于现有方法，且算法可扩展处理大规模数据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过保留约束原始信息实现更优聚类效果，为约束学习提供了新的有效范式。
