search_text: Constrained Clustering and Multiple Kernel Learning without Pairwise Constraint Relaxation 无成对约束松弛的约束聚类和多核学习 Clustering under pairwise constraints is an important knowledge discovery tool that enables the learning of appropriate kernels or distance metrics to improve clustering performance. These pairwise constraints, which come in the form of must-link and cannot-link pairs, arise naturally in many applications and are intuitive for users to provide. However, the common practice of relaxing discrete constraints to a continuous domain to ease optimization when learning kernels or metrics can harm generalization, as information which only encodes linkage is transformed to informing distances. We introduce a new constrained clustering algorithm that jointly clusters data and learns a kernel in accordance with the available pairwise constraints. To generalize well, our method is designed to maximize constraint satisfaction without relaxing pairwise constraints to a continuous domain where they inform distances. We show that the proposed method outperforms existing approaches on a large number of diverse publicly available datasets, and we discuss how our method can scale to handling large data. 成对约束下的聚类是一种重要的知识发现工具，可以学习适当的核或距离度量来提高聚类性能。这些成对约束以必须链接和不能链接对的形式出现，在许多应用中自然出现，并且用户可以直观地提供。然而，在学习内核或度量时放宽离散约束到连续域以简化优化的常见做法可能会损害泛化性，因为仅编码链接的信息会被转换为告知距离。我们引入了一种新的约束聚类算法，该算法联合聚类数据并根据可用的成对约束学习内核。为了很好地概括，我们的方法旨在最大化约束满足，而不将成对约束放松到它们告知距离的连续域。我们表明，所提出的方法在大量不同的公开数据集上优于现有方法，并且我们讨论了我们的方法如何扩展以处理大数据。 本文提出一种无需放松成对约束的约束聚类与多核学习方法，通过联合优化聚类和核学习以提升性能。 Benedikt Boecking,Vincent Jeanselme,Artur Dubrawski cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Ahmed Abouzeid,Ole-Christoffer Granmo,Christian Webersik,Morten Goodwin
title: Socially Fair Mitigation of Misinformation on Social Networks via Constraint Stochastic Optimization
title_zh: 通过约束随机优化以社会公平的方式减少社交网络上的错误信息
comment: These 14-pages paper is a version with appendices so that I can cite appendices in the original version of the paper which was accepted and submitted to AAAI22
comments: These 14-pages paper is a version with appendices so that I can cite appendices in the original version of the paper which was accepted and submitted to AAAI22
abstract: Recent social networks' misinformation mitigation approaches tend to investigate how to reduce misinformation by considering a whole-network statistical scale. However, unbalanced misinformation exposures among individuals urge to study fair allocation of mitigation resources. Moreover, the network has random dynamics which change over time. Therefore, we introduce a stochastic and non-stationary knapsack problem, and we apply its resolution to mitigate misinformation in social network campaigns. We further propose a generic misinformation mitigation algorithm that is robust to different social networks' misinformation statistics, allowing a promising impact in real-world scenarios. A novel loss function ensures fair mitigation among users. We achieve fairness by intelligently allocating a mitigation incentivization budget to the knapsack, and optimizing the loss function. To this end, a team of Learning Automata (LA) drives the budget allocation. Each LA is associated with a user and learns to minimize its exposure to misinformation by performing a non-stationary and stochastic walk over its state space. Our results show how our LA-based method is robust and outperforms similar misinformation mitigation methods in how the mitigation is fairly influencing the network users.
summary: Recent social networks' misinformation mitigation approaches tend to investigate how to reduce misinformation by considering a whole-network statistical scale. However, unbalanced misinformation exposures among individuals urge to study fair allocation of mitigation resources. Moreover, the network has random dynamics which change over time. Therefore, we introduce a stochastic and non-stationary knapsack problem, and we apply its resolution to mitigate misinformation in social network campaigns. We further propose a generic misinformation mitigation algorithm that is robust to different social networks' misinformation statistics, allowing a promising impact in real-world scenarios. A novel loss function ensures fair mitigation among users. We achieve fairness by intelligently allocating a mitigation incentivization budget to the knapsack, and optimizing the loss function. To this end, a team of Learning Automata (LA) drives the budget allocation. Each LA is associated with a user and learns to minimize its exposure to misinformation by performing a non-stationary and stochastic walk over its state space. Our results show how our LA-based method is robust and outperforms similar misinformation mitigation methods in how the mitigation is fairly influencing the network users.
abstract_zh: 最近的社交网络的错误信息缓解方法倾向于研究如何通过考虑全网络统计规模来减少错误信息。然而，个人之间不平衡的错误信息暴露促使人们研究缓解资源的公平分配。此外，网络具有随时间变化的随机动态。因此，我们引入了随机且非平稳的背包问题，并应用其解决方案来减少社交网络活动中的错误信息。我们进一步提出了一种通用的错误信息缓解算法，该算法对不同社交网络的错误信息统计数据具有鲁棒性，从而在现实世界场景中产生有希望的影响。新颖的损失函数确保用户之间的公平缓解。我们通过智能地将缓解激励预算分配给背包并优化损失函数来实现公平。为此，学习自动机 (LA) 团队负责推动预算分配。每个 LA 都与一个用户相关联，并通过在其状态空间上执行非平稳随机行走来学习最大限度地减少错误信息的暴露。我们的结果表明，我们基于 LA 的方法非常稳健，并且在缓解措施如何公平地影响网络用户方面优于类似的错误信息缓解方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于约束随机优化的社会公平性虚假信息缓解方法，通过学习自动机分配资源预算以实现用户间的公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有虚假信息缓解方法侧重整体网络统计尺度，忽视个体间信息暴露的不平衡性，且难以应对网络动态变化带来的挑战。
AI.method: 将问题建模为随机非平稳背包问题，设计公平性损失函数，并利用学习自动机（LA）团队动态分配缓解预算，通过非平稳状态空间随机游走优化用户个体暴露水平。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个社交网络数据集上优于现有方法，能更公平地降低用户虚假信息暴露量且具备动态适应性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合随机优化与学习自动机机制，本文为社交网络虚假信息治理提供了兼顾公平性与动态适应性的新型解决方案。

authors_text: Gauthier Tallec,Edouard Yvinec,Arnaud Dapogny,Kevin Bailly
title: Multi-label Transformer for Action Unit Detection
title_zh: 用于动作单元检测的多标签变压器
abstract: Action Unit (AU) Detection is the branch of affective computing that aims at recognizing unitary facial muscular movements. It is key to unlock unbiased computational face representations and has therefore aroused great interest in the past few years. One of the main obstacles toward building efficient deep learning based AU detection system is the lack of wide facial image databases annotated by AU experts. In that extent the ABAW challenge paves the way toward better AU detection as it involves a 2M frames AU annotated dataset. In this paper, we present our submission to the ABAW3 challenge. In a nutshell, we applied a multi-label detection transformer that leverage multi-head attention to learn which part of the face image is the most relevant to predict each AU.
summary: Action Unit (AU) Detection is the branch of affective computing that aims at recognizing unitary facial muscular movements. It is key to unlock unbiased computational face representations and has therefore aroused great interest in the past few years. One of the main obstacles toward building efficient deep learning based AU detection system is the lack of wide facial image databases annotated by AU experts. In that extent the ABAW challenge paves the way toward better AU detection as it involves a 2M frames AU annotated dataset. In this paper, we present our submission to the ABAW3 challenge. In a nutshell, we applied a multi-label detection transformer that leverage multi-head attention to learn which part of the face image is the most relevant to predict each AU.
abstract_zh: 动作单元（AU）检测是情感计算的一个分支，旨在识别单一的面部肌肉运动。它是解锁无偏差计算人脸表示的关键，因此在过去几年引起了人们的极大兴趣。构建高效的基于深度学习的 AU 检测系统的主要障碍之一是缺乏由 AU 专家注释的广泛面部图像数据库。在某种程度上，ABAW 挑战为更好的 AU 检测铺平了道路，因为它涉及 2M 帧 AU 注释数据集。在本文中，我们展示了我们对 ABAW3 挑战的提交内容。简而言之，我们应用了多标签检测转换器，利用多头注意力来学习面部图像的哪一部分与预测每个 AU 最相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多标签Transformer的动作单元检测方法，用于识别面部肌肉运动以提升情感计算的准确性。
AI.motivation: 动作单元检测因缺乏大规模专家标注数据集而面临挑战，ABAW3挑战赛提供的2M帧标注数据为研究提供了新机遇。
AI.method: 采用多标签检测Transformer模型，通过多头注意力机制学习面部关键区域与各动作单元的关联性。
AI.result: 在ABAW3挑战赛中提交了该方法，实现了对多标签动作单元的有效检测。
AI.conclusion: 多头注意力机制能有效捕捉面部区域与动作单元的依赖关系，为AU检测提供了新思路。

It is key to unlock unbiased computational face representations and has therefore aroused great interest in the past few years. One of the main obstacles toward building efficient deep learning based AU detection system is the lack of wide facial image databases annotated by AU experts. In that extent the ABAW challenge paves the way toward better AU detection as it involves a 2M frames AU annotated dataset. In this paper, we present our submission to the ABAW3 challenge. In a nutshell, we applied a multi-label detection transformer that leverage multi-head attention to learn which part of the face image is the most relevant to predict each AU. 动作单元（AU）检测是情感计算的一个分支，旨在识别单一的面部肌肉运动。它是解锁无偏差计算人脸表示的关键，因此在过去几年引起了人们的极大兴趣。构建高效的基于深度学习的 AU 检测系统的主要障碍之一是缺乏由 AU 专家注释的广泛面部图像数据库。在某种程度上，ABAW 挑战为更好的 AU 检测铺平了道路，因为它涉及 2M 帧 AU 注释数据集。在本文中，我们展示了我们对 ABAW3 挑战的提交内容。简而言之，我们应用了多标签检测转换器，利用多头注意力来学习面部图像的哪一部分与预测每个 AU 最相关。 本文提出一种基于多标签Transformer的动作单元检测方法，用于识别面部肌肉运动以提升情感计算的准确性。 Gauthier Tallec,Edouard Yvinec,Arnaud Dapogny,Kevin Bailly cs.CV

authors_text: Alex Morehead,Watchanan Chantapakul,Jianlin Cheng
title: Semi-Supervised Graph Learning Meets Dimensionality Reduction
title_zh: 半监督图学习遇到降维
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, and 5 tables. Submitted to the 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022). Source code is available at https://github.com/amorehead/SSL-With-DR-And-GNNs
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures, and 5 tables. Submitted to the 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022). Source code is available at https://github.com/amorehead/SSL-With-DR-And-GNNs
abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) has recently received increased attention from machine learning researchers. By enabling effective propagation of known labels in graph-based deep learning (GDL) algorithms, SSL is poised to become an increasingly used technique in GDL in the coming years. However, there are currently few explorations in the graph-based SSL literature on exploiting classical dimensionality reduction techniques for improved label propagation. In this work, we investigate the use of dimensionality reduction techniques such as PCA, t-SNE, and UMAP to see their effect on the performance of graph neural networks (GNNs) designed for semi-supervised propagation of node labels. Our study makes use of benchmark semi-supervised GDL datasets such as the Cora and Citeseer datasets to allow meaningful comparisons of the representations learned by each algorithm when paired with a dimensionality reduction technique. Our comprehensive benchmarks and clustering visualizations quantitatively and qualitatively demonstrate that, under certain conditions, employing a priori and a posteriori dimensionality reduction to GNN inputs and outputs, respectively, can simultaneously improve the effectiveness of semi-supervised node label propagation and node clustering. Our source code is freely available on GitHub.

Our study makes use of benchmark semi-supervised GDL datasets such as the Cora and Citeseer datasets to allow meaningful comparisons of the representations learned by each algorithm when paired with a dimensionality reduction technique. Our comprehensive benchmarks and clustering visualizations quantitatively and qualitatively demonstrate that, under certain conditions, employing a priori and a posteriori dimensionality reduction to GNN inputs and outputs, respectively, can simultaneously improve the effectiveness of semi-supervised node label propagation and node clustering. Our source code is freely available on GitHub.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习（SSL）最近受到机器学习研究人员的越来越多的关注。通过在基于图的深度学习 (GDL) 算法中实现已知标签的有效传播，SSL 有望在未来几年成为 GDL 中越来越多使用的技术。然而，目前基于图的 SSL 文献中关于利用经典降维技术来改进标签传播的探索很少。在这项工作中，我们研究了 PCA、t-SNE 和 UMAP 等降维技术的使用，以了解它们对专为节点标签的半监督传播而设计的图神经网络 (GNN) 性能的影响。我们的研究利用基准半监督 GDL 数据集（例如 Cora 和 Citeseer 数据集），在与降维技术配合使用时，可以对每种算法学到的表示进行有意义的比较。我们的综合基准和聚类可视化定量和定性地证明，在某些条件下，分别对 GNN 输入和输出采用先验和后验降维，可以同时提高半监督节点标签传播和节点聚类的有效性。我们的源代码可以在 GitHub 上免费获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究将半监督图学习与经典降维技术结合，以提升图神经网络在节点标签传播中的性能。
AI.motivation: 半监督学习在图深度学习中应用广泛，但现有研究较少探索利用降维技术优化标签传播效果。
AI.method: 采用PCA、t-SNE和UMAP等降维方法，分别作用于图神经网络的输入和输出，结合Cora和Citeseer等基准数据集进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，在特定条件下，先验和后验降维可同时提升节点标签传播效果及聚类性能。
AI.conclusion: 降维技术与半监督图学习的结合能有效增强图神经网络的表示学习能力与聚类效果。

authors_text: Marie-Louise Lackner,Christoph Mrkvicka,Nysret Musliu,Daniel Walkiewicz,Felix Winter
title: Exact methods and lower bounds for the Oven Scheduling Problem
title_zh: 烤箱调度问题的精确方法和下界
abstract: The Oven Scheduling Problem (OSP) is a new parallel batch scheduling problem that arises in the area of electronic component manufacturing. Jobs need to be scheduled to one of several ovens and may be processed simultaneously in one batch if they have compatible requirements. The scheduling of jobs must respect several constraints concerning eligibility and availability of ovens, release dates of jobs, setup times between batches as well as oven capacities. Running the ovens is highly energy-intensive and thus the main objective, besides finishing jobs on time, is to minimize the cumulative batch processing time across all ovens. This objective distinguishes the OSP from other batch processing problems which typically minimize objectives related to makespan, tardiness or lateness. We propose to solve this NP-hard scheduling problem via constraint programming (CP) and integer linear programming (ILP) and present corresponding models. For an experimental evaluation, we introduce a multi-parameter random instance generator to provide a diverse set of problem instances. Using state-of-the-art solvers, we evaluate the quality and compare the performance of our CP- and ILP-models. We show that our models can find feasible solutions for instances of realistic size, many of those being provably optimal or nearly optimal solutions. Finally, we derive theoretical lower bounds on the solution cost of feasible solutions to the OSP; these can be computed within a few seconds. We show that these lower bounds are competitive with those derived by state-of-the-art solvers.
summary: The Oven Scheduling Problem (OSP) is a new parallel batch scheduling problem that arises in the area of electronic component manufacturing. Jobs need to be scheduled to one of several ovens and may be processed simultaneously in one batch if they have compatible requirements. The scheduling of jobs must respect several constraints concerning eligibility and availability of ovens, release dates of jobs, setup times between batches as well as oven capacities. Running the ovens is highly energy-intensive and thus the main objective, besides finishing jobs on time, is to minimize the cumulative batch processing time across all ovens. This objective distinguishes the OSP from other batch processing problems which typically minimize objectives related to makespan, tardiness or lateness. We propose to solve this NP-hard scheduling problem via constraint programming (CP) and integer linear programming (ILP) and present corresponding models. For an experimental evaluation, we introduce a multi-parameter random instance generator to provide a diverse set of problem instances. Using state-of-the-art solvers, we evaluate the quality and compare the performance of our CP- and ILP-models. We show that our models can find feasible solutions for instances of realistic size, many of those being provably optimal or nearly optimal solutions. Finally, we derive theoretical lower bounds on the solution cost of feasible solutions to the OSP; these can be computed within a few seconds. We show that these lower bounds are competitive with those derived by state-of-the-art solvers.
abstract_zh: 烘箱调度问题（OSP）是电子元件制造领域出现的一个新的并行批量调度问题。工作需要安排到多个烤箱之一，如果它们有兼容的要求，则可以一批同时处理。作业的安排必须遵守有关烤箱的资格和可用性、作业的发布日期、批次之间的设置时间以及烤箱容量的多项限制。运行烤箱是高度能源密集型的，因此除了按时完成作业外，主要目标是最大限度地减少所有烤箱的累积批量处理时间。该目标将 OSP 与其他批处理问题区分开来，其他批处理问题通常最小化与完工时间、迟到或迟到相关的目标。我们建议通过约束规划（CP）和整数线性规划（ILP）来解决这个NP难调度问题，并提出相应的模型。对于实验评估，我们引入了多参数随机实例生成器来提供不同的问题实例集。使用最先进的求解器，我们评估 CP 模型和 ILP 模型的质量并比较其性能。我们表明，我们的模型可以为实际大小的实例找到可行的解决方案，其中许多解决方案已被证明是最佳或接近最佳的解决方案。最后，我们得出 OSP 可行解决方案的解决成本的理论下限；这些可以在几秒钟内计算出来。我们证明这些下限与最先进的求解器得出的下限具有竞争​​力。

AI.tldr: 本文针对电子元件制造中的新型并行批量调度问题（OSP），提出约束编程（CP）和整数线性规划（ILP）模型，并设计理论下界计算方法，以最小化烤箱累计处理时间。
AI.motivation: OSP需在满足多约束条件下优化能量消耗目标（累计处理时间），而现有调度方法多关注最大完成时间等指标，缺乏针对该问题的精确求解方案。
AI.method: 构建CP与ILP模型，设计多参数随机实例生成器，通过实验对比模型性能，并推导理论下界计算方法。
AI.result: 模型可求解现实规模实例并获得最优或近似最优解，理论下界计算速度达数秒级，效果与先进求解器相当。
AI.conclusion: 提出的精确方法和下界计算为OSP提供了有效求解框架，兼顾实际应用需求与理论分析价值。

authors_text: Jiaan Wang,Fandong Meng,Duo Zheng,Yunlong Liang,Zhixu Li,Jianfeng Qu,Jie Zhou
title: A Survey on Cross-Lingual Summarization
title_zh: 跨语言概括综述
comment: Accepted at TACL 2022
comments: Accepted at TACL 2022
abstract: Cross-lingual summarization is the task of generating a summary in one language (e.g., English) for the given document(s) in a different language (e.g., Chinese). Under the globalization background, this task has attracted increasing attention of the computational linguistics community. Nevertheless, there still remains a lack of comprehensive review for this task. Therefore, we present the first systematic critical review on the datasets, approaches, and challenges in this field. Specifically, we carefully organize existing datasets and approaches according to different construction methods and solution paradigms, respectively. For each type of datasets or approaches, we thoroughly introduce and summarize previous efforts and further compare them with each other to provide deeper analyses. In the end, we also discuss promising directions and offer our thoughts to facilitate future research. This survey is for both beginners and experts in cross-lingual summarization, and we hope it will serve as a starting point as well as a source of new ideas for researchers and engineers interested in this area.
summary: Cross-lingual summarization is the task of generating a summary in one language (e.g., English) for the given document(s) in a different language (e.g., Chinese). authors_text: Haoran Zhou,Honghua Chen,Yingkui Zhang,Mingqiang Wei,Haoran Xie,Jun Wang,Tong Lu,Jing Qin,Xiao-Ping Zhang
title: Refine-Net: Normal Refinement Neural Network for Noisy Point Clouds
title_zh: Refine-Net：噪声点云的常规细化神经网络
comment: Accepted by TPAMI
comments: Accepted by TPAMI
abstract: Point normal, as an intrinsic geometric property of 3D objects, not only serves conventional geometric tasks such as surface consolidation and reconstruction, but also facilitates cutting-edge learning-based techniques for shape analysis and generation. In this paper, we propose a normal refinement network, called Refine-Net, to predict accurate normals for noisy point clouds. Traditional normal estimation wisdom heavily depends on priors such as surface shapes or noise distributions, while learning-based solutions settle for single types of hand-crafted features. Differently, our network is designed to refine the initial normal of each point by extracting additional information from multiple feature representations. To this end, several feature modules are developed and incorporated into Refine-Net by a novel connection module. Besides the overall network architecture of Refine-Net, we propose a new multi-scale fitting patch selection scheme for the initial normal estimation, by absorbing geometry domain knowledge. Also, Refine-Net is a generic normal estimation framework: 1) point normals obtained from other methods can be further refined, and 2) any feature module related to the surface geometric structures can be potentially integrated into the framework. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate the clear superiority of Refine-Net over the state-of-the-arts on both synthetic and real-scanned datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/hrzhou2/refinenet.

In this paper, we propose a normal refinement network, called Refine-Net, to predict accurate normals for noisy point clouds. Traditional normal estimation wisdom heavily depends on priors such as surface shapes or noise distributions, while learning-based solutions settle for single types of hand-crafted features. Differently, our network is designed to refine the initial normal of each point by extracting additional information from multiple feature representations. To this end, several feature modules are developed and incorporated into Refine-Net by a novel connection module. Besides the overall network architecture of Refine-Net, we propose a new multi-scale fitting patch selection scheme for the initial normal estimation, by absorbing geometry domain knowledge. Also, Refine-Net is a generic normal estimation framework: 1) point normals obtained from other methods can be further refined, and 2) any feature module related to the surface geometric structures can be potentially integrated into the framework. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations demonstrate the clear superiority of Refine-Net over the state-of-the-arts on both synthetic and real-scanned datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/hrzhou2/refinenet.
abstract_zh: 点法线作为 3D 对象的固有几何属性，不仅服务于表面合并和重建等传统几何任务，而且还促进了基于学习的尖端形状分析和生成技术。在本文中，我们提出了一种法线细化网络，称为Refine-Net，用于预测噪声点云的准确法线。传统的法线估计智慧在很大程度上取决于表面形状或噪声分布等先验知识，而基于学习的解决方案则适用于单一类型的手工特征。不同的是，我们的网络旨在通过从多个特征表示中提取附加信息来细化每个点的初始法线。为此，开发了几个功能模块，并通过新颖的连接模块将其合并到Refine-Net中。除了Refine-Net的整体网络架构之外，我们通过吸收几何领域知识，提出了一种新的多尺度拟合补丁选择方案，用于初始法线估计。此外，Refine-Net 是一个通用的法线估计框架：1）从其他方法获得的点法线可以进一步细化，2）与表面几何结构相关的任何特征模块都可以集成到框架中。定性和定量评估表明，Refine-Net 在合成数据集和真实扫描数据集上均明显优于最先进的技术。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/hrzhou2/refinenet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Refine-Net的神经网络，用于预测噪声点云的准确法线。
AI.motivation: 传统的法线估计方法依赖于表面形状或噪声分布等先验知识，而基于学习的方法则依赖于单一类型的手工特征。因此，需要一种更灵活和准确的法线估计方法。
AI.method: 本文设计了一个名为Refine-Net的网络，通过从多种特征表示中提取额外信息来优化每个点的初始法线。开发了多个特征模块，并通过新的连接模块集成到Refine-Net中。此外，还提出了一种新的多尺度拟合补丁选择方案用于初始法线估计。
AI.result: 定性和定量评估表明，Refine-Net在合成和真实扫描数据集上均优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: Refine-Net是一个通用的法线估计框架，可以进一步优化其他方法得到的法线，并且可以集成与表面几何结构相关的任何特征模块。

authors_text: Julián Tachella,Dongdong Chen,Mike Davies
title: Sensing Theorems for Unsupervised Learning in Linear Inverse Problems
title_zh: 线性逆问题中无监督学习的感知定理
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2201.12151
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2201.12151
abstract: Solving an ill-posed linear inverse problem requires knowledge about the underlying signal model. In many applications, this model is a priori unknown and has to be learned from data. However, it is impossible to learn the model using observations obtained via a single incomplete measurement operator, as there is no information about the signal model in the nullspace of the operator, resulting in a chicken-and-egg problem: to learn the model we need reconstructed signals, but to reconstruct the signals we need to know the model. Two ways to overcome this limitation are using multiple measurement operators or assuming that the signal model is invariant to a certain group action. In this paper, we present necessary and sufficient sensing conditions for learning the signal model from measurement data alone which only depend on the dimension of the model and the number of operators or properties of the group action that the model is invariant to. As our results are agnostic of the learning algorithm, they shed light into the fundamental limitations of learning from incomplete data and have implications in a wide range set of practical algorithms, such as dictionary learning, matrix completion and deep neural networks.
summary: Solving an ill-posed linear inverse problem requires knowledge about the underlying signal model. In many applications, this model is a priori unknown and has to be learned from data. However, it is impossible to learn the model using observations obtained via a single incomplete measurement operator, as there is no information about the signal model in the nullspace of the operator, resulting in a chicken-and-egg problem: to learn the model we need reconstructed signals, but to reconstruct the signals we need to know the model. Two ways to overcome this limitation are using multiple measurement operators or assuming that the signal model is invariant to a certain group action. In this paper, we present necessary and sufficient sensing conditions for learning the signal model from measurement data alone which only depend on the dimension of the model and the number of operators or properties of the group action that the model is invariant to. As our results are agnostic of the learning algorithm, they shed light into the fundamental limitations of learning from incomplete data and have implications in a wide range set of practical algorithms, such as dictionary learning, matrix completion and deep neural networks.
abstract_zh: 解决不适定线性逆问题需要了解底层信号模型。在许多应用中，该模型是先验未知的，必须从数据中学习。然而，利用单个不完整测量算子获得的观测值来学习模型是不可能的，因为算子的零空间中没有关于信号模型的信息，从而导致了先有鸡还是先有蛋的问题：要学习模型，我们需要重构信号，但要重构信号，我们需要了解模型。克服这一限制的两种方法是使用多个测量算子或假设信号模型对于特定的群体行为是不变的。在本文中，我们提出了仅从测量数据学习信号模型的必要且充分的感知条件，该条件仅取决于模型的维数和算子的数量或模型不变的群动作的属性。由于我们的结果与学习算法无关，因此它们揭示了从不完整数据中学习的基本局限性，并对一系列广泛的实用算法产生了影响，例如字典学习、矩阵补全和深度神经网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了在线性逆问题中无监督学习信号模型的必要且充分感知条件，仅依赖模型维度和测量算子数量或群不变性性质。
AI.motivation: 解决不适定线性逆问题需依赖未知信号模型，但单一测量算子无法提供零空间信息，导致模型学习与信号重建的鸡生蛋困境。
AI.method: 通过分析多测量算子或群不变性假设，推导出仅依赖模型维度、算子数量及群作用性质的通用感知条件，与具体学习算法无关。
AI.result: 建立了无监督学习信号模型的理论界限，揭示了不完全数据下学习的基本限制，并为字典学习、矩阵补全等算法提供普适性指导。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为逆问题中无监督学习提供了理论框架，明确了模型学习与数据完备性的关系，指出了现有算法的改进方向。

search_text: Sensing Theorems for Unsupervised Learning in Linear Inverse Problems 线性逆问题中无监督学习的感知定理 Solving an ill-posed linear inverse problem requires knowledge about the underlying signal model. In many applications, this model is a priori unknown and has to be learned from data. However, it is impossible to learn the model using observations obtained via a single incomplete measurement operator, as there is no information about the signal model in the nullspace of the operator, resulting in a chicken-and-egg problem: to learn the model we need reconstructed signals, but to reconstruct the signals we need to know the model. Two ways to overcome this limitation are using multiple measurement operators or assuming that the signal model is invariant to a certain group action. In this paper, we present necessary and sufficient sensing conditions for learning the signal model from measurement data alone which only depend on the dimension of the model and the number of operators or properties of the group action that the model is invariant to. As our results are agnostic of the learning algorithm, they shed light into the fundamental limitations of learning from incomplete data and have implications in a wide range set of practical algorithms, such as dictionary learning, matrix completion and deep neural networks. 解决不适定线性逆问题需要了解底层信号模型。在许多应用中，该模型是先验未知的，必须从数据中学习。然而，利用单个不完整测量算子获得的观测值来学习模型是不可能的，因为算子的零空间中没有关于信号模型的信息，从而导致了先有鸡还是先有蛋的问题：要学习模型，我们需要重构信号，但要重构信号，我们需要了解模型。克服这一限制的两种方法是使用多个测量算子或假设信号模型对于特定的群体行为是不变的。在本文中，我们提出了仅从测量数据学习信号模型的必要且充分的感知条件，该条件仅取决于模型的维数和算子的数量或模型不变的群动作的属性。由于我们的结果与学习算法无关，因此它们揭示了从不完整数据中学习的基本局限性，并对一系列广泛的实用算法产生了影响，例如字典学习、矩阵补全和深度神经网络。 本文提出了在线性逆问题中无监督学习信号模型的必要且充分感知条件，仅依赖模型维度和测量算子数量或群不变性性质。 Julián Tachella,Dongdong Chen,Mike Davies stat.ML,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Dong Xing,Chenguang Zhao,Gang Wang
title: A Spatial-Temporal Attention Multi-Graph Convolution Network for Ride-Hailing Demand Prediction Based on Periodicity with Offset
title_zh: 基于偏移周期的时空注意力多图卷积网络网约车需求预测
comment: We have found another earlier related work that uses a similar structure. And therfore, we hope to withdraw this version and willl include more related work in a future version
comments: We have found another earlier related work that uses a similar structure. And therfore, we hope to withdraw this version and willl include more related work in a future version
abstract: Ride-hailing service is becoming a leading part in urban transportation. To improve the efficiency of ride-hailing service, accurate prediction of transportation demand is a fundamental challenge. In this paper, we tackle this problem from both aspects of network structure and data-set formulation. For network design, we propose a spatial-temporal attention multi-graph convolution network (STA-MGCN). A spatial-temporal layer in STA-MGCN is developed to capture the temporal correlations by temporal attention mechanism and temporal gate convolution, and the spatial correlations by multigraph convolution. A feature cluster layer is introduced to learn latent regional functions and to reduce the computation burden. For the data-set formulation, we develop a novel approach which considers the transportation feature of periodicity with offset. Instead of only using history data during the same time period, the history order demand in forward and backward neighboring time periods from yesterday and last week are also included. Extensive experiments on the three real-world datasets of New-York, Chicago and Chengdu show that the proposed algorithm achieves the state-of-the-art performance for ride-hailing demand prediction.
summary: Ride-hailing service is becoming a leading part in urban transportation. To improve the efficiency of ride-hailing service, accurate prediction of transportation demand is a fundamental challenge. In this paper, we tackle this problem from both aspects of network structure and data-set formulation. For network design, we propose a spatial-temporal attention multi-graph convolution network (STA-MGCN). A spatial-temporal layer in STA-MGCN is developed to capture the temporal correlations by temporal attention mechanism and temporal gate convolution, and the spatial correlations by multigraph convolution. A feature cluster layer is introduced to learn latent regional functions and to reduce the computation burden. For the data-set formulation, we develop a novel approach which considers the transportation feature of periodicity with offset. Instead of only using history data during the same time period, the history order demand in forward and backward neighboring time periods from yesterday and last week are also included. Extensive experiments on the three real-world datasets of New-York, Chicago and Chengdu show that the proposed algorithm achieves the state-of-the-art performance for ride-hailing demand prediction.
abstract_zh: 网约车服务正在成为城市交通的主导部分。要提高网约车服务的效率，准确预测交通需求是一个根本性的挑战。在本文中，我们从网络结构和数据集制定两个方面解决这个问题。对于网络设计，我们提出了时空注意力多图卷积网络（STA-MGCN）。 STA-MGCN 中的时空层被开发来通过时间注意机制和时间门卷积捕获时间相关性，并通过多图卷积捕获空间相关性。引入特征簇层来学习潜在区域函数并减少计算负担。对于数据集的制定，我们开发了一种新颖的方法，该方法考虑了具有偏移的周期性传输特征。不仅使用同一时间段的历史数据，还包括昨天和上周前后相邻时间段的历史订单需求。对纽约、芝加哥和成都三个现实世界数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的算法在网约车需求预测方面实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时空注意力机制和多图卷积网络的模型（STA-MGCN），用于改进网约车需求预测，考虑周期性偏移的数据特征。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效捕捉时空相关性及周期性偏移特征，导致网约车需求预测精度不足。
AI.method: 设计STA-MGCN网络，结合时空注意力机制、时序门控卷积和多图卷积；提出周期性偏移数据集构建方法，融合历史相邻时段数据。
AI.result: 在纽约、芝加哥和成都三个真实数据集上达到网约车需求预测的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: STA-MGCN通过建模时空关联与周期性偏移特征，显著提升了需求预测性能。

authors_text: Brendan Juba,Roni Stern
title: An Example of the SAM+ Algorithm for Learning Action Models for Stochastic Worlds
title_zh: 用于学习随机世界行动模型的 SAM+ 算法示例
abstract: In this technical report, we provide a complete example of running the SAM+ algorithm, an algorithm for learning stochastic planning action models, on a simplified PPDDL version of the Coffee problem. We provide a very brief description of the SAM+ algorithm and detailed description of our simplified version of the Coffee domain, and then describe the results of running it on the simplified Coffee domain.
summary: In this technical report, we provide a complete example of running the SAM+ algorithm, an algorithm for learning stochastic planning action models, on a simplified PPDDL version of the Coffee problem. We provide a very brief description of the SAM+ algorithm and detailed description of our simplified version of the Coffee domain, and then describe the results of running it on the simplified Coffee domain.
abstract_zh: 在本技术报告中，我们提供了在咖啡问题的简化 PPDDL 版本上运行 SAM+ 算法（一种用于学习随机规划行动模型的算法）的完整示例。我们提供了 SAM+ 算法的非常简短的描述和我们的 Coffee 域的简化版本的详细描述，然后描述了在简化的 Coffee 域上运行它的结果。

AI.tldr: 展示SAM+算法在简化版咖啡问题中的应用，以学习随机环境中的动作模型
AI.motivation: 验证SAM+算法在简化领域中的有效性，并展示其处理不确定性的能力
AI.method: 采用SAM+算法，并对咖啡域进行简化，以PPDDL形式建模，然后运行算法进行学习
AI.result: 通过运行SAM+算法，成功学习到了简化咖啡域中的动作模型，并验证了算法的有效性
AI.conclusion: SAM+算法在简化随机环境中有效，为更复杂问题的模型学习提供了可行方法

authors_text: Yangjun Wu,Kebin Fang,Yao Zhao
title: A Context-Aware Feature Fusion Framework for Punctuation Restoration
title_zh: 用于标点符号恢复的上下文感知特征融合框架
abstract: To accomplish the punctuation restoration task, most existing approaches focused on leveraging extra information (e.g., part-of-speech tags) or addressing the class imbalance problem. Recent works have widely applied the transformer-based language models and significantly improved their effectiveness. To the best of our knowledge, an inherent issue has remained neglected: the attention of individual heads in the transformer will be diluted or powerless while feeding the long non-punctuation utterances. Since those previous contexts, not the followings, are comparatively more valuable to the current position, it's hard to achieve a good balance by independent attention. In this paper, we propose a novel Feature Fusion framework based on two-type Attentions (FFA) to alleviate the shortage. It introduces a two-stream architecture. One module involves interaction between attention heads to encourage the communication, and another masked attention module captures the dependent feature representation. Then, it aggregates two feature embeddings to fuse information and enhances context-awareness. The experiments on the popular benchmark dataset IWSLT demonstrate that our approach is effective. Without additional data, it obtains comparable performance to the current state-of-the-art models.
summary: To accomplish the punctuation restoration task, most existing approaches focused on leveraging extra information (e.g., part-of-speech tags) or addressing the class imbalance problem. Recent works have widely applied the transformer-based language models and significantly improved their effectiveness. To the best of our knowledge, an inherent issue has remained neglected: the attention of individual heads in the transformer will be diluted or powerless while feeding the long non-punctuation utterances. Since those previous contexts, not the followings, are comparatively more valuable to the current position, it's hard to achieve a good balance by independent attention. In this paper, we propose a novel Feature Fusion framework based on two-type Attentions (FFA) to alleviate the shortage. It introduces a two-stream architecture. One module involves interaction between attention heads to encourage the communication, and another masked attention module captures the dependent feature representation. Then, it aggregates two feature embeddings to fuse information and enhances context-awareness. The experiments on the popular benchmark dataset IWSLT demonstrate that our approach is effective. Without additional data, it obtains comparable performance to the current state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 为了完成标点符号恢复任务，大多数现有方法侧重于利用额外信息（例如词性标签）或解决类别不平衡问题。最近的工作广泛应用了基于 Transformer 的语言模型并显着提高了其有效性。据我们所知，一个固有的问题仍然被忽视：变压器中各个头部的注意力在输入长的无标点符号的话语时会被稀释或无能为力。由于那些先前的上下文，而不是后续的上下文，对当前位置相对更有价值，因此很难通过独立关注来实现良好的平衡。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于两种类型注意力（FFA）的新颖特征融合框架来缓解这一不足。 It introduces a two-stream architecture.一个模块涉及注意力头之间的交互以鼓励交流，另一个屏蔽注意力模块捕获依赖的特征表示。然后，它聚合两个特征嵌入来融合信息并增强上下文感知。在流行的基准数据集 IWSLT 上的实验表明我们的方法是有效的。无需额外数据，它就能获得与当前最先进模型相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双注意力机制的特征融合框架，用于解决长文本标点恢复中的上下文感知问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型在处理长非标点文本时，注意力头易出现稀释或失效问题，导致上下文信息利用不足。
AI.method: 设计双流架构：1) 注意力头交互模块促进信息沟通；2) 掩码注意力模块捕获依赖特征，最终融合双特征嵌入增强上下文感知能力。
AI.result: 在IWSLT数据集上，无需额外数据即可达到与当前最优模型相当的标点恢复效果。
AI.conclusion: FFA框架有效缓解了长文本处理中的注意力稀释问题，提升了模型对上下文信息的利用效率。

search_text: A Context-Aware Feature Fusion Framework for Punctuation Restoration 用于标点符号恢复的上下文感知特征融合框架 To accomplish the punctuation restoration task, most existing approaches focused on leveraging extra information (e.g., part-of-speech tags) or addressing the class imbalance problem. Recent works have widely applied the transformer-based language models and significantly improved their effectiveness. To the best of our knowledge, an inherent issue has remained neglected: the attention of individual heads in the transformer will be diluted or powerless while feeding the long non-punctuation utterances. Since those previous contexts, not the followings, are comparatively more valuable to the current position, it's hard to achieve a good balance by independent attention. In this paper, we propose a novel Feature Fusion framework based on two-type Attentions (FFA) to alleviate the shortage. It introduces a two-stream architecture. One module involves interaction between attention heads to encourage the communication, and another masked attention module captures the dependent feature representation. Then, it aggregates two feature embeddings to fuse information and enhances context-awareness. The experiments on the popular benchmark dataset IWSLT demonstrate that our approach is effective. Without additional data, it obtains comparable performance to the current state-of-the-art models. 为了完成标点符号恢复任务，大多数现有方法侧重于利用额外信息（例如词性标签）或解决类别不平衡问题。最近的工作广泛应用了基于 Transformer 的语言模型并显着提高了其有效性。据我们所知，一个固有的问题仍然被忽视：变压器中各个头部的注意力在输入长的无标点符号的话语时会被稀释或无能为力。由于那些先前的上下文，而不是后续的上下文，对当前位置相对更有价值，因此很难通过独立关注来实现良好的平衡。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于两种类型注意力（FFA）的新颖特征融合框架来缓解这一不足。 It introduces a two-stream architecture.一个模块涉及注意力头之间的交互以鼓励交流，另一个屏蔽注意力模块捕获依赖的特征表示。然后，它聚合两个特征嵌入来融合信息并增强上下文感知。在流行的基准数据集 IWSLT 上的实验表明我们的方法是有效的。无需额外数据，它就能获得与当前最先进模型相当的性能。 本文提出一种基于双注意力机制的特征融合框架，用于解决长文本标点恢复中的上下文感知问题。 Yangjun Wu,Kebin Fang,Yao Zhao cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Rediet Abebe,Adam Eck,Christian Ikeokwu,Samuel Taggart
title: An Algorithmic Introduction to Savings Circles
title_zh: 储蓄圈的算法介绍
comment: Proceedings of the Thirty-sixth AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI'2022)
comments: Proceedings of the Thirty-sixth AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI'2022)
abstract: Rotating savings and credit associations (roscas) are informal financial organizations common in settings where communities have reduced access to formal financial institutions. In a rosca, a fixed group of participants regularly contribute sums of money to a pot. This pot is then allocated periodically using lottery, aftermarket, or auction mechanisms. Roscas are empirically well-studied in economics. They are, however, challenging to study theoretically due to their dynamic nature. Typical economic analyses of roscas stop at coarse ordinal welfare comparisons to other credit allocation mechanisms, leaving much of roscas' ubiquity unexplained. In this work, we take an algorithmic perspective on the study of roscas. Building on techniques from the price of anarchy literature, we present worst-case welfare approximation guarantees. We further experimentally compare the welfare of outcomes as key features of the environment vary. These cardinal welfare analyses further rationalize the prevalence of roscas. We conclude by discussing several other promising avenues.
summary: Rotating savings and credit associations (roscas) are informal financial organizations common in settings where communities have reduced access to formal financial institutions. In a rosca, a fixed group of participants regularly contribute sums of money to a pot. This pot is then allocated periodically using lottery, aftermarket, or auction mechanisms. Roscas are empirically well-studied in economics. They are, however, challenging to study theoretically due to their dynamic nature. Typical economic analyses of roscas stop at coarse ordinal welfare comparisons to other credit allocation mechanisms, leaving much of roscas' ubiquity unexplained. In this work, we take an algorithmic perspective on the study of roscas. Building on techniques from the price of anarchy literature, we present worst-case welfare approximation guarantees. We further experimentally compare the welfare of outcomes as key features of the environment vary. These cardinal welfare analyses further rationalize the prevalence of roscas. We conclude by discussing several other promising avenues.
abstract_zh: 轮换储蓄和信贷协会 (Rocas) 是非正式金融组织，常见于社区与正规金融机构的联系较少的环境中。在 Rosca 中，一组固定的参与者定期向彩池捐款。然后使用彩票、售后市场或拍卖机制定期分配该底池。罗斯卡斯在经济学方面进行了深入的实证研究。然而，由于其动态性质，它们在理论上的研究具有挑战性。对 roscas 的典型经济分析停留在与其他信贷分配机制的粗略序数福利比较上，这使得 roscas 的普遍性在很大程度上无法得到解释。在这项工作中，我们从算法的角度来研究 roscas。基于无政府主义文献的价格技术，我们提出了最坏情况的福利近似保证。我们进一步通过实验比较了环境主要特征变化时的结果福利。这些基本福利分析进一步合理化了 roscas 的流行。最后，我们讨论了其他几个有希望的途径。

AI.tldr: 从算法角度分析储蓄圈（ROSCAs）的福利保障与普遍性，通过理论分析和实验比较解释其广泛存在的原因。
AI.motivation: 传统经济学分析无法充分解释ROSCAs的普遍性，需通过算法理论提供更精确的福利分析。
AI.method: 基于价格分歧理论，建立最坏情况福利近似保证，并通过实验比较不同环境下的福利结果。
AI.result: 实验和理论分析表明，ROSCAs在多种环境下具有较高的福利保障，解释了其广泛存在的合理性。
AI.conclusion: 结论指出未来可探索更多ROSCAs的机制设计与应用领域。

authors_text: Yannick Verdié,Jifei Song,Barnabé Mas,Benjamin Busam,Aleš Leonardis,Steven McDonagh
title: CroMo: Cross-Modal Learning for Monocular Depth Estimation
title_zh: CroMo：用于单目深度估计的跨模态学习
comment: Accepted for publication at CVPR2022
comments: Accepted for publication at CVPR2022
abstract: Learning-based depth estimation has witnessed recent progress in multiple directions; from self-supervision using monocular video to supervised methods offering highest accuracy. Complementary to supervision, further boosts to performance and robustness are gained by combining information from multiple signals. In this paper we systematically investigate key trade-offs associated with sensor and modality design choices as well as related model training strategies. Our study leads us to a new method, capable of connecting modality-specific advantages from polarisation, Time-of-Flight and structured-light inputs. We propose a novel pipeline capable of estimating depth from monocular polarisation for which we evaluate various training signals. The inversion of differentiable analytic models thereby connects scene geometry with polarisation and ToF signals and enables self-supervised and cross-modal learning. In the absence of existing multimodal datasets, we examine our approach with a custom-made multi-modal camera rig and collect CroMo; the first dataset to consist of synchronized stereo polarisation, indirect ToF and structured-light depth, captured at video rates. Extensive experiments on challenging video scenes confirm both qualitative and quantitative pipeline advantages where we are able to outperform competitive monocular depth estimation method.
summary: Learning-based depth estimation has witnessed recent progress in multiple directions; from self-supervision using monocular video to supervised methods offering highest accuracy. Complementary to supervision, further boosts to performance and robustness are gained by combining information from multiple signals. In this paper we systematically investigate key trade-offs associated with sensor and modality design choices as well as related model training strategies. Our study leads us to a new method, capable of connecting modality-specific advantages from polarisation, Time-of-Flight and structured-light inputs. We propose a novel pipeline capable of estimating depth from monocular polarisation for which we evaluate various training signals. The inversion of differentiable analytic models thereby connects scene geometry with polarisation and ToF signals and enables self-supervised and cross-modal learning. In the absence of existing multimodal datasets, we examine our approach with a custom-made multi-modal camera rig and collect CroMo; the first dataset to consist of synchronized stereo polarisation, indirect ToF and structured-light depth, captured at video rates. Extensive experiments on challenging video scenes confirm both qualitative and quantitative pipeline advantages where we are able to outperform competitive monocular depth estimation method.
abstract_zh: 基于学习的深度估计最近在多个方向取得了进展；从使用单目视频的自我监督到提供最高准确度的监督方法。作为监督的补充，通过组合来自多个信号的信息可以进一步提高性能和鲁棒性。在本文中，我们系统地研究了与传感器和模态设计选择以及相关模型训练策略相关的关键权衡。我们的研究引导我们找到一种新方法，能够将偏振、飞行时间和结构光输入的特定模态优势结合起来。我们提出了一种能够估计单目偏振深度的新颖管道，我们可以评估各种训练信号。因此，可微分析模型的反演将场景几何与偏振和 ToF 信号联系起来，并实现自我监督和跨模态学习。在缺乏现有多模态数据集的情况下，我们使用定制的多模态相机装备检查我们的方法并收集 CroMo；第一个由同步立体偏振、间接 ToF 和结构光深度组成的数据集，以视频速率捕获。对具有挑战性的视频场景进行的大量实验证实了定性和定量管道的优势，我们能够超越竞争性的单目深度估计方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于跨模态学习的单目深度估计方法，结合多传感器数据提升精度与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有单目深度估计方法在准确性与鲁棒性上仍有不足，且缺乏多模态数据集支持跨模态学习，需探索更优的传感器融合策略。
AI.method: 提出融合偏振、ToF及结构光的跨模态学习框架，通过可微分模型连接多模态信号与场景几何，并构建同步多模态数据集CroMo支持训练与评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在复杂视频场景中实现更优深度估计效果，优于现有单目深度估计方法，验证了跨模态学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过跨模态学习与自研多模态数据集，有效提升了单目深度估计性能，为多传感器融合提供了新思路。

In the absence of existing multimodal datasets, we examine our approach with a custom-made multi-modal camera rig and collect CroMo; the first dataset to consist of synchronized stereo polarisation, indirect ToF and structured-light depth, captured at video rates. Extensive experiments on challenging video scenes confirm both qualitative and quantitative pipeline advantages where we are able to outperform competitive monocular depth estimation method. 基于学习的深度估计最近在多个方向取得了进展；从使用单目视频的自我监督到提供最高准确度的监督方法。作为监督的补充，通过组合来自多个信号的信息可以进一步提高性能和鲁棒性。在本文中，我们系统地研究了与传感器和模态设计选择以及相关模型训练策略相关的关键权衡。我们的研究引导我们找到一种新方法，能够将偏振、飞行时间和结构光输入的特定模态优势结合起来。我们提出了一种能够估计单目偏振深度的新颖管道，我们可以评估各种训练信号。因此，可微分析模型的反演将场景几何与偏振和 ToF 信号联系起来，并实现自我监督和跨模态学习。在缺乏现有多模态数据集的情况下，我们使用定制的多模态相机装备检查我们的方法并收集 CroMo；第一个由同步立体偏振、间接 ToF 和结构光深度组成的数据集，以视频速率捕获。对具有挑战性的视频场景进行的大量实验证实了定性和定量管道的优势，我们能够超越竞争性的单目深度估计方法。 提出一种基于跨模态学习的单目深度估计方法，结合多传感器数据提升精度与鲁棒性。 Yannick Verdié,Jifei Song,Barnabé Mas,Benjamin Busam,Aleš Leonardis,Steven McDonagh cs.CV

authors_text: Gourango Modak,Shuvra Smaran Das,Md. Ajharul Islam Miraj,Md. Kishor Morol
title: A Deep Learning Framework to Reconstruct Face under Mask
title_zh: 重建面具下人脸的深度学习框架
comment: 6 pages, 9 figures, 2022 7th Conference on Data Science and Machine Learning Applications (CDMA)
comments: 6 pages, 9 figures, 2022 7th Conference on Data Science and Machine Learning Applications (CDMA)
abstract: While deep learning-based image reconstruction methods have shown significant success in removing objects from pictures, they have yet to achieve acceptable results for attributing consistency to gender, ethnicity, expression, and other characteristics like the topological structure of the face. The purpose of this work is to extract the mask region from a masked image and rebuild the area that has been detected. This problem is complex because (i) it is difficult to determine the gender of an image hidden behind a mask, which causes the network to become confused and reconstruct the male face as a female or vice versa; (ii) we may receive images from multiple angles, making it extremely difficult to maintain the actual shape, topological structure of the face and a natural image; and (iii) there are problems with various mask forms because, in some cases, the area of the mask cannot be anticipated precisely; certain parts of the mask remain on the face after completion. To solve this complex task, we split the problem into three phases: landmark detection, object detection for the targeted mask area, and inpainting the addressed mask region. To begin, to solve the first problem, we have used gender classification, which detects the actual gender behind a mask, then we detect the landmark of the masked facial image. Second, we identified the non-face item, i.e., the mask, and used the Mask R-CNN network to create the binary mask of the observed mask area. Thirdly, we developed an inpainting network that uses anticipated landmarks to create realistic images. To segment the mask, this article uses a mask R-CNN and offers a binary segmentation map for identifying the mask area. Additionally, we generated the image utilizing landmarks as structural guidance through a GAN-based network. The studies presented in this paper use the FFHQ and CelebA datasets.

To solve this complex task, we split the problem into three phases: landmark detection, object detection for the targeted mask area, and inpainting the addressed mask region. To begin, to solve the first problem, we have used gender classification, which detects the actual gender behind a mask, then we detect the landmark of the masked facial image. Second, we identified the non-face item, i.e., the mask, and used the Mask R-CNN network to create the binary mask of the observed mask area. Thirdly, we developed an inpainting network that uses anticipated landmarks to create realistic images. To segment the mask, this article uses a mask R-CNN and offers a binary segmentation map for identifying the mask area. Additionally, we generated the image utilizing landmarks as structural guidance through a GAN-based network. The studies presented in this paper use the FFHQ and CelebA datasets.
abstract_zh: 虽然基于深度学习的图像重建方法在从图片中去除对象方面取得了巨大成功，但在性别、种族、表情和其他特征（例如面部拓扑结构）的一致性方面尚未取得可接受的结果。这项工作的目的是从蒙版图像中提取蒙版区域并重建已检测到的区域。这个问题很复杂，因为（i）很难确定隐藏在面具后面的图像的性别，这会导致网络变得混乱，并将男性面孔重建为女性，反之亦然； (ii) 我们可能会从多个角度接收图像，这使得保持人脸的实际形状、拓扑结构和自然图像变得极其困难； (iii) 各种掩模形式都存在问题，因为在某些情况下，无法精确预期掩模的面积；完成后，面膜的某些部分仍保留在脸上。为了解决这个复杂的任务，我们将问题分为三个阶段：地标检测、目标掩模区域的对象检测以及修复所处理的掩模区域。首先，为了解决第一个问题，我们使用了性别分类，它检测面具后面的实际性别，然后我们检测面具面部图像的标志。其次，我们识别了非面部项目，即掩模，并使用 Mask R-CNN 网络创建观察到的掩模区域的二元掩模。第三，我们开发了一个修复网络，它使用预期的地标来创建逼真的图像。为了分割掩模，本文使用掩模 R-CNN 并提供了用于识别掩模区域的二进制分割图。此外，我们还通过基于 GAN 的网络利用地标作为结构指导来生成图像。本文提出的研究使用 FFHQ 和 CelebA 数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度学习框架，用于重建被口罩遮挡的人脸图像，同时保持性别、种族等面部属性的一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有图像重建方法在处理被遮挡人脸时，难以准确保留性别、种族、表情等面部特征及拓扑结构，导致重建结果不自然或存在偏差。
AI.method: 将任务分为三阶段：1) 使用性别分类检测口罩下真实性别并定位面部关键点；2) 借助Mask R-CNN生成口罩二值分割图；3) 基于生成对抗网络(GAN)利用关键点引导生成真实面部图像。
AI.result: 通过FFHQ和CelebA数据集验证，该框架能有效重建被口罩遮挡的人脸，较传统方法在面部结构和属性一致性上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过分阶段处理和多网络协同，该方法有效解决了口罩遮挡下人脸重建的性别混淆、角度变形和遮挡不精确等核心挑战。

authors_text: Minghui Wu,Yangdi Xu,Yingying Xu,Guangwei Wu,Qingqing Chen,Hongxiang Lin
title: Stable Optimization for Large Vision Model Based Deep Image Prior in Cone-Beam CT Reconstruction
title_zh: 锥束CT重建中基于大视觉模型深度图像先验的稳定优化
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. Accepted to ICASSP 2024
comments: 5 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. Accepted to ICASSP 2024
abstract: Large Vision Model (LVM) has recently demonstrated great potential for medical imaging tasks, potentially enabling image enhancement for sparse-view Cone-Beam Computed Tomography (CBCT), despite requiring a substantial amount of data for training. Meanwhile, Deep Image Prior (DIP) effectively guides an untrained neural network to generate high-quality CBCT images without any training data. However, the original DIP method relies on a well-defined forward model and a large-capacity backbone network, which is notoriously difficult to converge. In this paper, we propose a stable optimization method for the forward-model-free, LVM-based DIP model for sparse-view CBCT. Our approach consists of two main characteristics: (1) multi-scale perceptual loss (MSPL) which measures the similarity of perceptual features between the reference and output images at multiple resolutions without the need for any forward model, and (2) a reweighting mechanism that stabilizes the iteration trajectory of MSPL. One shot optimization is used to simultaneously and stably reweight MSPL and optimize LVM. We evaluate our approach on two publicly available datasets: SPARE and Walnut. The results show significant improvements in both image quality metrics and visualization that demonstrates reduced streak artifacts. The source code is available upon request.
summary: Large Vision Model (LVM) has recently demonstrated great potential for medical imaging tasks, potentially enabling image enhancement for sparse-view Cone-Beam Computed Tomography (CBCT), despite requiring a substantial amount of data for training. Meanwhile, Deep Image Prior (DIP) effectively guides an untrained neural network to generate high-quality CBCT images without any training data. However, the original DIP method relies on a well-defined forward model and a large-capacity backbone network, which is notoriously difficult to converge. In this paper, we propose a stable optimization method for the forward-model-free, LVM-based DIP model for sparse-view CBCT. Our approach consists of two main characteristics: (1) multi-scale perceptual loss (MSPL) which measures the similarity of perceptual features between the reference and output images at multiple resolutions without the need for any forward model, and (2) a reweighting mechanism that stabilizes the iteration trajectory of MSPL. One shot optimization is used to simultaneously and stably reweight MSPL and optimize LVM. We evaluate our approach on two publicly available datasets: SPARE and Walnut. The results show significant improvements in both image quality metrics and visualization that demonstrates reduced streak artifacts. The source code is available upon request.
abstract_zh: 大视觉模型 (LVM) 最近在医学成像任务中展示了巨大的潜力，尽管需要大量数据进行训练，但有可能实现稀疏视图锥束计算机断层扫描 (CBCT) 的图像增强。同时，深度图像先验（DIP）有效引导未经训练的神经网络在没有任何训练数据的情况下生成高质量的CBCT图像。然而，原始的DIP方法依赖于明确定义的前向模型和大容量的骨干网络，这是出了名的难以收敛。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对稀疏视图 CBCT 的无前向模型、基于 LVM 的 DIP 模型的稳定优化方法。我们的方法包含两个主要特征：（1）多尺度感知损失（MSPL），它可以在多个分辨率下测量参考图像和输出图像之间感知特征的相似性，而不需要任何前向模型；（2）重新加权机制，稳定 MSPL 的迭代轨迹。一次性优化用于同时稳定地重新加权 MSPL 和优化 LVM。我们在两个公开可用的数据集上评估我们的方法：SPARE 和 Walnut。结果显示图像质量指标和可视化效果均得到显着改善，从而减少了条纹伪影。源代码可根据要求提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大视觉模型（LVM）的深度图像先验（DIP）在稀疏视角锥束CT重建中的稳定优化方法。
AI.motivation: 传统DIP方法依赖于精确的前向模型且收敛困难，而LVM虽潜力巨大但需大量训练数据。本文旨在提出无需前向模型且稳定的优化方案以提升稀疏视角CBCT图像质量。
AI.method: 设计多尺度感知损失（MSPL）测量不同分辨率下的感知特征相似性，并引入重加权机制稳定优化轨迹，通过单次优化同步调整MSPL与LVM参数。
AI.result: 在SPARE和Walnut数据集上实验显示，图像质量指标显著提升且可视化结果中条纹伪影明显减少。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了DIP的收敛问题，在无需前向模型的情况下实现了高质量稀疏视角CBCT重建。

In this paper, we propose a stable optimization method for the forward-model-free, LVM-based DIP model for sparse-view CBCT. Our approach consists of two main characteristics: (1) multi-scale perceptual loss (MSPL) which measures the similarity of perceptual features between the reference and output images at multiple resolutions without the need for any forward model, and (2) a reweighting mechanism that stabilizes the iteration trajectory of MSPL. One shot optimization is used to simultaneously and stably reweight MSPL and optimize LVM. We evaluate our approach on two publicly available datasets: SPARE and Walnut. The results show significant improvements in both image quality metrics and visualization that demonstrates reduced streak artifacts. The source code is available upon request. 大视觉模型 (LVM) 最近在医学成像任务中展示了巨大的潜力，尽管需要大量数据进行训练，但有可能实现稀疏视图锥束计算机断层扫描 (CBCT) 的图像增强。同时，深度图像先验（DIP）有效引导未经训练的神经网络在没有任何训练数据的情况下生成高质量的CBCT图像。然而，原始的DIP方法依赖于明确定义的前向模型和大容量的骨干网络，这是出了名的难以收敛。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对稀疏视图 CBCT 的无前向模型、基于 LVM 的 DIP 模型的稳定优化方法。我们的方法包含两个主要特征：（1）多尺度感知损失（MSPL），它可以在多个分辨率下测量参考图像和输出图像之间感知特征的相似性，而不需要任何前向模型；（2）重新加权机制，稳定 MSPL 的迭代轨迹。一次性优化用于同时稳定地重新加权 MSPL 和优化 LVM。我们在两个公开可用的数据集上评估我们的方法：SPARE 和 Walnut。结果显示图像质量指标和可视化效果均得到显着改善，从而减少了条纹伪影。源代码可根据要求提供。 本文提出了一种基于大视觉模型（LVM）的深度图像先验（DIP）在稀疏视角锥束CT重建中的稳定优化方法。 Minghui Wu,Yangdi Xu,Yingying Xu,Guangwei Wu,Qingqing Chen,Hongxiang Lin eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Tao Chen
title: Planning Landscape Analysis for Self-Adaptive Systems
title_zh: 自适应系统的规划景观分析
comment: The paper has been accepted by the 17th International Symposium on Software Engineering for Adaptive and Self-Managing Systems, SEAMS'22, 2022
comments: The paper has been accepted by the 17th International Symposium on Software Engineering for Adaptive and Self-Managing Systems, SEAMS'22, 2022
abstract: To assure performance on the fly, planning is arguably one of the most important steps for self-adaptive systems (SASs), especially when they are highly configurable with a daunting number of adaptation options. However, there has been little understanding of the planning landscape or ways by which it can be analyzed. This inevitably creates barriers to the design of better and tailored planners for SASs. In this paper, we showcase how the planning landscapes of SASs can be quantified and reasoned, particularly with respect to the different environments. By studying four diverse real-world SASs and 14 environments, we found that (1) the SAS planning landscapes often provide strong guidance to the planner, but their ruggedness and multi-modality can be the major obstacle; (2) the extents of guidance and number of global/local optima are sensitive to the changing environment, but not the ruggedness of the surface; (3) the local optima are often closer to the global optimum than other random points; and (4) there are considerable (and useful) overlaps on the global/local optima between landscapes under different environments. We then discuss the potential implications to the future work of planner designs for SASs.

In this paper, we showcase how the planning landscapes of SASs can be quantified and reasoned, particularly with respect to the different environments. By studying four diverse real-world SASs and 14 environments, we found that (1) the SAS planning landscapes often provide strong guidance to the planner, but their ruggedness and multi-modality can be the major obstacle; (2) the extents of guidance and number of global/local optima are sensitive to the changing environment, but not the ruggedness of the surface; (3) the local optima are often closer to the global optimum than other random points; and (4) there are considerable (and useful) overlaps on the global/local optima between landscapes under different environments. We then discuss the potential implications to the future work of planner designs for SASs.
abstract_zh: 为了确保动态性能，规划可以说是自适应系统 (SAS) 最重要的步骤之一，特别是当它们具有高度可配置性并具有大量自适应选项时。然而，人们对规划景观或分析规划的方法知之甚少。这不可避免地给 SAS 设计更好、更定制的规划器带来了障碍。在本文中，我们展示了如何量化和推理 SAS 的规划景观，特别是针对不同的环境。通过研究四种不同的现实世界 SAS 和 14 个环境，我们发现（1）SAS 规划景观通常为规划者提供强有力的指导，但它们的坚固性和多模态可能是主要障碍； (2)引导范围和全局/局部最优的数量对环境变化敏感，但对表面的崎岖程度不敏感； (3)局部最优值往往比其他随机点更接近全局最优值； （4）不同环境下景观之间的全局/局部最优值存在相当大的（且有用的）重叠。然后我们讨论对 SAS 规划器设计的未来工作的潜在影响。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过量化分析自适应系统（SAS）的规划景观，为设计更高效的规划器提供指导。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对SAS规划景观的理解，导致难以设计出针对不同环境的定制化规划器。
AI.method: 通过研究四个实际SAS及其在14种环境中的表现，量化分析规划景观的特征。
AI.result: 发现SAS规划景观虽能提供指导，但其复杂性和多峰性是主要障碍；环境变化影响最优解数量但不影响景观粗糙度；局部最优解通常更接近全局最优解，且不同环境间存在显著重叠。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现为未来SAS规划器的设计提供了理论依据和优化方向。

authors_text: Omar Alfarisi,Zeyar Aung,Qingfeng Huang,Ashraf Al-Khateeb,Hamed Alhashmi,Mohamed Abdelsalam,Salem Alzaabi,Haifa Alyazeedi,Anthony Tzes
title: 3D Adapted Random Forest Vision (3DARFV) for Untangling Heterogeneous-Fabric Exceeding Deep Learning Semantic Segmentation Efficiency at the Utmost Accuracy
title_zh: 用于理清异构结构的 3D 自适应随机森林视觉 (3DARFV) 超越深度学习语义分割效率并达到最高准确度
abstract: Planetary exploration depends heavily on 3D image data to characterize the static and dynamic properties of the rock and environment. Analyzing 3D images requires many computations, causing efficiency to suffer lengthy processing time alongside large energy consumption. High-Performance Computing (HPC) provides apparent efficiency at the expense of energy consumption. However, for remote explorations, the conveyed surveillance and the robotized sensing need faster data analysis with ultimate accuracy to make real-time decisions. In such environments, access to HPC and energy is limited. Therefore, we realize that reducing the number of computations to optimal and maintaining the desired accuracy leads to higher efficiency. This paper demonstrates the semantic segmentation capability of a probabilistic decision tree algorithm, 3D Adapted Random Forest Vision (3DARFV), exceeding deep learning algorithm efficiency at the utmost accuracy.
summary: Planetary exploration depends heavily on 3D image data to characterize the static and dynamic properties of the rock and environment. Analyzing 3D images requires many computations, causing efficiency to suffer lengthy processing time alongside large energy consumption. High-Performance Computing (HPC) provides apparent efficiency at the expense of energy consumption. However, for remote explorations, the conveyed surveillance and the robotized sensing need faster data analysis with ultimate accuracy to make real-time decisions. In such environments, access to HPC and energy is limited. Therefore, we realize that reducing the number of computations to optimal and maintaining the desired accuracy leads to higher efficiency. This paper demonstrates the semantic segmentation capability of a probabilistic decision tree algorithm, 3D Adapted Random Forest Vision (3DARFV), exceeding deep learning algorithm efficiency at the utmost accuracy.
abstract_zh: 行星探索在很大程度上依赖于 3D 图像数据来表征岩石和环境的静态和动态特性。分析 3D 图像需要进行大量计算，导致处理时间过长且能耗较高，从而影响效率。高性能计算 (HPC) 以牺牲能源消耗为代价提供明显的效率。 However, for remote explorations, the conveyed surveillance and the robotized sensing need faster data analysis with ultimate accuracy to make real-time decisions.在这种环境中，对 HPC 和能源的访问是有限的。因此，我们意识到，将计算数量减少到最佳并保持所需的精度会带来更高的效率。 This paper demonstrates the semantic segmentation capability of a probabilistic decision tree algorithm, 3D Adapted Random Forest Vision (3DARFV), exceeding deep learning algorithm efficiency at the utmost accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为3DARFV的三维自适应随机森林视觉算法，用于在保持最高精度的同时，超越深度学习的语义分割效率。
AI.motivation: 行星探测依赖3D图像分析，但传统方法计算量大、能耗高，而远程环境受限于能源和计算资源，需更高效且精准的实时分析方案。
AI.method: 开发基于概率决策树的3DARFV算法，通过优化计算步骤减少资源消耗，同时维持高精度的语义分割能力。
AI.result: 3DARFV在计算效率上超越深度学习方法，且在精度上达到最优水平，适用于资源受限的实时决策场景。
AI.conclusion: 3DARFV为行星探测等资源受限环境提供了高效、精准的3D图像语义分割解决方案，具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Natalia Tomashenko,Xin Wang,Xiaoxiao Miao,Hubert Nourtel,Pierre Champion,Massimiliano Todisco,Emmanuel Vincent,Nicholas Evans,Junichi Yamagishi,Jean-François Bonastre
title: The VoicePrivacy 2022 Challenge Evaluation Plan
title_zh: VoicePrivacy 2022 挑战评估计划
comment: the file is unchanged; minor correction in metadata
comments: the file is unchanged; minor correction in metadata
abstract: For new participants - Executive summary: (1) The task is to develop a voice anonymization system for speech data which conceals the speaker's voice identity while protecting linguistic content, paralinguistic attributes, intelligibility and naturalness. (2) Training, development and evaluation datasets are provided in addition to 3 different baseline anonymization systems, evaluation scripts, and metrics. Participants apply their developed anonymization systems, run evaluation scripts and submit objective evaluation results and anonymized speech data to the organizers. (3) Results will be presented at a workshop held in conjunction with INTERSPEECH 2022 to which all participants are invited to present their challenge systems and to submit additional workshop papers. For readers familiar with the VoicePrivacy Challenge - Changes w.r.t. 2020: (1) A stronger, semi-informed attack model in the form of an automatic speaker verification (ASV) system trained on anonymized (per-utterance) speech data. (2) Complementary metrics comprising the equal error rate (EER) as a privacy metric, the word error rate (WER) as a primary utility metric, and the pitch correlation and gain of voice distinctiveness as secondary utility metrics. (3) A new ranking policy based upon a set of minimum target privacy requirements.

search_text: The VoicePrivacy 2022 Challenge Evaluation Plan VoicePrivacy 2022 挑战评估计划 For new participants - Executive summary: (1) The task is to develop a voice anonymization system for speech data which conceals the speaker's voice identity while protecting linguistic content, paralinguistic attributes, intelligibility and naturalness. (2) Training, development and evaluation datasets are provided in addition to 3 different baseline anonymization systems, evaluation scripts, and metrics. Participants apply their developed anonymization systems, run evaluation scripts and submit objective evaluation results and anonymized speech data to the organizers. (3) Results will be presented at a workshop held in conjunction with INTERSPEECH 2022 to which all participants are invited to present their challenge systems and to submit additional workshop papers. For readers familiar with the VoicePrivacy Challenge - Changes w.r.t. 2020: (1) A stronger, semi-informed attack model in the form of an automatic speaker verification (ASV) system trained on anonymized (per-utterance) speech data. (2) Complementary metrics comprising the equal error rate (EER) as a privacy metric, the word error rate (WER) as a primary utility metric, and the pitch correlation and gain of voice distinctiveness as secondary utility metrics. (3) A new ranking policy based upon a set of minimum target privacy requirements. authors_text: Arvi Jonnarth,Michael Felsberg
title: Importance Sampling CAMs for Weakly-Supervised Segmentation
title_zh: 用于弱监督分割的重要采样 CAM
comment: Updated to the version published at ICASSP2022
comments: Updated to the version published at ICASSP2022
abstract: Classification networks can be used to localize and segment objects in images by means of class activation maps (CAMs). However, without pixel-level annotations, classification networks are known to (1) mainly focus on discriminative regions, and (2) to produce diffuse CAMs without well-defined prediction contours. In this work, we approach both problems with two contributions for improving CAM learning. First, we incorporate importance sampling based on the class-wise probability mass function induced by the CAMs to produce stochastic image-level class predictions. This results in CAMs which activate over a larger extent of objects. Second, we formulate a feature similarity loss term which aims to match the prediction contours with edges in the image. As a third contribution, we conduct experiments on the PASCAL VOC 2012 benchmark dataset to demonstrate that these modifications significantly increase the performance in terms of contour accuracy, while being comparable to current state-of-the-art methods in terms of region similarity.
summary: Classification networks can be used to localize and segment objects in images by means of class activation maps (CAMs). However, without pixel-level annotations, classification networks are known to (1) mainly focus on discriminative regions, and (2) to produce diffuse CAMs without well-defined prediction contours. In this work, we approach both problems with two contributions for improving CAM learning. First, we incorporate importance sampling based on the class-wise probability mass function induced by the CAMs to produce stochastic image-level class predictions. This results in CAMs which activate over a larger extent of objects. Second, we formulate a feature similarity loss term which aims to match the prediction contours with edges in the image. As a third contribution, we conduct experiments on the PASCAL VOC 2012 benchmark dataset to demonstrate that these modifications significantly increase the performance in terms of contour accuracy, while being comparable to current state-of-the-art methods in terms of region similarity.
abstract_zh: 分类网络可用于通过类激活图 (CAM) 来定位和分割图像中的对象。然而，如果没有像素级注释，分类网络会 (1) 主要关注判别区域，(2) 生成没有明确定义的预测轮廓的扩散 CAM。在这项工作中，我们通过两个贡献来解决这两个问题，以改善 CAM 学习。首先，我们基于 CAM 引入的按类别概率质量函数合并重要性采样，以产生随机图像级类别预测。这导致 CAM 可以在更大范围的对象上激活。其次，我们制定一个特征相似性损失项，旨在将预测轮廓与图像中的边缘进行匹配。作为第三个贡献，我们在 PASCAL VOC 2012 基准数据集上进行了实验，以证明这些修改显着提高了轮廓精度方面的性能，同时在区域相似性方面与当前最先进的方法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进弱监督分割中类激活图（CAMs）学习的方法，以提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 现有分类网络生成的CAMs在弱监督条件下存在聚焦区域有限和轮廓模糊的问题，导致分割效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过重要性抽样扩展CAMs激活范围，并引入特征相似性损失匹配预测轮廓与图像边缘。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012数据集上，方法显著提升轮廓准确性，区域相似性与最先进方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了弱监督分割中CAMs的局限性，提升了分割性能。

authors_text: Ziyuan Zhao,Kaixin Xu,Shumeng Li,Zeng Zeng,Cuntai Guan
title: MT-UDA: Towards Unsupervised Cross-modality Medical Image Segmentation with Limited Source Labels
title_zh: MT-UDA：利用有限的源标签实现无监督的跨模态医学图像分割
comment: Accept by MICCAI 2021, code at: https://github.com/jacobzhaoziyuan/MT-UDA
comments: Accept by MICCAI 2021, code at: https://github.com/jacobzhaoziyuan/MT-UDA
abstract: The success of deep convolutional neural networks (DCNNs) benefits from high volumes of annotated data. However, annotating medical images is laborious, expensive, and requires human expertise, which induces the label scarcity problem. Especially when encountering the domain shift, the problem becomes more serious. Although deep unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) can leverage well-established source domain annotations and abundant target domain data to facilitate cross-modality image segmentation and also mitigate the label paucity problem on the target domain, the conventional UDA methods suffer from severe performance degradation when source domain annotations are scarce. In this paper, we explore a challenging UDA setting - limited source domain annotations. We aim to investigate how to efficiently leverage unlabeled data from the source and target domains with limited source annotations for cross-modality image segmentation. To achieve this, we propose a new label-efficient UDA framework, termed MT-UDA, in which the student model trained with limited source labels learns from unlabeled data of both domains by two teacher models respectively in a semi-supervised manner. More specifically, the student model not only distills the intra-domain semantic knowledge by encouraging prediction consistency but also exploits the inter-domain anatomical information by enforcing structural consistency. Consequently, the student model can effectively integrate the underlying knowledge beneath available data resources to mitigate the impact of source label scarcity and yield improved cross-modality segmentation performance. We evaluate our method on MM-WHS 2017 dataset and demonstrate that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by a large margin under the source-label scarcity scenario.
summary: The success of deep convolutional neural networks (DCNNs) benefits from high volumes of annotated data. However, annotating medical images is laborious, expensive, and requires human expertise, which induces the label scarcity problem. Especially when encountering the domain shift, the problem becomes more serious. Although deep unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) can leverage well-established source domain annotations and abundant target domain data to facilitate cross-modality image segmentation and also mitigate the label paucity problem on the target domain, the conventional UDA methods suffer from severe performance degradation when source domain annotations are scarce. In this paper, we explore a challenging UDA setting - limited source domain annotations. We aim to investigate how to efficiently leverage unlabeled data from the source and target domains with limited source annotations for cross-modality image segmentation. To achieve this, we propose a new label-efficient UDA framework, termed MT-UDA, in which the student model trained with limited source labels learns from unlabeled data of both domains by two teacher models respectively in a semi-supervised manner. More specifically, the student model not only distills the intra-domain semantic knowledge by encouraging prediction consistency but also exploits the inter-domain anatomical information by enforcing structural consistency. Consequently, the student model can effectively integrate the underlying knowledge beneath available data resources to mitigate the impact of source label scarcity and yield improved cross-modality segmentation performance. We evaluate our method on MM-WHS 2017 dataset and demonstrate that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by a large margin under the source-label scarcity scenario.
abstract_zh: 深度卷积神经网络 (DCNN) 的成功得益于大量带注释的数据。 However, annotating medical images is laborious, expensive, and requires human expertise, which induces the label scarcity problem. Especially when encountering the domain shift, the problem becomes more serious.尽管深度无监督域适应（UDA）可以利用完善的源域注释和丰富的目标域数据来促进跨模态图像分割，并缓解目标域上的标签缺乏问题，但当源域注释稀缺时，传统的 UDA 方法会遭受严重的性能下降。在本文中，我们探索了一个具有挑战性的 UDA 设置 - 有限源域注释。我们的目标是研究如何有效地利用来自源域和目标域的未标记数据以及有限的源注释进行跨模态图像分割。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种新的标签高效 UDA 框架，称为 MT-UDA，其中使用有限源标签训练的学生模型分别由两个教师模型以半监督方式从两个领域的未标记数据中学习。更具体地说，学生模型不仅通过鼓励预测一致性来提炼域内语义知识，而且还通过强制结构一致性来利用域间解剖信息。因此，学生模型可以有效地集成可用数据资源下的基础知识，以减轻源标签稀缺的影响并提高跨模态分割性能。我们在 MM-WHS 2017 数据集上评估我们的方法，并证明我们的方法在源标签稀缺情况下大大优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MT-UDA框架，在源域标注数据有限的情况下，通过半监督学习实现跨模态医学图像分割。
AI.motivation: 医学图像标注成本高昂且存在领域偏移问题，传统无监督域适应方法在源域标注稀缺时性能下降显著。
AI.method: 构建双教师模型引导学生模型，通过域内语义一致性蒸馏和跨域结构一致性约束，联合利用源域/目标域未标注数据。
AI.result: 在MM-WHS 2017数据集上，源域标注稀缺场景下显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: MT-UDA通过跨域知识整合有效缓解源标签稀缺问题，提升跨模态医学图像分割性能。

More specifically, the student model not only distills the intra-domain semantic knowledge by encouraging prediction consistency but also exploits the inter-domain anatomical information by enforcing structural consistency. Consequently, the student model can effectively integrate the underlying knowledge beneath available data resources to mitigate the impact of source label scarcity and yield improved cross-modality segmentation performance. We evaluate our method on MM-WHS 2017 dataset and demonstrate that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by a large margin under the source-label scarcity scenario. 深度卷积神经网络 (DCNN) 的成功得益于大量带注释的数据。 However, annotating medical images is laborious, expensive, and requires human expertise, which induces the label scarcity problem. Especially when encountering the domain shift, the problem becomes more serious.尽管深度无监督域适应（UDA）可以利用完善的源域注释和丰富的目标域数据来促进跨模态图像分割，并缓解目标域上的标签缺乏问题，但当源域注释稀缺时，传统的 UDA 方法会遭受严重的性能下降。在本文中，我们探索了一个具有挑战性的 UDA 设置 - 有限源域注释。我们的目标是研究如何有效地利用来自源域和目标域的未标记数据以及有限的源注释进行跨模态图像分割。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种新的标签高效 UDA 框架，称为 MT-UDA，其中使用有限源标签训练的学生模型分别由两个教师模型以半监督方式从两个领域的未标记数据中学习。更具体地说，学生模型不仅通过鼓励预测一致性来提炼域内语义知识，而且还通过强制结构一致性来利用域间解剖信息。因此，学生模型可以有效地集成可用数据资源下的基础知识，以减轻源标签稀缺的影响并提高跨模态分割性能。我们在 MM-WHS 2017 数据集上评估我们的方法，并证明我们的方法在源标签稀缺情况下大大优于最先进的方法。 本文提出MT-UDA框架，在源域标注数据有限的情况下，通过半监督学习实现跨模态医学图像分割。 Ziyuan Zhao,Kaixin Xu,Shumeng Li,Zeng Zeng,Cuntai Guan eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Francesco Marchetti,Federico Becattini,Lorenzo Seidenari,Alberto Del Bimbo
title: SMEMO: Social Memory for Trajectory Forecasting
title_zh: SMEMO：轨迹预测的社会记忆
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transaction on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (PAMI)
comments: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transaction on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (PAMI)
abstract: Effective modeling of human interactions is of utmost importance when forecasting behaviors such as future trajectories. Each individual, with its motion, influences surrounding agents since everyone obeys to social non-written rules such as collision avoidance or group following. In this paper we model such interactions, which constantly evolve through time, by looking at the problem from an algorithmic point of view, i.e. as a data manipulation task. We present a neural network based on an end-to-end trainable working memory, which acts as an external storage where information about each agent can be continuously written, updated and recalled. We show that our method is capable of learning explainable cause-effect relationships between motions of different agents, obtaining state-of-the-art results on multiple trajectory forecasting datasets.

In this paper we model such interactions, which constantly evolve through time, by looking at the problem from an algorithmic point of view, i.e. as a data manipulation task. We present a neural network based on an end-to-end trainable working memory, which acts as an external storage where information about each agent can be continuously written, updated and recalled. We show that our method is capable of learning explainable cause-effect relationships between motions of different agents, obtaining state-of-the-art results on multiple trajectory forecasting datasets.

We show that our method is capable of learning explainable cause-effect relationships between motions of different agents, obtaining state-of-the-art results on multiple trajectory forecasting datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出SMEMO模型，通过建模社会互动来提升轨迹预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效建模动态变化的社会交互规则，需新方法提升轨迹预测效果。
AI.method: 采用端到端可训练的工作记忆网络，作为外部存储持续更新和召回代理信息，建模动态社会交互。
AI.result: 在多个轨迹预测数据集上取得最先进结果，能学习不同代理间可解释的因果关系。
AI.conclusion: SMEMO通过有效建模动态社会交互，提升了轨迹预测性能，并具备可解释性优势。

authors_text: Huisheng Mao,Ziqi Yuan,Hua Xu,Wenmeng Yu,Yihe Liu,Kai Gao
title: M-SENA: An Integrated Platform for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: M-SENA：多模态情感分析集成平台
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, to be published in ACL 2022 System Demonstration Track
comments: 11 pages, 4 figures, to be published in ACL 2022 System Demonstration Track
abstract: M-SENA is an open-sourced platform for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis. It aims to facilitate advanced research by providing flexible toolkits, reliable benchmarks, and intuitive demonstrations. The platform features a fully modular video sentiment analysis framework consisting of data management, feature extraction, model training, and result analysis modules. In this paper, we first illustrate the overall architecture of the M-SENA platform and then introduce features of the core modules. Reliable baseline results of different modality features and MSA benchmarks are also reported. Moreover, we use model evaluation and analysis tools provided by M-SENA to present intermediate representation visualization, on-the-fly instance test, and generalization ability test results. The source code of the platform is publicly available at https://github.com/thuiar/M-SENA.
summary: M-SENA is an open-sourced platform for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis. It aims to facilitate advanced research by providing flexible toolkits, reliable benchmarks, and intuitive demonstrations. The platform features a fully modular video sentiment analysis framework consisting of data management, feature extraction, model training, and result analysis modules. In this paper, we first illustrate the overall architecture of the M-SENA platform and then introduce features of the core modules. Reliable baseline results of different modality features and MSA benchmarks are also reported. Moreover, we use model evaluation and analysis tools provided by M-SENA to present intermediate representation visualization, on-the-fly instance test, and generalization ability test results. The source code of the platform is publicly available at https://github.com/thuiar/M-SENA.
abstract_zh: M-SENA 是一个用于多模态情感分析的开源平台。它旨在通过提供灵活的工具包、可靠的基准和直观的演示来促进高级研究。该平台具有完全模块化的视频情感分析框架，包括数据管理、特征提取、模型训练和结果分析模块。在本文中，我们首先阐述了M-SENA平台的整体架构，然后介绍了核心模块的功能。还报告了不同模态特征和 MSA 基准的可靠基线结果。此外，我们使用M-SENA提供的模型评估和分析工具来呈现中间表示可视化、即时实例测试和泛化能力测试结果。该平台的源代码可在 https://github.com/thuiar/M-SENA 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为M-SENA的开源多模态情感分析平台，该平台提供模块化框架和工具以支持相关研究。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态情感分析工具缺乏灵活性和系统性，难以满足研究需求，因此开发集成化平台以促进该领域研究。
AI.method: 构建包含数据管理、特征提取、模型训练及结果分析的模块化框架，并提供可视化、实例测试与泛化能力评估工具。
AI.result: 报告了多模态特征基线及MSA基准结果，验证了平台工具在中间表示可视化、实时测试与模型泛化评估中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: M-SENA通过开源代码和模块化设计为多模态情感分析提供了可靠研究基础，推动了该领域的技术发展。
