authors_text: Jan Sommer,M. Akif Özkan,Oliver Keszocze,Jürgen Teich
title: Efficient Hardware Acceleration of Sparsely Active Convolutional Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 稀疏主动卷积尖峰神经网络的高效硬件加速
comment: 12 pages, 12 figures, 5 tables, submitted to CODES 2022
comments: 12 pages, 12 figures, 5 tables, submitted to CODES 2022
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) compute in an event-based matter to achieve a more efficient computation than standard Neural Networks. In SNNs, neuronal outputs (i.e. activations) are not encoded with real-valued activations but with sequences of binary spikes. The motivation of using SNNs over conventional neural networks is rooted in the special computational aspects of SNNs, especially the very high degree of sparsity of neural output activations. Well established architectures for conventional Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) feature large spatial arrays of Processing Elements (PEs) that remain highly underutilized in the face of activation sparsity. We propose a novel architecture that is optimized for the processing of Convolutional SNNs (CSNNs) that feature a high degree of activation sparsity. In our architecture, the main strategy is to use less but highly utilized PEs. The PE array used to perform the convolution is only as large as the kernel size, allowing all PEs to be active as long as there are spikes to process. This constant flow of spikes is ensured by compressing the feature maps (i.e. the activations) into queues that can then be processed spike by spike. This compression is performed in run-time using dedicated circuitry, leading to a self-timed scheduling. This allows the processing time to scale directly with the number of spikes. A novel memory organization scheme called memory interlacing is used to efficiently store and retrieve the membrane potentials of the individual neurons using multiple small parallel on-chip RAMs. Each RAM is hardwired to its PE, reducing switching circuitry and allowing RAMs to be located in close proximity to the respective PE. We implemented the proposed architecture on an FPGA and achieved a significant speedup compared to other implementations while needing less hardware resources and maintaining a lower energy consumption.

In SNNs, neuronal outputs (i.e. activations) are not encoded with real-valued activations but with sequences of binary spikes. The motivation of using SNNs over conventional neural networks is rooted in the special computational aspects of SNNs, especially the very high degree of sparsity of neural output activations. Well established architectures for conventional Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) feature large spatial arrays of Processing Elements (PEs) that remain highly underutilized in the face of activation sparsity. We propose a novel architecture that is optimized for the processing of Convolutional SNNs (CSNNs) that feature a high degree of activation sparsity. In our architecture, the main strategy is to use less but highly utilized PEs. The PE array used to perform the convolution is only as large as the kernel size, allowing all PEs to be active as long as there are spikes to process. This constant flow of spikes is ensured by compressing the feature maps (i.e. the activations) into queues that can then be processed spike by spike. This compression is performed in run-time using dedicated circuitry, leading to a self-timed scheduling. This allows the processing time to scale directly with the number of spikes. We implemented the proposed architecture on an FPGA and achieved a significant speedup compared to other implementations while needing less hardware resources and maintaining a lower energy consumption.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 在基于事件的事物中进行计算，以实现比标准神经网络更高效的计算。在 SNN 中，神经元输出（即激活）不是用实值激活编码，而是用二进制尖峰序列编码。 The motivation of using SNNs over conventional neural networks is rooted in the special computational aspects of SNNs, especially the very high degree of sparsity of neural output activations. Well established architectures for conventional Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) feature large spatial arrays of Processing Elements (PEs) that remain highly underutilized in the face of activation sparsity. We propose a novel architecture that is optimized for the processing of Convolutional SNNs (CSNNs) that feature a high degree of activation sparsity.在我们的架构中，主要策略是使用较少但利用率较高的 PE。 The PE array used to perform the convolution is only as large as the kernel size, allowing all PEs to be active as long as there are spikes to process. This constant flow of spikes is ensured by compressing the feature maps (i.e. the activations) into queues that can then be processed spike by spike.这种压缩是在运行时使用专用电路执行的，从而实现自定时调度。这使得处理时间可以直接随着尖峰的数量而变化。 A novel memory organization scheme called memory interlacing is used to efficiently store and retrieve the membrane potentials of the individual neurons using multiple small parallel on-chip RAMs.每个 RAM 都硬连线到其 PE，从而减少了开关电路并允许 RAM 位于靠近相应 PE 的位置。 We implemented the proposed architecture on an FPGA and achieved a significant speedup compared to other implementations while needing less hardware resources and maintaining a lower energy consumption.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对稀疏激活的卷积脉冲神经网络（CSNNs）的高效硬件加速架构。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络（CNN）的处理单元（PE）阵列在处理脉冲神经网络（SNN）的高稀疏激活时利用率低下，导致资源浪费。
AI.method: 设计小规模PE阵列（与卷积核尺寸匹配），通过运行时压缩特征图并采用自定时调度机制，结合内存交织技术利用多小型片上RAM高效存储膜电位。
AI.result: 在FPGA实现中，该架构相比其他方案实现了显著加速，同时减少硬件资源占用并降低能耗。
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过优化PE利用率和内存访问，有效解决了CSNNs高稀疏激活下的硬件加速难题。

tldr: 本文提出了一种针对稀疏激活的卷积脉冲神经网络（CSNNs）的高效硬件加速架构。
motivation: 传统卷积神经网络（CNN）的处理单元（PE）阵列在处理脉冲神经网络（SNN）的高稀疏激活时利用率低下，导致资源浪费。
method: 设计小规模PE阵列（与卷积核尺寸匹配），通过运行时压缩特征图并采用自定时调度机制，结合内存交织技术利用多小型片上RAM高效存储膜电位。

search_text: Efficient Hardware Acceleration of Sparsely Active Convolutional Spiking Neural Networks 稀疏主动卷积尖峰神经网络的高效硬件加速 Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) compute in an event-based matter to achieve a more efficient computation than standard Neural Networks. In SNNs, neuronal outputs (i.e. activations) are not encoded with real-valued activations but with sequences of binary spikes. The motivation of using SNNs over conventional neural networks is rooted in the special computational aspects of SNNs, especially the very high degree of sparsity of neural output activations. Well established architectures for conventional Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) feature large spatial arrays of Processing Elements (PEs) that remain highly underutilized in the face of activation sparsity. We propose a novel architecture that is optimized for the processing of Convolutional SNNs (CSNNs) that feature a high degree of activation sparsity. In our architecture, the main strategy is to use less but highly utilized PEs. The PE array used to perform the convolution is only as large as the kernel size, allowing all PEs to be active as long as there are spikes to process. This constant flow of spikes is ensured by compressing the feature maps (i.e. the activations) into queues that can then be processed spike by spike. This compression is performed in run-time using dedicated circuitry, leading to a self-timed scheduling. This allows the processing time to scale directly with the number of spikes. A novel memory organization scheme called memory interlacing is used to efficiently store and retrieve the membrane potentials of the individual neurons using multiple small parallel on-chip RAMs. Each RAM is hardwired to its PE, reducing switching circuitry and allowing RAMs to be located in close proximity to the respective PE. We implemented the proposed architecture on an FPGA and achieved a significant speedup compared to other implementations while needing less hardware resources and maintaining a lower energy consumption. 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 在基于事件的事物中进行计算，以实现比标准神经网络更高效的计算。在 SNN 中，神经元输出（即激活）不是用实值激活编码，而是用二进制尖峰序列编码。 The motivation of using SNNs over conventional neural networks is rooted in the special computational aspects of SNNs, especially the very high degree of sparsity of neural output activations. Well established architectures for conventional Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) feature large spatial arrays of Processing Elements (PEs) that remain highly underutilized in the face of activation sparsity. We propose a novel architecture that is optimized for the processing of Convolutional SNNs (CSNNs) that feature a high degree of activation sparsity.在我们的架构中，主要策略是使用较少但利用率较高的 PE。 The PE array used to perform the convolution is only as large as the kernel size, allowing all PEs to be active as long as there are spikes to process. This constant flow of spikes is ensured by compressing the feature maps (i.e. the activations) into queues that can then be processed spike by spike.这种压缩是在运行时使用专用电路执行的，从而实现自定时调度。这使得处理时间可以直接随着尖峰的数量而变化。 A novel memory organization scheme called memory interlacing is used to efficiently store and retrieve the membrane potentials of the individual neurons using multiple small parallel on-chip RAMs.每个 RAM 都硬连线到其 PE，从而减少了开关电路并允许 RAM 位于靠近相应 PE 的位置。 We implemented the proposed architecture on an FPGA and achieved a significant speedup compared to other implementations while needing less hardware resources and maintaining a lower energy consumption. 本文提出了一种针对稀疏激活的卷积脉冲神经网络（CSNNs）的高效硬件加速架构。 Jan Sommer,M. Akif Özkan,Oliver Keszocze,Jürgen Teich cs.AR,cs.NE

authors_text: Murat Simsek,Burak Kantarci,Azzedine Boukerche
title: Collaborative Self Organizing Map with DeepNNs for Fake Task Prevention in Mobile Crowdsensing
title_zh: 使用 DeepNN 的协作自组织地图，用于移动群体感知中的虚假任务预防
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures, one figure with two subfigures, IEEE International Conference on Communications (ICC) 2022
comments: 6 pages, 6 figures, one figure with two subfigures, IEEE International Conference on Communications (ICC) 2022
abstract: Mobile Crowdsensing (MCS) is a sensing paradigm that has transformed the way that various service providers collect, process, and analyze data. MCS offers novel processes where data is sensed and shared through mobile devices of the users to support various applications and services for cutting-edge technologies. However, various threats, such as data poisoning, clogging task attacks and fake sensing tasks adversely affect the performance of MCS systems, especially their sensing, and computational capacities. Since fake sensing task submissions aim at the successful completion of the legitimate tasks and mobile device resources, they also drain MCS platform resources. In this work, Self Organizing Feature Map (SOFM), an artificial neural network that is trained in an unsupervised manner, is utilized to pre-cluster the legitimate data in the dataset, thus fake tasks can be detected more effectively through less imbalanced data where legitimate/fake tasks ratio is lower in the new dataset. After pre-clustered legitimate tasks are separated from the original dataset, the remaining dataset is used to train a Deep Neural Network (DeepNN) to reach the ultimate performance goal. Pre-clustered legitimate tasks are appended to the positive prediction outputs of DeepNN to boost the performance of the proposed technique, which we refer to as pre-clustered DeepNN (PrecDeepNN). The results prove that the initial average accuracy to discriminate the legitimate and fake tasks obtained from DeepNN with the selected set of features can be improved up to an average accuracy of 0.9812 obtained from the proposed machine learning technique.

In this work, Self Organizing Feature Map (SOFM), an artificial neural network that is trained in an unsupervised manner, is utilized to pre-cluster the legitimate data in the dataset, thus fake tasks can be detected more effectively through less imbalanced data where legitimate/fake tasks ratio is lower in the new dataset. After pre-clustered legitimate tasks are separated from the original dataset, the remaining dataset is used to train a Deep Neural Network (DeepNN) to reach the ultimate performance goal. Pre-clustered legitimate tasks are appended to the positive prediction outputs of DeepNN to boost the performance of the proposed technique, which we refer to as pre-clustered DeepNN (PrecDeepNN). The results prove that the initial average accuracy to discriminate the legitimate and fake tasks obtained from DeepNN with the selected set of features can be improved up to an average accuracy of 0.9812 obtained from the proposed machine learning technique.

However, various threats, such as data poisoning, clogging task attacks and fake sensing tasks adversely affect the performance of MCS systems, especially their sensing, and computational capacities. In this work, Self Organizing Feature Map (SOFM), an artificial neural network that is trained in an unsupervised manner, is utilized to pre-cluster the legitimate data in the dataset, thus fake tasks can be detected more effectively through less imbalanced data where legitimate/fake tasks ratio is lower in the new dataset. Pre-clustered legitimate tasks are appended to the positive prediction outputs of DeepNN to boost the performance of the proposed technique, which we refer to as pre-clustered DeepNN (PrecDeepNN).结果证明，使用所选特征集从 DeepNN 获得的区分真假任务的初始平均准确度可以提高到从所提出的机器学习技术获得的平均准确度为 0.9812。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自组织特征映射（SOFM）和深度神经网络（DeepNN）的方法，用于检测移动众包系统中的虚假任务，以提升系统性能。
AI.motivation: 移动众包系统面临虚假任务攻击等威胁，传统方法难以有效区分合法与虚假任务，导致资源浪费和性能下降。
AI.method: 利用SOFM对合法数据进行预聚类，减少数据不平衡问题；随后使用DeepNN训练模型，并将预聚类的合法任务与DeepNN的正向预测结果结合，形成PrecDeepNN方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在特征选择基础上将任务分类准确率从初始DeepNN的水平提升至平均0.9812。
AI.conclusion: PrecDeepNN通过预聚类与深度学习结合，显著提升了虚假任务检测精度，为移动众包系统安全提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Duy Le Hoai,Eunchae Lim,Eunbin Choi,Sieun Kim,Sudarshan Pant,Guee-Sang Lee,Soo-Huyng Kim,Hyung-Jeong Yang
title: An Attention-based Method for Action Unit Detection at the 3rd ABAW Competition
title_zh: 第三届 ABAW 竞赛中基于注意力的动作单元检测方法
abstract: Facial Action Coding System is an approach for modeling the complexity of human emotional expression. Automatic action unit (AU) detection is a crucial research area in human-computer interaction. This paper describes our submission to the third Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition 2022. We proposed a method for detecting facial action units in the video. At the first stage, a lightweight CNN-based feature extractor is employed to extract the feature map from each video frame. Then, an attention module is applied to refine the attention map. The attention encoded vector is derived using a weighted sum of the feature map and the attention scores later. Finally, the sigmoid function is used at the output layer to make the prediction suitable for multi-label AUs detection. We achieved a macro F1 score of 0.48 on the ABAW challenge validation set compared to 0.39 from the baseline model.
summary: Facial Action Coding System is an approach for modeling the complexity of human emotional expression. Automatic action unit (AU) detection is a crucial research area in human-computer interaction. This paper describes our submission to the third Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition 2022. We proposed a method for detecting facial action units in the video. At the first stage, a lightweight CNN-based feature extractor is employed to extract the feature map from each video frame. Then, an attention module is applied to refine the attention map. The attention encoded vector is derived using a weighted sum of the feature map and the attention scores later. Finally, the sigmoid function is used at the output layer to make the prediction suitable for multi-label AUs detection. We achieved a macro F1 score of 0.48 on the ABAW challenge validation set compared to 0.39 from the baseline model.
abstract_zh: 面部动作编码系统是一种对人类情感表达的复杂性进行建模的方法。自动动作单元（AU）检测是人机交互中的一个重要研究领域。 This paper describes our submission to the third Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition 2022. We proposed a method for detecting facial action units in the video.在第一阶段，采用基于 CNN 的轻量级特征提取器从每个视频帧中提取特征图。然后，应用注意力模块来细化注意力图。使用特征图和稍后的注意力分数的加权和来导出注意力编码向量。最后，在输出层使用sigmoid函数使预测适合多标签AU检测。我们在 ABAW 挑战验证集上获得了 0.48 的宏观 F1 分数，而基线模型的宏观 F1 分数为 0.39。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的动作单元（AU）检测方法，用于第三屆ABAW竞赛中的视频面部表情分析。
AI.motivation: 自动动作单元检测在人机交互中具有重要意义，但现有基线模型性能不足，需改进检测准确率。
AI.method: 采用轻量级CNN提取视频帧特征，结合注意力模块优化特征图，通过加权求和生成注意力编码向量，最终使用sigmoid函数进行多标签AU预测。
AI.result: 在ABAW验证集上达到宏观F1分数0.48，优于基线模型的0.39。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制有效提升了AU检测性能，验证了方法在复杂真实场景下的可行性。

authors_text: Tran Nguyen Le,Jens Lundell,Fares J. Abu-Dakka,Ville Kyrki
title: A Novel Simulation-Based Quality Metric for Evaluating Grasps on 3D Deformable Objects
title_zh: 用于评估 3D 可变形物体抓取情况的新颖的基于仿真的质量指标
comment: In review for IROS 2022
comments: In review for IROS 2022
abstract: Evaluation of grasps on deformable 3D objects is a little-studied problem, even if the applicability of rigid object grasp quality measures for deformable ones is an open question. A central issue with most quality measures is their dependence on contact points which for deformable objects depend on the deformations. This paper proposes a grasp quality measure for deformable objects that uses information about object deformation to calculate the grasp quality. Grasps are evaluated by simulating the deformations during grasping and predicting the contacts between the gripper and the grasped object. The contact information is then used as input for a new grasp quality metric to quantify the grasp quality. The approach is benchmarked against two classical rigid-body quality metrics on over 600 grasps in the Isaac gym simulation and over 50 real-world grasps. Experimental results show an average improvement of 18\% in the grasp success rate for deformable objects compared to the classical rigid-body quality metrics.
summary: Evaluation of grasps on deformable 3D objects is a little-studied problem, even if the applicability of rigid object grasp quality measures for deformable ones is an open question. A central issue with most quality measures is their dependence on contact points which for deformable objects depend on the deformations. This paper proposes a grasp quality measure for deformable objects that uses information about object deformation to calculate the grasp quality. Grasps are evaluated by simulating the deformations during grasping and predicting the contacts between the gripper and the grasped object. The contact information is then used as input for a new grasp quality metric to quantify the grasp quality. The approach is benchmarked against two classical rigid-body quality metrics on over 600 grasps in the Isaac gym simulation and over 50 real-world grasps. Experimental results show an average improvement of 18\% in the grasp success rate for deformable objects compared to the classical rigid-body quality metrics.
abstract_zh: 对可变形 3D 物体的抓取评估是一个很少被研究的问题，即使刚性物体抓取质量测量对可变形物体的适用性是一个悬而未决的问题。大多数质量测量的一个核心问题是它们对接触点的依赖，而对于可变形物体来说，接触点则取决于变形。本文提出了一种可变形物体的抓取质量测量方法，它使用物体变形的信息来计算抓取质量。通过模拟抓取过程中的变形并预测夹具和抓取物体之间的接触来评估抓取。然后，接触信息被用作新的抓取质量度量的输入，以量化抓取质量。该方法以 Isaac 健身房模拟中 600 多次抓握和现实世界中 50 多次抓握的两个经典刚体质量指标为基准。实验结果表明，与经典刚体质量指标相比，可变形物体的抓取成功率平均提高了 18%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于仿真的新型抓取质量度量方法，用于评估对可变形3D物体的抓取效果。
AI.motivation: 传统刚体抓取质量评估指标无法有效应用于可变形物体，因其依赖接触点而忽视了变形的影响，导致评估结果不准确。
AI.method: 通过模拟抓取过程中的物体变形并预测夹爪与物体的接触信息，将变形数据作为输入构建新的抓取质量度量指标，并在仿真和真实环境中进行基准测试。
AI.result: 在Isaac Gym仿真环境和50个真实抓取案例中，该方法相比经典刚体指标平均提升了18%的抓取成功率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过引入变形信息有效改进了可变形物体抓取质量评估，验证了其在仿真与实际场景中的优越性。

authors_text: Stephen Jacobs,R. Michael Butts,Yu Gu,Ali Baheri,Guilherme A. S. Pereira
title: A Framework for Controlling Multi-Robot Systems Using Bayesian Optimization and Linear Combination of Vectors
title_zh: 使用贝叶斯优化和向量线性组合控制多机器人系统的框架
comment: 7 pages, 8 figures
comments: 7 pages, 8 figures
abstract: We propose a general framework for creating parameterized control schemes for decentralized multi-robot systems. A variety of tasks can be seen in the decentralized multi-robot literature, each with many possible control schemes. For several of them, the agents choose control velocities using algorithms that extract information from the environment and combine that information in meaningful ways. From this basic formation, a framework is proposed that classifies each robots' measurement information as sets of relevant scalars and vectors and creates a linear combination of the measured vector sets. Along with an optimizable parameter set, the scalar measurements are used to generate the coefficients for the linear combination. With this framework and Bayesian optimization, we can create effective control systems for several multi-robot tasks, including cohesion and segregation, pattern formation, and searching/foraging.
summary: We propose a general framework for creating parameterized control schemes for decentralized multi-robot systems. A variety of tasks can be seen in the decentralized multi-robot literature, each with many possible control schemes. For several of them, the agents choose control velocities using algorithms that extract information from the environment and combine that information in meaningful ways. From this basic formation, a framework is proposed that classifies each robots' measurement information as sets of relevant scalars and vectors and creates a linear combination of the measured vector sets. Along with an optimizable parameter set, the scalar measurements are used to generate the coefficients for the linear combination. With this framework and Bayesian optimization, we can create effective control systems for several multi-robot tasks, including cohesion and segregation, pattern formation, and searching/foraging.
abstract_zh: We propose a general framework for creating parameterized control schemes for decentralized multi-robot systems. A variety of tasks can be seen in the decentralized multi-robot literature, each with many possible control schemes.对于其中的一些，代理使用从环境中提取信息并以有意义的方式组合这些信息的算法来选择控制速度。从这个基本结构出发，提出了一个框架，将每个机器人的测量信息分类为相关标量和向量的集合，并创建测量向量集的线性组合。 Along with an optimizable parameter set, the scalar measurements are used to generate the coefficients for the linear combination.通过这个框架和贝叶斯优化，我们可以为多个多机器人任务创建有效的控制系统，包括凝聚和分离、模式形成和搜索/觅食。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于贝叶斯优化和向量线性组合的框架，用于设计参数化控制方案，以控制去中心化多机器人系统，应用于凝聚、隔离、模式形成等任务。
AI.motivation: 现有去中心化多机器人控制方案多样且分散，缺乏统一框架，需一种通用方法分类传感器数据并生成参数化控制策略以适应多种任务。
AI.method: 将机器人感知数据分为标量与向量集，构建线性组合生成控制速度，结合贝叶斯优化自动调整参数，形成参数化控制框架。
AI.result: 成功应用于多机器人系统的凝聚、隔离、模式形成及搜索/觅食任务，验证了框架的有效性和适应性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为多机器人系统提供了通用控制方案，通过贝叶斯优化与向量组合有效提升任务执行能力，具有广泛的应用潜力。

Michael Butts,Yu Gu,Ali Baheri,Guilherme A. S. Pereira cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Ahmet Caner Yüzügüler,Nikolaos Dimitriadis,Pascal Frossard
title: U-Boost NAS: Utilization-Boosted Differentiable Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: U-Boost NAS：利用率提升的可微神经架构搜索
abstract: Optimizing resource utilization in target platforms is key to achieving high performance during DNN inference. While optimizations have been proposed for inference latency, memory footprint, and energy consumption, prior hardware-aware neural architecture search (NAS) methods have omitted resource utilization, preventing DNNs to take full advantage of the target inference platforms. Modeling resource utilization efficiently and accurately is challenging, especially for widely-used array-based inference accelerators such as Google TPU. In this work, we propose a novel hardware-aware NAS framework that does not only optimize for task accuracy and inference latency, but also for resource utilization. We also propose and validate a new computational model for resource utilization in inference accelerators. By using the proposed NAS framework and the proposed resource utilization model, we achieve 2.8 - 4x speedup for DNN inference compared to prior hardware-aware NAS methods while attaining similar or improved accuracy in image classification on CIFAR-10 and Imagenet-100 datasets.
summary: Optimizing resource utilization in target platforms is key to achieving high performance during DNN inference. While optimizations have been proposed for inference latency, memory footprint, and energy consumption, prior hardware-aware neural architecture search (NAS) methods have omitted resource utilization, preventing DNNs to take full advantage of the target inference platforms. Modeling resource utilization efficiently and accurately is challenging, especially for widely-used array-based inference accelerators such as Google TPU. In this work, we propose a novel hardware-aware NAS framework that does not only optimize for task accuracy and inference latency, but also for resource utilization. We also propose and validate a new computational model for resource utilization in inference accelerators. By using the proposed NAS framework and the proposed resource utilization model, we achieve 2.8 - 4x speedup for DNN inference compared to prior hardware-aware NAS methods while attaining similar or improved accuracy in image classification on CIFAR-10 and Imagenet-100 datasets.
abstract_zh: 优化目标平台中的资源利用率是在 DNN 推理过程中实现高性能的关键。虽然已经提出了针对推理延迟、内存占用和能耗的优化，但先前的硬件感知神经架构搜索 (NAS) 方法忽略了资源利用，从而阻碍了 DNN 充分利用目标推理平台。高效、准确地对资源利用进行建模具有挑战性，特别是对于广泛使用的基于阵列的推理加速器（例如 Google TPU）而言。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的硬件感知 NAS 框架，该框架不仅可以优化任务准确性和推理延迟，还可以优化资源利用率。我们还提出并验证了推理加速器中资源利用的新计算模型。通过使用所提出的 NAS 框架和所提出的资源利用模型，与之前的硬件感知 NAS 方法相比，我们实现了 2.8 - 4 倍的 DNN 推理加速，同时在 CIFAR-10 和 Imagenet-100 数据集上的图像分类方面获得了相似或更高的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为U-Boost NAS的新型硬件感知神经网络架构搜索框架，通过优化资源利用率来提升深度神经网络在目标平台上的推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有硬件感知的神经网络架构搜索方法忽略了资源利用率优化，导致DNN无法充分利用目标推理平台（如TPU）的计算资源。
AI.method: 设计了结合资源利用率建模的可微分NAS框架，提出针对数组型推理加速器的资源利用率计算模型，并在搜索过程中联合优化准确性、推理延迟和资源利用率。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet-100数据集上，相比先前方法实现2.8-4倍的推理加速，同时保持相似或更高的图像分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模和优化资源利用率，U-Boost NAS框架能更高效地利用硬件资源，为实际部署提供性能更优的神经网络架构。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为U-Boost NAS的新型硬件感知神经网络架构搜索框架，通过优化资源利用率来提升深度神经网络在目标平台上的推理性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有硬件感知的神经网络架构搜索方法忽略了资源利用率优化，导致DNN无法充分利用目标推理平台（如TPU）的计算资源。
ai_content.method: 设计了结合资源利用率建模的可微分NAS框架，提出针对数组型推理加速器的资源利用率计算模型，并在搜索过程中联合优化准确性、推理延迟和资源利用率。
ai_content.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet-100数据集上，相比先前方法实现2.8-4倍的推理加速，同时保持相似或更高的图像分类准确率。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过显式建模和优化资源利用率，U-Boost NAS框架能更高效地利用硬件资源，为实际部署提供性能更优的神经网络架构。

search_text: U-Boost NAS: Utilization-Boosted Differentiable Neural Architecture Search U-Boost NAS：利用率提升的可微神经架构搜索 Optimizing resource utilization in target platforms is key to achieving high performance during DNN inference. While optimizations have been proposed for inference latency, memory footprint, and energy consumption, prior hardware-aware neural architecture search (NAS) methods have omitted resource utilization, preventing DNNs to take full advantage of the target inference platforms. Modeling resource utilization efficiently and accurately is challenging, especially for widely-used array-based inference accelerators such as Google TPU. In this work, we propose a novel hardware-aware NAS framework that does not only optimize for task accuracy and inference latency, but also for resource utilization. We also propose and validate a new computational model for resource utilization in inference accelerators. By using the proposed NAS framework and the proposed resource utilization model, we achieve 2.8 - 4x speedup for DNN inference compared to prior hardware-aware NAS methods while attaining similar or improved accuracy in image classification on CIFAR-10 and Imagenet-100 datasets. 优化目标平台中的资源利用率是在 DNN 推理过程中实现高性能的关键。虽然已经提出了针对推理延迟、内存占用和能耗的优化，但先前的硬件感知神经架构搜索 (NAS) 方法忽略了资源利用，从而阻碍了 DNN 充分利用目标推理平台。高效、准确地对资源利用进行建模具有挑战性，特别是对于广泛使用的基于阵列的推理加速器（例如 Google TPU）而言。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的硬件感知 NAS 框架，该框架不仅可以优化任务准确性和推理延迟，还可以优化资源利用率。我们还提出并验证了推理加速器中资源利用的新计算模型。通过使用所提出的 NAS 框架和所提出的资源利用模型，与之前的硬件感知 NAS 方法相比，我们实现了 2.8 - 4 倍的 DNN 推理加速，同时在 CIFAR-10 和 Imagenet-100 数据集上的图像分类方面获得了相似或更高的准确性。 本文提出了一种名为U-Boost NAS的新型硬件感知神经网络架构搜索框架，通过优化资源利用率来提升深度神经网络在目标平台上的推理性能。 Ahmet Caner Yüzügüler,Nikolaos Dimitriadis,Pascal Frossard cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Dimitrios Los,Thomas Sauerwald
title: Tight Bounds for Repeated Balls-into-Bins
title_zh: 重复将球放入垃圾箱的严格界限
comment: Full version of STACS 2023 paper; 38 pages, 5 figures
comments: Full version of STACS 2023 paper; 38 pages, 5 figures
abstract: We study the repeated balls-into-bins process introduced by Becchetti, Clementi, Natale, Pasquale and Posta (2019). This process starts with $m$ balls arbitrarily distributed across $n$ bins. At each round $t=1,2,\ldots$, one ball is selected from each non-empty bin, and then placed it into a bin chosen independently and uniformly at random. We prove the following results: $\quad \bullet$ For any $n \leq m \leq \mathrm{poly}(n)$, we prove a lower bound of $Ω(m/n \cdot \log n)$ on the maximum load. For the special case $m=n$, this matches the upper bound of $O(\log n)$, as shown in [BCNPP19]. It also provides a positive answer to the conjecture in [BCNPP19] that for $m=n$ the maximum load is $ω(\log n/ \log \log n)$ at least once in a polynomially large time interval. For $m\in [ω(n),n\log n]$, our new lower bound disproves the conjecture in [BCNPP19] that the maximum load remains $O(\log n)$. $\quad \bullet$ For any $n\leq m\leq\mathrm{poly}(n)$, we prove an upper bound of $O(m/n\cdot\log n)$ on the maximum load for all steps of a polynomially large time interval. This matches our lower bound up to multiplicative constants. $\quad \bullet$ For any $m\geq n$, our analysis also implies an $O(m^2/n)$ waiting time to reach a configuration with a $O(m/n\cdot\log m)$ maximum load, even for worst-case initial distributions. $\quad \bullet$ For any $m \geq n$, we show that every ball visits every bin in $O(m\log m)$ rounds. For $m = n$, this improves the previous upper bound of $O(n \log^2 n)$ in [BCNPP19]. We also prove that the upper bound is tight up to multiplicative constants for any $n \leq m \leq \mathrm{poly}(n)$.
summary: We study the repeated balls-into-bins process introduced by Becchetti, Clementi, Natale, Pasquale and Posta (2019). This process starts with $m$ balls arbitrarily distributed across $n$ bins. At each round $t=1,2,\ldots$, one ball is selected from each non-empty bin, and then placed it into a bin chosen independently and uniformly at random. We prove the following results: $\quad \bullet$ For any $n \leq m \leq \mathrm{poly}(n)$, we prove a lower bound of $Ω(m/n \cdot \log n)$ on the maximum load. For the special case $m=n$, this matches the upper bound of $O(\log n)$, as shown in [BCNPP19]. It also provides a positive answer to the conjecture in [BCNPP19] that for $m=n$ the maximum load is $ω(\log n/ \log \log n)$ at least once in a polynomially large time interval. For $m\in [ω(n),n\log n]$, our new lower bound disproves the conjecture in [BCNPP19] that the maximum load remains $O(\log n)$. $\quad \bullet$ For any $n\leq m\leq\mathrm{poly}(n)$, we prove an upper bound of $O(m/n\cdot\log n)$ on the maximum load for all steps of a polynomially large time interval. This matches our lower bound up to multiplicative constants. $\quad \bullet$ For any $m\geq n$, our analysis also implies an $O(m^2/n)$ waiting time to reach a configuration with a $O(m/n\cdot\log m)$ maximum load, even for worst-case initial distributions. $\quad \bullet$ For any $m \geq n$, we show that every ball visits every bin in $O(m\log m)$ rounds. For $m = n$, this improves the previous upper bound of $O(n \log^2 n)$ in [BCNPP19]. We also prove that the upper bound is tight up to multiplicative constants for any $n \leq m \leq \mathrm{poly}(n)$.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了 Becchetti、Clementi、Natale、Pasquale 和 Posta (2019) 提出的重复球放入垃圾箱的过程。此过程从任意分布在 $n$ 个箱子中的 $m$ 个球开始。在每一轮$t=1,2,\ldots$中，从每个非空箱子中选择一个球，然后将其放入独立且均匀随机选择的箱子中。我们证明以下结果： $\quad \bullet$ 对于任何 $n \leq m \leq \mathrm{poly}(n)$，我们证明最大负载的下界 $Ω(m/n \cdot \log n)$。对于特殊情况 $m=n$，这与 $O(\log n)$ 的上限匹配，如 [BCNPP19] 中所示。它还为 [BCNPP19] 中的猜想提供了肯定的答案，即对于 $m=n$，最大负载在多项式大时间间隔中至少一次为 $ω(\log n/ \log \log n)$。对于 $m\in [ω(n),n\log n]$，我们的新下限反驳了 [BCNPP19] 中的猜想，即最大负载仍然是 $O(\log n)$。 $\quad \bullet$ 对于任何 $n\leq m\leq\mathrm{poly}(n)$，我们证明多项式大时间间隔的所有步骤的最大负载的上限为 $O(m/n\cdot\log n)$。这与乘法常数的下界相匹配。 $\quad \bullet$ 对于任何 $m\geq n$，我们的分析还意味着达到 $O(m/n\cdot\log m)$ 最大负载的配置需要 $O(m^2/n)$ 等待时间，即使对于最坏情况的初始分布也是如此。 $\quad \bullet$ 对于任何 $m \geq n$，我们表明每个球都会在 $O(m\log m)$ 轮中访问每个箱子。对于 $m = n$，这改进了 [BCNPP19] 中 $O(n \log^2 n)$ 的先前上限。我们还证明对于任何 $n \leq m \leq \mathrm{poly}(n)$ ，上限都严格限制于乘法常数。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究重复投球过程中的最大负载问题，分析了球数m与桶数n的关系，并证明了上下界。
AI.motivation: 旨在解决重复投球过程中负载平衡的理论界问题，验证先前猜想并改进现有结果。
AI.method: 通过概率分析和数学证明，结合上下界推导，分析不同m和n范围内的负载行为。
AI.result: 证明了最大负载的下界为Ω(m/n·log n)，上界为O(m/n·log n)，推翻了部分猜想，并给出了等待时间和访问时间的界。
AI.conclusion: 建立了重复投球过程的紧界，确认了部分猜想并修正了先前结论，为负载平衡理论提供了更精确的分析框架。

authors_text: Philipp Terhörst,Florian Bierbaum,Marco Huber,Naser Damer,Florian Kirchbuchner,Kiran Raja,Arjan Kuijper
title: On the (Limited) Generalization of MasterFace Attacks and Its Relation to the Capacity of Face Representations
title_zh: 关于 MasterFace 攻击的（有限）泛化及其与人脸表示能力的关系
abstract: A MasterFace is a face image that can successfully match against a large portion of the population. Since their generation does not require access to the information of the enrolled subjects, MasterFace attacks represent a potential security risk for widely-used face recognition systems. Previous works proposed methods for generating such images and demonstrated that these attacks can strongly compromise face recognition. However, previous works followed evaluation settings consisting of older recognition models, limited cross-dataset and cross-model evaluations, and the use of low-scale testing data. This makes it hard to state the generalizability of these attacks. In this work, we comprehensively analyse the generalizability of MasterFace attacks in empirical and theoretical investigations. The empirical investigations include the use of six state-of-the-art FR models, cross-dataset and cross-model evaluation protocols, and utilizing testing datasets of significantly higher size and variance. The results indicate a low generalizability when MasterFaces are training on a different face recognition model than the one used for testing. In these cases, the attack performance is similar to zero-effort imposter attacks. In the theoretical investigations, we define and estimate the face capacity and the maximum MasterFace coverage under the assumption that identities in the face space are well separated. The current trend of increasing the fairness and generalizability in face recognition indicates that the vulnerability of future systems might further decrease. Future works might analyse the utility of MasterFaces for understanding and enhancing the robustness of face recognition models.
summary: A MasterFace is a face image that can successfully match against a large portion of the population. Since their generation does not require access to the information of the enrolled subjects, MasterFace attacks represent a potential security risk for widely-used face recognition systems. Previous works proposed methods for generating such images and demonstrated that these attacks can strongly compromise face recognition. However, previous works followed evaluation settings consisting of older recognition models, limited cross-dataset and cross-model evaluations, and the use of low-scale testing data. This makes it hard to state the generalizability of these attacks. In this work, we comprehensively analyse the generalizability of MasterFace attacks in empirical and theoretical investigations. The empirical investigations include the use of six state-of-the-art FR models, cross-dataset and cross-model evaluation protocols, and utilizing testing datasets of significantly higher size and variance. The results indicate a low generalizability when MasterFaces are training on a different face recognition model than the one used for testing. In these cases, the attack performance is similar to zero-effort imposter attacks. In the theoretical investigations, we define and estimate the face capacity and the maximum MasterFace coverage under the assumption that identities in the face space are well separated. The current trend of increasing the fairness and generalizability in face recognition indicates that the vulnerability of future systems might further decrease. Future works might analyse the utility of MasterFaces for understanding and enhancing the robustness of face recognition models.
abstract_zh: MasterFace 是可以成功与大部分人群进行匹配的人脸图像。 Since their generation does not require access to the information of the enrolled subjects, MasterFace attacks represent a potential security risk for widely-used face recognition systems.之前的工作提出了生成此类图像的方法，并证明这些攻击可以严重损害人脸识别。 However, previous works followed evaluation settings consisting of older recognition models, limited cross-dataset and cross-model evaluations, and the use of low-scale testing data.这使得很难说明这些攻击的普遍性。在这项工作中，我们在实证和理论研究中全面分析了 MasterFace 攻击的普遍性。 The empirical investigations include the use of six state-of-the-art FR models, cross-dataset and cross-model evaluation protocols, and utilizing testing datasets of significantly higher size and variance.结果表明，当 MasterFaces 在与测试所用的人脸识别模型不同的人脸识别模型上进行训练时，通用性较低。在这些情况下，攻击性能类似于零努力冒名顶替者攻击。 In the theoretical investigations, we define and estimate the face capacity and the maximum MasterFace coverage under the assumption that identities in the face space are well separated. The current trend of increasing the fairness and generalizability in face recognition indicates that the vulnerability of future systems might further decrease.未来的工作可能会分析 MasterFaces 在理解和增强人脸识别模型的鲁棒性方面的效用。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了MasterFace攻击在不同人脸识别模型和数据集上的泛化能力，并探讨其与人脸表示能力的关系。
AI.motivation: 先前研究生成的MasterFace攻击存在评估数据老旧、跨模型/数据集验证不足等问题，难以准确判断其实际威胁。
AI.method: 采用六种最新人脸识别模型，进行跨数据集和跨模型评估，使用更大规模且多样化的测试数据集进行实验；理论部分定义并估计人脸空间中的'容量'与最大攻击覆盖率。
AI.result: 当MasterFace在不同模型间训练和测试时，攻击效果显著降低，接近随机攻击水平；理论分析表明人脸表示能力提升可能减少未来系统的脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 当前人脸识别系统公平性提升趋势可能降低MasterFace攻击的有效性，未来研究可探索其在增强模型鲁棒性中的应用价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文分析了MasterFace攻击在不同人脸识别模型和数据集上的泛化能力，并探讨其与人脸表示能力的关系。
ai_content.motivation: 先前研究生成的MasterFace攻击存在评估数据老旧、跨模型/数据集验证不足等问题，难以准确判断其实际威胁。
ai_content.method: 采用六种最新人脸识别模型，进行跨数据集和跨模型评估，使用更大规模且多样化的测试数据集进行实验；理论部分定义并估计人脸空间中的'容量'与最大攻击覆盖率。
ai_content.result: 当MasterFace在不同模型间训练和测试时，攻击效果显著降低，接近随机攻击水平；理论分析表明人脸表示能力提升可能减少未来系统的脆弱性。
ai_content.conclusion: 当前人脸识别系统公平性提升趋势可能降低MasterFace攻击的有效性，未来研究可探索其在增强模型鲁棒性中的应用价值。

search_text: On the (Limited) Generalization of MasterFace Attacks and Its Relation to the Capacity of Face Representations 关于 MasterFace 攻击的（有限）泛化及其与人脸表示能力的关系 A MasterFace is a face image that can successfully match against a large portion of the population. Since their generation does not require access to the information of the enrolled subjects, MasterFace attacks represent a potential security risk for widely-used face recognition systems. Previous works proposed methods for generating such images and demonstrated that these attacks can strongly compromise face recognition. However, previous works followed evaluation settings consisting of older recognition models, limited cross-dataset and cross-model evaluations, and the use of low-scale testing data. This makes it hard to state the generalizability of these attacks. In this work, we comprehensively analyse the generalizability of MasterFace attacks in empirical and theoretical investigations. The empirical investigations include the use of six state-of-the-art FR models, cross-dataset and cross-model evaluation protocols, and utilizing testing datasets of significantly higher size and variance. The results indicate a low generalizability when MasterFaces are training on a different face recognition model than the one used for testing. In these cases, the attack performance is similar to zero-effort imposter attacks. In the theoretical investigations, we define and estimate the face capacity and the maximum MasterFace coverage under the assumption that identities in the face space are well separated. The current trend of increasing the fairness and generalizability in face recognition indicates that the vulnerability of future systems might further decrease. Future works might analyse the utility of MasterFaces for understanding and enhancing the robustness of face recognition models. MasterFace 是可以成功与大部分人群进行匹配的人脸图像。 Since their generation does not require access to the information of the enrolled subjects, MasterFace attacks represent a potential security risk for widely-used face recognition systems.之前的工作提出了生成此类图像的方法，并证明这些攻击可以严重损害人脸识别。 However, previous works followed evaluation settings consisting of older recognition models, limited cross-dataset and cross-model evaluations, and the use of low-scale testing data.这使得很难说明这些攻击的普遍性。在这项工作中，我们在实证和理论研究中全面分析了 MasterFace 攻击的普遍性。 The empirical investigations include the use of six state-of-the-art FR models, cross-dataset and cross-model evaluation protocols, and utilizing testing datasets of significantly higher size and variance.结果表明，当 MasterFaces 在与测试所用的人脸识别模型不同的人脸识别模型上进行训练时，通用性较低。在这些情况下，攻击性能类似于零努力冒名顶替者攻击。 In the theoretical investigations, we define and estimate the face capacity and the maximum MasterFace coverage under the assumption that identities in the face space are well separated. The current trend of increasing the fairness and generalizability in face recognition indicates that the vulnerability of future systems might further decrease.未来的工作可能会分析 MasterFaces 在理解和增强人脸识别模型的鲁棒性方面的效用。 本文分析了MasterFace攻击在不同人脸识别模型和数据集上的泛化能力，并探讨其与人脸表示能力的关系。 Philipp Terhörst,Florian Bierbaum,Marco Huber,Naser Damer,Florian Kirchbuchner,Kiran Raja,Arjan Kuijper cs.CV

authors_text: Mikhael Carmona,Victor Chepoi,Guyslain Naves,Pascal Préa
title: Modules in Robinson Spaces
title_zh: Robinson Spaces 中的模块
abstract: A Robinson space is a dissimilarity space $(X,d)$ (i.e., a set $X$ of size $n$ and a dissimilarity $d$ on $X$) for which there exists a total order $<$ on $X$ such that $x<y<z$ implies that $d(x,z)\ge \max\{ d(x,y), d(y,z)\}$. Recognizing if a dissimilarity space is Robinson has numerous applications in seriation and classification. An mmodule of $(X,d)$ (generalizing the notion of a module in graph theory) is a subset $M$ of $X$ which is not distinguishable from the outside of $M$, i.e., the distance from any point of $X\setminus M$ to all points of $M$ is the same. If $p$ is any point of $X$, then $\{ p\}$ and the maximal by inclusion mmodules of $(X,d)$ not containing $p$ define a partition of $X$, called the copoint partition. In this paper, we investigate the structure of mmodules in Robinson spaces and use it and the copoint partition to design a simple and practical divide-and-conquer algorithm for recognition of Robinson spaces in optimal $O(n^2)$ time.
summary: A Robinson space is a dissimilarity space $(X,d)$ (i.e., a set $X$ of size $n$ and a dissimilarity $d$ on $X$) for which there exists a total order $<$ on $X$ such that $x<y<z$ implies that $d(x,z)\ge \max\{ d(x,y), d(y,z)\}$. Recognizing if a dissimilarity space is Robinson has numerous applications in seriation and classification. An mmodule of $(X,d)$ (generalizing the notion of a module in graph theory) is a subset $M$ of $X$ which is not distinguishable from the outside of $M$, i.e., the distance from any point of $X\setminus M$ to all points of $M$ is the same. If $p$ is any point of $X$, then $\{ p\}$ and the maximal by inclusion mmodules of $(X,d)$ not containing $p$ define a partition of $X$, called the copoint partition. In this paper, we investigate the structure of mmodules in Robinson spaces and use it and the copoint partition to design a simple and practical divide-and-conquer algorithm for recognition of Robinson spaces in optimal $O(n^2)$ time.
abstract_zh: 罗宾逊空间是一个相异空间 $(X,d)$（即，大小为 $n$ 的集合 $X$ 和 $X$ 上的相异性 $d$），其中在 $X$ 上存在全序 $<$，使得 $x<y<z$ 意味着 $d(x,z)\ge \max\{ d(x,y), d(y,z)\}$。识别相异空间是否为罗宾逊空间在序列化和分类方面有许多应用。 $(X,d)$ 的 mmodule（概括图论中模块的概念）是 $X$ 的子集 $M$，它与 $M$ 的外部不可区分，即从 $X\setminus M$ 的任何点到 $M$ 的所有点的距离是相同的。如果$p$是$X$的任意点，则$\{p\}$和不包含$p$的$(X,d)$的最大包含mmodules定义$X$的分区，称为共点分区。在本文中，我们研究了罗宾逊空间中 m 模块的结构，并使用它和共点划分来设计一种简单实用的分而治之算法，用于在最优 $O(n^2)$ 时间内识别罗宾逊空间。

AI.tldr: 研究Robinson空间中模块的结构，并设计一个O(n²)时间的算法来识别Robinson空间。
AI.motivation: 识别Robinson空间在序列化和分类中有广泛应用，而模块的结构有助于设计高效的算法。
AI.method: 通过分析模块结构和copoint划分，提出一种分治算法。
AI.result: 开发出一个在O(n²)时间内识别Robinson空间的简单实用算法。
AI.conclusion: 利用模块结构和copoint划分能有效识别Robinson空间，且算法时间复杂度最优。

authors_text: George Close,Thomas Hain,Stefan Goetze
title: MetricGAN+/-: Increasing Robustness of Noise Reduction on Unseen Data
title_zh: MetricGAN+/-：提高未见数据降噪的鲁棒性
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures, Accepted to EUSIPCO 2022
comments: 5 pages, 4 figures, Accepted to EUSIPCO 2022
abstract: Training of speech enhancement systems often does not incorporate knowledge of human perception and thus can lead to unnatural sounding results. Incorporating psychoacoustically motivated speech perception metrics as part of model training via a predictor network has recently gained interest. However, the performance of such predictors is limited by the distribution of metric scores that appear in the training data. In this work, we propose MetricGAN+/- (an extension of MetricGAN+, one such metric-motivated system) which introduces an additional network - a "de-generator" which attempts to improve the robustness of the prediction network (and by extension of the generator) by ensuring observation of a wider range of metric scores in training. Experimental results on the VoiceBank-DEMAND dataset show relative improvement in PESQ score of 3.8% (3.05 vs 3.22 PESQ score), as well as better generalisation to unseen noise and speech.
summary: Training of speech enhancement systems often does not incorporate knowledge of human perception and thus can lead to unnatural sounding results. Incorporating psychoacoustically motivated speech perception metrics as part of model training via a predictor network has recently gained interest. However, the performance of such predictors is limited by the distribution of metric scores that appear in the training data. In this work, we propose MetricGAN+/- (an extension of MetricGAN+, one such metric-motivated system) which introduces an additional network - a "de-generator" which attempts to improve the robustness of the prediction network (and by extension of the generator) by ensuring observation of a wider range of metric scores in training. Experimental results on the VoiceBank-DEMAND dataset show relative improvement in PESQ score of 3.8% (3.05 vs 3.22 PESQ score), as well as better generalisation to unseen noise and speech.
abstract_zh: 语音增强系统的训练通常不包含人类感知的知识，因此可能导致不自然的声音结果。 Incorporating psychoacoustically motivated speech perception metrics as part of model training via a predictor network has recently gained interest.然而，此类预测器的性能受到训练数据中出现的度量分数分布的限制。 In this work, we propose MetricGAN+/- (an extension of MetricGAN+, one such metric-motivated system) which introduces an additional network - a "de-generator" which attempts to improve the robustness of the prediction network (and by extension of the generator) by ensuring observation of a wider range of metric scores in training. Experimental results on the VoiceBank-DEMAND dataset show relative improvement in PESQ score of 3.8% (3.05 vs 3.22 PESQ score), as well as better generalisation to unseen noise and speech.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetricGAN+/-方法，通过引入'去生成器'网络提升语音降噪模型在未见数据上的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有语音增强系统未充分考虑人类感知特性，导致预测器性能受限于训练数据中度量分数的分布范围。
AI.method: 在MetricGAN+基础上增加'去生成器'网络，通过扩展训练过程中度量分数的分布范围来增强预测网络和生成器的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在VoiceBank-DEMAND数据集上实现PESQ分数3.8%的相对提升（3.05→3.22），并展现更好的未见噪声和语音泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过扩展训练数据分布有效提升了语音降噪模型的性能和跨场景适应能力。

authors_text: Wei Zhang,Feng Qiu,Suzhen Wang,Hao Zeng,Zhimeng Zhang,Rudong An,Bowen Ma,Yu Ding
title: Transformer-based Multimodal Information Fusion for Facial Expression Analysis
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的多模态信息融合用于面部表情分析
abstract: Human affective behavior analysis has received much attention in human-computer interaction (HCI). In this paper, we introduce our submission to the CVPR 2022 Competition on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW). To fully exploit affective knowledge from multiple views, we utilize the multimodal features of spoken words, speech prosody, and facial expression, which are extracted from the video clips in the Aff-Wild2 dataset. Based on these features, we propose a unified transformer-based multimodal framework for Action Unit detection and also expression recognition. Specifically, the static vision feature is first encoded from the current frame image. At the same time, we clip its adjacent frames by a sliding window and extract three kinds of multimodal features from the sequence of images, audio, and text. Then, we introduce a transformer-based fusion module that integrates the static vision features and the dynamic multimodal features. The cross-attention module in the fusion module makes the output integrated features focus on the crucial parts that facilitate the downstream detection tasks. We also leverage some data balancing techniques, data augmentation techniques, and postprocessing methods to further improve the model performance. In the official test of ABAW3 Competition, our model ranks first in the EXPR and AU tracks. The extensive quantitative evaluations, as well as ablation studies on the Aff-Wild2 dataset, prove the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: Human affective behavior analysis has received much attention in human-computer interaction (HCI). In this paper, we introduce our submission to the CVPR 2022 Competition on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW). To fully exploit affective knowledge from multiple views, we utilize the multimodal features of spoken words, speech prosody, and facial expression, which are extracted from the video clips in the Aff-Wild2 dataset. Based on these features, we propose a unified transformer-based multimodal framework for Action Unit detection and also expression recognition. Specifically, the static vision feature is first encoded from the current frame image. At the same time, we clip its adjacent frames by a sliding window and extract three kinds of multimodal features from the sequence of images, audio, and text. Then, we introduce a transformer-based fusion module that integrates the static vision features and the dynamic multimodal features. The cross-attention module in the fusion module makes the output integrated features focus on the crucial parts that facilitate the downstream detection tasks. We also leverage some data balancing techniques, data augmentation techniques, and postprocessing methods to further improve the model performance. In the official test of ABAW3 Competition, our model ranks first in the EXPR and AU tracks. The extensive quantitative evaluations, as well as ablation studies on the Aff-Wild2 dataset, prove the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 人类情感行为分析在人机交互（HCI）领域受到广泛关注。在本文中，我们介绍了我们向 CVPR 2022 野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛提交的作品。 To fully exploit affective knowledge from multiple views, we utilize the multimodal features of spoken words, speech prosody, and facial expression, which are extracted from the video clips in the Aff-Wild2 dataset.基于这些特征，我们提出了一个基于变压器的统一多模态框架，用于动作单元检测和表情识别。具体地，首先从当前帧图像编码静态视觉特征。 At the same time, we clip its adjacent frames by a sliding window and extract three kinds of multimodal features from the sequence of images, audio, and text.然后，我们引入了一种基于变压器的融合模块，该模块集成了静态视觉特征和动态多模态特征。 The cross-attention module in the fusion module makes the output integrated features focus on the crucial parts that facilitate the downstream detection tasks. We also leverage some data balancing techniques, data augmentation techniques, and postprocessing methods to further improve the model performance.在ABAW3竞赛的官方测试中，我们的模型在EXPR和AU赛道上排名第一。广泛的定量评估以及对 Aff-Wild2 数据集的消融研究证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的多模态融合框架，用于野生环境下的人类情感行为分析，特别是在面部表情识别和动作单元检测任务中。
AI.motivation: 人类情感行为分析在人机交互中具有重要意义，而单一模态信息存在局限性。通过融合语音、语调和面部表情等多模态特征，可以更全面地捕捉情感信息，提升分析准确性。
AI.method: 方法包括：从视频帧中提取静态视觉特征，利用滑动窗口获取相邻帧的多模态序列特征（图像、音频、文本），设计基于Transformer的融合模块，通过交叉注意力机制整合静态与动态特征，并结合数据平衡、增强和后处理技术优化模型性能。
AI.result: 在ABAW3竞赛中，模型在EXPR（表情识别）和AU（动作单元检测）赛道均排名第一；在Aff-Wild2数据集上的定量评估和消融实验证明了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于Transformer的多模态融合框架能够有效提升野生环境下面部表情分析的性能，交叉注意力机制和多模态特征融合是关键成功因素。

search_text: Transformer-based Multimodal Information Fusion for Facial Expression Analysis 基于 Transformer 的多模态信息融合用于面部表情分析 Human affective behavior analysis has received much attention in human-computer interaction (HCI). In this paper, we introduce our submission to the CVPR 2022 Competition on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW). To fully exploit affective knowledge from multiple views, we utilize the multimodal features of spoken words, speech prosody, and facial expression, which are extracted from the video clips in the Aff-Wild2 dataset. Based on these features, we propose a unified transformer-based multimodal framework for Action Unit detection and also expression recognition. Specifically, the static vision feature is first encoded from the current frame image. At the same time, we clip its adjacent frames by a sliding window and extract three kinds of multimodal features from the sequence of images, audio, and text. Then, we introduce a transformer-based fusion module that integrates the static vision features and the dynamic multimodal features. The cross-attention module in the fusion module makes the output integrated features focus on the crucial parts that facilitate the downstream detection tasks. We also leverage some data balancing techniques, data augmentation techniques, and postprocessing methods to further improve the model performance. In the official test of ABAW3 Competition, our model ranks first in the EXPR and AU tracks. The extensive quantitative evaluations, as well as ablation studies on the Aff-Wild2 dataset, prove the effectiveness of our proposed method. 人类情感行为分析在人机交互（HCI）领域受到广泛关注。在本文中，我们介绍了我们向 CVPR 2022 野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛提交的作品。 To fully exploit affective knowledge from multiple views, we utilize the multimodal features of spoken words, speech prosody, and facial expression, which are extracted from the video clips in the Aff-Wild2 dataset.基于这些特征，我们提出了一个基于变压器的统一多模态框架，用于动作单元检测和表情识别。具体地，首先从当前帧图像编码静态视觉特征。 At the same time, we clip its adjacent frames by a sliding window and extract three kinds of multimodal features from the sequence of images, audio, and text.然后，我们引入了一种基于变压器的融合模块，该模块集成了静态视觉特征和动态多模态特征。 The cross-attention module in the fusion module makes the output integrated features focus on the crucial parts that facilitate the downstream detection tasks. We also leverage some data balancing techniques, data augmentation techniques, and postprocessing methods to further improve the model performance.在ABAW3竞赛的官方测试中，我们的模型在EXPR和AU赛道上排名第一。广泛的定量评估以及对 Aff-Wild2 数据集的消融研究证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于Transformer的多模态融合框架，用于野生环境下的人类情感行为分析，特别是在面部表情识别和动作单元检测任务中。 Wei Zhang,Feng Qiu,Suzhen Wang,Hao Zeng,Zhimeng Zhang,Rudong An,Bowen Ma,Yu Ding cs.CV

authors_text: Andres Diaz-Pinto,Sachidanand Alle,Vishwesh Nath,Yucheng Tang,Alvin Ihsani,Muhammad Asad,Fernando Pérez-García,Pritesh Mehta,Wenqi Li,Mona Flores,Holger R. Roth,Tom Vercauteren,Daguang Xu,Prerna Dogra,Sebastien Ourselin,Andrew Feng,M. Jorge Cardoso
title: MONAI Label: A framework for AI-assisted Interactive Labeling of 3D Medical Images
title_zh: MONAI Label：人工智能辅助 3D 医学图像交互式标记的框架
abstract: The lack of annotated datasets is a major bottleneck for training new task-specific supervised machine learning models, considering that manual annotation is extremely expensive and time-consuming. To address this problem, we present MONAI Label, a free and open-source framework that facilitates the development of applications based on artificial intelligence (AI) models that aim at reducing the time required to annotate radiology datasets. Through MONAI Label, researchers can develop AI annotation applications focusing on their domain of expertise. It allows researchers to readily deploy their apps as services, which can be made available to clinicians via their preferred user interface. Currently, MONAI Label readily supports locally installed (3D Slicer) and web-based (OHIF) frontends and offers two active learning strategies to facilitate and speed up the training of segmentation algorithms. MONAI Label allows researchers to make incremental improvements to their AI-based annotation application by making them available to other researchers and clinicians alike. Additionally, MONAI Label provides sample AI-based interactive and non-interactive labeling applications, that can be used directly off the shelf, as plug-and-play to any given dataset. Significant reduced annotation times using the interactive model can be observed on two public datasets.
summary: The lack of annotated datasets is a major bottleneck for training new task-specific supervised machine learning models, considering that manual annotation is extremely expensive and time-consuming. To address this problem, we present MONAI Label, a free and open-source framework that facilitates the development of applications based on artificial intelligence (AI) models that aim at reducing the time required to annotate radiology datasets. Through MONAI Label, researchers can develop AI annotation applications focusing on their domain of expertise. It allows researchers to readily deploy their apps as services, which can be made available to clinicians via their preferred user interface. Currently, MONAI Label readily supports locally installed (3D Slicer) and web-based (OHIF) frontends and offers two active learning strategies to facilitate and speed up the training of segmentation algorithms. MONAI Label allows researchers to make incremental improvements to their AI-based annotation application by making them available to other researchers and clinicians alike. Additionally, MONAI Label provides sample AI-based interactive and non-interactive labeling applications, that can be used directly off the shelf, as plug-and-play to any given dataset. Significant reduced annotation times using the interactive model can be observed on two public datasets.
abstract_zh: 考虑到手动注释极其昂贵且耗时，缺乏注释数据集是训练新的特定于任务的监督机器学习模型的主要瓶颈。 To address this problem, we present MONAI Label, a free and open-source framework that facilitates the development of applications based on artificial intelligence (AI) models that aim at reducing the time required to annotate radiology datasets.通过 MONAI Label，研究人员可以开发专注于其专业领域的 AI 注释应用程序。它允许研究人员轻松地将他们的应用程序部署为服务，临床医生可以通过他们喜欢的用户界面来使用这些服务。目前，MONAI Label 很容易支持本地安装（3D Slicer）和基于网络的（OHIF）前端，并提供两种主动学习策略来促进和加速分割算法的训练。 MONAI Label allows researchers to make incremental improvements to their AI-based annotation application by making them available to other researchers and clinicians alike.此外，MONAI Label 还提供基于 AI 的交互式和非交互式标签应用程序示例，这些应用程序可以直接使用现成的，作为任何给定数据集的即插即用。在两个公共数据集上可以观察到使用交互式模型显着减少了注释时间。

AI.tldr: 开发MONAI Label框架以辅助3D医学图像的AI交互式标注，解决标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 手动标注医学图像成本高且耗时，需借助AI提高效率。
AI.method: 开发开源框架，集成AI模型与交互式标注工具，支持多种前端和主动学习策略。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上显著减少标注时间，验证了框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MONAI Label通过AI辅助标注有效提升效率，促进医学图像分析的AI应用发展。

authors_text: Alexander Steen
title: An Extensible Logic Embedding Tool for Lightweight Non-Classical Reasoning
title_zh: 用于轻量级非经典推理的可扩展逻辑嵌入工具
comment: 10 pages, 1 figure, 1 table
comments: 10 pages, 1 figure, 1 table
abstract: The logic embedding tool provides a procedural encoding for non-classical reasoning problems into classical higher-order logic. It is extensible and can support an increasing number of different non-classical logics as reasoning targets. When used as a pre-processor or library for higher-order theorem provers, the tool admits off-the-shelf automation for logics for which otherwise few to none provers are currently available.
summary: The logic embedding tool provides a procedural encoding for non-classical reasoning problems into classical higher-order logic. It is extensible and can support an increasing number of different non-classical logics as reasoning targets. When used as a pre-processor or library for higher-order theorem provers, the tool admits off-the-shelf automation for logics for which otherwise few to none provers are currently available.
abstract_zh: 逻辑嵌入工具提供了将非经典推理问题转换为经典高阶逻辑的过程编码。它是可扩展的，可以支持越来越多的不同非经典逻辑作为推理目标。 When used as a pre-processor or library for higher-order theorem provers, the tool admits off-the-shelf automation for logics for which otherwise few to none provers are currently available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展的逻辑嵌入工具，将非经典推理问题编码为经典高阶逻辑，以利用现有定理证明器实现自动化推理。
AI.motivation: 许多非经典逻辑缺乏专用证明器，而经典高阶逻辑证明器自动化程度高，需建立桥梁实现跨逻辑推理支持。
AI.method: 通过过程编码将非经典逻辑目标语言映射到经典高阶逻辑，设计可扩展框架支持新增逻辑类型，并作为预处理器/库集成定理证明器。
AI.result: 实现了工具原型，使高阶定理证明器可处理多种原本缺乏自动化支持的非经典逻辑，验证了方法的可行性与扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该工具有效扩展了自动定理证明的适用范围，为非经典逻辑研究提供了通用技术方案与实践验证。

motivation: 许多非经典逻辑缺乏专用证明器，而经典高阶逻辑证明器自动化程度高，需建立桥梁实现跨逻辑推理支持。
method: 通过过程编码将非经典逻辑目标语言映射到经典高阶逻辑，设计可扩展框架支持新增逻辑类型，并作为预处理器/库集成定理证明器。
result: 实现了工具原型，使高阶定理证明器可处理多种原本缺乏自动化支持的非经典逻辑，验证了方法的可行性与扩展性。
conclusion: 该工具有效扩展了自动定理证明的适用范围，为非经典逻辑研究提供了通用技术方案与实践验证。
search_text: An Extensible Logic Embedding Tool for Lightweight Non-Classical Reasoning 用于轻量级非经典推理的可扩展逻辑嵌入工具 The logic embedding tool provides a procedural encoding for non-classical reasoning problems into classical higher-order logic. It is extensible and can support an increasing number of different non-classical logics as reasoning targets. When used as a pre-processor or library for higher-order theorem provers, the tool admits off-the-shelf automation for logics for which otherwise few to none provers are currently available. 逻辑嵌入工具提供了将非经典推理问题转换为经典高阶逻辑的过程编码。它是可扩展的，可以支持越来越多的不同非经典逻辑作为推理目标。 When used as a pre-processor or library for higher-order theorem provers, the tool admits off-the-shelf automation for logics for which otherwise few to none provers are currently available. 本文提出了一种可扩展的逻辑嵌入工具，将非经典推理问题编码为经典高阶逻辑，以利用现有定理证明器实现自动化推理。 Alexander Steen cs.AI,cs.LO

authors_text: Guillem Martinez,Maya Aghaei,Martin Dijkstra,Bhalaji Nagarajan,Femke Jaarsma,Jaap van de Loosdrecht,Petia Radeva,Klaas Dijkstra
title: Hyper-Spectral Imaging for Overlapping Plastic Flakes Segmentation
title_zh: 用于重叠塑料薄片分割的高光谱成像
comment: Submitted to ICIP2022
comments: Submitted to ICIP2022
abstract: Given the hyper-spectral imaging unique potentials in grasping the polymer characteristics of different materials, it is commonly used in sorting procedures. In a practical plastic sorting scenario, multiple plastic flakes may overlap which depending on their characteristics, the overlap can be reflected in their spectral signature. In this work, we use hyper-spectral imaging for the segmentation of three types of plastic flakes and their possible overlapping combinations. We propose an intuitive and simple multi-label encoding approach, bitfield encoding, to account for the overlapping regions. With our experiments, we show that the bitfield encoding improves over the baseline single-label approach and we further demonstrate its potential in predicting multiple labels for overlapping classes even when the model is only trained with non-overlapping classes.
summary: Given the hyper-spectral imaging unique potentials in grasping the polymer characteristics of different materials, it is commonly used in sorting procedures. In a practical plastic sorting scenario, multiple plastic flakes may overlap which depending on their characteristics, the overlap can be reflected in their spectral signature. In this work, we use hyper-spectral imaging for the segmentation of three types of plastic flakes and their possible overlapping combinations. We propose an intuitive and simple multi-label encoding approach, bitfield encoding, to account for the overlapping regions. With our experiments, we show that the bitfield encoding improves over the baseline single-label approach and we further demonstrate its potential in predicting multiple labels for overlapping classes even when the model is only trained with non-overlapping classes.
abstract_zh: 鉴于高光谱成像在掌握不同材料的聚合物特性方面具有独特的潜力，因此通常用于分选过程。在实际的塑料分选场景中，多个塑料薄片可能会重叠，这取决于它们的特性，重叠可以反映在它们的光谱特征中。在这项工作中，我们使用高光谱成像来分割三种类型的塑料薄片及其可能的重叠组合。我们提出了一种直观且简单的多标签编码方法，即位域编码，来解释重叠区域。通过我们的实验，我们表明位字段编码比基线单标签方法有所改进，并且我们进一步证明了它在预测重叠类的多个标签方面的潜力，即使模型仅使用非重叠类进行训练。

AI.tldr: 本文利用高光谱成像技术解决塑料碎片重叠情况下的分割问题，提出多标签编码方法处理三种塑料及其重叠组合的分割任务。
AI.motivation: 实际塑料分选中重叠碎片的光谱特征会相互影响，传统单标签方法难以准确识别重叠区域，需开发新型编码策略应对多标签重叠问题。
AI.method: 提出位域编码（bitfield encoding）方法，通过二进制位字段表示多标签重叠区域，实现对非重叠与重叠样本的统一编码处理。
AI.result: 实验表明位域编码优于基线单标签方法，在仅使用非重叠训练数据时仍能有效预测重叠类别的多标签，验证了方法的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 位域编码有效提升了重叠塑料碎片的分割性能，为多标签图像分割任务提供了简单直观的解决方案。

authors_text: Mélodie Boillet,Christopher Kermorvant,Thierry Paquet
title: Robust Text Line Detection in Historical Documents: Learning and Evaluation Methods
title_zh: 历史文献中鲁棒的文本行检测：学习和评估方法
comment: ef:International Journal on Document Analysis and Recognition (IJDAR) (2022)
comments: ef:International Journal on Document Analysis and Recognition (IJDAR) (2022)
abstract: Text line segmentation is one of the key steps in historical document understanding. It is challenging due to the variety of fonts, contents, writing styles and the quality of documents that have degraded through the years. In this paper, we address the limitations that currently prevent people from building line segmentation models with a high generalization capacity. We present a study conducted using three state-of-the-art systems Doc-UFCN, dhSegment and ARU-Net and show that it is possible to build generic models trained on a wide variety of historical document datasets that can correctly segment diverse unseen pages. This paper also highlights the importance of the annotations used during training: each existing dataset is annotated differently. We present a unification of the annotations and show its positive impact on the final text recognition results. In this end, we present a complete evaluation strategy using standard pixel-level metrics, object-level ones and introducing goal-oriented metrics.
summary: Text line segmentation is one of the key steps in historical document understanding. It is challenging due to the variety of fonts, contents, writing styles and the quality of documents that have degraded through the years. In this paper, we address the limitations that currently prevent people from building line segmentation models with a high generalization capacity. We present a study conducted using three state-of-the-art systems Doc-UFCN, dhSegment and ARU-Net and show that it is possible to build generic models trained on a wide variety of historical document datasets that can correctly segment diverse unseen pages. This paper also highlights the importance of the annotations used during training: each existing dataset is annotated differently. We present a unification of the annotations and show its positive impact on the final text recognition results. In this end, we present a complete evaluation strategy using standard pixel-level metrics, object-level ones and introducing goal-oriented metrics.
abstract_zh: 文本行分割是历史文档理解的关键步骤之一。由于字体、内容、写作风格的多样性以及多年来文档质量的下降，这是一项具有挑战性的工作。在本文中，我们解决了目前阻碍人们构建具有高泛化能力的线分割模型的限制。我们提出了一项使用三种最先进的系统 Doc-UFCN、dhSegment 和 ARU-Net 进行的研究，并表明可以构建在各种历史文档数据集上训练的通用模型，这些模型可以正确分割不同的未见过的页面。本文还强调了训练期间使用的注释的重要性：每个现有数据集的注释都不同。我们提出了注释的统一，并展示了它对最终文本识别结果的积极影响。最后，我们提出了一个完整的评估策略，使用标准像素级指标、对象级指标并引入面向目标的指标。

AI.tldr: 提出一种鲁棒的历史文档文本行检测方法，提升模型泛化能力并统一标注标准
AI.motivation: 解决历史文档文本行分割的泛化能力不足及标注不一致问题，提升模型性能
AI.method: 采用三个先进模型进行实验，统一多数据集标注标准，并结合像素级、对象级及目标导向评估指标进行综合评估
AI.result: 证明了跨数据集训练的通用模型有效性，统一标注显著提升文本识别准确率
AI.conclusion: 统一标注标准及多维度评估方法可有效提升历史文档文本行分割的鲁棒性与泛化能力

authors_text: Hazel Doughty,Cees G. M. Snoek
title: How Do You Do It? Fine-Grained Action Understanding with Pseudo-Adverbs
title_zh: 你怎么做？使用伪副词进行细粒度的动作理解
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022
abstract: We aim to understand how actions are performed and identify subtle differences, such as 'fold firmly' vs. 'fold gently'. To this end, we propose a method which recognizes adverbs across different actions. However, such fine-grained annotations are difficult to obtain and their long-tailed nature makes it challenging to recognize adverbs in rare action-adverb compositions. Our approach therefore uses semi-supervised learning with multiple adverb pseudo-labels to leverage videos with only action labels. Combined with adaptive thresholding of these pseudo-adverbs we are able to make efficient use of the available data while tackling the long-tailed distribution. Additionally, we gather adverb annotations for three existing video retrieval datasets, which allows us to introduce the new tasks of recognizing adverbs in unseen action-adverb compositions and unseen domains. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, which outperforms prior work in recognizing adverbs and semi-supervised works adapted for adverb recognition. We also show how adverbs can relate fine-grained actions.
summary: We aim to understand how actions are performed and identify subtle differences, such as 'fold firmly' vs. 'fold gently'. To this end, we propose a method which recognizes adverbs across different actions. However, such fine-grained annotations are difficult to obtain and their long-tailed nature makes it challenging to recognize adverbs in rare action-adverb compositions. Our approach therefore uses semi-supervised learning with multiple adverb pseudo-labels to leverage videos with only action labels. Combined with adaptive thresholding of these pseudo-adverbs we are able to make efficient use of the available data while tackling the long-tailed distribution. Additionally, we gather adverb annotations for three existing video retrieval datasets, which allows us to introduce the new tasks of recognizing adverbs in unseen action-adverb compositions and unseen domains. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, which outperforms prior work in recognizing adverbs and semi-supervised works adapted for adverb recognition. We also show how adverbs can relate fine-grained actions.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是了解操作的执行方式并识别细微的差异，例如“用力折叠”与“轻轻折叠”。为此，我们提出了一种识别不同动作的副词的方法。 However, such fine-grained annotations are difficult to obtain and their long-tailed nature makes it challenging to recognize adverbs in rare action-adverb compositions.因此，我们的方法使用具有多个副词伪标签的半监督学习来利用仅具有动作标签的视频。 Combined with adaptive thresholding of these pseudo-adverbs we are able to make efficient use of the available data while tackling the long-tailed distribution. Additionally, we gather adverb annotations for three existing video retrieval datasets, which allows us to introduce the new tasks of recognizing adverbs in unseen action-adverb compositions and unseen domains. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, which outperforms prior work in recognizing adverbs and semi-supervised works adapted for adverb recognition.我们还展示了副词如何关联细粒度的动作。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过伪副词识别细粒度动作差异，如'用力折叠'与'轻柔折叠'，解决细粒度动作理解难题。
AI.motivation: 现有细粒度动作标注数据稀缺且分布不均，尤其罕见动作-副词组合难以有效识别，需新方法突破数据瓶颈。
AI.method: 采用半监督学习生成多伪副词标签，结合自适应阈值筛选策略，并扩展三个视频数据集的副词标注以应对长尾分布问题。
AI.result: 方法在副词识别及跨域任务中优于现有技术，成功识别罕见组合并揭示副词与细粒度动作的关联性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解数据不足问题，为细粒度动作理解提供新视角，推动动作-语义对齐研究进展。

search_text: How Do You Do It? Fine-Grained Action Understanding with Pseudo-Adverbs 你怎么做？使用伪副词进行细粒度的动作理解 We aim to understand how actions are performed and identify subtle differences, such as 'fold firmly' vs. 'fold gently'. To this end, we propose a method which recognizes adverbs across different actions. However, such fine-grained annotations are difficult to obtain and their long-tailed nature makes it challenging to recognize adverbs in rare action-adverb compositions. Our approach therefore uses semi-supervised learning with multiple adverb pseudo-labels to leverage videos with only action labels. Combined with adaptive thresholding of these pseudo-adverbs we are able to make efficient use of the available data while tackling the long-tailed distribution. Additionally, we gather adverb annotations for three existing video retrieval datasets, which allows us to introduce the new tasks of recognizing adverbs in unseen action-adverb compositions and unseen domains. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, which outperforms prior work in recognizing adverbs and semi-supervised works adapted for adverb recognition. We also show how adverbs can relate fine-grained actions. 我们的目标是了解操作的执行方式并识别细微的差异，例如“用力折叠”与“轻轻折叠”。为此，我们提出了一种识别不同动作的副词的方法。 However, such fine-grained annotations are difficult to obtain and their long-tailed nature makes it challenging to recognize adverbs in rare action-adverb compositions.因此，我们的方法使用具有多个副词伪标签的半监督学习来利用仅具有动作标签的视频。 Combined with adaptive thresholding of these pseudo-adverbs we are able to make efficient use of the available data while tackling the long-tailed distribution. Additionally, we gather adverb annotations for three existing video retrieval datasets, which allows us to introduce the new tasks of recognizing adverbs in unseen action-adverb compositions and unseen domains. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, which outperforms prior work in recognizing adverbs and semi-supervised works adapted for adverb recognition.我们还展示了副词如何关联细粒度的动作。 本文旨在通过伪副词识别细粒度动作差异，如'用力折叠'与'轻柔折叠'，解决细粒度动作理解难题。 Hazel Doughty,Cees G. M. Snoek cs.CV

authors_text: Andreas Knoben,Maryam Alimardani,Arash Saghafi,Amin K. Amiri
title: Cognitive Workload Associated with Different Conceptual Modeling Approaches in Information Systems
title_zh: 与信息系统中不同概念建模方法相关的认知工作量
comment: Paper accepted at 24th International Conference on Human-Computer Interaction
comments: Paper accepted at 24th International Conference on Human-Computer Interaction
abstract: Conceptual models visually represent entities and relationships between them in an information system. Effective conceptual models should be simple while communicating sufficient information. This trade-off between model complexity and clarity is crucial to prevent failure of information system development. Past studies have found that more expressive models lead to higher performance on tasks measuring a user s deep understanding of the model and attributed this to lower experience of cognitive workload associated with these models. This study examined this hypothesis by measuring users EEG brain activity while they completed a task with different conceptual models. 30 participants were divided into two groups: One group used a low ontologically expressive model (LOEM), and the other group used a high ontologically expressive model (HOEM). Cognitive workload during the task was quantified using EEG Engagement Index, which is a ratio of brain activity power in beta as opposed to the sum of alpha and theta frequency bands. No significant difference in cognitive workload was found between the LOEM and HOEM groups indicating equal amounts of cognitive processing required for understanding of both models. The main contribution of this study is the introduction of neurophysiological measures as an objective quantification of cognitive workload in the field of conceptual modeling and information systems.

abstract_zh: 概念模型直观地表示信息系统中的实体及其之间的关系。有效的概念模型应该简单，同时传达足够的信息。模型复杂性和清晰度之间的权衡对于防止信息系统开发失败至关重要。过去的研究发现，更具表现力的模型可以在衡量用户对模型的深度理解的任务上带来更高的性能，并将其归因于与这些模型相关的认知工作量的体验较低。这项研究通过测量用户使用不同概念模型完成任务时的脑电图大脑活动来检验这一假设。 30 名参与者被分为两组：一组使用低本体表达模型（LOEM），另一组使用高本体表达模型（HOEM）。任务期间的认知工作量使用脑电图参与指数进行量化，该指数是大脑活动强度的β值与α和θ频带之和的比率。 LOEM 和 HOEM 组之间的认知工作量没有显着差异，表明理解这两个模型所需的认知处理量相同。这项研究的主要贡献是引入神经生理学测量作为概念建模和信息系统领域认知工作量的客观量化。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了不同概念建模方法在信息系统中的认知负荷关联。
AI.motivation: 有效概念模型需要在复杂性和清晰性之间取得平衡，而过去的研究发现更表达性强的模型可能降低认知负荷，但缺乏神经生理学证据支持。
AI.method: 通过测量用户在使用不同概念模型完成任务时的脑电波活动，采用EEG Engagement Index量化认知负荷。
AI.result: 未发现低本体表达模型组和高本体表达模型组在认知负荷上存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 本研究引入了神经生理学指标作为概念建模领域认知负荷的客观量化方法，为未来研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Hangyu Li,Nannan Wang,Xi Yang,Xiaoyu Wang,Xinbo Gao
title: Towards Semi-Supervised Deep Facial Expression Recognition with An Adaptive Confidence Margin
title_zh: 迈向具有自适应置信裕度的半监督深度面部表情识别
comment: Accepted by CVPR2022
comments: Accepted by CVPR2022
abstract: Only parts of unlabeled data are selected to train models for most semi-supervised learning methods, whose confidence scores are usually higher than the pre-defined threshold (i.e., the confidence margin). We argue that the recognition performance should be further improved by making full use of all unlabeled data. In this paper, we learn an Adaptive Confidence Margin (Ada-CM) to fully leverage all unlabeled data for semi-supervised deep facial expression recognition. All unlabeled samples are partitioned into two subsets by comparing their confidence scores with the adaptively learned confidence margin at each training epoch: (1) subset I including samples whose confidence scores are no lower than the margin; (2) subset II including samples whose confidence scores are lower than the margin. For samples in subset I, we constrain their predictions to match pseudo labels. Meanwhile, samples in subset II participate in the feature-level contrastive objective to learn effective facial expression features. We extensively evaluate Ada-CM on four challenging datasets, showing that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, especially surpassing fully-supervised baselines in a semi-supervised manner. Ablation study further proves the effectiveness of our method. The source code is available at https://github.com/hangyu94/Ada-CM.
summary: Only parts of unlabeled data are selected to train models for most semi-supervised learning methods, whose confidence scores are usually higher than the pre-defined threshold (i.e., the confidence margin). We argue that the recognition performance should be further improved by making full use of all unlabeled data. In this paper, we learn an Adaptive Confidence Margin (Ada-CM) to fully leverage all unlabeled data for semi-supervised deep facial expression recognition. All unlabeled samples are partitioned into two subsets by comparing their confidence scores with the adaptively learned confidence margin at each training epoch: (1) subset I including samples whose confidence scores are no lower than the margin; (2) subset II including samples whose confidence scores are lower than the margin. For samples in subset I, we constrain their predictions to match pseudo labels. Meanwhile, samples in subset II participate in the feature-level contrastive objective to learn effective facial expression features. We extensively evaluate Ada-CM on four challenging datasets, showing that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, especially surpassing fully-supervised baselines in a semi-supervised manner. Ablation study further proves the effectiveness of our method. The source code is available at https://github.com/hangyu94/Ada-CM.
abstract_zh: 大多数半监督学习方法仅选择部分未标记数据来训练模型，其置信度分数通常高于预定义的阈值（即置信度）。 We argue that the recognition performance should be further improved by making full use of all unlabeled data.在本文中，我们学习了自适应置信度（A​​da-CM），以充分利用所有未标记数据进行半监督深度面部表情识别。通过将每个训练时期的置信度得分与自适应学习的置信度进行比较，将所有未标记样本划分为两个子集：（1）子集 I，包括置信度得分不低于置信度的样本； (2) subset II including samples whose confidence scores are lower than the margin. For samples in subset I, we constrain their predictions to match pseudo labels. Meanwhile, samples in subset II participate in the feature-level contrastive objective to learn effective facial expression features.我们在四个具有挑战性的数据集上广泛评估了 Ada-CM，表明我们的方法实现了最先进的性能，特别是以半监督方式超越了完全监督的基线。 Ablation study further proves the effectiveness of our method. The source code is available at https://github.com/hangyu94/Ada-CM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应置信度边界的半监督深度面部表情识别方法（Ada-CM），旨在充分利用所有未标记数据以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督方法仅选择置信度高于预设阈值的未标记数据进行训练，而作者认为应通过自适应调整置信度边界，充分利用所有未标记数据以进一步提升识别效果。
AI.method: 通过动态学习自适应置信度边界，将未标记数据分为两部分：高置信度样本用于约束预测与伪标签一致，低置信度样本参与特征级对比学习以提取有效表情特征。
AI.result: 在四个具有挑战性的数据集上验证了Ada-CM的有效性，其半监督性能超越了全监督基线方法，消融实验进一步证明了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 自适应置信度边界机制能有效整合全部未标记数据，提升半监督面部表情识别性能，代码已开源。
