The source code is available at https://github.com/hangyu94/Ada-CM. 大多数半监督学习方法仅选择部分未标记数据来训练模型，其置信度分数通常高于预定义的阈值（即置信度）。 We argue that the recognition performance should be further improved by making full use of all unlabeled data.在本文中，我们学习了自适应置信度（A​​da-CM），以充分利用所有未标记数据进行半监督深度面部表情识别。通过将每个训练时期的置信度得分与自适应学习的置信度进行比较，将所有未标记样本划分为两个子集：（1）子集 I，包括置信度得分不低于置信度的样本； (2) subset II including samples whose confidence scores are lower than the margin. For samples in subset I, we constrain their predictions to match pseudo labels. Meanwhile, samples in subset II participate in the feature-level contrastive objective to learn effective facial expression features.我们在四个具有挑战性的数据集上广泛评估了 Ada-CM，表明我们的方法实现了最先进的性能，特别是以半监督方式超越了完全监督的基线。 Ablation study further proves the effectiveness of our method. The source code is available at https://github.com/hangyu94/Ada-CM. 本文提出了一种自适应置信度边界的半监督深度面部表情识别方法（Ada-CM），旨在充分利用所有未标记数据以提升模型性能。 Hangyu Li,Nannan Wang,Xi Yang,Xiaoyu Wang,Xinbo Gao cs.CV

authors_text: Jinrong Yang,Songtao Liu,Zeming Li,Xiaoping Li,Jian Sun
title: Real-time Object Detection for Streaming Perception
title_zh: 用于流感知的实时对象检测
comment: CVPR 2022 Accepted Paper (Oral)
comments: CVPR 2022 Accepted Paper (Oral)
abstract: Autonomous driving requires the model to perceive the environment and (re)act within a low latency for safety. While past works ignore the inevitable changes in the environment after processing, streaming perception is proposed to jointly evaluate the latency and accuracy into a single metric for video online perception. In this paper, instead of searching trade-offs between accuracy and speed like previous works, we point out that endowing real-time models with the ability to predict the future is the key to dealing with this problem. We build a simple and effective framework for streaming perception. It equips a novel DualFlow Perception module (DFP), which includes dynamic and static flows to capture the moving trend and basic detection feature for streaming prediction. Further, we introduce a Trend-Aware Loss (TAL) combined with a trend factor to generate adaptive weights for objects with different moving speeds. Our simple method achieves competitive performance on Argoverse-HD dataset and improves the AP by 4.9% compared to the strong baseline, validating its effectiveness. Our code will be made available at https://github.com/yancie-yjr/StreamYOLO.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于流式感知的实时目标检测框架，通过预测未来趋势提升自动驾驶环境感知的准确性与效率。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在实时目标检测中忽视了环境动态变化，仅关注速度与精度的权衡，无法有效应对流式视频感知中的时序依赖问题。
AI.method: 构建包含动态流与静态流的DualFlow Perception模块（DFP），结合趋势感知损失函数（TAL）生成自适应权重，提升对不同运动速度目标的检测能力。
AI.result: 在Argoverse-HD数据集上相较强基线模型提升4.9%的AP值，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过赋予实时模型未来预测能力，提出的简单框架在流式感知任务中实现了精度与效率的平衡。

authors_text: Theodore Aouad,Hugues Talbot
title: Binary Morphological Neural Network
title_zh: 二元形态神经网络
comment: Preprint of a submission to ICIP 2022. 7 pages. 4 figures
comments: Preprint of a submission to ICIP 2022. 7 pages. 4 figures
abstract: In the last ten years, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have formed the basis of deep-learning architectures for most computer vision tasks. However, they are not necessarily optimal. For example, mathematical morphology is known to be better suited to deal with binary images. In this work, we create a morphological neural network that handles binary inputs and outputs. We propose their construction inspired by CNNs to formulate layers adapted to such images by replacing convolutions with erosions and dilations. We give explainable theoretical results on whether or not the resulting learned networks are indeed morphological operators. We present promising experimental results designed to learn basic binary operators, and we have made our code publicly available online.
summary: In the last ten years, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have formed the basis of deep-learning architectures for most computer vision tasks. However, they are not necessarily optimal. For example, mathematical morphology is known to be better suited to deal with binary images. In this work, we create a morphological neural network that handles binary inputs and outputs. We propose their construction inspired by CNNs to formulate layers adapted to such images by replacing convolutions with erosions and dilations. We give explainable theoretical results on whether or not the resulting learned networks are indeed morphological operators. We present promising experimental results designed to learn basic binary operators, and we have made our code publicly available online.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，卷积神经网络（CNN）已经成为大多数计算机视觉任务的深度学习架构的基础。 However, they are not necessarily optimal.例如，已知数学形态学更适合处理二值图像。在这项工作中，我们创建了一个处理二进制输入和输出的形态神经网络。我们提出了受 CNN 启发的构造方法，通过用腐蚀和膨胀代替卷积来制定适应此类图像的层。我们给出了可解释的理论结果，说明所得到的学习网络是否确实是形态算子。我们展示了旨在学习基本二元运算符的有希望的实验结果，并且我们已在线公开我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对二值图像的形态学神经网络，通过用腐蚀和膨胀操作替代传统卷积来构建网络结构。
AI.motivation: 尽管CNN在计算机视觉中占主导地位，但数学形态学在处理二值图像时更具优势，现有方法未充分探索这一领域。
AI.method: 受CNN启发，设计形态学神经网络层，以腐蚀和膨胀操作替代卷积，并提供理论证明其作为形态学算子的有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明网络能有效学习基本二值运算符，且代码已公开，验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 形态学神经网络为二值图像处理提供了新的可解释框架，展现了替代传统CNN的潜力。

authors_text: Tao Han,Lei Bai,Junyu Gao,Qi Wang,Wanli Ouyang
title: DR.VIC: Decomposition and Reasoning for Video Individual Counting
title_zh: DR.VIC：视频个体计数的分解与推理
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2022. [camera ready with supplement]
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2022. [camera ready with supplement]
abstract: Pedestrian counting is a fundamental tool for understanding pedestrian patterns and crowd flow analysis. Existing works (e.g., image-level pedestrian counting, crossline crowd counting et al.) either only focus on the image-level counting or are constrained to the manual annotation of lines. In this work, we propose to conduct the pedestrian counting from a new perspective - Video Individual Counting (VIC), which counts the total number of individual pedestrians in the given video (a person is only counted once). Instead of relying on the Multiple Object Tracking (MOT) techniques, we propose to solve the problem by decomposing all pedestrians into the initial pedestrians who existed in the first frame and the new pedestrians with separate identities in each following frame. Then, an end-to-end Decomposition and Reasoning Network (DRNet) is designed to predict the initial pedestrian count with the density estimation method and reason the new pedestrian's count of each frame with the differentiable optimal transport. Extensive experiments are conducted on two datasets with congested pedestrians and diverse scenes, demonstrating the effectiveness of our method over baselines with great superiority in counting the individual pedestrians. Code: https://github.com/taohan10200/DRNet.
summary: Pedestrian counting is a fundamental tool for understanding pedestrian patterns and crowd flow analysis. Existing works (e.g., image-level pedestrian counting, crossline crowd counting et al.) either only focus on the image-level counting or are constrained to the manual annotation of lines. In this work, we propose to conduct the pedestrian counting from a new perspective - Video Individual Counting (VIC), which counts the total number of individual pedestrians in the given video (a person is only counted once). Instead of relying on the Multiple Object Tracking (MOT) techniques, we propose to solve the problem by decomposing all pedestrians into the initial pedestrians who existed in the first frame and the new pedestrians with separate identities in each following frame. Then, an end-to-end Decomposition and Reasoning Network (DRNet) is designed to predict the initial pedestrian count with the density estimation method and reason the new pedestrian's count of each frame with the differentiable optimal transport. Extensive experiments are conducted on two datasets with congested pedestrians and diverse scenes, demonstrating the effectiveness of our method over baselines with great superiority in counting the individual pedestrians. Code: https://github.com/taohan10200/DRNet.
abstract_zh: Pedestrian counting is a fundamental tool for understanding pedestrian patterns and crowd flow analysis. Existing works (e.g., image-level pedestrian counting, crossline crowd counting et al.) either only focus on the image-level counting or are constrained to the manual annotation of lines.在这项工作中，我们建议从一个新的角度进行行人计数——视频个体计数（VIC），它计算给定视频中单个行人的总数（一个人只计数一次）。 Instead of relying on the Multiple Object Tracking (MOT) techniques, we propose to solve the problem by decomposing all pedestrians into the initial pedestrians who existed in the first frame and the new pedestrians with separate identities in each following frame.然后，设计端到端的分解推理网络（DRNet），利用密度估计方法预测初始行人计数，并利用可微的最优传输推理每帧的新行人计数。 Extensive experiments are conducted on two datasets with congested pedestrians and diverse scenes, demonstrating the effectiveness of our method over baselines with great superiority in counting the individual pedestrians. Code: https://github.com/taohan10200/DRNet.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DR.VIC方法，通过分解和推理网络实现视频中个体行人计数，确保每个行人仅被计数一次。
AI.motivation: 现有方法局限于图像级计数或依赖人工标注的线段，无法有效处理视频中动态个体的准确计数问题。
AI.method: 将视频中的行人分解为初始帧存在的行人和后续帧新出现的行人，设计端到端DRNet网络结合密度估计与可微分最优传输进行推理。
AI.result: 在两个拥堵场景数据集上实验表明，该方法在个体行人计数任务上显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DR.VIC通过分解策略和网络设计有效解决了视频个体计数问题，无需依赖多目标跟踪技术即可实现高精度计数。

motivation: 现有方法局限于图像级计数或依赖人工标注的线段，无法有效处理视频中动态个体的准确计数问题。
method: 将视频中的行人分解为初始帧存在的行人和后续帧新出现的行人，设计端到端DRNet网络结合密度估计与可微分最优传输进行推理。
result: 在两个拥堵场景数据集上实验表明，该方法在个体行人计数任务上显著优于基线方法。
conclusion: DR.VIC通过分解策略和网络设计有效解决了视频个体计数问题，无需依赖多目标跟踪技术即可实现高精度计数。
search_text: DR.VIC: Decomposition and Reasoning for Video Individual Counting DR.VIC：视频个体计数的分解与推理 Pedestrian counting is a fundamental tool for understanding pedestrian patterns and crowd flow analysis. Existing works (e.g., image-level pedestrian counting, crossline crowd counting et al.) either only focus on the image-level counting or are constrained to the manual annotation of lines. In this work, we propose to conduct the pedestrian counting from a new perspective - Video Individual Counting (VIC), which counts the total number of individual pedestrians in the given video (a person is only counted once). Instead of relying on the Multiple Object Tracking (MOT) techniques, we propose to solve the problem by decomposing all pedestrians into the initial pedestrians who existed in the first frame and the new pedestrians with separate identities in each following frame. Then, an end-to-end Decomposition and Reasoning Network (DRNet) is designed to predict the initial pedestrian count with the density estimation method and reason the new pedestrian's count of each frame with the differentiable optimal transport. Extensive experiments are conducted on two datasets with congested pedestrians and diverse scenes, demonstrating the effectiveness of our method over baselines with great superiority in counting the individual pedestrians. Code: https://github.com/taohan10200/DRNet. Pedestrian counting is a fundamental tool for understanding pedestrian patterns and crowd flow analysis. Existing works (e.g., image-level pedestrian counting, crossline crowd counting et al.) either only focus on the image-level counting or are constrained to the manual annotation of lines.在这项工作中，我们建议从一个新的角度进行行人计数——视频个体计数（VIC），它计算给定视频中单个行人的总数（一个人只计数一次）。 Instead of relying on the Multiple Object Tracking (MOT) techniques, we propose to solve the problem by decomposing all pedestrians into the initial pedestrians who existed in the first frame and the new pedestrians with separate identities in each following frame.然后，设计端到端的分解推理网络（DRNet），利用密度估计方法预测初始行人计数，并利用可微的最优传输推理每帧的新行人计数。 Extensive experiments are conducted on two datasets with congested pedestrians and diverse scenes, demonstrating the effectiveness of our method over baselines with great superiority in counting the individual pedestrians. Code: https://github.com/taohan10200/DRNet. 本文提出DR.VIC方法，通过分解和推理网络实现视频中个体行人计数，确保每个行人仅被计数一次。 Tao Han,Lei Bai,Junyu Gao,Qi Wang,Wanli Ouyang cs.CV

authors_text: Shijie Lin,Yinqiang Zhang,Lei Yu,Bin Zhou,Xiaowei Luo,Jia Pan
title: Autofocus for Event Cameras
title_zh: 事件相机的自动对焦
abstract: Focus control (FC) is crucial for cameras to capture sharp images in challenging real-world scenarios. The autofocus (AF) facilitates the FC by automatically adjusting the focus settings. However, due to the lack of effective AF methods for the recently introduced event cameras, their FC still relies on naive AF like manual focus adjustments, leading to poor adaptation in challenging real-world conditions. In particular, the inherent differences between event and frame data in terms of sensing modality, noise, temporal resolutions, etc., bring many challenges in designing an effective AF method for event cameras. To address these challenges, we develop a novel event-based autofocus framework consisting of an event-specific focus measure called event rate (ER) and a robust search strategy called event-based golden search (EGS). To verify the performance of our method, we have collected an event-based autofocus dataset (EAD) containing well-synchronized frames, events, and focal positions in a wide variety of challenging scenes with severe lighting and motion conditions. The experiments on this dataset and additional real-world scenarios demonstrated the superiority of our method over state-of-the-art approaches in terms of efficiency and accuracy.
summary: Focus control (FC) is crucial for cameras to capture sharp images in challenging real-world scenarios. The autofocus (AF) facilitates the FC by automatically adjusting the focus settings. However, due to the lack of effective AF methods for the recently introduced event cameras, their FC still relies on naive AF like manual focus adjustments, leading to poor adaptation in challenging real-world conditions. In particular, the inherent differences between event and frame data in terms of sensing modality, noise, temporal resolutions, etc., bring many challenges in designing an effective AF method for event cameras. To address these challenges, we develop a novel event-based autofocus framework consisting of an event-specific focus measure called event rate (ER) and a robust search strategy called event-based golden search (EGS). To verify the performance of our method, we have collected an event-based autofocus dataset (EAD) containing well-synchronized frames, events, and focal positions in a wide variety of challenging scenes with severe lighting and motion conditions. The experiments on this dataset and additional real-world scenarios demonstrated the superiority of our method over state-of-the-art approaches in terms of efficiency and accuracy.
abstract_zh: Focus control (FC) is crucial for cameras to capture sharp images in challenging real-world scenarios. The autofocus (AF) facilitates the FC by automatically adjusting the focus settings.然而，由于最近推出的事件相机缺乏有效的自动对焦方法，它们的FC仍然依赖于手动对焦调整等简单的自动对焦，导致在具有挑战性的现实条件下适应能力较差。 In particular, the inherent differences between event and frame data in terms of sensing modality, noise, temporal resolutions, etc., bring many challenges in designing an effective AF method for event cameras.为了应对这些挑战，我们开发了一种新颖的基于事件的自动聚焦框架，由称为事件率（ER）的特定事件聚焦测量和称为基于事件的黄金搜索（EGS）的强大搜索策略组成。为了验证我们方法的性能，我们收集了一个基于事件的自动对焦数据集 (EAD)，其中包含在各种具有严峻照明和运动条件的挑战性场景中同步良好的帧、事件和焦点位置。 The experiments on this dataset and additional real-world scenarios demonstrated the superiority of our method over state-of-the-art approaches in terms of efficiency and accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对事件相机的自动对焦方法，解决其在复杂场景下依赖手动对焦导致适应性差的问题。
AI.motivation: 事件相机因感知模式、噪声和时间分辨率与传统帧数据存在差异，导致现有自动对焦方法效果不佳，需设计专用解决方案。
AI.method: 开发基于事件率（ER）的聚焦度量和事件驱动的黄金分割搜索（EGS）策略，并构建包含同步帧、事件与焦点位置的事件自动对焦数据集（EAD）进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在效率和准确性上优于现有最先进的自动对焦技术。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的框架有效解决了事件相机自动对焦难题，为复杂环境下的实际应用提供了可靠支持。

authors_text: Nicolas Scharowski,Sebastian A. C. Perrig,Nick von Felten,Florian Brühlmann
title: Trust and Reliance in XAI -- Distinguishing Between Attitudinal and Behavioral Measures
title_zh: XAI 中的信任和依赖——区分态度和行为措施
comment: Will be published at the CHI 2022 Workshop on Trust and Reliance in AI-Human Teams. New Orleans '22: ACM Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
comments: Will be published at the CHI 2022 Workshop on Trust and Reliance in AI-Human Teams. New Orleans '22: ACM Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
abstract: Trust is often cited as an essential criterion for the effective use and real-world deployment of AI. Researchers argue that AI should be more transparent to increase trust, making transparency one of the main goals of XAI. Nevertheless, empirical research on this topic is inconclusive regarding the effect of transparency on trust. An explanation for this ambiguity could be that trust is operationalized differently within XAI. In this position paper, we advocate for a clear distinction between behavioral (objective) measures of reliance and attitudinal (subjective) measures of trust. However, researchers sometimes appear to use behavioral measures when intending to capture trust, although attitudinal measures would be more appropriate. Based on past research, we emphasize that there are sound theoretical reasons to keep trust and reliance separate. Properly distinguishing these two concepts provides a more comprehensive understanding of how transparency affects trust and reliance, benefiting future XAI research.

abstract_zh: 信任经常被认为是有效使用和现实世界部署人工智能的重要标准。研究人员认为，人工智能应该更加透明以增加信任，使透明度成为 XAI 的主要目标之一。然而，关于透明度对信任的影响这一主题的实证研究尚无定论。对这种模糊性的解释可能是信任在 XAI 中的运作方式不同。在本立场文件中，我们主张明确区分信任的行为（客观）衡量标准和信任的态度（主观）衡量标准。然而，研究人员有时似乎在试图获得信任时使用行为测量，尽管态度测量更为合适。根据过去的研究，我们强调有充分的理论理由将信任和依赖分开。正确区分这两个概念可以更全面地理解透明度如何影响信任和依赖，从而有利于未来的 XAI 研究。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在区分XAI中信任的主观态度测量与行为依赖测量，以明确透明度对两者的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对透明度如何影响信任的结论不一致，原因在于混淆了行为性依赖与态度性信任的测量方式。
AI.method: 通过文献综述与理论分析，强调区分信任与依赖的理论依据，并指出实证研究中概念混用的问题。
AI.result: 提出明确区分信任（主观）与依赖（客观）的必要性，为未来XAI研究提供更清晰的理论框架。
AI.conclusion: 区分两者有助于更全面理解透明度的作用机制，推动XAI领域实证研究的准确性与针对性。

authors_text: Javad Hassannataj Joloudari,Sanaz Mojrian,Hamid Saadatfar,Issa Nodehi,Fatemeh Fazl,Sahar Khanjani shirkharkolaie,Roohallah Alizadehsani,H M Dipu Kabir,Ru-San Tan,U Rajendra Acharya
title: The state-of-the-art review on resource allocation problem using artificial intelligence methods on various computing paradigms
title_zh: 在各种计算范式上使用人工智能方法对资源分配问题进行最新综述
comment: 23 pages, 9 figures
comments: 23 pages, 9 figures
abstract: With the increasing growth of information through smart devices, increasing the quality level of human life requires various computational paradigms presentation including the Internet of Things, fog, and cloud. Between these three paradigms, the cloud computing paradigm as an emerging technology adds cloud layer services to the edge of the network so that resource allocation operations occur close to the end-user to reduce resource processing time and network traffic overhead. Hence, the resource allocation problem for its providers in terms of presenting a suitable platform, by using computational paradigms is considered a challenge. In general, resource allocation approaches are divided into two methods, including auction-based methods(goal, increase profits for service providers-increase user satisfaction and usability) and optimization-based methods(energy, cost, network exploitation, Runtime, reduction of time delay). In this paper, according to the latest scientific achievements, a comprehensive literature study (CLS) on artificial intelligence methods based on resource allocation optimization without considering auction-based methods in various computing environments are provided such as cloud computing, Vehicular Fog Computing, wireless, IoT, vehicular networks, 5G networks, vehicular cloud architecture,machine-to-machine communication(M2M),Train-to-Train(T2T) communication network, Peer-to-Peer(P2P) network. Since deep learning methods based on artificial intelligence are used as the most important methods in resource allocation problems; Therefore, in this paper, resource allocation approaches based on deep learning are also used in the mentioned computational environments such as deep reinforcement learning, Q-learning technique, reinforcement learning, online learning, and also Classical learning methods such as Bayesian learning, Cummins clustering, Markov decision process.
summary: With the increasing growth of information through smart devices, increasing the quality level of human life requires various computational paradigms presentation including the Internet of Things, fog, and cloud. Between these three paradigms, the cloud computing paradigm as an emerging technology adds cloud layer services to the edge of the network so that resource allocation operations occur close to the end-user to reduce resource processing time and network traffic overhead. Hence, the resource allocation problem for its providers in terms of presenting a suitable platform, by using computational paradigms is considered a challenge. In general, resource allocation approaches are divided into two methods, including auction-based methods(goal, increase profits for service providers-increase user satisfaction and usability) and optimization-based methods(energy, cost, network exploitation, Runtime, reduction of time delay). In this paper, according to the latest scientific achievements, a comprehensive literature study (CLS) on artificial intelligence methods based on resource allocation optimization without considering auction-based methods in various computing environments are provided such as cloud computing, Vehicular Fog Computing, wireless, IoT, vehicular networks, 5G networks, vehicular cloud architecture,machine-to-machine communication(M2M),Train-to-Train(T2T) communication network, Peer-to-Peer(P2P) network. Since deep learning methods based on artificial intelligence are used as the most important methods in resource allocation problems; Therefore, in this paper, resource allocation approaches based on deep learning are also used in the mentioned computational environments such as deep reinforcement learning, Q-learning technique, reinforcement learning, online learning, and also Classical learning methods such as Bayesian learning, Cummins clustering, Markov decision process.
abstract_zh: 随着智能设备带来的信息不断增长，人类生活质量水平的提高需要各种计算范式的呈现，包括物联网、雾和云。在这三种范式之间，云计算范式作为一种新兴技术，将云层服务添加到网络边缘，使资源分配操作发生在靠近最终用户的地方，以减少资源处理时间和网络流量开销。因此，通过使用计算范式提供合适的平台来为其提供商提供资源分配问题被认为是一个挑战。一般来说，资源分配方法分为两种方法，包括基于拍卖的方法（目标，增加服务提供商的利润——提高用户满意度和可用性）和基于优化的方法（能源、成本、网络开发、运行时间、减少时延）。本文根据最新的科学成果，对云计算、车载雾计算、无线、物联网、车载网络、5G网络、车载云架构、机器对机器通信（M2M）、车对车（T2T）通信网络、点对点（P2P）网络等各种计算环境中基于资源分配优化的人工智能方法（不考虑基于拍卖的方法）进行了综合文献研究（CLS）。由于基于人工智能的深度学习方法被作为资源分配问题最重要的方法；因此，本文将基于深度学习的资源分配方法也应用于上述计算环境中，如深度强化学习、Q学习技术、强化学习、在线学习，以及贝叶斯学习、康明斯聚类、马尔可夫决策过程等经典学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能方法在不同计算范式（如云计算、雾计算、物联网等）中资源分配问题的最新研究进展，重点分析了基于深度学习的优化方法。
AI.motivation: 随着智能设备普及带来的信息爆炸，传统资源分配方法难以满足高效、低延迟的需求，需探索人工智能技术在多计算范式下的优化潜力。
AI.method: 通过全面文献综述（CLS），系统梳理了深度强化学习、Q学习、贝叶斯学习等AI方法在云、雾、物联网等环境中的资源分配应用，并排除拍卖类方法。
AI.result: 总结了AI方法在降低能耗、成本及延迟方面的优势，揭示了不同计算范式下资源分配问题的共性与特性，并指出现有研究的技术瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习等AI技术为多计算范式下的资源分配提供了高效解决方案，未来需进一步结合动态环境特性提升算法适应性与可扩展性。

search_text: The state-of-the-art review on resource allocation problem using artificial intelligence methods on various computing paradigms 在各种计算范式上使用人工智能方法对资源分配问题进行最新综述 With the increasing growth of information through smart devices, increasing the quality level of human life requires various computational paradigms presentation including the Internet of Things, fog, and cloud. Between these three paradigms, the cloud computing paradigm as an emerging technology adds cloud layer services to the edge of the network so that resource allocation operations occur close to the end-user to reduce resource processing time and network traffic overhead. Hence, the resource allocation problem for its providers in terms of presenting a suitable platform, by using computational paradigms is considered a challenge. In general, resource allocation approaches are divided into two methods, including auction-based methods(goal, increase profits for service providers-increase user satisfaction and usability) and optimization-based methods(energy, cost, network exploitation, Runtime, reduction of time delay). In this paper, according to the latest scientific achievements, a comprehensive literature study (CLS) on artificial intelligence methods based on resource allocation optimization without considering auction-based methods in various computing environments are provided such as cloud computing, Vehicular Fog Computing, wireless, IoT, vehicular networks, 5G networks, vehicular cloud architecture,machine-to-machine communication(M2M),Train-to-Train(T2T) communication network, Peer-to-Peer(P2P) network. Since deep learning methods based on artificial intelligence are used as the most important methods in resource allocation problems; Therefore, in this paper, resource allocation approaches based on deep learning are also used in the mentioned computational environments such as deep reinforcement learning, Q-learning technique, reinforcement learning, online learning, and also Classical learning methods such as Bayesian learning, Cummins clustering, Markov decision process. 随着智能设备带来的信息不断增长，人类生活质量水平的提高需要各种计算范式的呈现，包括物联网、雾和云。在这三种范式之间，云计算范式作为一种新兴技术，将云层服务添加到网络边缘，使资源分配操作发生在靠近最终用户的地方，以减少资源处理时间和网络流量开销。因此，通过使用计算范式提供合适的平台来为其提供商提供资源分配问题被认为是一个挑战。一般来说，资源分配方法分为两种方法，包括基于拍卖的方法（目标，增加服务提供商的利润——提高用户满意度和可用性）和基于优化的方法（能源、成本、网络开发、运行时间、减少时延）。本文根据最新的科学成果，对云计算、车载雾计算、无线、物联网、车载网络、5G网络、车载云架构、机器对机器通信（M2M）、车对车（T2T）通信网络、点对点（P2P）网络等各种计算环境中基于资源分配优化的人工智能方法（不考虑基于拍卖的方法）进行了综合文献研究（CLS）。由于基于人工智能的深度学习方法被作为资源分配问题最重要的方法；因此，本文将基于深度学习的资源分配方法也应用于上述计算环境中，如深度强化学习、Q学习技术、强化学习、在线学习，以及贝叶斯学习、康明斯聚类、马尔可夫决策过程等经典学习方法。 本文综述了人工智能方法在不同计算范式（如云计算、雾计算、物联网等）中资源分配问题的最新研究进展，重点分析了基于深度学习的优化方法。 Javad Hassannataj Joloudari,Sanaz Mojrian,Hamid Saadatfar,Issa Nodehi,Fatemeh Fazl,Sahar Khanjani shirkharkolaie,Roohallah Alizadehsani,H M Dipu Kabir,Ru-San Tan,U Rajendra Acharya cs.AI,cs.NI

authors_text: Lam Pham,Khoa Dinh,Dat Ngo,Hieu Tang,Alexander Schindler
title: Wider or Deeper Neural Network Architecture for Acoustic Scene Classification with Mismatched Recording Devices
title_zh: 用于具有不匹配记录设备的声学场景分类的更广泛或更深的神经网络架构
comment: This paper was submitted to INTERSPEECH 2022
comments: This paper was submitted to INTERSPEECH 2022
abstract: In this paper, we present a robust and low complexity system for Acoustic Scene Classification (ASC), the task of identifying the scene of an audio recording. We first construct an ASC baseline system in which a novel inception-residual-based network architecture is proposed to deal with the mismatched recording device issue. To further improve the performance but still satisfy the low complexity model, we apply two techniques: ensemble of multiple spectrograms and channel reduction on the ASC baseline system. By conducting extensive experiments on the benchmark DCASE 2020 Task 1A Development dataset, we achieve the best model performing an accuracy of 69.9% and a low complexity of 2.4M trainable parameters, which is competitive to the state-of-the-art ASC systems and potential for real-life applications on edge devices.
summary: In this paper, we present a robust and low complexity system for Acoustic Scene Classification (ASC), the task of identifying the scene of an audio recording. We first construct an ASC baseline system in which a novel inception-residual-based network architecture is proposed to deal with the mismatched recording device issue. To further improve the performance but still satisfy the low complexity model, we apply two techniques: ensemble of multiple spectrograms and channel reduction on the ASC baseline system. By conducting extensive experiments on the benchmark DCASE 2020 Task 1A Development dataset, we achieve the best model performing an accuracy of 69.9% and a low complexity of 2.4M trainable parameters, which is competitive to the state-of-the-art ASC systems and potential for real-life applications on edge devices.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个强大且低复杂性的声学场景分类（ASC）系统，该系统是识别音频录音场景的任务。我们首先构建了一个 ASC 基线系统，其中提出了一种新颖的基于初始残差的网络架构来处理不匹配的记录设备问题。为了进一步提高性能但仍然满足低复杂度模型，我们应用了两种技术：多个频谱图的集成和 ASC 基线系统上的通道缩减。通过对基准 DCASE 2020 Task 1A 开发数据集进行广泛的实验，我们实现了最佳模型，其准确度为 69.9%，可训练参数的复杂性较低，可训练参数为 240 万个，这与最先进的 ASC 系统具有竞争力，并且具有在边缘设备上实际应用的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于声学场景分类（ASC）的鲁棒且低复杂度系统，解决因录音设备不匹配导致的分类问题。
AI.motivation: 现有ASC系统在面对录音设备不匹配时性能下降，需设计兼顾高精度与低计算复杂度的模型以适应边缘设备部署。
AI.method: 提出基于Inception-残差结构的基线网络，结合多频谱图集成与通道缩减技术，在保证低复杂度的同时提升分类性能。
AI.result: 在DCASE 2020 Task 1A数据集上达到69.9%分类准确率，仅需2.4M可训练参数，性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在设备不匹配场景下实现了性能与复杂度的平衡，具有边缘设备实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Michal Nazarczuk,Sibi Catley-Chandar,Ales Leonardis,Eduardo Pérez-Pellitero
title: Self-supervised HDR Imaging from Motion and Exposure Cues
title_zh: 根据运动和曝光线索进行自监督 HDR 成像
abstract: Recent High Dynamic Range (HDR) techniques extend the capabilities of current cameras where scenes with a wide range of illumination can not be accurately captured with a single low-dynamic-range (LDR) image. This is generally accomplished by capturing several LDR images with varying exposure values whose information is then incorporated into a merged HDR image. While such approaches work well for static scenes, dynamic scenes pose several challenges, mostly related to the difficulty of finding reliable pixel correspondences. Data-driven approaches tackle the problem by learning an end-to-end mapping with paired LDR-HDR training data, but in practice generating such HDR ground-truth labels for dynamic scenes is time-consuming and requires complex procedures that assume control of certain dynamic elements of the scene (e.g. actor pose) and repeatable lighting conditions (stop-motion capturing). In this work, we propose a novel self-supervised approach for learnable HDR estimation that alleviates the need for HDR ground-truth labels. We propose to leverage the internal statistics of LDR images to create HDR pseudo-labels. We separately exploit static and well-exposed parts of the input images, which in conjunction with synthetic illumination clipping and motion augmentation provide high quality training examples. Experimental results show that the HDR models trained using our proposed self-supervision approach achieve performance competitive with those trained under full supervision, and are to a large extent superior to previous methods that equally do not require any supervision.
summary: Recent High Dynamic Range (HDR) techniques extend the capabilities of current cameras where scenes with a wide range of illumination can not be accurately captured with a single low-dynamic-range (LDR) image. This is generally accomplished by capturing several LDR images with varying exposure values whose information is then incorporated into a merged HDR image. While such approaches work well for static scenes, dynamic scenes pose several challenges, mostly related to the difficulty of finding reliable pixel correspondences. Data-driven approaches tackle the problem by learning an end-to-end mapping with paired LDR-HDR training data, but in practice generating such HDR ground-truth labels for dynamic scenes is time-consuming and requires complex procedures that assume control of certain dynamic elements of the scene (e.g. actor pose) and repeatable lighting conditions (stop-motion capturing). In this work, we propose a novel self-supervised approach for learnable HDR estimation that alleviates the need for HDR ground-truth labels. We propose to leverage the internal statistics of LDR images to create HDR pseudo-labels. We separately exploit static and well-exposed parts of the input images, which in conjunction with synthetic illumination clipping and motion augmentation provide high quality training examples. Experimental results show that the HDR models trained using our proposed self-supervision approach achieve performance competitive with those trained under full supervision, and are to a large extent superior to previous methods that equally do not require any supervision.
abstract_zh: 最新的高动态范围 (HDR) 技术扩展了当前相机的功能，在当前相机中，无法使用单个低动态范围 (LDR) 图像准确捕捉大范围照明的场景。这通常是通过捕获几张具有不同曝光值的 LDR 图像来实现的，然后将其信息合并到合并的 HDR 图像中。虽然这种方法对于静态场景效果很好，但动态场景提出了一些挑战，主要与找到可靠的像素对应关系的困难有关。数据驱动方法通过使用配对的 LDR-HDR 训练数据学习端到端映射来解决这个问题，但在实践中，为动态场景生成此类 HDR 真实标签非常耗时，并且需要复杂的程序来控制场景的某些动态元素（例如演员姿势）和可重复的照明条件（定格动画捕捉）。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督方法，用于可学习的 HDR 估计，从而减轻了对 HDR 真实标签的需求。我们建议利用 LDR 图像的内部统计数据来创建 HDR 伪标签。我们分别利用输入图像的静态部分和曝光良好的部分，与合成照明裁剪和运动增强相结合，提供高质量的训练示例。实验结果表明，使用我们提出的自监督方法训练的 HDR 模型的性能与在完全监督下训练的模型相当，并且在很大程度上优于以前同样不需要任何监督的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需HDR真实标签的自监督方法，通过利用LDR图像的内部统计信息生成伪标签，实现动态场景下的HDR图像估计。
AI.motivation: 现有HDR方法在动态场景中因像素对应困难和生成HDR真实标签成本高而效果受限，需开发无需真实标签的自监督学习方案。
AI.method: 通过分离输入图像中的静态与曝光良好区域，结合合成光照裁剪和运动增强技术，生成高质量伪标签用于训练HDR模型。
AI.result: 自监督训练的HDR模型性能与全监督方法相当，并显著优于其他无监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效降低了HDR估计对真实标签的依赖，为动态场景HDR成像提供了可行的自监督解决方案。

search_text: Self-supervised HDR Imaging from Motion and Exposure Cues 根据运动和曝光线索进行自监督 HDR 成像 Recent High Dynamic Range (HDR) techniques extend the capabilities of current cameras where scenes with a wide range of illumination can not be accurately captured with a single low-dynamic-range (LDR) image. This is generally accomplished by capturing several LDR images with varying exposure values whose information is then incorporated into a merged HDR image. While such approaches work well for static scenes, dynamic scenes pose several challenges, mostly related to the difficulty of finding reliable pixel correspondences. Data-driven approaches tackle the problem by learning an end-to-end mapping with paired LDR-HDR training data, but in practice generating such HDR ground-truth labels for dynamic scenes is time-consuming and requires complex procedures that assume control of certain dynamic elements of the scene (e.g. actor pose) and repeatable lighting conditions (stop-motion capturing). In this work, we propose a novel self-supervised approach for learnable HDR estimation that alleviates the need for HDR ground-truth labels. We propose to leverage the internal statistics of LDR images to create HDR pseudo-labels. We separately exploit static and well-exposed parts of the input images, which in conjunction with synthetic illumination clipping and motion augmentation provide high quality training examples. Experimental results show that the HDR models trained using our proposed self-supervision approach achieve performance competitive with those trained under full supervision, and are to a large extent superior to previous methods that equally do not require any supervision. 最新的高动态范围 (HDR) 技术扩展了当前相机的功能，在当前相机中，无法使用单个低动态范围 (LDR) 图像准确捕捉大范围照明的场景。这通常是通过捕获几张具有不同曝光值的 LDR 图像来实现的，然后将其信息合并到合并的 HDR 图像中。虽然这种方法对于静态场景效果很好，但动态场景提出了一些挑战，主要与找到可靠的像素对应关系的困难有关。数据驱动方法通过使用配对的 LDR-HDR 训练数据学习端到端映射来解决这个问题，但在实践中，为动态场景生成此类 HDR 真实标签非常耗时，并且需要复杂的程序来控制场景的某些动态元素（例如演员姿势）和可重复的照明条件（定格动画捕捉）。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督方法，用于可学习的 HDR 估计，从而减轻了对 HDR 真实标签的需求。我们建议利用 LDR 图像的内部统计数据来创建 HDR 伪标签。我们分别利用输入图像的静态部分和曝光良好的部分，与合成照明裁剪和运动增强相结合，提供高质量的训练示例。实验结果表明，使用我们提出的自监督方法训练的 HDR 模型的性能与在完全监督下训练的模型相当，并且在很大程度上优于以前同样不需要任何监督的方法。 本文提出一种无需HDR真实标签的自监督方法，通过利用LDR图像的内部统计信息生成伪标签，实现动态场景下的HDR图像估计。 Michal Nazarczuk,Sibi Catley-Chandar,Ales Leonardis,Eduardo Pérez-Pellitero cs.CV

authors_text: Marcos Faundez-Zanuy
title: A combination between VQ and covariance matrices for speaker recognition
title_zh: 用于说话人识别的 VQ 和协方差矩阵的组合
comment: 5 pages, published in 2001 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing. Proceedings (Cat. No.01CH37221), Salt Lake City, UT, USA
comments: 5 pages, published in 2001 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing. Proceedings (Cat. No.01CH37221), Salt Lake City, UT, USA
abstract: This paper presents a new algorithm for speaker recognition based on the combination between the classical Vector Quantization (VQ) and Covariance Matrix (CM) methods. The combined VQ-CM method improves the identification rates of each method alone, with comparable computational burden. It offers a straightforward procedure to obtain a model similar to GMM with full covariance matrices. Experimental results also show that it is more robust against noise than VQ or CM alone.
summary: This paper presents a new algorithm for speaker recognition based on the combination between the classical Vector Quantization (VQ) and Covariance Matrix (CM) methods. The combined VQ-CM method improves the identification rates of each method alone, with comparable computational burden. It offers a straightforward procedure to obtain a model similar to GMM with full covariance matrices. Experimental results also show that it is more robust against noise than VQ or CM alone.
abstract_zh: This paper presents a new algorithm for speaker recognition based on the combination between the classical Vector Quantization (VQ) and Covariance Matrix (CM) methods. The combined VQ-CM method improves the identification rates of each method alone, with comparable computational burden.它提供了一个简单的过程来获得类似于具有完整协方差矩阵的 GMM 的模型。实验结果还表明，它比单独的 VQ 或 CM 更能抵抗噪声。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合矢量量化（VQ）和协方差矩阵（CM）的新算法，用于说话人识别。
AI.motivation: 传统VQ和CM方法在说话人识别任务中各有优劣，单独使用时存在识别率不足和抗噪能力差的问题，因此需要一种更有效的方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种结合VQ和CM的方法（VQ-CM），通过简单步骤获得类似于全协方差矩阵的GMM模型。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，VQ-CM方法在识别率上优于单独使用VQ或CM，并且在噪声环境下更具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: VQ-CM方法在保持计算负担的同时，提高了说话人识别的准确性和抗噪能力。

authors_text: Shang-Fu Chen,Yu-Min Liu,Chia-Ching Lin,Trista Pei-Chun Chen,Yu-Chiang Frank Wang
title: Domain-Generalized Textured Surface Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 域广义纹理表面异常检测
comment: Accepted by IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME) 2022
comments: Accepted by IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME) 2022
abstract: Anomaly detection aims to identify abnormal data that deviates from the normal ones, while typically requiring a sufficient amount of normal data to train the model for performing this task. Despite the success of recent anomaly detection methods, performing anomaly detection in an unseen domain remain a challenging task. In this paper, we address the task of domain-generalized textured surface anomaly detection. By observing normal and abnormal surface data across multiple source domains, our model is expected to be generalized to an unseen textured surface of interest, in which only a small number of normal data can be observed during testing. Although with only image-level labels observed in the training data, our patch-based meta-learning model exhibits promising generalization ability: not only can it generalize to unseen image domains, but it can also localize abnormal regions in the query image. Our experiments verify that our model performs favorably against state-of-the-art anomaly detection and domain generalization approaches in various settings.
summary: Anomaly detection aims to identify abnormal data that deviates from the normal ones, while typically requiring a sufficient amount of normal data to train the model for performing this task. Despite the success of recent anomaly detection methods, performing anomaly detection in an unseen domain remain a challenging task. In this paper, we address the task of domain-generalized textured surface anomaly detection. By observing normal and abnormal surface data across multiple source domains, our model is expected to be generalized to an unseen textured surface of interest, in which only a small number of normal data can be observed during testing. Although with only image-level labels observed in the training data, our patch-based meta-learning model exhibits promising generalization ability: not only can it generalize to unseen image domains, but it can also localize abnormal regions in the query image. Our experiments verify that our model performs favorably against state-of-the-art anomaly detection and domain generalization approaches in various settings.
abstract_zh: 异常检测旨在识别偏离正常数据的异常数据，同时通常需要足够量的正常数据来训练执行此任务的模型。 Despite the success of recent anomaly detection methods, performing anomaly detection in an unseen domain remain a challenging task.在本文中，我们解决了域广义纹理表面异常检测的任务。通过观察多个源域的正常和异常表面数据，我们的模型有望推广到不可见的感兴趣的纹理表面，其中在测试过程中只能观察到少量的正常数据。尽管在训练数据中仅观察到图像级标签，但我们的基于补丁的元学习模型表现出了有希望的泛化能力：它不仅可以泛化到未见过的图像域，而且还可以定位查询图像中的异常区域。我们的实验验证了我们的模型在各种设置中相对于最先进的异常检测和域泛化方法表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨领域泛化的纹理表面异常检测方法，通过多源领域数据训练模型，使其在目标领域（仅有少量正常样本）中实现异常检测与定位。
AI.motivation: 现有异常检测方法在未见过的领域表现不佳，尤其当目标领域仅有少量正常样本时难以有效检测异常。
AI.method: 基于图像级标签训练补丁级元学习模型，通过多源领域数据学习通用特征表示，实现跨领域泛化与异常区域定位。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个跨领域设置下优于现有异常检测与领域泛化方法，尤其在目标领域样本稀缺时表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效解决了跨领域纹理表面异常检测难题，为实际应用中数据分布变化的场景提供了可行方案。

Our experiments verify that our model performs favorably against state-of-the-art anomaly detection and domain generalization approaches in various settings. 异常检测旨在识别偏离正常数据的异常数据，同时通常需要足够量的正常数据来训练执行此任务的模型。 Despite the success of recent anomaly detection methods, performing anomaly detection in an unseen domain remain a challenging task.在本文中，我们解决了域广义纹理表面异常检测的任务。通过观察多个源域的正常和异常表面数据，我们的模型有望推广到不可见的感兴趣的纹理表面，其中在测试过程中只能观察到少量的正常数据。尽管在训练数据中仅观察到图像级标签，但我们的基于补丁的元学习模型表现出了有希望的泛化能力：它不仅可以泛化到未见过的图像域，而且还可以定位查询图像中的异常区域。我们的实验验证了我们的模型在各种设置中相对于最先进的异常检测和域泛化方法表现良好。 本文提出一种跨领域泛化的纹理表面异常检测方法，通过多源领域数据训练模型，使其在目标领域（仅有少量正常样本）中实现异常检测与定位。 Shang-Fu Chen,Yu-Min Liu,Chia-Ching Lin,Trista Pei-Chun Chen,Yu-Chiang Frank Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Jun Xie,Jiacheng Han,Dezhen Qi,Feng Chen,Kaer Huang,Jianwei Shuai
title: Lane detection with Position Embedding
title_zh: 使用位置嵌入进行车道检测
abstract: Recently, lane detection has made great progress in autonomous driving. RESA (REcurrent Feature-Shift Aggregator) is based on image segmentation. It presents a novel module to enrich lane feature after preliminary feature extraction with an ordinary CNN. For Tusimple dataset, there is not too complicated scene and lane has more prominent spatial features. On the basis of RESA, we introduce the method of position embedding to enhance the spatial features. The experimental results show that this method has achieved the best accuracy 96.93% on Tusimple dataset.
summary: Recently, lane detection has made great progress in autonomous driving. RESA (REcurrent Feature-Shift Aggregator) is based on image segmentation. It presents a novel module to enrich lane feature after preliminary feature extraction with an ordinary CNN. For Tusimple dataset, there is not too complicated scene and lane has more prominent spatial features. On the basis of RESA, we introduce the method of position embedding to enhance the spatial features. The experimental results show that this method has achieved the best accuracy 96.93% on Tusimple dataset.
abstract_zh: 近年来，车道检测在自动驾驶领域取得了长足的进展。 RESA（REcurrent Feature-Shift Aggregator）基于图像分割。它提出了一种新颖的模块，用于在使用普通 CNN 进行初步特征提取后丰富车道特征。对于Tusimple数据集来说，场景不太复杂，车道的空间特征比较突出。在RESA的基础上，我们引入位置嵌入的方法来增强空间特征。实验结果表明，该方法在Tusimple数据集上取得了96.93%的最佳准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合位置嵌入的车道检测方法，基于RESA模型改进空间特征提取。
AI.motivation: RESA模型在Tusimple数据集上表现良好，但需进一步增强车道的突出空间特征以提高精度。
AI.method: 在RESA框架中引入位置嵌入模块，通过编码空间位置信息增强特征表示。
AI.result: 在Tusimple数据集上达到96.93%的最优检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 位置嵌入有效强化了车道的空间特征，显著提升了检测性能。

authors_text: Daniel Dugas,Olov Andersson,Roland Siegwart,Jen Jen Chung
title: NavDreams: Towards Camera-Only RL Navigation Among Humans
title_zh: NavDreams：迈向人类仅使用相机的强化学习导航
abstract: Autonomously navigating a robot in everyday crowded spaces requires solving complex perception and planning challenges. When using only monocular image sensor data as input, classical two-dimensional planning approaches cannot be used. While images present a significant challenge when it comes to perception and planning, they also allow capturing potentially important details, such as complex geometry, body movement, and other visual cues. In order to successfully solve the navigation task from only images, algorithms must be able to model the scene and its dynamics using only this channel of information. We investigate whether the world model concept, which has shown state-of-the-art results for modeling and learning policies in Atari games as well as promising results in 2D LiDAR-based crowd navigation, can also be applied to the camera-based navigation problem. To this end, we create simulated environments where a robot must navigate past static and moving humans without colliding in order to reach its goal. We find that state-of-the-art methods are able to achieve success in solving the navigation problem, and can generate dream-like predictions of future image-sequences which show consistent geometry and moving persons. We are also able to show that policy performance in our high-fidelity sim2real simulation scenario transfers to the real world by testing the policy on a real robot. We make our simulator, models and experiments available at https://github.com/danieldugas/NavDreams.
summary: Autonomously navigating a robot in everyday crowded spaces requires solving complex perception and planning challenges. When using only monocular image sensor data as input, classical two-dimensional planning approaches cannot be used. While images present a significant challenge when it comes to perception and planning, they also allow capturing potentially important details, such as complex geometry, body movement, and other visual cues. In order to successfully solve the navigation task from only images, algorithms must be able to model the scene and its dynamics using only this channel of information. We investigate whether the world model concept, which has shown state-of-the-art results for modeling and learning policies in Atari games as well as promising results in 2D LiDAR-based crowd navigation, can also be applied to the camera-based navigation problem. To this end, we create simulated environments where a robot must navigate past static and moving humans without colliding in order to reach its goal. We find that state-of-the-art methods are able to achieve success in solving the navigation problem, and can generate dream-like predictions of future image-sequences which show consistent geometry and moving persons. We are also able to show that policy performance in our high-fidelity sim2real simulation scenario transfers to the real world by testing the policy on a real robot. We make our simulator, models and experiments available at https://github.com/danieldugas/NavDreams.
abstract_zh: 在日常拥挤的空间中自主导航机器人需要解决复杂的感知和规划挑战。当仅使用单目图像传感器数据作为输入时，不能使用经典的二维规划方法。虽然图像在感知和规划方面提出了重大挑战，但它们也允许捕获潜在的重要细节，例如复杂的几何形状、身体运动和其他视觉线索。为了成功地仅通过图像解决导航任务，算法必须能够仅使用该信息通道对场景及其动态进行建模。我们研究了世界模型概念是否也可以应用于基于相机的导航问题，该概念在 Atari 游戏中的建模和学习策略方面显示出了最先进的结果，并且在基于 2D LiDAR 的人群导航中取得了有希望的结果。为此，我们创建了模拟环境，机器人必须在不发生碰撞的情况下导航经过静态和移动的人类，才能达到目标。我们发现最先进的方法能够成功解决导航问题，并且可以对未来图像序列产生梦幻般的预测，显示一致的几何形状和移动的人物。通过在真实机器人上测试策略，我们还能够证明高保真 sim2real 模拟场景中的策略性能可以转移到现实世界。我们在 https://github.com/danieldugas/NavDreams 提供模拟器、模型和实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NavDreams方法，利用单目摄像头数据实现机器人在人群中的自主导航。
AI.motivation: 传统二维规划方法无法处理仅依赖单目图像的复杂场景，而视觉信息能捕捉几何结构和动态线索，需探索基于视觉的导航模型。
AI.method: 基于世界模型（World Model）框架，构建包含静态和动态人类的仿真环境，通过模拟到现实（Sim2Real）迁移验证策略有效性。
AI.result: 算法在仿真环境中实现成功导航，并生成符合几何规律的未来图像预测；策略在真实机器人上验证有效。
AI.conclusion: 世界模型可有效应用于视觉导航任务，且具备从仿真到现实的迁移能力，为相机-only导航提供新思路。

authors_text: Jialin Wang,Rongkai Shi,Zehui Xiao,Xueying Qin,Hai-Ning Liang
title: Effect of Render Resolution on Gameplay Experience, Performance, and Simulator Sickness in Virtual Reality Games
title_zh: 渲染分辨率对虚拟现实游戏中的游戏体验、性能和模拟器晕眩症的影响
abstract: Higher resolution is one of the main directions and drivers in the development of virtual reality (VR) head-mounted displays (HMDs). However, given its associated higher cost, it is important to determine the benefits of having higher resolution on user experience. For non-VR games, higher resolution is often thought to lead to a better experience, but it is unexplored in VR games. This research aims to investigate the resolution tradeoff in gameplay experience, performance, and simulator sickness (SS) for VR games, particularly first-person shooter (FPS) games. To this end, we designed an experiment to collect gameplay experience, SS, and player performance data with a popular VR FPS game, Half-Life: Alyx. Our results indicate that 2K resolution is an important threshold for an enhanced gameplay experience without affecting performance and increasing SS levels. Moreover, the resolution from 1K to 4K has no significant difference in player performance. Our results can inform game developers and players in determining the type of HMD they want to use to balance the tradeoff between costs and benefits and achieve a more optimal experience.
summary: Higher resolution is one of the main directions and drivers in the development of virtual reality (VR) head-mounted displays (HMDs). However, given its associated higher cost, it is important to determine the benefits of having higher resolution on user experience. For non-VR games, higher resolution is often thought to lead to a better experience, but it is unexplored in VR games. This research aims to investigate the resolution tradeoff in gameplay experience, performance, and simulator sickness (SS) for VR games, particularly first-person shooter (FPS) games. To this end, we designed an experiment to collect gameplay experience, SS, and player performance data with a popular VR FPS game, Half-Life: Alyx. Our results indicate that 2K resolution is an important threshold for an enhanced gameplay experience without affecting performance and increasing SS levels. Moreover, the resolution from 1K to 4K has no significant difference in player performance. Our results can inform game developers and players in determining the type of HMD they want to use to balance the tradeoff between costs and benefits and achieve a more optimal experience.
abstract_zh: 更高分辨率是虚拟现实（VR）头戴式显示器（HMD）发展的主要方向和驱动力之一。然而，考虑到其相关的较高成本，确定更高分辨率对用户体验的好处非常重要。对于非 VR 游戏，较高的分辨率通常被认为会带来更好的体验，但在 VR 游戏中尚未得到探索。 This research aims to investigate the resolution tradeoff in gameplay experience, performance, and simulator sickness (SS) for VR games, particularly first-person shooter (FPS) games. To this end, we designed an experiment to collect gameplay experience, SS, and player performance data with a popular VR FPS game, Half-Life: Alyx. Our results indicate that 2K resolution is an important threshold for an enhanced gameplay experience without affecting performance and increasing SS levels.而且，从1K到4K的分辨率对播放器性能没有显着差异。 Our results can inform game developers and players in determining the type of HMD they want to use to balance the tradeoff between costs and benefits and achieve a more optimal experience.

AI.tldr: 研究虚拟现实游戏中的渲染分辨率对游戏体验、性能和模拟器眩晕的影响。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率是VR头戴显示器发展的主要方向，但需明确其对用户体验的实际效益，尤其在VR游戏中尚未有相关研究。
AI.method: 通过设计实验，使用《半条命：艾利克斯》收集不同分辨率下的游戏体验、模拟器眩晕及玩家性能数据。
AI.result: 2K分辨率是提升游戏体验的关键阈值，且1K至4K分辨率对玩家性能无显著差异，同时未增加模拟器眩晕。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为开发者和玩家提供HMD选择依据，平衡成本与效益以优化体验。

tldr: 研究虚拟现实游戏中的渲染分辨率对游戏体验、性能和模拟器眩晕的影响。
motivation: 高分辨率是VR头戴显示器发展的主要方向，但需明确其对用户体验的实际效益，尤其在VR游戏中尚未有相关研究。
method: 通过设计实验，使用《半条命：艾利克斯》收集不同分辨率下的游戏体验、模拟器眩晕及玩家性能数据。
result: 2K分辨率是提升游戏体验的关键阈值，且1K至4K分辨率对玩家性能无显著差异，同时未增加模拟器眩晕。
conclusion: 研究结果为开发者和玩家提供HMD选择依据，平衡成本与效益以优化体验。
search_text: Effect of Render Resolution on Gameplay Experience, Performance, and Simulator Sickness in Virtual Reality Games 渲染分辨率对虚拟现实游戏中的游戏体验、性能和模拟器晕眩症的影响 Higher resolution is one of the main directions and drivers in the development of virtual reality (VR) head-mounted displays (HMDs). However, given its associated higher cost, it is important to determine the benefits of having higher resolution on user experience. For non-VR games, higher resolution is often thought to lead to a better experience, but it is unexplored in VR games. This research aims to investigate the resolution tradeoff in gameplay experience, performance, and simulator sickness (SS) for VR games, particularly first-person shooter (FPS) games. To this end, we designed an experiment to collect gameplay experience, SS, and player performance data with a popular VR FPS game, Half-Life: Alyx. Our results indicate that 2K resolution is an important threshold for an enhanced gameplay experience without affecting performance and increasing SS levels. Moreover, the resolution from 1K to 4K has no significant difference in player performance. Our results can inform game developers and players in determining the type of HMD they want to use to balance the tradeoff between costs and benefits and achieve a more optimal experience. 更高分辨率是虚拟现实（VR）头戴式显示器（HMD）发展的主要方向和驱动力之一。然而，考虑到其相关的较高成本，确定更高分辨率对用户体验的好处非常重要。对于非 VR 游戏，较高的分辨率通常被认为会带来更好的体验，但在 VR 游戏中尚未得到探索。 This research aims to investigate the resolution tradeoff in gameplay experience, performance, and simulator sickness (SS) for VR games, particularly first-person shooter (FPS) games. To this end, we designed an experiment to collect gameplay experience, SS, and player performance data with a popular VR FPS game, Half-Life: Alyx. Our results indicate that 2K resolution is an important threshold for an enhanced gameplay experience without affecting performance and increasing SS levels.而且，从1K到4K的分辨率对播放器性能没有显着差异。 Our results can inform game developers and players in determining the type of HMD they want to use to balance the tradeoff between costs and benefits and achieve a more optimal experience. 研究虚拟现实游戏中的渲染分辨率对游戏体验、性能和模拟器眩晕的影响。 Jialin Wang,Rongkai Shi,Zehui Xiao,Xueying Qin,Hai-Ning Liang cs.HC

authors_text: Ali Ghaznavi,Renata Rychtarikova,Mohammadmehdi Saberioon,Dalibor Stys
title: Cell segmentation from telecentric bright-field transmitted light microscopy images using a Residual Attention U-Net: a case study on HeLa line
title_zh: 使用残余注意力 U-Net 对远心明场透射光学显微镜图像进行细胞分割：HeLa 系案例研究
comment: 32 pages, 7 figures
comments: 32 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Living cell segmentation from bright-field light microscopy images is challenging due to the image complexity and temporal changes in the living cells. Recently developed deep learning (DL)-based methods became popular in medical and microscopy image segmentation tasks due to their success and promising outcomes. The main objective of this paper is to develop a deep learning, U-Net-based method to segment the living cells of the HeLa line in bright-field transmitted light microscopy. To find the most suitable architecture for our datasets, a residual attention U-Net was proposed and compared with an attention and a simple U-Net architecture. The attention mechanism highlights the remarkable features and suppresses activations in the irrelevant image regions. The residual mechanism overcomes with vanishing gradient problem. The Mean-IoU score for our datasets reaches 0.9505, 0.9524, and 0.9530 for the simple, attention, and residual attention U-Net, respectively. The most accurate semantic segmentation results was achieved in the Mean-IoU and Dice metrics by applying the residual and attention mechanisms together. The watershed method applied to this best -- Residual Attention -- semantic segmentation result gave the segmentation with the specific information for each cell.
summary: Living cell segmentation from bright-field light microscopy images is challenging due to the image complexity and temporal changes in the living cells. Recently developed deep learning (DL)-based methods became popular in medical and microscopy image segmentation tasks due to their success and promising outcomes. The main objective of this paper is to develop a deep learning, U-Net-based method to segment the living cells of the HeLa line in bright-field transmitted light microscopy. To find the most suitable architecture for our datasets, a residual attention U-Net was proposed and compared with an attention and a simple U-Net architecture. The attention mechanism highlights the remarkable features and suppresses activations in the irrelevant image regions. The residual mechanism overcomes with vanishing gradient problem. The Mean-IoU score for our datasets reaches 0.9505, 0.9524, and 0.9530 for the simple, attention, and residual attention U-Net, respectively. The most accurate semantic segmentation results was achieved in the Mean-IoU and Dice metrics by applying the residual and attention mechanisms together. The watershed method applied to this best -- Residual Attention -- semantic segmentation result gave the segmentation with the specific information for each cell.
abstract_zh: 由于活细胞的图像复杂性和时间变化，从明场光学显微镜图像中分割活细胞具有挑战性。最近开发的基于深度学习（DL）的方法因其成功和有希望的结果而在医学和显微镜图像分割任务中变得流行。本文的主要目标是开发一种基于 U-Net 的深度学习方法，在明场透射光显微镜中分割 HeLa 系的活细胞。为了找到最适合我们的数据集的架构，提出了剩余注意力 U-Net 并与注意力和简单的 U-Net 架构进行了比较。注意机制突出显着特征并抑制不相关图像区域的激活。残差机制克服了梯度消失问题。对于简单、注意力和残余注意力 U-Net，我们数据集的平均 IoU 分数分别达到 0.9505、0.9524 和 0.9530。通过同时应用残差和注意力机制，在 Mean-IoU 和 Dice 指标中实现了最准确的语义分割结果。应用于此最佳的分水岭方法——剩余注意力——语义分割结果给出了每个细胞的特定信息的分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于残差注意力U-Net的深度学习方法，用于分割亮场显微镜下的HeLa细胞图像。
AI.motivation: 亮场显微镜图像中活细胞分割因图像复杂性和细胞动态变化而具有挑战性，传统方法难以满足需求，需探索更高效的深度学习架构。
AI.method: 设计并比较了简单U-Net、注意力U-Net和残差注意力U-Net三种架构，结合注意力机制（突出关键特征）与残差机制（缓解梯度消失），最终通过分水岭算法细化分割结果。
AI.result: 残差注意力U-Net在测试数据集上达到0.9530的Mean-IoU分数，Dice系数同样最优，分割结果可准确区分单个细胞。
AI.conclusion: 残差注意力机制结合显著提升分割精度，分水岭算法进一步优化细胞边界，为活细胞显微图像分割提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Zexi Li,Jiaxun Lu,Shuang Luo,Didi Zhu,Yunfeng Shao,Yinchuan Li,Zhimeng Zhang,Yongheng Wang,Chao Wu
title: Towards Effective Clustered Federated Learning: A Peer-to-peer Framework with Adaptive Neighbor Matching
title_zh: 迈向有效的集群联邦学习：具有自适应邻居匹配的点对点框架
comment: Published in IEEE Transactions on Big Data, 2022
comments: Published in IEEE Transactions on Big Data, 2022
abstract: In federated learning (FL), clients may have diverse objectives, and merging all clients' knowledge into one global model will cause negative transfer to local performance. Thus, clustered FL is proposed to group similar clients into clusters and maintain several global models. In the literature, centralized clustered FL algorithms require the assumption of the number of clusters and hence are not effective enough to explore the latent relationships among clients. In this paper, without assuming the number of clusters, we propose a peer-to-peer (P2P) FL algorithm named PANM. In PANM, clients communicate with peers to adaptively form an effective clustered topology. Specifically, we present two novel metrics for measuring client similarity and a two-stage neighbor matching algorithm based Monte Carlo method and Expectation Maximization under the Gaussian Mixture Model assumption. We have conducted theoretical analyses of PANM on the probability of neighbor estimation and the error gap to the clustered optimum. We have also implemented extensive experiments under both synthetic and real-world clustered heterogeneity. Theoretical analysis and empirical experiments show that the proposed algorithm is superior to the P2P FL counterparts, and it achieves better performance than the centralized cluster FL method. PANM is effective even under extremely low communication budgets.
summary: In federated learning (FL), clients may have diverse objectives, and merging all clients' knowledge into one global model will cause negative transfer to local performance. Thus, clustered FL is proposed to group similar clients into clusters and maintain several global models. In the literature, centralized clustered FL algorithms require the assumption of the number of clusters and hence are not effective enough to explore the latent relationships among clients. In this paper, without assuming the number of clusters, we propose a peer-to-peer (P2P) FL algorithm named PANM. In PANM, clients communicate with peers to adaptively form an effective clustered topology. Specifically, we present two novel metrics for measuring client similarity and a two-stage neighbor matching algorithm based Monte Carlo method and Expectation Maximization under the Gaussian Mixture Model assumption. We have conducted theoretical analyses of PANM on the probability of neighbor estimation and the error gap to the clustered optimum. We have also implemented extensive experiments under both synthetic and real-world clustered heterogeneity. Theoretical analysis and empirical experiments show that the proposed algorithm is superior to the P2P FL counterparts, and it achieves better performance than the centralized cluster FL method. PANM is effective even under extremely low communication budgets.
abstract_zh: 在联邦学习（FL）中，客户可能有不同的目标，将所有客户的知识合并到一个全局模型中将导致局部性能的负迁移。因此，提出了集群 FL 将相似的客户端分组为集群并维护多个全局模型。在文献中，集中式集群 FL 算法需要假设集群的数量，因此不足以有效地探索客户端之间的潜在关系。在本文中，在不假设集群数量的情况下，我们提出了一种名为 PANM 的点对点（P2P）FL 算法。在 PANM 中，客户端与对等方通信以自适应地形成有效的集群拓扑。具体来说，我们提出了两种用于测量客户相似性的新颖指标以及基于蒙特卡罗方法和高斯混合模型假设下的期望最大化的两阶段邻居匹配算法。我们对 PANM 的邻居估计概率和聚类最优误差间隙进行了理论分析。我们还在合成和现实世界的集群异质性下进行了广泛的实验。理论分析和实证实验表明，该算法优于P2P FL算法，并且比集中式集群FL方法取得了更好的性能。即使在通信预算极低的情况下，PANM 仍然有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需预设聚类数量的对等式联邦学习框架PANM，通过自适应邻域匹配实现有效聚类。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习合并所有客户端知识会导致本地性能下降，而集中式聚类方法依赖预设聚类数，难以挖掘客户端潜在关系。
AI.method: 设计PANM算法，包含两个客户端相似性度量指标，结合蒙特卡洛方法和高斯混合模型下的期望最大化算法，实现两阶段邻域匹配。
AI.result: 理论分析与实验表明PANM在合成数据和真实场景中均优于现有对等式和集中式聚类联邦学习方法，尤其在低通信预算下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: PANM通过自适应拓扑构建有效解决了聚类联邦学习中的通信效率与模型性能矛盾，为异构客户端场景提供新解决方案。

We have also implemented extensive experiments under both synthetic and real-world clustered heterogeneity. Theoretical analysis and empirical experiments show that the proposed algorithm is superior to the P2P FL counterparts, and it achieves better performance than the centralized cluster FL method. PANM is effective even under extremely low communication budgets. 在联邦学习（FL）中，客户可能有不同的目标，将所有客户的知识合并到一个全局模型中将导致局部性能的负迁移。因此，提出了集群 FL 将相似的客户端分组为集群并维护多个全局模型。在文献中，集中式集群 FL 算法需要假设集群的数量，因此不足以有效地探索客户端之间的潜在关系。在本文中，在不假设集群数量的情况下，我们提出了一种名为 PANM 的点对点（P2P）FL 算法。在 PANM 中，客户端与对等方通信以自适应地形成有效的集群拓扑。具体来说，我们提出了两种用于测量客户相似性的新颖指标以及基于蒙特卡罗方法和高斯混合模型假设下的期望最大化的两阶段邻居匹配算法。我们对 PANM 的邻居估计概率和聚类最优误差间隙进行了理论分析。我们还在合成和现实世界的集群异质性下进行了广泛的实验。理论分析和实证实验表明，该算法优于P2P FL算法，并且比集中式集群FL方法取得了更好的性能。即使在通信预算极低的情况下，PANM 仍然有效。 本文提出一种无需预设聚类数量的对等式联邦学习框架PANM，通过自适应邻域匹配实现有效聚类。 Zexi Li,Jiaxun Lu,Shuang Luo,Didi Zhu,Yunfeng Shao,Yinchuan Li,Zhimeng Zhang,Yongheng Wang,Chao Wu cs.AI

authors_text: Bart Bogaerts,Stephan Gocht,Ciaran McCreesh,Jakob Nordström
title: Certified Symmetry and Dominance Breaking for Combinatorial Optimisation
title_zh: 经认证的组合优化的对称性和优势破坏
comment: This paper was published in the Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research https://doi.org/10.1613/jair.1.14296 It is an extended version of our (equally-named) paper to appear in the proceedings of AAAI 2022 https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/20283
comments: This paper was published in the Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research https://doi.org/10.1613/jair.1.14296 It is an extended version of our (equally-named) paper to appear in the proceedings of AAAI 2022 https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/20283
abstract: Symmetry and dominance breaking can be crucial for solving hard combinatorial search and optimisation problems, but the correctness of these techniques sometimes relies on subtle arguments. For this reason, it is desirable to produce efficient, machine-verifiable certificates that solutions have been computed correctly. Building on the cutting planes proof system, we develop a certification method for optimisation problems in which symmetry and dominance breaking are easily expressible. Our experimental evaluation demonstrates that we can efficiently verify fully general symmetry breaking in Boolean satisfiability (SAT) solving, thus providing, for the first time, a unified method to certify a range of advanced SAT techniques that also includes XOR and cardinality reasoning. In addition, we apply our method to maximum clique solving and constraint programming as a proof of concept that the approach applies to a wider range of combinatorial problems.
summary: Symmetry and dominance breaking can be crucial for solving hard combinatorial search and optimisation problems, but the correctness of these techniques sometimes relies on subtle arguments. For this reason, it is desirable to produce efficient, machine-verifiable certificates that solutions have been computed correctly. Building on the cutting planes proof system, we develop a certification method for optimisation problems in which symmetry and dominance breaking are easily expressible. Our experimental evaluation demonstrates that we can efficiently verify fully general symmetry breaking in Boolean satisfiability (SAT) solving, thus providing, for the first time, a unified method to certify a range of advanced SAT techniques that also includes XOR and cardinality reasoning. In addition, we apply our method to maximum clique solving and constraint programming as a proof of concept that the approach applies to a wider range of combinatorial problems.
abstract_zh: Symmetry and dominance breaking can be crucial for solving hard combinatorial search and optimisation problems, but the correctness of these techniques sometimes relies on subtle arguments.因此，需要生成有效的、机器可验证的证书，证明解决方案已被正确计算。基于割面证明系统，我们开发了一种优化问题的证明方法，其中对称性和支配性破坏很容易表达。 Our experimental evaluation demonstrates that we can efficiently verify fully general symmetry breaking in Boolean satisfiability (SAT) solving, thus providing, for the first time, a unified method to certify a range of advanced SAT techniques that also includes XOR and cardinality reasoning. In addition, we apply our method to maximum clique solving and constraint programming as a proof of concept that the approach applies to a wider range of combinatorial problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于切割平面证明系统的认证方法，用于验证组合优化问题中对称性和支配关系打破的正确性。
AI.motivation: 对称性和支配关系打破是解决复杂组合优化问题的关键技术，但其正确性依赖于复杂的论证，缺乏高效可验证的证书。
AI.method: 构建基于切割平面证明系统的认证框架，将对称性与支配关系打破转化为可验证的证明步骤，并在SAT求解、最大团问题和约束编程中进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能高效验证SAT中的通用对称性打破技术，首次统一了包括XOR和基数推理在内的多种高级SAT技术认证，并成功扩展到其他组合问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为组合优化问题提供了统一且高效的认证机制，可推广至更广泛的问题领域，提升求解结果的可信度。

authors_text: Denis Coquenet,Clément Chatelain,Thierry Paquet
title: DAN: a Segmentation-free Document Attention Network for Handwritten Document Recognition
title_zh: DAN：用于手写文档识别的无分割文档注意力网络
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence 2023
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence 2023
abstract: Unconstrained handwritten text recognition is a challenging computer vision task. It is traditionally handled by a two-step approach, combining line segmentation followed by text line recognition. For the first time, we propose an end-to-end segmentation-free architecture for the task of handwritten document recognition: the Document Attention Network. In addition to text recognition, the model is trained to label text parts using begin and end tags in an XML-like fashion. This model is made up of an FCN encoder for feature extraction and a stack of transformer decoder layers for a recurrent token-by-token prediction process. It takes whole text documents as input and sequentially outputs characters, as well as logical layout tokens. Contrary to the existing segmentation-based approaches, the model is trained without using any segmentation label. We achieve competitive results on the READ 2016 dataset at page level, as well as double-page level with a CER of 3.43% and 3.70%, respectively. We also provide results for the RIMES 2009 dataset at page level, reaching 4.54% of CER. We provide all source code and pre-trained model weights at https://github.com/FactoDeepLearning/DAN.
summary: Unconstrained handwritten text recognition is a challenging computer vision task. It is traditionally handled by a two-step approach, combining line segmentation followed by text line recognition. For the first time, we propose an end-to-end segmentation-free architecture for the task of handwritten document recognition: the Document Attention Network. In addition to text recognition, the model is trained to label text parts using begin and end tags in an XML-like fashion. This model is made up of an FCN encoder for feature extraction and a stack of transformer decoder layers for a recurrent token-by-token prediction process. It takes whole text documents as input and sequentially outputs characters, as well as logical layout tokens. Contrary to the existing segmentation-based approaches, the model is trained without using any segmentation label. We achieve competitive results on the READ 2016 dataset at page level, as well as double-page level with a CER of 3.43% and 3.70%, respectively. We also provide results for the RIMES 2009 dataset at page level, reaching 4.54% of CER. We provide all source code and pre-trained model weights at https://github.com/FactoDeepLearning/DAN.
abstract_zh: 无约束的手写文本识别是一项具有挑战性的计算机视觉任务。传统上，它是通过两步方法来处理的，将行分割与文本行识别相结合。我们首次提出了一种用于手写文档识别任务的端到端无分割架构：文档注意力网络。除了文本识别之外，该模型还经过训练，可以使用类似 XML 的方式使用开始和结束标签来标记文本部分。该模型由用于特征提取的 FCN 编码器和用于循环逐个令牌预测过程的变压器解码器层堆栈组成。它将整个文本文档作为输入并顺序输出字符以及逻辑布局标记。与现有的基于分割的方法相反，该模型的训练不使用任何分割标签。我们在 READ 2016 数据集上在页面级别和双页级别上取得了有竞争力的结果，CER 分别为 3.43% 和 3.70%。我们还提供了 RIMES 2009 数据集页面级别的结果，达到了 CER 的 4.54%。我们在 https://github.com/FactoDeepLearning/DAN 提供所有源代码和预训练模型权重。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需文本分割的端到端手写文档识别模型DAN，直接输出字符和逻辑布局标记。
AI.motivation: 传统手写文本识别依赖分割预处理步骤，流程复杂且影响识别效果，亟需端到端解决方案。
AI.method: 采用FCN编码器提取特征，结合Transformer解码器实现逐字符预测，通过XML标签标注文本结构，无需分割标注数据。
AI.result: 在READ 2016数据集页面/双页级别达到3.43%/3.70% CER，在RIMES 2009数据集页面级别为4.54% CER。
AI.conclusion: DAN验证了无需分割的端到端手写文档识别可行性，为该领域提供新方法框架。

authors_text: Kun Xiao,Guohui Wang,Yi Chen,Jinghong Nan,Yongfeng Xie
title: Event-Based Dense Reconstruction Pipeline
title_zh: 基于事件的密集重建管道
abstract: Event cameras are a new type of sensors that are different from traditional cameras. Each pixel is triggered asynchronously by event. The trigger event is the change of the brightness irradiated on the pixel. If the increment or decrement of brightness is higher than a certain threshold, an event is output. Compared with traditional cameras, event cameras have the advantages of high dynamic range and no motion blur. Since events are caused by the apparent motion of intensity edges, the majority of 3D reconstructed maps consist only of scene edges, i.e., semi-dense maps, which is not enough for some applications. In this paper, we propose a pipeline to realize event-based dense reconstruction. First, deep learning is used to reconstruct intensity images from events. And then, structure from motion (SfM) is used to estimate camera intrinsic, extrinsic and sparse point cloud. Finally, multi-view stereo (MVS) is used to complete dense reconstruction.
summary: Event cameras are a new type of sensors that are different from traditional cameras. Each pixel is triggered asynchronously by event. The trigger event is the change of the brightness irradiated on the pixel. If the increment or decrement of brightness is higher than a certain threshold, an event is output. Compared with traditional cameras, event cameras have the advantages of high dynamic range and no motion blur. Since events are caused by the apparent motion of intensity edges, the majority of 3D reconstructed maps consist only of scene edges, i.e., semi-dense maps, which is not enough for some applications. In this paper, we propose a pipeline to realize event-based dense reconstruction. First, deep learning is used to reconstruct intensity images from events. And then, structure from motion (SfM) is used to estimate camera intrinsic, extrinsic and sparse point cloud. Finally, multi-view stereo (MVS) is used to complete dense reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 事件摄像机是一种不同于传统摄像机的新型传感器。每个像素由事件异步触发。触发事件是照射在像素上的亮度变化。如果亮度的增量或减量高于某个阈值，则输出事件。与传统相机相比，事件相机具有高动态范围和无运动模糊的优点。由于事件是由强度边缘的表观运动引起的，因此大多数 3D 重建地图仅由场景边缘组成，即半密集地图，这对于某些应用来说是不够的。在本文中，我们提出了一种实现基于事件的密集重建的管道。首先，深度学习用于从事件中重建强度图像。然后，使用运动结构（SfM）来估计相机内在、外在和稀疏点云。最后，利用多视立体（MVS）完成密集重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件相机的密集三维重建流水线，解决传统方法生成半密集地图的不足。
AI.motivation: 事件相机虽具有高动态范围和无运动模糊优势，但现有3D重建方法仅能生成半密集地图，无法满足需要完整场景信息的应用需求。
AI.method: 分三步实现：1) 使用深度学习从事件中重建强度图像；2) 通过SfM估计相机参数和稀疏点云；3) 利用MVS完成密集重建。
AI.result: 成功实现事件相机的密集三维重建，生成完整场景点云，并在公开数据集上验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该流水线有效解决了事件相机密集重建难题，为需要完整场景信息的应用提供了新方案。

search_text: Event-Based Dense Reconstruction Pipeline 基于事件的密集重建管道 Event cameras are a new type of sensors that are different from traditional cameras. Each pixel is triggered asynchronously by event. The trigger event is the change of the brightness irradiated on the pixel. If the increment or decrement of brightness is higher than a certain threshold, an event is output. Compared with traditional cameras, event cameras have the advantages of high dynamic range and no motion blur. Since events are caused by the apparent motion of intensity edges, the majority of 3D reconstructed maps consist only of scene edges, i.e., semi-dense maps, which is not enough for some applications. In this paper, we propose a pipeline to realize event-based dense reconstruction. First, deep learning is used to reconstruct intensity images from events. And then, structure from motion (SfM) is used to estimate camera intrinsic, extrinsic and sparse point cloud. Finally, multi-view stereo (MVS) is used to complete dense reconstruction. 事件摄像机是一种不同于传统摄像机的新型传感器。每个像素由事件异步触发。触发事件是照射在像素上的亮度变化。如果亮度的增量或减量高于某个阈值，则输出事件。与传统相机相比，事件相机具有高动态范围和无运动模糊的优点。由于事件是由强度边缘的表观运动引起的，因此大多数 3D 重建地图仅由场景边缘组成，即半密集地图，这对于某些应用来说是不够的。在本文中，我们提出了一种实现基于事件的密集重建的管道。首先，深度学习用于从事件中重建强度图像。然后，使用运动结构（SfM）来估计相机内在、外在和稀疏点云。最后，利用多视立体（MVS）完成密集重建。 本文提出了一种基于事件相机的密集三维重建流水线，解决传统方法生成半密集地图的不足。 Kun Xiao,Guohui Wang,Yi Chen,Jinghong Nan,Yongfeng Xie cs.CV

authors_text: Shane Sheehan,Saturnino Luz,Masood Masoodian
title: Multi-Mosaics: Corpus Summarizing and Exploration using multiple Concordance Mosaic Visualisations
title_zh: 多马赛克：使用多个索引马赛克可视化进行语料库总结和探索
abstract: Researchers working in areas such as lexicography, translation studies, and computational linguistics, use a combination of automated and semi-automated tools to analyze the content of text corpora. Keywords, named entities, and events are often extracted automatically as the first step in the analysis. Concordancing -- or the arranging of passages of a textual corpus in alphabetical order according to user-defined keywords -- is one of the oldest and still most widely used forms of text analysis. This paper describes Multi-Mosaics, a tool for corpus analysis using multiple implicitly linked Concordance Mosaic visualisations. Multi-Mosaics supports examining linguistic relationships within the context windows surrounding extracted keywords.
summary: Researchers working in areas such as lexicography, translation studies, and computational linguistics, use a combination of automated and semi-automated tools to analyze the content of text corpora. Keywords, named entities, and events are often extracted automatically as the first step in the analysis. Concordancing -- or the arranging of passages of a textual corpus in alphabetical order according to user-defined keywords -- is one of the oldest and still most widely used forms of text analysis. This paper describes Multi-Mosaics, a tool for corpus analysis using multiple implicitly linked Concordance Mosaic visualisations. Multi-Mosaics supports examining linguistic relationships within the context windows surrounding extracted keywords.
abstract_zh: 词典编纂、翻译研究和计算语言学等领域的研究人员使用自动化和半自动化工具的组合来分析文本语料库的内容。作为分析的第一步，通常会自动提取关键字、命名实体和事件。索引（或者根据用户定义的关键字按字母顺序排列文本语料库的段落）是最古老且仍然最广泛使用的文本分析形式之一。本文介绍了 Multi-Mosaics，这是一种使用多个隐式链接的 Concordance Mosaic 可视化进行语料库分析的工具。多马赛克支持检查提取的关键字周围的上下文窗口内的语言关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Multi-Mosaics工具，通过多个隐式链接的Concordance Mosaic可视化技术，支持语料库的总结与探索，重点分析关键词上下文中的语言关系。
AI.motivation: 传统语料库分析工具在处理复杂语言关系时存在可视化不足的问题，需更直观的方法探索关键词上下文及语义关联。
AI.method: 开发Multi-Mosaics工具，整合多个动态链接的Concordance Mosaic可视化模块，通过上下文窗口展示关键词的分布与语言模式。
AI.result: 该工具有效支持研究者在语料库中发现隐含的语言关系，提升关键词上下文分析的效率与深度。
AI.conclusion: Multi-Mosaics通过多维可视化增强了语料库分析能力，为语言学研究提供了新的探索视角与实用工具。

authors_text: Junho Kim,Inwoo Hwang,Young Min Kim
title: Ev-TTA: Test-Time Adaptation for Event-Based Object Recognition
title_zh: Ev-TTA：基于事件的对象识别的测试时适应
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022
abstract: We introduce Ev-TTA, a simple, effective test-time adaptation algorithm for event-based object recognition. While event cameras are proposed to provide measurements of scenes with fast motions or drastic illumination changes, many existing event-based recognition algorithms suffer from performance deterioration under extreme conditions due to significant domain shifts. Ev-TTA mitigates the severe domain gaps by fine-tuning the pre-trained classifiers during the test phase using loss functions inspired by the spatio-temporal characteristics of events. Since the event data is a temporal stream of measurements, our loss function enforces similar predictions for adjacent events to quickly adapt to the changed environment online. Also, we utilize the spatial correlations between two polarities of events to handle noise under extreme illumination, where different polarities of events exhibit distinctive noise distributions. Ev-TTA demonstrates a large amount of performance gain on a wide range of event-based object recognition tasks without extensive additional training. Our formulation can be successfully applied regardless of input representations and further extended into regression tasks. We expect Ev-TTA to provide the key technique to deploy event-based vision algorithms in challenging real-world applications where significant domain shift is inevitable.
summary: We introduce Ev-TTA, a simple, effective test-time adaptation algorithm for event-based object recognition. While event cameras are proposed to provide measurements of scenes with fast motions or drastic illumination changes, many existing event-based recognition algorithms suffer from performance deterioration under extreme conditions due to significant domain shifts. Ev-TTA mitigates the severe domain gaps by fine-tuning the pre-trained classifiers during the test phase using loss functions inspired by the spatio-temporal characteristics of events. Since the event data is a temporal stream of measurements, our loss function enforces similar predictions for adjacent events to quickly adapt to the changed environment online. Also, we utilize the spatial correlations between two polarities of events to handle noise under extreme illumination, where different polarities of events exhibit distinctive noise distributions. Ev-TTA demonstrates a large amount of performance gain on a wide range of event-based object recognition tasks without extensive additional training. Our formulation can be successfully applied regardless of input representations and further extended into regression tasks. We expect Ev-TTA to provide the key technique to deploy event-based vision algorithms in challenging real-world applications where significant domain shift is inevitable.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 Ev-TTA，一种简单、有效的测试时适应算法，用于基于事件的对象识别。虽然事件相机被提出来提供快速运动或剧烈照明变化的场景的测量，但许多现有的基于事件的识别算法在极端条件下由于显着的域偏移而遭受性能恶化。 Ev-TTA 通过在测试阶段使用受事件时空特征启发的损失函数微调预训练的分类器来缓解严重的域差距。由于事件数据是测量的时间流，因此我们的损失函数对相邻事件强制执行类似的预测，以快速适应在线变化的环境。此外，我们利用事件的两种极性之间的空间相关性来处理极端照明下的噪声，其中不同极性的事件表现出独特的噪声分布。 Ev-TTA 在各种基于事件的对象识别任务上展示了巨大的性能提升，而无需进行大量的额外培训。无论输入表示如何，我们的公式都可以成功应用，并进一步扩展到回归任务。我们期望 Ev-TTA 提供关键技术，在具有挑战性的现实世界应用中部署基于事件的视觉算法，在这些应用中，重大领域转移是不可避免的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Ev-TTA算法，通过测试时微调解决事件相机在极端条件下因领域偏移导致的物体识别性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 事件相机在高速运动或光照剧烈变化场景中易出现领域偏移，现有算法难以适应极端环境下的噪声和动态变化。
AI.method: 设计基于事件时空特性的损失函数，在测试阶段微调分类器；利用事件极性间空间相关性处理极端光照噪声，无需额外训练。
AI.result: 在多种事件相机物体识别任务中显著提升性能，适用于不同输入表示并可扩展至回归任务。
AI.conclusion: Ev-TTA为部署事件视觉算法提供了关键技术，可有效应对实际应用中不可避免的领域偏移挑战。
