authors_text: Karn N. Watcharasupat,Sureenate Jaratjarungkiat,Bhan Lam,Sujinat Jitwiriyanont,Kanyanut Akaratham,Kenneth Ooi,Zhen-Ting Ong,Titima Suthiwan,Nitipong Pichetpan,Monthita Rojtinnakorn,Woon-Seng Gan
title: Quantitative Evaluation Approach for Translation of Perceptual Soundscape Attributes: Initial Application to the Thai Language
title_zh: 感知音景属性翻译的定量评估方法：在泰语中的初步应用
comment: Under review for Applied Acoustics (Special Issue on Soundscape Attributes Translation: Current Projects and Challenges)
comments: Under review for Applied Acoustics (Special Issue on Soundscape Attributes Translation: Current Projects and Challenges)
abstract: Translation of perceptual soundscape attributes from one language to another remains a challenging task that requires a high degree of fidelity in both psychoacoustic and psycholinguistic senses across the target population. Due to the inherently subjective nature of human perception, translating soundscape attributes using only small focus group discussion or expert panels could lead to translations with psycholinguistic meanings that, in a non-expert setting, deviate or distort from that of the source language. In this work, we present a quantitative evaluation method based on the circumplex model of soundscape perception to assess the overall translation quality across a set of criteria. As an initial application domain, we demonstrated the use of the quantitative evaluation framework in the context of an English-to-Thai translation of soundscape attributes.
summary: Translation of perceptual soundscape attributes from one language to another remains a challenging task that requires a high degree of fidelity in both psychoacoustic and psycholinguistic senses across the target population. Due to the inherently subjective nature of human perception, translating soundscape attributes using only small focus group discussion or expert panels could lead to translations with psycholinguistic meanings that, in a non-expert setting, deviate or distort from that of the source language. In this work, we present a quantitative evaluation method based on the circumplex model of soundscape perception to assess the overall translation quality across a set of criteria. As an initial application domain, we demonstrated the use of the quantitative evaluation framework in the context of an English-to-Thai translation of soundscape attributes.
abstract_zh: 将感知音景属性从一种语言翻译成另一种语言仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要目标人群的心理声学和心理语言学意义上的高度保真度。由于人类感知固有的主观性，仅使用小型焦点小组讨论或专家小组来翻译音景属性可能会导致翻译具有心理语言学含义，在非专家环境中，该翻译会偏离或扭曲源语言的含义。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于声景感知环绕模型的定量评估方法，以评估一组标准的整体翻译质量。作为最初的应用领域，我们演示了在音景属性的英语到泰语翻译的背景下使用定量评估框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于声景感知圆周模型的定量评估方法，用于评估跨语言翻译中感知声景属性的质量，并首次应用于英语到泰语的翻译场景。
AI.motivation: 声景属性翻译存在主观性强、依赖专家判断的局限性，传统方法难以确保非专家群体对翻译结果的心理声学和心理语言学意义的准确性。
AI.method: 构建基于声景感知圆周模型的定量评估框架，通过多维指标体系对翻译结果进行系统化质量评估。
AI.result: 验证了该框架在英语-泰语声景属性翻译中的可行性，为跨语言翻译质量评估提供了可量化的方法论支持。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效识别翻译偏差，为多语言声景研究提供可靠评估工具，后续需扩大语料库和测试语言范围以增强普适性。

authors_text: Qiushan Guo,Yao Mu,Jianyu Chen,Tianqi Wang,Yizhou Yu,Ping Luo
title: Scale-Equivalent Distillation for Semi-Supervised Object Detection
title_zh: 用于半监督目标检测的尺度等效蒸馏
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2022
abstract: Recent Semi-Supervised Object Detection (SS-OD) methods are mainly based on self-training, i.e., generating hard pseudo-labels by a teacher model on unlabeled data as supervisory signals. Although they achieved certain success, the limited labeled data in semi-supervised learning scales up the challenges of object detection. We analyze the challenges these methods meet with the empirical experiment results. We find that the massive False Negative samples and inferior localization precision lack consideration. Besides, the large variance of object sizes and class imbalance (i.e., the extreme ratio between background and object) hinder the performance of prior arts. Further, we overcome these challenges by introducing a novel approach, Scale-Equivalent Distillation (SED), which is a simple yet effective end-to-end knowledge distillation framework robust to large object size variance and class imbalance. SED has several appealing benefits compared to the previous works. (1) SED imposes a consistency regularization to handle the large scale variance problem. (2) SED alleviates the noise problem from the False Negative samples and inferior localization precision. (3) A re-weighting strategy can implicitly screen the potential foreground regions of the unlabeled data to reduce the effect of class imbalance. Extensive experiments show that SED consistently outperforms the recent state-of-the-art methods on different datasets with significant margins. For example, it surpasses the supervised counterpart by more than 10 mAP when using 5% and 10% labeled data on MS-COCO.
summary: Recent Semi-Supervised Object Detection (SS-OD) methods are mainly based on self-training, i.e., generating hard pseudo-labels by a teacher model on unlabeled data as supervisory signals. Although they achieved certain success, the limited labeled data in semi-supervised learning scales up the challenges of object detection. We analyze the challenges these methods meet with the empirical experiment results. We find that the massive False Negative samples and inferior localization precision lack consideration. Besides, the large variance of object sizes and class imbalance (i.e., the extreme ratio between background and object) hinder the performance of prior arts. Further, we overcome these challenges by introducing a novel approach, Scale-Equivalent Distillation (SED), which is a simple yet effective end-to-end knowledge distillation framework robust to large object size variance and class imbalance. SED has several appealing benefits compared to the previous works. (1) SED imposes a consistency regularization to handle the large scale variance problem. (2) SED alleviates the noise problem from the False Negative samples and inferior localization precision. (3) A re-weighting strategy can implicitly screen the potential foreground regions of the unlabeled data to reduce the effect of class imbalance. Extensive experiments show that SED consistently outperforms the recent state-of-the-art methods on different datasets with significant margins. For example, it surpasses the supervised counterpart by more than 10 mAP when using 5% and 10% labeled data on MS-COCO.
abstract_zh: 最近的半监督目标检测（SS-OD）方法主要基于自训练，即通过教师模型在未标记数据上生成硬伪标签作为监督信号。尽管他们取得了一定的成功，但半监督学习中有限的标记数据加大了目标检测的挑战。我们通过实证实验结果分析了这些方法所面临的挑战。我们发现大量的假阴性样本和较差的定位精度缺乏考虑。此外，对象尺寸的巨大变化和类别不平衡（即背景和对象之间的极端比例）阻碍了现有技术的性能。此外，我们通过引入一种新颖的方法来克服这些挑战，即尺度等效蒸馏（SED），这是一种简单而有效的端到端知识蒸馏框架，对大的对象大小方差和类不平衡具有鲁棒性。与之前的作品相比，SED 有几个吸引人的优点。 (1) SED 施加一致性正则化来处理大规模方差问题。 (2) SED 缓解了 False Negative 样本带来的噪声问题和较差的定位精度。 （3）重新加权策略可以隐式筛选未标记数据的潜在前景区域，以减少类别不平衡的影响。大量实验表明，SED 在不同数据集上始终优于最新的最先进方法，并且具有显着优势。例如，当在 MS-COCO 上使用 5% 和 10% 的标记数据时，它比监督对应的 mAP 超过 10 mAP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Scale-Equivalent Distillation (SED)的半监督目标检测方法，旨在解决现有方法在有限标注数据下的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督目标检测方法在处理大规模物体尺寸差异、类别不平衡、伪标签噪声（如假阴性样本和定位误差）时表现不足，限制了检测性能。
AI.method: SED通过一致性正则化缓解尺寸差异，采用重加权策略减少类别不平衡影响，并通过噪声抑制机制处理伪标签误差，形成端到端的知识蒸馏框架。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO数据集上，SED在5%和10%标注数据下分别超过监督方法10 mAP以上，显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SED通过多维度优化有效解决了半监督目标检测的核心挑战，为低标注数据场景提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: JuSong Kim
title: A Method of Data Augmentation to Train a Small Area Fingerprint Recognition Deep Neural Network with a Normal Fingerprint Database
title_zh: 一种用普通指纹数据库训练小面积指纹识别深度神经网络的数据增强方法
abstract: Fingerprints are popular among the biometric based systems due to ease of acquisition, uniqueness and availability. Nowadays it is used in smart phone security, digital payment and digital locker. The traditional fingerprint matching methods based on minutiae are mainly applicable for large-area fingerprint and the accuracy rate would reduce significantly when dealing with small-area fingerprint from smart phone. There are many attempts to using deep learning for small-area fingerprint recognition, and there are many successes. But training deep neural network needs a lot of datasets for training. There is no well-known dataset for small-area, so we have to make datasets ourselves. In this paper, we propose a method of data augmentation to train a small-area fingerprint recognition deep neural network with a normal fingerprint database (such as FVC2002) and verify it via tests. The experimental results showed the efficiency of our method.
summary: Fingerprints are popular among the biometric based systems due to ease of acquisition, uniqueness and availability. Nowadays it is used in smart phone security, digital payment and digital locker. The traditional fingerprint matching methods based on minutiae are mainly applicable for large-area fingerprint and the accuracy rate would reduce significantly when dealing with small-area fingerprint from smart phone. There are many attempts to using deep learning for small-area fingerprint recognition, and there are many successes. But training deep neural network needs a lot of datasets for training. There is no well-known dataset for small-area, so we have to make datasets ourselves. In this paper, we propose a method of data augmentation to train a small-area fingerprint recognition deep neural network with a normal fingerprint database (such as FVC2002) and verify it via tests. The experimental results showed the efficiency of our method.
abstract_zh: 由于易于获取、唯一性和可用性，指纹在基于生物识别的系统中很受欢迎。如今它被用于智能手机安全、数字支付和数字储物柜。传统的基于细节点的指纹匹配方法主要适用于大面积指纹，在处理智能手机的小面积指纹时，准确率会明显降低。利用深度学习进行小面积指纹识别的尝试有很多，也有很多成功的案例。但训练深度神经网络需要大量的数据集进行训练。小区域没有知名的数据集，所以我们必须自己制作数据集。在本文中，我们提出了一种数据增强方法，用普通指纹数据库（例如FVC2002）训练小面积指纹识别深度神经网络，并通过测试进行验证。实验结果表明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据增强方法，利用常规指纹数据库训练小区域指纹识别深度神经网络。
AI.motivation: 传统指纹匹配方法在小区域指纹（如智能手机采集）上准确率显著下降，且缺乏专用小区域数据集导致深度学习模型训练困难。
AI.method: 通过数据增强技术对常规指纹数据库（如FVC2002）进行处理，生成适用于小区域指纹识别的训练数据。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在小区域指纹识别任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法成功解决了小区域指纹识别中数据集不足的问题，为相关研究提供了可行方案。

search_text: A Method of Data Augmentation to Train a Small Area Fingerprint Recognition Deep Neural Network with a Normal Fingerprint Database 一种用普通指纹数据库训练小面积指纹识别深度神经网络的数据增强方法 Fingerprints are popular among the biometric based systems due to ease of acquisition, uniqueness and availability. Nowadays it is used in smart phone security, digital payment and digital locker. The traditional fingerprint matching methods based on minutiae are mainly applicable for large-area fingerprint and the accuracy rate would reduce significantly when dealing with small-area fingerprint from smart phone. There are many attempts to using deep learning for small-area fingerprint recognition, and there are many successes. But training deep neural network needs a lot of datasets for training. There is no well-known dataset for small-area, so we have to make datasets ourselves. In this paper, we propose a method of data augmentation to train a small-area fingerprint recognition deep neural network with a normal fingerprint database (such as FVC2002) and verify it via tests. The experimental results showed the efficiency of our method. 由于易于获取、唯一性和可用性，指纹在基于生物识别的系统中很受欢迎。如今它被用于智能手机安全、数字支付和数字储物柜。传统的基于细节点的指纹匹配方法主要适用于大面积指纹，在处理智能手机的小面积指纹时，准确率会明显降低。利用深度学习进行小面积指纹识别的尝试有很多，也有很多成功的案例。但训练深度神经网络需要大量的数据集进行训练。小区域没有知名的数据集，所以我们必须自己制作数据集。在本文中，我们提出了一种数据增强方法，用普通指纹数据库（例如FVC2002）训练小面积指纹识别深度神经网络，并通过测试进行验证。实验结果表明了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出一种数据增强方法，利用常规指纹数据库训练小区域指纹识别深度神经网络。 JuSong Kim cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yu Xiang,Yu Huang,Haodong Xu,Guangbo Zhang,Wenyong Wang
title: A Multi-Characteristic Learning Method with Micro-Doppler Signatures for Pedestrian Identification
title_zh: 一种用于行人识别的微多普勒特征多特征学习方法
abstract: The identification of pedestrians using radar micro-Doppler signatures has become a hot topic in recent years. In this paper, we propose a multi-characteristic learning (MCL) model with clusters to jointly learn discrepant pedestrian micro-Doppler signatures and fuse the knowledge learned from each cluster into final decisions. Time-Doppler spectrogram (TDS) and signal statistical features extracted from FMCW radar, as two categories of micro-Doppler signatures, are used in MCL to learn the micro-motion information inside pedestrians' free walking patterns. The experimental results show that our model achieves a higher accuracy rate and is more stable for pedestrian identification than other studies, which make our model more practical.
summary: The identification of pedestrians using radar micro-Doppler signatures has become a hot topic in recent years. In this paper, we propose a multi-characteristic learning (MCL) model with clusters to jointly learn discrepant pedestrian micro-Doppler signatures and fuse the knowledge learned from each cluster into final decisions. Time-Doppler spectrogram (TDS) and signal statistical features extracted from FMCW radar, as two categories of micro-Doppler signatures, are used in MCL to learn the micro-motion information inside pedestrians' free walking patterns. The experimental results show that our model achieves a higher accuracy rate and is more stable for pedestrian identification than other studies, which make our model more practical.
abstract_zh: 利用雷达微多普勒特征识别行人已成为近年来的热门话题。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有集群的多特征学习（MCL）模型，可以共同学习不同的行人微多普勒特征，并将从每个集群学到的知识融合到最终决策中。 MCL 使用时间多普勒频谱图 (TDS) 和从 FMCW 雷达提取的信号统计特征作为两类微多普勒特征来学习行人自由行走模式内的微运动信息。实验结果表明，与其他研究相比，我们的模型在行人识别方面取得了更高的准确率，并且更加稳定，这使得我们的模型更加实用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于微多普勒特征的多特征学习模型（MCL），用于提升行人识别的准确率和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有行人识别方法在处理复杂微多普勒特征时存在准确率不足和稳定性差的问题，需融合多特征信息以提高识别效果。
AI.method: 设计多特征学习模型（MCL），结合时多普勒谱图（TDS）与FMCW雷达统计特征，通过聚类联合学习不同微运动模式并融合知识。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在行人识别任务中达到更高准确率且稳定性优于现有方法，具备实际应用价值。
AI.conclusion: MCL模型通过多特征融合有效提升了行人识别性能，为雷达微多普勒分析提供了更可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Jinqiang Wang,Tao Zhu,Liming Chen,Huansheng Ning,Yaping Wan
title: Negative Selection by Clustering for Contrastive Learning in Human Activity Recognition
title_zh: 人类活动识别中对比学习的聚类负选择
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures
comments: 11 pages, 5 figures
abstract: Contrastive learning has been applied to Human Activity Recognition (HAR) based on sensor data owing to its ability to achieve performance comparable to supervised learning with a large amount of unlabeled data and a small amount of labeled data. The pre-training task for contrastive learning is generally instance discrimination, which specifies that each instance belongs to a single class, but this will consider the same class of samples as negative examples. Such a pre-training task is not conducive to human activity recognition tasks, which are mainly classification tasks. To address this problem, we follow SimCLR to propose a new contrastive learning framework that negative selection by clustering in HAR, which is called ClusterCLHAR. Compared with SimCLR, it redefines the negative pairs in the contrastive loss function by using unsupervised clustering methods to generate soft labels that mask other samples of the same cluster to avoid regarding them as negative samples. We evaluate ClusterCLHAR on three benchmark datasets, USC-HAD, MotionSense, and UCI-HAR, using mean F1-score as the evaluation metric. The experiment results show that it outperforms all the state-of-the-art methods applied to HAR in self-supervised learning and semi-supervised learning.
summary: Contrastive learning has been applied to Human Activity Recognition (HAR) based on sensor data owing to its ability to achieve performance comparable to supervised learning with a large amount of unlabeled data and a small amount of labeled data. The pre-training task for contrastive learning is generally instance discrimination, which specifies that each instance belongs to a single class, but this will consider the same class of samples as negative examples. Such a pre-training task is not conducive to human activity recognition tasks, which are mainly classification tasks. To address this problem, we follow SimCLR to propose a new contrastive learning framework that negative selection by clustering in HAR, which is called ClusterCLHAR. Compared with SimCLR, it redefines the negative pairs in the contrastive loss function by using unsupervised clustering methods to generate soft labels that mask other samples of the same cluster to avoid regarding them as negative samples. We evaluate ClusterCLHAR on three benchmark datasets, USC-HAD, MotionSense, and UCI-HAR, using mean F1-score as the evaluation metric. The experiment results show that it outperforms all the state-of-the-art methods applied to HAR in self-supervised learning and semi-supervised learning.
abstract_zh: 对比学习已被应用于基于传感器数据的人类活动识别（HAR），因为它能够在大量未标记数据和少量标记数据的情况下实现与监督学习相当的性能。对比学习的预训练任务一般是实例判别，即指定每个实例属于单个类，但这会将同一类样本视为反例。这样的预训练任务不利于人类活动识别任务，而人类活动识别任务主要是分类任务。为了解决这个问题，我们遵循SimCLR提出了一种新的HAR中通过聚类负选择的对比学习框架，称为ClusterCLHAR。与SimCLR相比，它通过使用无监督聚类方法重新定义对比损失函数中的负对，生成软标签，屏蔽同一簇的其他样本，以避免将其视为负样本。我们使用平均 F1 分数作为评估指标，在三个基准数据集 USC-HAD、MotionSense 和 UCI-HAR 上评估 ClusterCLHAR。实验结果表明，它在自监督学习和半监督学习方面优于所有应用于 HAR 的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于聚类的负样本选择方法ClusterCLHAR，用于改进对比学习在人体活动识别（HAR）中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习的实例区分任务将同类样本视为负样本，这与HAR的分类任务需求冲突，导致预训练效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过无监督聚类生成软标签，重新定义对比损失函数中的负样本对，屏蔽同一聚类内的样本作为负样本。
AI.result: 在USC-HAD、MotionSense和UCI-HAR三个数据集上，ClusterCLHAR的平均F1分数优于现有自监督和半监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 聚类驱动的负样本选择有效提升了对比学习在HAR中的分类性能，验证了方法的优越性。

authors_text: Ze Yang,Chi Zhang,Ruibo Li,Yi Xu,Guosheng Lin
title: Efficient Few-Shot Object Detection via Knowledge Inheritance
title_zh: 通过知识继承进行高效的少样本目标检测
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP). Codes are available at https://github.com/Ze-Yang/Efficient-FSOD
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP). Codes are available at https://github.com/Ze-Yang/Efficient-FSOD
abstract: Few-shot object detection (FSOD), which aims at learning a generic detector that can adapt to unseen tasks with scarce training samples, has witnessed consistent improvement recently. However, most existing methods ignore the efficiency issues, e.g., high computational complexity and slow adaptation speed. Notably, efficiency has become an increasingly important evaluation metric for few-shot techniques due to an emerging trend toward embedded AI. To this end, we present an efficient pretrain-transfer framework (PTF) baseline with no computational increment, which achieves comparable results with previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods. Upon this baseline, we devise an initializer named knowledge inheritance (KI) to reliably initialize the novel weights for the box classifier, which effectively facilitates the knowledge transfer process and boosts the adaptation speed. Within the KI initializer, we propose an adaptive length re-scaling (ALR) strategy to alleviate the vector length inconsistency between the predicted novel weights and the pretrained base weights. Finally, our approach not only achieves the SOTA results across three public benchmarks, i.e., PASCAL VOC, COCO and LVIS, but also exhibits high efficiency with 1.8-100x faster adaptation speed against the other methods on COCO/LVIS benchmark during few-shot transfer. To our best knowledge, this is the first work to consider the efficiency problem in FSOD. We hope to motivate a trend toward powerful yet efficient few-shot technique development. The codes are publicly available at https://github.com/Ze-Yang/Efficient-FSOD.
summary: Few-shot object detection (FSOD), which aims at learning a generic detector that can adapt to unseen tasks with scarce training samples, has witnessed consistent improvement recently. However, most existing methods ignore the efficiency issues, e.g., high computational complexity and slow adaptation speed. Notably, efficiency has become an increasingly important evaluation metric for few-shot techniques due to an emerging trend toward embedded AI. To this end, we present an efficient pretrain-transfer framework (PTF) baseline with no computational increment, which achieves comparable results with previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods. Upon this baseline, we devise an initializer named knowledge inheritance (KI) to reliably initialize the novel weights for the box classifier, which effectively facilitates the knowledge transfer process and boosts the adaptation speed. Within the KI initializer, we propose an adaptive length re-scaling (ALR) strategy to alleviate the vector length inconsistency between the predicted novel weights and the pretrained base weights. Finally, our approach not only achieves the SOTA results across three public benchmarks, i.e., PASCAL VOC, COCO and LVIS, but also exhibits high efficiency with 1.8-100x faster adaptation speed against the other methods on COCO/LVIS benchmark during few-shot transfer. To our best knowledge, this is the first work to consider the efficiency problem in FSOD. We hope to motivate a trend toward powerful yet efficient few-shot technique development. The codes are publicly available at https://github.com/Ze-Yang/Efficient-FSOD.
abstract_zh: 少镜头目标检测（FSOD）旨在学习一种通用检测器，能够适应训练样本稀缺的未知任务，最近取得了持续的进步。然而，大多数现有方法忽略了效率问题，例如计算复杂度高和适应速度慢。值得注意的是，由于嵌入式人工智能的新兴趋势，效率已成为小样本技术越来越重要的评估指标。为此，我们提出了一种无需计算增量的高效预训练传输框架（PTF）基线，其结果与之前最先进的（SOTA）方法相当。在此基础上，我们设计了一个名为知识继承（KI）的初始化器来可靠地初始化框分类器的新权重，这有效地促进了知识转移过程并提高了适应速度。在 KI 初始化器中，我们提出了一种自适应长度重新缩放（ALR）策略，以减轻预测的新权重和预训练的基本权重之间的向量长度不一致。最后，我们的方法不仅在三个公共基准（即 PASCAL VOC、COCO 和 LVIS）上实现了 SOTA 结果，而且在少样本传输期间在 COCO/LVIS 基准上表现出高效率，自适应速度比其他方法快 1.8-100 倍。据我们所知，这是第一个考虑 FSOD 效率问题的工作。我们希望推动强大而高效的小样本技术开发的趋势。这些代码可在 https://github.com/Ze-Yang/Efficient-FSOD 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的少样本目标检测方法，通过知识继承机制解决计算复杂度高和适应速度慢的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本目标检测方法忽视了计算效率问题，而嵌入式AI的发展使效率成为关键评价指标。
AI.method: 设计了无计算增量的预训练-迁移框架（PTF），提出知识继承（KI）初始化器和自适应长度重缩放（ALR）策略，优化新型权重初始化过程。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC、COCO和LVIS三个基准测试中达到SOTA性能，且在COCO/LVIS上适应速度比其他方法快1.8-100倍。
AI.conclusion: 首次在少样本目标检测中考虑效率问题，为开发高效且强大的少样本技术提供新方向。

authors_text: Darryl Roman,Noah Ari,Johnathan Mell
title: The Harmony Index: a Utilitarian Metric for Measuring Effectiveness in Mixed-Skill Teams
title_zh: 和谐指数：衡量混合技能团队有效性的实用指标
comment: 6 pages. 5 figures. Appears in Proceedings of the AAAI SSS-22 Symposium `Closing the Assessment Loop: Communicating Proficiency and Intent in Human-Robot Teaming`
comments: 6 pages. 5 figures. Appears in Proceedings of the AAAI SSS-22 Symposium `Closing the Assessment Loop: Communicating Proficiency and Intent in Human-Robot Teaming`
abstract: As teamwork becomes ever-more important in a new age of remote work, it is critical to develop metrics to quantitatively evaluate how effective teams are. This is especially true with mixed-modality teams, such as those that include a human and an agent or human and robot. We propose a novel utilitarian metric, the Harmony Index, which quantifies the effectiveness of team members by classifying them into four sub-types based on the result of their teaming on overall effectiveness. This index is evaluated using a real-world dataset of over 1 million interactions, and potential future uses of this index are explored in the realm of team science.
summary: As teamwork becomes ever-more important in a new age of remote work, it is critical to develop metrics to quantitatively evaluate how effective teams are. This is especially true with mixed-modality teams, such as those that include a human and an agent or human and robot. We propose a novel utilitarian metric, the Harmony Index, which quantifies the effectiveness of team members by classifying them into four sub-types based on the result of their teaming on overall effectiveness. This index is evaluated using a real-world dataset of over 1 million interactions, and potential future uses of this index are explored in the realm of team science.
abstract_zh: 随着团队合作在远程工作的新时代变得越来越重要，制定指标来定量评估团队的效率至关重要。对于混合模式团队尤其如此，例如包含人类和代理或人类和机器人的团队。我们提出了一种新颖的功利主义指标，即和谐指数，它根据团队成员整体效率的结果将团队成员分为四个子类型，从而量化团队成员的效率。该指数使用超过 100 万次交互的真实数据集进行评估，并在团队科学领域探索该指数未来的潜在用途。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为和谐指数的效用指标，用于量化评估混合技能团队（如人机协作团队）的有效性。
AI.motivation: 随着远程工作普及，团队协作愈发重要，尤其需要量化评估混合模态团队（如人与智能体/机器人协作）的效果，现有方法存在不足。
AI.method: 基于实际数据集（超100万次互动），将团队成员按对整体效果的贡献分为四类，构建和谐指数模型进行评估。
AI.result: 验证了和谐指数的有效性，并探讨了其在团队科学领域优化团队构成与协作策略的潜在应用。
AI.conclusion: 和谐指数为混合技能团队效果评估提供新工具，有助于推动团队科学领域的发展与实践应用。

authors_text: Qinqin Zhou,Kekai Sheng,Xiawu Zheng,Ke Li,Xing Sun,Yonghong Tian,Jie Chen,Rongrong Ji
title: Training-free Transformer Architecture Search
title_zh: 免培训 Transformer 架构搜索
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022
abstract: Recently, Vision Transformer (ViT) has achieved remarkable success in several computer vision tasks. The progresses are highly relevant to the architecture design, then it is worthwhile to propose Transformer Architecture Search (TAS) to search for better ViTs automatically. However, current TAS methods are time-consuming and existing zero-cost proxies in CNN do not generalize well to the ViT search space according to our experimental observations. In this paper, for the first time, we investigate how to conduct TAS in a training-free manner and devise an effective training-free TAS (TF-TAS) scheme. Firstly, we observe that the properties of multi-head self-attention (MSA) and multi-layer perceptron (MLP) in ViTs are quite different and that the synaptic diversity of MSA affects the performance notably. Secondly, based on the observation, we devise a modular strategy in TF-TAS that evaluates and ranks ViT architectures from two theoretical perspectives: synaptic diversity and synaptic saliency, termed as DSS-indicator. With DSS-indicator, evaluation results are strongly correlated with the test accuracies of ViT models. Experimental results demonstrate that our TF-TAS achieves a competitive performance against the state-of-the-art manually or automatically design ViT architectures, and it promotes the searching efficiency in ViT search space greatly: from about $24$ GPU days to less than $0.5$ GPU days. Moreover, the proposed DSS-indicator outperforms the existing cutting-edge zero-cost approaches (e.g., TE-score and NASWOT).
summary: Recently, Vision Transformer (ViT) has achieved remarkable success in several computer vision tasks. The progresses are highly relevant to the architecture design, then it is worthwhile to propose Transformer Architecture Search (TAS) to search for better ViTs automatically. However, current TAS methods are time-consuming and existing zero-cost proxies in CNN do not generalize well to the ViT search space according to our experimental observations. In this paper, for the first time, we investigate how to conduct TAS in a training-free manner and devise an effective training-free TAS (TF-TAS) scheme. Firstly, we observe that the properties of multi-head self-attention (MSA) and multi-layer perceptron (MLP) in ViTs are quite different and that the synaptic diversity of MSA affects the performance notably. Secondly, based on the observation, we devise a modular strategy in TF-TAS that evaluates and ranks ViT architectures from two theoretical perspectives: synaptic diversity and synaptic saliency, termed as DSS-indicator. With DSS-indicator, evaluation results are strongly correlated with the test accuracies of ViT models. Experimental results demonstrate that our TF-TAS achieves a competitive performance against the state-of-the-art manually or automatically design ViT architectures, and it promotes the searching efficiency in ViT search space greatly: from about $24$ GPU days to less than $0.5$ GPU days. Moreover, the proposed DSS-indicator outperforms the existing cutting-edge zero-cost approaches (e.g., TE-score and NASWOT).
abstract_zh: 最近，Vision Transformer（ViT）在多项计算机视觉任务中取得了显着的成功。 The progresses are highly relevant to the architecture design, then it is worthwhile to propose Transformer Architecture Search (TAS) to search for better ViTs automatically.然而，根据我们的实验观察，当前的 TAS 方法非常耗时，并且 CNN 中现有的零成本代理不能很好地推广到 ViT 搜索空间。 In this paper, for the first time, we investigate how to conduct TAS in a training-free manner and devise an effective training-free TAS (TF-TAS) scheme.首先，我们观察到 ViT 中的多头自注意力（MSA）和多层感知器（MLP）的特性有很大不同，并且 MSA 的突触多样性显着影响性能。其次，基于观察，我们在 TF-TAS 中设计了一种模块化策略，从突触多样性和突触显着性两个理论角度对 ViT 架构进行评估和排名，称为 DSS 指标。使用DSS-indicator，评估结果与ViT模型的测试精度密切相关。实验结果表明，我们的 TF-TAS 实现了与最先进的手动或自动设计的 ViT 架构相比的竞争性能，并且极大地提高了 ViT 搜索空间中的搜索效率：从大约 24 美元 GPU 天到不到 0.5 美元 GPU 天。此外，所提出的 DSS 指标优于现有的尖端零成本方法（例如 TE-score 和 NASWOT）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练的Transformer架构搜索方法（TF-TAS），通过理论指标DSS-indicator高效评估ViT架构。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer架构搜索方法耗时且零成本代理在ViT领域效果不佳，需探索更高效的训练免费搜索方案。
AI.method: 基于MSA突触多样性与显著性理论设计DSS-indicator，从两个理论维度评估并排序ViT架构。
AI.result: 搜索效率提升至0.5 GPU天（原24 GPU天），DSS指标优于TE-score和NASWOT等现有零成本方法。
AI.conclusion: TF-TAS在保持性能竞争力的同时显著提升搜索效率，为ViT架构设计提供新范式。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练的Transformer架构搜索方法（TF-TAS），通过理论指标DSS-indicator高效评估ViT架构。
ai_content.motivation: 现有Transformer架构搜索方法耗时且零成本代理在ViT领域效果不佳，需探索更高效的训练免费搜索方案。

search_text: Training-free Transformer Architecture Search 免培训 Transformer 架构搜索 Recently, Vision Transformer (ViT) has achieved remarkable success in several computer vision tasks. The progresses are highly relevant to the architecture design, then it is worthwhile to propose Transformer Architecture Search (TAS) to search for better ViTs automatically. However, current TAS methods are time-consuming and existing zero-cost proxies in CNN do not generalize well to the ViT search space according to our experimental observations. In this paper, for the first time, we investigate how to conduct TAS in a training-free manner and devise an effective training-free TAS (TF-TAS) scheme. Firstly, we observe that the properties of multi-head self-attention (MSA) and multi-layer perceptron (MLP) in ViTs are quite different and that the synaptic diversity of MSA affects the performance notably. Secondly, based on the observation, we devise a modular strategy in TF-TAS that evaluates and ranks ViT architectures from two theoretical perspectives: synaptic diversity and synaptic saliency, termed as DSS-indicator. With DSS-indicator, evaluation results are strongly correlated with the test accuracies of ViT models. Experimental results demonstrate that our TF-TAS achieves a competitive performance against the state-of-the-art manually or automatically design ViT architectures, and it promotes the searching efficiency in ViT search space greatly: from about $24$ GPU days to less than $0.5$ GPU days. Moreover, the proposed DSS-indicator outperforms the existing cutting-edge zero-cost approaches (e.g., TE-score and NASWOT). 最近，Vision Transformer（ViT）在多项计算机视觉任务中取得了显着的成功。 The progresses are highly relevant to the architecture design, then it is worthwhile to propose Transformer Architecture Search (TAS) to search for better ViTs automatically.然而，根据我们的实验观察，当前的 TAS 方法非常耗时，并且 CNN 中现有的零成本代理不能很好地推广到 ViT 搜索空间。 In this paper, for the first time, we investigate how to conduct TAS in a training-free manner and devise an effective training-free TAS (TF-TAS) scheme.首先，我们观察到 ViT 中的多头自注意力（MSA）和多层感知器（MLP）的特性有很大不同，并且 MSA 的突触多样性显着影响性能。其次，基于观察，我们在 TF-TAS 中设计了一种模块化策略，从突触多样性和突触显着性两个理论角度对 ViT 架构进行评估和排名，称为 DSS 指标。使用DSS-indicator，评估结果与ViT模型的测试精度密切相关。实验结果表明，我们的 TF-TAS 实现了与最先进的手动或自动设计的 ViT 架构相比的竞争性能，并且极大地提高了 ViT 搜索空间中的搜索效率：从大约 24 美元 GPU 天到不到 0.5 美元 GPU 天。此外，所提出的 DSS 指标优于现有的尖端零成本方法（例如 TE-score 和 NASWOT）。 本文提出一种无需训练的Transformer架构搜索方法（TF-TAS），通过理论指标DSS-indicator高效评估ViT架构。 Qinqin Zhou,Kekai Sheng,Xiawu Zheng,Ke Li,Xing Sun,Yonghong Tian,Jie Chen,Rongrong Ji cs.CV

authors_text: Kerstin Hammernik,Thomas Küstner,Burhaneddin Yaman,Zhengnan Huang,Daniel Rueckert,Florian Knoll,Mehmet Akçakaya
title: Physics-Driven Deep Learning for Computational Magnetic Resonance Imaging
title_zh: 物理驱动的计算磁共振成像深度学习
comment: To appear in IEEE Signal Processing Magazine
comments: To appear in IEEE Signal Processing Magazine
abstract: Physics-driven deep learning methods have emerged as a powerful tool for computational magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) problems, pushing reconstruction performance to new limits. This article provides an overview of the recent developments in incorporating physics information into learning-based MRI reconstruction. We consider inverse problems with both linear and non-linear forward models for computational MRI, and review the classical approaches for solving these. We then focus on physics-driven deep learning approaches, covering physics-driven loss functions, plug-and-play methods, generative models, and unrolled networks. We highlight domain-specific challenges such as real- and complex-valued building blocks of neural networks, and translational applications in MRI with linear and non-linear forward models. Finally, we discuss common issues and open challenges, and draw connections to the importance of physics-driven learning when combined with other downstream tasks in the medical imaging pipeline.
summary: Physics-driven deep learning methods have emerged as a powerful tool for computational magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) problems, pushing reconstruction performance to new limits. This article provides an overview of the recent developments in incorporating physics information into learning-based MRI reconstruction. We consider inverse problems with both linear and non-linear forward models for computational MRI, and review the classical approaches for solving these. We then focus on physics-driven deep learning approaches, covering physics-driven loss functions, plug-and-play methods, generative models, and unrolled networks. We highlight domain-specific challenges such as real- and complex-valued building blocks of neural networks, and translational applications in MRI with linear and non-linear forward models. Finally, we discuss common issues and open challenges, and draw connections to the importance of physics-driven learning when combined with other downstream tasks in the medical imaging pipeline.
abstract_zh: 物理驱动的深度学习方法已成为解决计算磁共振成像 (MRI) 问题的强大工具，将重建性能推向新的极限。本文概述了将物理信息纳入基于学习的 MRI 重建的最新进展。我们考虑计算 MRI 的线性和非线性正向模型的逆问题，并回顾解决这些问题的经典方法。然后，我们专注于物理驱动的深度学习方法，涵盖物理驱动的损失函数、即插即用方法、生成模型和展开网络。我们重点关注特定领域的挑战，例如神经网络的实值和复值构建块，以及线性和非线性前向模型在 MRI 中的转化应用。最后，我们讨论常见问题和开放挑战，并将物理驱动学习与医学成像流程中的其他下游任务相结合时的重要性联系起来。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了将物理信息融入基于学习的MRI重建方法的最新进展，涵盖线性和非线性前向模型的逆问题解决方法。
AI.motivation: 传统MRI重建方法在处理复杂逆问题时存在局限性，需通过结合物理模型提升深度学习方法的准确性与效率。
AI.method: 回顾经典MRI重建方法，重点分析物理驱动的损失函数、即插即用方法、生成模型及展开网络等技术，并讨论神经网络中实数/复数模块及线性/非线性前向模型的应用挑战。
AI.result: 总结了物理驱动方法在MRI重建中的有效性，指出现有技术的共性问题及开放性挑战，并探讨其与医学影像处理下游任务的关联性。
AI.conclusion: 物理驱动的深度学习为MRI重建提供了新方向，未来需进一步结合多任务学习与物理模型优化以提升临床应用价值。

authors_text: Naoki Fujita,Nicolas Chauvet,Andre Roehm,Ryoichi Horisaki,Aohan Li,Mikio Hasegawa,Makoto Naruse
title: Efficient Pairing in Unknown Environments: Minimal Observations and TSP-based Optimization
title_zh: 未知环境中的高效配对：最少的观察和基于 TSP 的优化
abstract: Generating paired sequences with maximal compatibility from a given set is one of the most important challenges in various applications, including information and communication technologies. However, the number of possible pairings explodes in a double factorial order as a function of the number of entities, manifesting the difficulties of finding the optimal pairing that maximizes the overall reward. In the meantime, in real-world systems, such as user pairing in non-orthogonal multiple access (NOMA), pairing often needs to be conducted at high speed in dynamically changing environments; hence, efficient recognition of the environment and finding high reward pairings are highly demanded. In this paper, we demonstrate an efficient pairing algorithm to recognize compatibilities among elements as well as to find a pairing that yields a high total compatibility. The proposed pairing strategy consists of two phases. The first is the observation phase, where compatibility information among elements is obtained by only observing the sum of rewards. We show an efficient strategy that allows obtaining all compatibility information with minimal observations. The minimum number of observations under these conditions is also discussed, along with its mathematical proof. The second is the combination phase, by which a pairing with a large total reward is determined heuristically. We transform the pairing problem into a traveling salesman problem (TSP) in a three-layer graph structure, which we call Pairing-TSP. We demonstrate heuristic algorithms in solving the Pairing-TSP efficiently. This research is expected to be utilized in real-world applications such as NOMA, social networks, among others.
summary: Generating paired sequences with maximal compatibility from a given set is one of the most important challenges in various applications, including information and communication technologies. However, the number of possible pairings explodes in a double factorial order as a function of the number of entities, manifesting the difficulties of finding the optimal pairing that maximizes the overall reward. In the meantime, in real-world systems, such as user pairing in non-orthogonal multiple access (NOMA), pairing often needs to be conducted at high speed in dynamically changing environments; hence, efficient recognition of the environment and finding high reward pairings are highly demanded. In this paper, we demonstrate an efficient pairing algorithm to recognize compatibilities among elements as well as to find a pairing that yields a high total compatibility. The proposed pairing strategy consists of two phases. The first is the observation phase, where compatibility information among elements is obtained by only observing the sum of rewards. We show an efficient strategy that allows obtaining all compatibility information with minimal observations. The minimum number of observations under these conditions is also discussed, along with its mathematical proof. The second is the combination phase, by which a pairing with a large total reward is determined heuristically. We transform the pairing problem into a traveling salesman problem (TSP) in a three-layer graph structure, which we call Pairing-TSP. We demonstrate heuristic algorithms in solving the Pairing-TSP efficiently. This research is expected to be utilized in real-world applications such as NOMA, social networks, among others.
abstract_zh: 从给定的集合中生成具有最大兼容性的配对序列是各种应用（包括信息和通信技术）中最重要的挑战之一。然而，可能的配对数量作为实体数量的函数呈双阶乘阶爆炸式增长，这表明找到最大化总体奖励的最佳配对的困难。同时，在现实系统中，例如非正交多址接入（NOMA）中的用户配对，往往需要在动态变化的环境中高速进行配对；因此，非常需要有效地识别环境并找到高奖励配对。在本文中，我们演示了一种有效的配对算法来识别元素之间的兼容性以及找到产生高总体兼容性的配对。所提出的配对策略包括两个阶段。第一个是观察阶段，仅通过观察奖励之和来获得元素之间的兼容性信息。我们展示了一种有效的策略，可以通过最少的观察来获取所有兼容性信息。还讨论了这些条件下的最小观测数量及其数学证明。第二个是组合阶段，通过该阶段启发式地确定具有大总奖励的配对。我们将配对问题转化为三层图结构中的旅行商问题（TSP），我们称之为 Pairing-TSP。我们演示了有效解决 Pairing-TSP 的启发式算法。这项研究预计将用于现实世界的应用，例如 NOMA、社交网络等。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在未知环境中高效配对的算法，通过最小观察和TSP优化实现高兼容性配对。
AI.motivation: 在现实系统中（如NOMA用户配对），需在动态变化环境中快速识别环境并找到高收益配对，传统方法面临组合爆炸难题。
AI.method: 分两阶段：观察阶段通过最小观察次数获取兼容性信息，组合阶段将配对问题转化为三层图结构的TSP问题（Pairing-TSP）并采用启发式算法求解。
AI.result: 证明了最小观察次数的数学下界，设计了高效配对策略，并通过实验验证其在实际应用中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法可应用于NOMA、社交网络等场景，为动态环境下的高效配对提供了理论支持与实用方案。

We transform the pairing problem into a traveling salesman problem (TSP) in a three-layer graph structure, which we call Pairing-TSP. We demonstrate heuristic algorithms in solving the Pairing-TSP efficiently. This research is expected to be utilized in real-world applications such as NOMA, social networks, among others. 从给定的集合中生成具有最大兼容性的配对序列是各种应用（包括信息和通信技术）中最重要的挑战之一。然而，可能的配对数量作为实体数量的函数呈双阶乘阶爆炸式增长，这表明找到最大化总体奖励的最佳配对的困难。同时，在现实系统中，例如非正交多址接入（NOMA）中的用户配对，往往需要在动态变化的环境中高速进行配对；因此，非常需要有效地识别环境并找到高奖励配对。在本文中，我们演示了一种有效的配对算法来识别元素之间的兼容性以及找到产生高总体兼容性的配对。所提出的配对策略包括两个阶段。第一个是观察阶段，仅通过观察奖励之和来获得元素之间的兼容性信息。我们展示了一种有效的策略，可以通过最少的观察来获取所有兼容性信息。还讨论了这些条件下的最小观测数量及其数学证明。第二个是组合阶段，通过该阶段启发式地确定具有大总奖励的配对。我们将配对问题转化为三层图结构中的旅行商问题（TSP），我们称之为 Pairing-TSP。我们演示了有效解决 Pairing-TSP 的启发式算法。这项研究预计将用于现实世界的应用，例如 NOMA、社交网络等。 本文提出了一种在未知环境中高效配对的算法，通过最小观察和TSP优化实现高兼容性配对。 Naoki Fujita,Nicolas Chauvet,Andre Roehm,Ryoichi Horisaki,Aohan Li,Mikio Hasegawa,Makoto Naruse cs.DS,eess.SY,math.OC

authors_text: Liang Chen,Yong Zhang,Yibing Song,Lingqiao Liu,Jue Wang
title: Self-supervised Learning of Adversarial Example: Towards Good Generalizations for Deepfake Detection
title_zh: 对抗性示例的自监督学习：为 Deepfake 检测提供良好的泛化
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2022 (Oral presentation)
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2022 (Oral presentation)
abstract: Recent studies in deepfake detection have yielded promising results when the training and testing face forgeries are from the same dataset. However, the problem remains challenging when one tries to generalize the detector to forgeries created by unseen methods in the training dataset. This work addresses the generalizable deepfake detection from a simple principle: a generalizable representation should be sensitive to diverse types of forgeries. Following this principle, we propose to enrich the "diversity" of forgeries by synthesizing augmented forgeries with a pool of forgery configurations and strengthen the "sensitivity" to the forgeries by enforcing the model to predict the forgery configurations. To effectively explore the large forgery augmentation space, we further propose to use the adversarial training strategy to dynamically synthesize the most challenging forgeries to the current model. Through extensive experiments, we show that the proposed strategies are surprisingly effective (see Figure 1), and they could achieve superior performance than the current state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/liangchen527/SLADD}.
summary: Recent studies in deepfake detection have yielded promising results when the training and testing face forgeries are from the same dataset. However, the problem remains challenging when one tries to generalize the detector to forgeries created by unseen methods in the training dataset. This work addresses the generalizable deepfake detection from a simple principle: a generalizable representation should be sensitive to diverse types of forgeries. Following this principle, we propose to enrich the "diversity" of forgeries by synthesizing augmented forgeries with a pool of forgery configurations and strengthen the "sensitivity" to the forgeries by enforcing the model to predict the forgery configurations. To effectively explore the large forgery augmentation space, we further propose to use the adversarial training strategy to dynamically synthesize the most challenging forgeries to the current model. Through extensive experiments, we show that the proposed strategies are surprisingly effective (see Figure 1), and they could achieve superior performance than the current state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/liangchen527/SLADD}.
abstract_zh: 当训练和测试人脸伪造来自同一数据集时，深度伪造检测的最新研究取得了有希望的结果。然而，当人们试图将检测器推广到训练数据集中未见过的方法创建的伪造品时，问题仍然具有挑战性。这项工作从一个简单的原则出发解决了可泛化的深度伪造检测：可泛化的表示应该对不同类型的伪造敏感。遵循这一原则，我们建议通过将增强伪造品与伪造品配置池合成来丰富伪造品的“多样性”，并通过强制模型预测伪造品配置来增强对伪造品的“敏感性”。为了有效地探索大型伪造增强空间，我们进一步建议使用对抗性训练策略将最具挑战性的伪造动态合成到当前模型中。通过大量的实验，我们表明所提出的策略非常有效（见图 1），并且它们可以实现比当前最先进的方法更优越的性能。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/liangchen527/SLADD} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督学习方法，通过对抗样本增强深度伪造检测模型的泛化能力，使其能有效检测训练集中未出现的伪造方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测模型在面对训练数据中未出现的伪造方法时泛化能力不足，需提升模型对多样化伪造特征的敏感性和适应性。
AI.method: 通过合成多样化伪造样本增强数据多样性，并强制模型预测伪造配置；结合对抗训练动态生成最具挑战性的伪造样本以提升检测鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，尤其在跨数据集测试中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过自监督学习与对抗训练结合，可有效提升深度伪造检测模型的泛化能力，为应对新型伪造攻击提供新思路。

authors_text: Weicheng Zhu,Carlos Fernandez-Granda,Narges Razavian
title: Interpretable Prediction of Lung Squamous Cell Carcinoma Recurrence With Self-supervised Learning
title_zh: 通过自我监督学习对肺鳞状细胞癌复发的可解释预测
comment: ef:Proceedings of The 5th International Conference on Medical Imaging with Deep Learning, PMLR 172:1504-1522, 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of The 5th International Conference on Medical Imaging with Deep Learning, PMLR 172:1504-1522, 2022
abstract: Lung squamous cell carcinoma (LSCC) has a high recurrence and metastasis rate. Factors influencing recurrence and metastasis are currently unknown and there are no distinct histopathological or morphological features indicating the risks of recurrence and metastasis in LSCC. Our study focuses on the recurrence prediction of LSCC based on H&E-stained histopathological whole-slide images (WSI). Due to the small size of LSCC cohorts in terms of patients with available recurrence information, standard end-to-end learning with various convolutional neural networks for this task tends to overfit. Also, the predictions made by these models are hard to interpret. Histopathology WSIs are typically very large and are therefore processed as a set of smaller tiles. In this work, we propose a novel conditional self-supervised learning (SSL) method to learn representations of WSI at the tile level first, and leverage clustering algorithms to identify the tiles with similar histopathological representations. The resulting representations and clusters from self-supervision are used as features of a survival model for recurrence prediction at the patient level. Using two publicly available datasets from TCGA and CPTAC, we show that our LSCC recurrence prediction survival model outperforms both LSCC pathological stage-based approach and machine learning baselines such as multiple instance learning. The proposed method also enables us to explain the recurrence histopathological risk factors via the derived clusters. This can help pathologists derive new hypotheses regarding morphological features associated with LSCC recurrence.
summary: Lung squamous cell carcinoma (LSCC) has a high recurrence and metastasis rate. Factors influencing recurrence and metastasis are currently unknown and there are no distinct histopathological or morphological features indicating the risks of recurrence and metastasis in LSCC. Our study focuses on the recurrence prediction of LSCC based on H&E-stained histopathological whole-slide images (WSI). Due to the small size of LSCC cohorts in terms of patients with available recurrence information, standard end-to-end learning with various convolutional neural networks for this task tends to overfit. Also, the predictions made by these models are hard to interpret. Histopathology WSIs are typically very large and are therefore processed as a set of smaller tiles. In this work, we propose a novel conditional self-supervised learning (SSL) method to learn representations of WSI at the tile level first, and leverage clustering algorithms to identify the tiles with similar histopathological representations. The resulting representations and clusters from self-supervision are used as features of a survival model for recurrence prediction at the patient level. Using two publicly available datasets from TCGA and CPTAC, we show that our LSCC recurrence prediction survival model outperforms both LSCC pathological stage-based approach and machine learning baselines such as multiple instance learning. The proposed method also enables us to explain the recurrence histopathological risk factors via the derived clusters. This can help pathologists derive new hypotheses regarding morphological features associated with LSCC recurrence.
abstract_zh: 肺鳞状细胞癌（LSCC）具有很高的复发率和转移率。目前影响复发和转移的因素尚不清楚，并且没有明显的组织病理学或形态学特征表明LSCC复发和转移的风险。我们的研究重点是基于 H&E 染色的组织病理学全切片图像 (WSI) 的 LSCC 复发预测。由于就可用复发信息的患者而言，LSCC 队列规模较小，因此使用各种卷积神经网络进行此任务的标准端到端学习往往会过度拟合。此外，这些模型做出的预测很难解释。组织病理学 WSI 通常非常大，因此被作为一组较小的图块进行处理。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的条件自监督学习（SSL）方法，首先在图块级别学习 WSI 的表示，并利用聚类算法来识别具有相似组织病理学表示的图块。自我监督产生的表示和聚类被用作患者水平复发预测的生存模型的特征。使用来自 TCGA 和 CPTAC 的两个公开数据集，我们表明我们的 LSCC 复发预测生存模型优于基于 LSCC 病理阶段的方法和机器学习基线（例如多实例学习）。所提出的方法还使我们能够通过派生的聚类来解释复发组织病理学风险因素。这可以帮助病理学家得出关于与 LSCC 复发相关的形态特征的新假设。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的可解释方法，用于预测肺鳞状细胞癌（LSCC）复发，并通过聚类分析揭示复发的组织病理学风险因素。
AI.motivation: LSCC复发率高且影响因素不明，现有模型因数据量小易过拟合且缺乏可解释性，需开发兼顾预测精度与可解释性的新方法。
AI.method: 采用条件自监督学习（SSL）对全切片图像（WSI）的瓷砖级表征进行预训练，结合聚类算法识别相似组织病理学特征的瓷砖，将其作为生存模型的输入进行患者级复发预测。
AI.result: 在TCGA和CPTAC数据集上，该模型在预测性能上优于基于病理分期的方法和多实例学习等基线模型，并通过聚类结果解释了复发相关的组织学风险因素。
AI.conclusion: 该方法不仅提升了LSCC复发预测的准确性，还通过可解释的聚类结果为病理学家提供了新的形态学特征研究方向。

Using two publicly available datasets from TCGA and CPTAC, we show that our LSCC recurrence prediction survival model outperforms both LSCC pathological stage-based approach and machine learning baselines such as multiple instance learning. The proposed method also enables us to explain the recurrence histopathological risk factors via the derived clusters. This can help pathologists derive new hypotheses regarding morphological features associated with LSCC recurrence. 肺鳞状细胞癌（LSCC）具有很高的复发率和转移率。目前影响复发和转移的因素尚不清楚，并且没有明显的组织病理学或形态学特征表明LSCC复发和转移的风险。我们的研究重点是基于 H&E 染色的组织病理学全切片图像 (WSI) 的 LSCC 复发预测。由于就可用复发信息的患者而言，LSCC 队列规模较小，因此使用各种卷积神经网络进行此任务的标准端到端学习往往会过度拟合。此外，这些模型做出的预测很难解释。组织病理学 WSI 通常非常大，因此被作为一组较小的图块进行处理。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的条件自监督学习（SSL）方法，首先在图块级别学习 WSI 的表示，并利用聚类算法来识别具有相似组织病理学表示的图块。自我监督产生的表示和聚类被用作患者水平复发预测的生存模型的特征。使用来自 TCGA 和 CPTAC 的两个公开数据集，我们表明我们的 LSCC 复发预测生存模型优于基于 LSCC 病理阶段的方法和机器学习基线（例如多实例学习）。所提出的方法还使我们能够通过派生的聚类来解释复发组织病理学风险因素。这可以帮助病理学家得出关于与 LSCC 复发相关的形态特征的新假设。 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的可解释方法，用于预测肺鳞状细胞癌（LSCC）复发，并通过聚类分析揭示复发的组织病理学风险因素。 Weicheng Zhu,Carlos Fernandez-Granda,Narges Razavian cs.CV

authors_text: Shun Lei,Yixuan Zhou,Liyang Chen,Zhiyong Wu,Shiyin Kang,Helen Meng
title: Towards Expressive Speaking Style Modelling with Hierarchical Context Information for Mandarin Speech Synthesis
title_zh: 面向普通话语音合成的具有分层上下文信息的表达性说话风格建模
comment: Accepted by ICASSP 2022
comments: Accepted by ICASSP 2022
abstract: Previous works on expressive speech synthesis mainly focus on current sentence. The context in adjacent sentences is neglected, resulting in inflexible speaking style for the same text, which lacks speech variations. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical framework to model speaking style from context. A hierarchical context encoder is proposed to explore a wider range of contextual information considering structural relationship in context, including inter-phrase and inter-sentence relations. Moreover, to encourage this encoder to learn style representation better, we introduce a novel training strategy with knowledge distillation, which provides the target for encoder training. Both objective and subjective evaluations on a Mandarin lecture dataset demonstrate that the proposed method can significantly improve the naturalness and expressiveness of the synthesized speech.
summary: Previous works on expressive speech synthesis mainly focus on current sentence. The context in adjacent sentences is neglected, resulting in inflexible speaking style for the same text, which lacks speech variations. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical framework to model speaking style from context. A hierarchical context encoder is proposed to explore a wider range of contextual information considering structural relationship in context, including inter-phrase and inter-sentence relations. Moreover, to encourage this encoder to learn style representation better, we introduce a novel training strategy with knowledge distillation, which provides the target for encoder training. Both objective and subjective evaluations on a Mandarin lecture dataset demonstrate that the proposed method can significantly improve the naturalness and expressiveness of the synthesized speech.
abstract_zh: 先前关于表达性语音合成的工作主要集中在当前句子。相邻句子的上下文被忽略，导致同一文本的说话风格不灵活，缺乏语音变化。在本文中，我们提出了一个分层框架来根据上下文对说话风格进行建模。考虑到上下文中的结构关系，包括短语间和句子间关系，提出了分层上下文编码器来探索更广泛的上下文信息。此外，为了鼓励编码器更好地学习风格表示，我们引入了一种新颖的知识蒸馏训练策略，为编码器训练提供了目标。对普通话讲座数据集的客观和主观评估表明，所提出的方法可以显着提高合成语音的自然度和表现力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于层次化上下文信息的 Mandarin 语音合成方法，以提升表达的自然性和多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有情感语音合成方法仅关注当前句子，忽略相邻句子的上下文信息，导致同一文本的说话风格缺乏变化。
AI.method: 设计层次化上下文编码器，建模短语间与句子间的结构关系，并引入知识蒸馏训练策略优化风格表征学习。
AI.result: 在 Mandarin 讲座数据集上，客观与主观评估均显示合成语音的自然度和表现力显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 层次化上下文建模与知识蒸馏策略有效增强了语音合成的表达能力，为 Mandarin 语音生成提供新思路。

authors_text: Xiao Liu,Bonan Gao,Basem Suleiman,Han You,Zisu Ma,Yu Liu,Ali Anaissi
title: Privacy-Preserving Personalized Fitness Recommender System (P3FitRec): A Multi-level Deep Learning Approach
title_zh: 保护隐私的个性化健身推荐系统（P3FitRec）：一种多级深度学习方法
comment: 30 pages, 16 figures, 36 references
comments: 30 pages, 16 figures, 36 references
abstract: Recommender systems have been successfully used in many domains with the help of machine learning algorithms. However, such applications tend to use multi-dimensional user data, which has raised widespread concerns about the breach of users privacy. Meanwhile, wearable technologies have enabled users to collect fitness-related data through embedded sensors to monitor their conditions or achieve personalized fitness goals. In this paper, we propose a novel privacy-aware personalized fitness recommender system. We introduce a multi-level deep learning framework that learns important features from a large-scale real fitness dataset that is collected from wearable IoT devices to derive intelligent fitness recommendations. Unlike most existing approaches, our approach achieves personalization by inferring the fitness characteristics of users from sensory data and thus minimizing the need for explicitly collecting user identity or biometric information, such as name, age, height, weight. In particular, our proposed models and algorithms predict (a) personalized exercise distance recommendations to help users to achieve target calories, (b) personalized speed sequence recommendations to adjust exercise speed given the nature of the exercise and the chosen route, and (c) personalized heart rate sequence to guide the user of the potential health status for future exercises. Our experimental evaluation on a real-world Fitbit dataset demonstrated high accuracy in predicting exercise distance, speed sequence, and heart rate sequence compared to similar studies. Furthermore, our approach is novel compared to existing studies as it does not require collecting and using users sensitive information, and thus it preserves the users privacy.

In particular, our proposed models and algorithms predict (a) personalized exercise distance recommendations to help users to achieve target calories, (b) personalized speed sequence recommendations to adjust exercise speed given the nature of the exercise and the chosen route, and (c) personalized heart rate sequence to guide the user of the potential health status for future exercises. Our experimental evaluation on a real-world Fitbit dataset demonstrated high accuracy in predicting exercise distance, speed sequence, and heart rate sequence compared to similar studies. Furthermore, our approach is novel compared to existing studies as it does not require collecting and using users sensitive information, and thus it preserves the users privacy.
abstract_zh: 在机器学习算法的帮助下，推荐系统已成功应用于许多领域。然而，此类应用往往使用多维的用户数据，这引起了人们对侵犯用户隐私的广泛担忧。 Meanwhile, wearable technologies have enabled users to collect fitness-related data through embedded sensors to monitor their conditions or achieve personalized fitness goals.在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的隐私意识个性化健身推荐系统。 We introduce a multi-level deep learning framework that learns important features from a large-scale real fitness dataset that is collected from wearable IoT devices to derive intelligent fitness recommendations. Unlike most existing approaches, our approach achieves personalization by inferring the fitness characteristics of users from sensory data and thus minimizing the need for explicitly collecting user identity or biometric information, such as name, age, height, weight. In particular, our proposed models and algorithms predict (a) personalized exercise distance recommendations to help users to achieve target calories, (b) personalized speed sequence recommendations to adjust exercise speed given the nature of the exercise and the chosen route, and (c) personalized heart rate sequence to guide the user of the potential health status for future exercises. Our experimental evaluation on a real-world Fitbit dataset demonstrated high accuracy in predicting exercise distance, speed sequence, and heart rate sequence compared to similar studies. Furthermore, our approach is novel compared to existing studies as it does not require collecting and using users sensitive information, and thus it preserves the users privacy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多级深度学习的隐私保护个性化健身推荐系统P3FitRec，通过可穿戴设备传感器数据实现个性化推荐，无需收集用户敏感信息。
AI.motivation: 传统推荐系统依赖用户身份和生物特征等敏感数据，存在隐私泄露风险。可穿戴设备能采集健身数据，但现有方法未能有效平衡隐私保护与个性化推荐需求。
AI.method: 构建多级深度学习框架，从可穿戴设备的传感器数据中学习特征，通过分析运动距离、速度序列和心率序列实现个性化推荐，避免直接收集用户身份或生物信息。
AI.result: 在真实Fitbit数据集上的实验表明，系统在运动距离、速度序列和心率序列预测准确率优于同类研究，且无需处理敏感数据。
AI.conclusion: P3FitRec通过传感器数据建模实现了隐私保护与个性化推荐的平衡，为健身领域提供了新型隐私友好型解决方案。

authors_text: Shiqi Lin,Zhizheng Zhang,Zhipeng Huang,Yan Lu,Cuiling Lan,Peng Chu,Quanzeng You,Jiang Wang,Zicheng Liu,Amey Parulkar,Viraj Navkal,Zhibo Chen
title: Deep Frequency Filtering for Domain Generalization
title_zh: 用于域泛化的深度频率过滤
comment: Accepted by CVPR2023
comments: Accepted by CVPR2023
abstract: Improving the generalization ability of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) is critical for their practical uses, which has been a longstanding challenge. Some theoretical studies have uncovered that DNNs have preferences for some frequency components in the learning process and indicated that this may affect the robustness of learned features. In this paper, we propose Deep Frequency Filtering (DFF) for learning domain-generalizable features, which is the first endeavour to explicitly modulate the frequency components of different transfer difficulties across domains in the latent space during training. To achieve this, we perform Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) for the feature maps at different layers, then adopt a light-weight module to learn attention masks from the frequency representations after FFT to enhance transferable components while suppressing the components not conducive to generalization. Further, we empirically compare the effectiveness of adopting different types of attention designs for implementing DFF. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed DFF and show that applying our DFF on a plain baseline outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on different domain generalization tasks, including close-set classification and open-set retrieval.
summary: Improving the generalization ability of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) is critical for their practical uses, which has been a longstanding challenge. Some theoretical studies have uncovered that DNNs have preferences for some frequency components in the learning process and indicated that this may affect the robustness of learned features. In this paper, we propose Deep Frequency Filtering (DFF) for learning domain-generalizable features, which is the first endeavour to explicitly modulate the frequency components of different transfer difficulties across domains in the latent space during training. To achieve this, we perform Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) for the feature maps at different layers, then adopt a light-weight module to learn attention masks from the frequency representations after FFT to enhance transferable components while suppressing the components not conducive to generalization. Further, we empirically compare the effectiveness of adopting different types of attention designs for implementing DFF. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed DFF and show that applying our DFF on a plain baseline outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on different domain generalization tasks, including close-set classification and open-set retrieval.
abstract_zh: 提高深度神经网络（DNN）的泛化能力对其实际应用至关重要，这一直是一个长期的挑战。一些理论研究发现，DNN 在学习过程中对某些频率成分有偏好，并表明这可能会影响学习特征的鲁棒性。在本文中，我们提出了用于学习域可泛化特征的深度频率过滤（DFF），这是在训练期间显式调制潜在空间中跨域的不同传输难度的频率分量的首次尝试。为了实现这一目标，我们对不同层的特征图进行快速傅里叶变换（FFT），然后采用轻量级模块从FFT后的频率表示中学习注意力掩模，以增强可转移成分，同时抑制不利于泛化的成分。此外，我们根据经验比较了采用不同类型的注意力设计来实现 DFF 的有效性。大量实验证明了我们提出的 DFF 的有效性，并表明在普通基线上应用我们的 DFF 在不同领域泛化任务（包括闭集分类和开集检索）上优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Deep Frequency Filtering（DFF）的方法，旨在通过调节特征的频率成分来提升深度神经网络的领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在领域泛化任务中面临挑战，现有研究发现其对特定频率成分的偏好可能影响特征鲁棒性，因此需要显式调节频率成分以增强泛化能力。
AI.method: 在训练过程中对不同层级的特征图进行快速傅里叶变换（FFT），利用轻量模块从频率表示中学习注意力掩码，增强有益于泛化的频率成分并抑制不利成分，同时比较不同注意力设计的效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，DFF在闭集分类和开集检索等任务中优于现有最先进方法，且在基础模型上应用后性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: DFF通过显式频率过滤有效提升了领域泛化能力，验证了频率成分调节对增强特征可迁移性的关键作用。

search_text: Deep Frequency Filtering for Domain Generalization 用于域泛化的深度频率过滤 Improving the generalization ability of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) is critical for their practical uses, which has been a longstanding challenge. Some theoretical studies have uncovered that DNNs have preferences for some frequency components in the learning process and indicated that this may affect the robustness of learned features. In this paper, we propose Deep Frequency Filtering (DFF) for learning domain-generalizable features, which is the first endeavour to explicitly modulate the frequency components of different transfer difficulties across domains in the latent space during training. To achieve this, we perform Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) for the feature maps at different layers, then adopt a light-weight module to learn attention masks from the frequency representations after FFT to enhance transferable components while suppressing the components not conducive to generalization. Further, we empirically compare the effectiveness of adopting different types of attention designs for implementing DFF. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed DFF and show that applying our DFF on a plain baseline outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on different domain generalization tasks, including close-set classification and open-set retrieval. 提高深度神经网络（DNN）的泛化能力对其实际应用至关重要，这一直是一个长期的挑战。一些理论研究发现，DNN 在学习过程中对某些频率成分有偏好，并表明这可能会影响学习特征的鲁棒性。在本文中，我们提出了用于学习域可泛化特征的深度频率过滤（DFF），这是在训练期间显式调制潜在空间中跨域的不同传输难度的频率分量的首次尝试。为了实现这一目标，我们对不同层的特征图进行快速傅里叶变换（FFT），然后采用轻量级模块从FFT后的频率表示中学习注意力掩模，以增强可转移成分，同时抑制不利于泛化的成分。此外，我们根据经验比较了采用不同类型的注意力设计来实现 DFF 的有效性。大量实验证明了我们提出的 DFF 的有效性，并表明在普通基线上应用我们的 DFF 在不同领域泛化任务（包括闭集分类和开集检索）上优于最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种名为Deep Frequency Filtering（DFF）的方法，旨在通过调节特征的频率成分来提升深度神经网络的领域泛化能力。 Shiqi Lin,Zhizheng Zhang,Zhipeng Huang,Yan Lu,Cuiling Lan,Peng Chu,Quanzeng You,Jiang Wang,Zicheng Liu,Amey Parulkar,Viraj Navkal,Zhibo Chen cs.CV

authors_text: A. H. Rashid,A. Gupta,J. Gupta,M. Tanveer
title: Biceph-Net: A robust and lightweight framework for the diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease using 2D-MRI scans and deep similarity learning
title_zh: Biceph-Net：使用 2D-MRI 扫描和深度相似性学习诊断阿尔茨海默病的强大而轻量级的框架
comment: ef:IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics, 2022
comments: ef:IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics, 2022
abstract: Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is a neurodegenerative disease that is one of the significant causes of death in the elderly population. Many deep learning techniques have been proposed to diagnose AD using Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) scans. Predicting AD using 2D slices extracted from 3D MRI scans is challenging as the inter-slice information gets lost. To this end, we propose a novel and lightweight framework termed 'Biceph-Net' for AD diagnosis using 2D MRI scans that model both the intra-slice and inter-slice information. Biceph-Net has been experimentally shown to perform similar to other Spatio-temporal neural networks while being computationally more efficient. Biceph-Net is also superior in performance compared to vanilla 2D convolutional neural networks (CNN) for AD diagnosis using 2D MRI slices. Biceph-Net also has an inbuilt neighbourhood-based model interpretation feature that can be exploited to understand the classification decision taken by the network. Biceph-Net experimentally achieves a test accuracy of 100% in the classification of Cognitively Normal (CN) vs AD, 98.16% for Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) vs AD, and 97.80% for CN vs MCI vs AD.
summary: Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is a neurodegenerative disease that is one of the significant causes of death in the elderly population. Many deep learning techniques have been proposed to diagnose AD using Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) scans. Predicting AD using 2D slices extracted from 3D MRI scans is challenging as the inter-slice information gets lost. To this end, we propose a novel and lightweight framework termed 'Biceph-Net' for AD diagnosis using 2D MRI scans that model both the intra-slice and inter-slice information. Biceph-Net has been experimentally shown to perform similar to other Spatio-temporal neural networks while being computationally more efficient. Biceph-Net is also superior in performance compared to vanilla 2D convolutional neural networks (CNN) for AD diagnosis using 2D MRI slices. Biceph-Net also has an inbuilt neighbourhood-based model interpretation feature that can be exploited to understand the classification decision taken by the network. Biceph-Net experimentally achieves a test accuracy of 100% in the classification of Cognitively Normal (CN) vs AD, 98.16% for Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) vs AD, and 97.80% for CN vs MCI vs AD.
abstract_zh: Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is a neurodegenerative disease that is one of the significant causes of death in the elderly population. Many deep learning techniques have been proposed to diagnose AD using Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) scans. Predicting AD using 2D slices extracted from 3D MRI scans is challenging as the inter-slice information gets lost.为此，我们提出了一种名为“Biceph-Net”的新型轻量级框架，用于使用 2D MRI 扫描对切片内和切片间信息进行建模的 AD 诊断。 Biceph-Net has been experimentally shown to perform similar to other Spatio-temporal neural networks while being computationally more efficient. Biceph-Net is also superior in performance compared to vanilla 2D convolutional neural networks (CNN) for AD diagnosis using 2D MRI slices. Biceph-Net 还具有内置的基于邻域的模型解释功能，可用于理解网络做出的分类决策。 Biceph-Net 在认知正常 (CN) 与 AD 的分类中实验性地实现了 100% 的测试准确率，在轻度认知障碍 (MCI) 与 AD 的分类中达到 98.16% 的测试准确率，在 CN、MCI 与 AD 的分类中达到 97.80% 的测试准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Biceph-Net的轻量级框架，利用2D-MRI扫描和深度相似性学习进行阿尔茨海默病（AD）的诊断，同时建模切片内和切片间信息。
AI.motivation: 传统2D CNN在AD诊断中因丢失切片间信息而效果受限，需设计兼顾计算效率与诊断性能的模型。
AI.method: Biceph-Net通过深度相似性学习同时建模2D MRI切片的局部特征（切片内）与全局关联（切片间），并集成邻域解释机制增强模型可解释性。
AI.result: 在CN vs AD分类中达到100%测试准确率，在MCI vs AD中为98.16%，在三分类任务中为97.80%，优于传统2D CNN且计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: Biceph-Net在保持轻量化优势的同时显著提升AD诊断性能，其邻域解释功能为医学决策提供了可信依据。

authors_text: Pan He,Patrick Emami,Sanjay Ranka,Anand Rangarajan
title: Self-Supervised Robust Scene Flow Estimation via the Alignment of Probability Density Functions
title_zh: 通过概率密度函数对齐的自监督鲁棒场景流估计
comment: Published in AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (2022)
comments: Published in AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (2022)
abstract: In this paper, we present a new self-supervised scene flow estimation approach for a pair of consecutive point clouds. The key idea of our approach is to represent discrete point clouds as continuous probability density functions using Gaussian mixture models. Scene flow estimation is therefore converted into the problem of recovering motion from the alignment of probability density functions, which we achieve using a closed-form expression of the classic Cauchy-Schwarz divergence. Unlike existing nearest-neighbor-based approaches that use hard pairwise correspondences, our proposed approach establishes soft and implicit point correspondences between point clouds and generates more robust and accurate scene flow in the presence of missing correspondences and outliers. Comprehensive experiments show that our method makes noticeable gains over the Chamfer Distance and the Earth Mover's Distance in real-world environments and achieves state-of-the-art performance among self-supervised learning methods on FlyingThings3D and KITTI, even outperforming some supervised methods with ground truth annotations.
summary: In this paper, we present a new self-supervised scene flow estimation approach for a pair of consecutive point clouds. The key idea of our approach is to represent discrete point clouds as continuous probability density functions using Gaussian mixture models. Scene flow estimation is therefore converted into the problem of recovering motion from the alignment of probability density functions, which we achieve using a closed-form expression of the classic Cauchy-Schwarz divergence. Unlike existing nearest-neighbor-based approaches that use hard pairwise correspondences, our proposed approach establishes soft and implicit point correspondences between point clouds and generates more robust and accurate scene flow in the presence of missing correspondences and outliers. Comprehensive experiments show that our method makes noticeable gains over the Chamfer Distance and the Earth Mover's Distance in real-world environments and achieves state-of-the-art performance among self-supervised learning methods on FlyingThings3D and KITTI, even outperforming some supervised methods with ground truth annotations.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种针对一对连续点云的新的自监督场景流估计方法。我们方法的关键思想是使用高斯混合模型将离散点云表示为连续概率密度函数。因此，场景流估计被转换为从概率密度函数的对齐中恢复运动的问题，这是我们使用经典柯西-施瓦茨散度的封闭形式表达式来实现的。与使用硬配对对应的现有基于最近邻的方法不同，我们提出的方法在点云之间建立软和隐式点对应，并在存在缺失对应和异常值的情况下生成更稳健和准确的场景流。综合实验表明，我们的方法在现实环境中的切角距离和地球移动器距离上取得了显着的进步，并在 FlyingThings3D 和 KITTI 上的自监督学习方法中实现了最先进的性能，甚至优于一些带有地面实况注释的监督方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率密度函数对齐的自监督场景流估计方法，通过高斯混合模型将点云表示为连续密度函数，并利用柯西-施瓦茨散度进行运动恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有基于最近邻的场景流方法依赖硬对应关系，在缺失对应和异常值情况下鲁棒性不足，需提出软隐式对应机制提升精度。
AI.method: 使用高斯混合模型将离散点云转化为连续概率密度函数，通过柯西-施瓦茨散度的闭式表达实现密度函数对齐，建立软点对应关系进行场景流估计。
AI.result: 在FlyingThings3D和KITTI数据集上达到自监督方法的最先进水平，超越部分有监督方法，且在真实环境中的表现优于切比雪夫距离和地球移动距离。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过概率密度函数对齐有效解决了场景流估计中的鲁棒性问题，在复杂真实场景中展现出优越性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率密度函数对齐的自监督场景流估计方法，通过高斯混合模型将点云表示为连续密度函数，并利用柯西-施瓦茨散度进行运动恢复。

search_text: Self-Supervised Robust Scene Flow Estimation via the Alignment of Probability Density Functions 通过概率密度函数对齐的自监督鲁棒场景流估计 In this paper, we present a new self-supervised scene flow estimation approach for a pair of consecutive point clouds. The key idea of our approach is to represent discrete point clouds as continuous probability density functions using Gaussian mixture models. Scene flow estimation is therefore converted into the problem of recovering motion from the alignment of probability density functions, which we achieve using a closed-form expression of the classic Cauchy-Schwarz divergence. Unlike existing nearest-neighbor-based approaches that use hard pairwise correspondences, our proposed approach establishes soft and implicit point correspondences between point clouds and generates more robust and accurate scene flow in the presence of missing correspondences and outliers. Comprehensive experiments show that our method makes noticeable gains over the Chamfer Distance and the Earth Mover's Distance in real-world environments and achieves state-of-the-art performance among self-supervised learning methods on FlyingThings3D and KITTI, even outperforming some supervised methods with ground truth annotations. 在本文中，我们提出了一种针对一对连续点云的新的自监督场景流估计方法。我们方法的关键思想是使用高斯混合模型将离散点云表示为连续概率密度函数。因此，场景流估计被转换为从概率密度函数的对齐中恢复运动的问题，这是我们使用经典柯西-施瓦茨散度的封闭形式表达式来实现的。与使用硬配对对应的现有基于最近邻的方法不同，我们提出的方法在点云之间建立软和隐式点对应，并在存在缺失对应和异常值的情况下生成更稳健和准确的场景流。综合实验表明，我们的方法在现实环境中的切角距离和地球移动器距离上取得了显着的进步，并在 FlyingThings3D 和 KITTI 上的自监督学习方法中实现了最先进的性能，甚至优于一些带有地面实况注释的监督方法。 本文提出一种基于概率密度函数对齐的自监督场景流估计方法，通过高斯混合模型将点云表示为连续密度函数，并利用柯西-施瓦茨散度进行运动恢复。 Pan He,Patrick Emami,Sanjay Ranka,Anand Rangarajan cs.CV

authors_text: Ayush Chopra,Abhinav Java,Abhishek Singh,Vivek Sharma,Ramesh Raskar
title: Learning to Censor by Noisy Sampling
title_zh: 学习通过噪声采样进行审查
abstract: Point clouds are an increasingly ubiquitous input modality and the raw signal can be efficiently processed with recent progress in deep learning. This signal may, often inadvertently, capture sensitive information that can leak semantic and geometric properties of the scene which the data owner does not want to share. The goal of this work is to protect sensitive information when learning from point clouds; by censoring the sensitive information before the point cloud is released for downstream tasks. Specifically, we focus on preserving utility for perception tasks while mitigating attribute leakage attacks. The key motivating insight is to leverage the localized saliency of perception tasks on point clouds to provide good privacy-utility trade-offs. We realize this through a mechanism called Censoring by Noisy Sampling (CBNS), which is composed of two modules: i) Invariant Sampler: a differentiable point-cloud sampler which learns to remove points invariant to utility and ii) Noisy Distorter: which learns to distort sampled points to decouple the sensitive information from utility, and mitigate privacy leakage. We validate the effectiveness of CBNS through extensive comparisons with state-of-the-art baselines and sensitivity analyses of key design choices. Results show that CBNS achieves superior privacy-utility trade-offs on multiple datasets.
summary: Point clouds are an increasingly ubiquitous input modality and the raw signal can be efficiently processed with recent progress in deep learning. This signal may, often inadvertently, capture sensitive information that can leak semantic and geometric properties of the scene which the data owner does not want to share. The goal of this work is to protect sensitive information when learning from point clouds; by censoring the sensitive information before the point cloud is released for downstream tasks. Specifically, we focus on preserving utility for perception tasks while mitigating attribute leakage attacks. The key motivating insight is to leverage the localized saliency of perception tasks on point clouds to provide good privacy-utility trade-offs. We realize this through a mechanism called Censoring by Noisy Sampling (CBNS), which is composed of two modules: i) Invariant Sampler: a differentiable point-cloud sampler which learns to remove points invariant to utility and ii) Noisy Distorter: which learns to distort sampled points to decouple the sensitive information from utility, and mitigate privacy leakage. We validate the effectiveness of CBNS through extensive comparisons with state-of-the-art baselines and sensitivity analyses of key design choices. Results show that CBNS achieves superior privacy-utility trade-offs on multiple datasets.
abstract_zh: 点云是一种日益普遍的输入方式，随着深度学习的最新进展，可以有效地处理原始信号。该信号通常可能会无意中捕获敏感信息，这些信息可能会泄漏数据所有者不想共享的场景的语义和几何属性。这项工作的目标是在从点云学习时保护敏感信息；通过在点云发布用于下游任务之前审查敏感信息。具体来说，我们专注于保留感知任务的效用，同时减轻属性泄漏攻击。关键的激励洞察力是利用点云上感知任务的局部显着性来提供良好的隐私与效用权衡。我们通过一种称为噪声采样审查（CBNS）的机制来实现这一点，该机制由两个模块组成：i）不变采样器：可微分的点云采样器，它学习删除对效用不变的点；ii）噪声失真器：它学习扭曲采样点以将敏感信息与效用分离，并减少隐私泄漏。我们通过与最先进的基线的广泛比较和关键设计选择的敏感性分析来验证 CBNS 的有效性。结果表明，CBNS 在多个数据集上实现了卓越的隐私与效用权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CBNS的方法，用于在点云数据中保护敏感信息，同时保持感知任务的实用性。
AI.motivation: 点云数据可能无意中捕捉到敏感信息，这些信息可能泄露场景的语义和几何属性。因此，需要在发布点云数据之前对其进行审查，以防止敏感信息泄露。
AI.method: 该方法包含两个模块：Invariant Sampler（不变采样器）和Noisy Distorter（噪声失真器）。Invariant Sampler通过可微分的点云采样器学习去除对实用性不变的点，而Noisy Distorter通过扭曲采样点来解耦敏感信息与实用性，从而减少隐私泄露。
AI.result: CBNS在多个数据集上实现了优于现有基线方法的隐私-实用性权衡，并通过广泛的比较和关键设计选择的敏感性分析验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: CBNS方法有效保护了点云数据中的敏感信息，同时保持了感知任务的实用性，为隐私保护提供了良好的隐私-实用性权衡。

authors_text: Jun Chen,Zilin Wang,Deyi Tuo,Zhiyong Wu,Shiyin Kang,Helen Meng
title: FullSubNet+: Channel Attention FullSubNet with Complex Spectrograms for Speech Enhancement
title_zh: FullSubNet+：带有复杂频谱图的通道注意力 FullSubNet，用于语音增强
comment: Accepted by ICASSP 2022
comments: Accepted by ICASSP 2022
abstract: Previously proposed FullSubNet has achieved outstanding performance in Deep Noise Suppression (DNS) Challenge and attracted much attention. However, it still encounters issues such as input-output mismatch and coarse processing for frequency bands. In this paper, we propose an extended single-channel real-time speech enhancement framework called FullSubNet+ with following significant improvements. First, we design a lightweight multi-scale time sensitive channel attention (MulCA) module which adopts multi-scale convolution and channel attention mechanism to help the network focus on more discriminative frequency bands for noise reduction. Then, to make full use of the phase information in noisy speech, our model takes all the magnitude, real and imaginary spectrograms as inputs. Moreover, by replacing the long short-term memory (LSTM) layers in original full-band model with stacked temporal convolutional network (TCN) blocks, we design a more efficient full-band module called full-band extractor. The experimental results in DNS Challenge dataset show the superior performance of our FullSubNet+, which reaches the state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance and outperforms other existing speech enhancement approaches.
summary: Previously proposed FullSubNet has achieved outstanding performance in Deep Noise Suppression (DNS) Challenge and attracted much attention. However, it still encounters issues such as input-output mismatch and coarse processing for frequency bands. In this paper, we propose an extended single-channel real-time speech enhancement framework called FullSubNet+ with following significant improvements. First, we design a lightweight multi-scale time sensitive channel attention (MulCA) module which adopts multi-scale convolution and channel attention mechanism to help the network focus on more discriminative frequency bands for noise reduction. Then, to make full use of the phase information in noisy speech, our model takes all the magnitude, real and imaginary spectrograms as inputs. Moreover, by replacing the long short-term memory (LSTM) layers in original full-band model with stacked temporal convolutional network (TCN) blocks, we design a more efficient full-band module called full-band extractor. The experimental results in DNS Challenge dataset show the superior performance of our FullSubNet+, which reaches the state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance and outperforms other existing speech enhancement approaches.
abstract_zh: 此前提出的FullSubNet在深度噪声抑制（DNS）挑战赛中取得了出色的表现，备受关注。但仍面临输入输出不匹配、频段处理粗糙等问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 FullSubNet+ 的扩展单通道实时语音增强框架，并进行了以下重大改进。首先，我们设计了一个轻量级的多尺度时间敏感通道注意（MulCA）模块，该模块采用多尺度卷积和通道注意机制来帮助网络关注更具辨别力的频段以实现降噪。然后，为了充分利用噪声语音中的相位信息，我们的模型将所有幅度、实部和虚部频谱图作为输入。此外，通过用堆叠时间卷积网络（TCN）块替换原始全带模型中的长短期记忆（LSTM）层，我们设计了一种更高效的全带模块，称为全带提取器。 DNS Challenge 数据集中的实验结果显示了我们的 FullSubNet+ 的卓越性能，它达到了最先进的 (SOTA) 性能，并且优于其他现有的语音增强方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的单通道实时语音增强框架FullSubNet+，通过引入通道注意力机制和复数频谱图提升降噪效果。
AI.motivation: 现有FullSubNet存在输入输出不匹配及频率带处理粗糙的问题，需改进以提升语音增强性能。
AI.method: 设计轻量级多尺度时间敏感通道注意力模块（MulCA），结合复数频谱图输入，并用TCN替代LSTM构建全带提取模块。
AI.result: 在DNS挑战赛数据集上达到SOTA性能，优于其他现有语音增强方法。
AI.conclusion: FullSubNet+通过多尺度通道注意力与复数频谱建模有效解决了频率带处理问题，为语音增强提供了新思路。
