conclusion: FullSubNet+通过多尺度通道注意力与复数频谱建模有效解决了频率带处理问题，为语音增强提供了新思路。
search_text: FullSubNet+: Channel Attention FullSubNet with Complex Spectrograms for Speech Enhancement FullSubNet+：带有复杂频谱图的通道注意力 FullSubNet，用于语音增强 Previously proposed FullSubNet has achieved outstanding performance in Deep Noise Suppression (DNS) Challenge and attracted much attention. However, it still encounters issues such as input-output mismatch and coarse processing for frequency bands. In this paper, we propose an extended single-channel real-time speech enhancement framework called FullSubNet+ with following significant improvements. First, we design a lightweight multi-scale time sensitive channel attention (MulCA) module which adopts multi-scale convolution and channel attention mechanism to help the network focus on more discriminative frequency bands for noise reduction. Then, to make full use of the phase information in noisy speech, our model takes all the magnitude, real and imaginary spectrograms as inputs. Moreover, by replacing the long short-term memory (LSTM) layers in original full-band model with stacked temporal convolutional network (TCN) blocks, we design a more efficient full-band module called full-band extractor. The experimental results in DNS Challenge dataset show the superior performance of our FullSubNet+, which reaches the state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance and outperforms other existing speech enhancement approaches. 此前提出的FullSubNet在深度噪声抑制（DNS）挑战赛中取得了出色的表现，备受关注。但仍面临输入输出不匹配、频段处理粗糙等问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 FullSubNet+ 的扩展单通道实时语音增强框架，并进行了以下重大改进。首先，我们设计了一个轻量级的多尺度时间敏感通道注意（MulCA）模块，该模块采用多尺度卷积和通道注意机制来帮助网络关注更具辨别力的频段以实现降噪。然后，为了充分利用噪声语音中的相位信息，我们的模型将所有幅度、实部和虚部频谱图作为输入。此外，通过用堆叠时间卷积网络（TCN）块替换原始全带模型中的长短期记忆（LSTM）层，我们设计了一种更高效的全带模块，称为全带提取器。 DNS Challenge 数据集中的实验结果显示了我们的 FullSubNet+ 的卓越性能，它达到了最先进的 (SOTA) 性能，并且优于其他现有的语音增强方法。 本文提出了一种改进的单通道实时语音增强框架FullSubNet+，通过引入通道注意力机制和复数频谱图提升降噪效果。 Jun Chen,Zilin Wang,Deyi Tuo,Zhiyong Wu,Shiyin Kang,Helen Meng cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Tian Xie,Xinyi Yang,Angela S. Lin,Feihong Wu,Kazuma Hashimoto,Jin Qu,Young Mo Kang,Wenpeng Yin,Huan Wang,Semih Yavuz,Gang Wu,Michael Jones,Richard Socher,Yingbo Zhou,Wenhao Liu,Caiming Xiong
title: Converse: A Tree-Based Modular Task-Oriented Dialogue System
title_zh: Converse：基于树的模块化任务导向对话系统
abstract: Creating a system that can have meaningful conversations with humans to help accomplish tasks is one of the ultimate goals of Artificial Intelligence (AI). It has defined the meaning of AI since the beginning. A lot has been accomplished in this area recently, with voice assistant products entering our daily lives and chat bot systems becoming commonplace in customer service. At first glance there seems to be no shortage of options for dialogue systems. However, the frequently deployed dialogue systems today seem to all struggle with a critical weakness - they are hard to build and harder to maintain. At the core of the struggle is the need to script every single turn of interactions between the bot and the human user. This makes the dialogue systems more difficult to maintain as the tasks become more complex and more tasks are added to the system. In this paper, we propose Converse, a flexible tree-based modular task-oriented dialogue system. Converse uses an and-or tree structure to represent tasks and offers powerful multi-task dialogue management. Converse supports task dependency and task switching, which are unique features compared to other open-source dialogue frameworks. At the same time, Converse aims to make the bot building process easy and simple, for both professional and non-professional software developers. The code is available at https://github.com/salesforce/Converse.

It has defined the meaning of AI since the beginning. A lot has been accomplished in this area recently, with voice assistant products entering our daily lives and chat bot systems becoming commonplace in customer service. In this paper, we propose Converse, a flexible tree-based modular task-oriented dialogue system. Converse uses an and-or tree structure to represent tasks and offers powerful multi-task dialogue management. At the same time, Converse aims to make the bot building process easy and simple, for both professional and non-professional software developers. The code is available at https://github.com/salesforce/Converse.
abstract_zh: 创建一个可以与人类进行有意义的对话以帮助完成任务的系统是人工智能 (AI) 的最终目标之一。它从一开始就定义了人工智能的含义。最近，这一领域取得了很多成就，语音助手产品进入了我们的日常生活，聊天机器人系统在客户服务中变得司空见惯。乍一看，对话系统似乎不乏选择。然而，当今频繁部署的对话系统似乎都面临着一个严重的弱点——它们难以构建且难以维护。斗争的核心是需要为机器人和人类用户之间的每一次交互编写脚本。随着任务变得更加复杂并且更多任务被添加到系统中，这使得对话系统更加难以维护。在本文中，我们提出了 Converse，一种灵活的基于树的模块化面向任务的对话系统。 Converse 使用“与”或“树”结构来表示任务，并提供强大的多任务对话管理。 Converse 支持任务依赖和任务切换，这是与其他开源对话框架相比的独特功能。同时，Converse 的目标是让专业和非专业软件开发人员的机器人构建过程变得轻松简单。该代码可从 https://github.com/salesforce/Converse 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Converse，一种基于树结构的模块化任务导向对话系统，旨在解决现有对话系统构建和维护困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对话系统需手动脚本化每个交互步骤，导致维护复杂且难以扩展，尤其在面对复杂任务时效率低下。
AI.method: 采用和或树结构表示任务，支持多任务对话管理、任务依赖与切换，通过模块化设计简化开发流程。
AI.result: 实现了灵活的树结构任务管理，支持任务切换与依赖关系，代码开源并验证了系统的易用性与扩展性。
AI.conclusion: Converse通过树结构与模块化设计有效解决了传统对话系统的维护难题，为专业及非专业开发者提供了更高效的解决方案。
